guestVisitList.name: 理查德·萨顿
guestVisitList.introduce: 理查德·萨顿（Richard Sutton），美国计算机科学家，强化学习领域主要奠基人，现任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授、北京大学图灵导师、前DeepMind研究科学家，2025年3月与安德鲁·巴托共同获2024年图灵奖。1978年获斯坦福大学心理学学士学位，1984年在安德鲁·巴托指导下获马萨诸塞大学安姆斯特分校计算机科学博士学位。2003年起担任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授，领导强化学习与人工智能实验室。其与巴托合著的《强化学习导论》是该领域奠基性教材，提出时序差分学习和策略梯度方法，开创现代强化学习体系。2023年加入John Carmack创立的Keen Technologies公司，致力于2030年实现通用人工智能（AGI）原型 。2025年在外滩大会发表主旨演讲，提出人工智能进入以持续学习为核心的“经验时代”，指出大型语言模型依赖人类数据具有局限性并批评其为“死路一条”，主张智能体通过自我博弈和环境交互生成新数据。2003年获国际神经网络学会总统奖，2013年获马萨诸塞大学杰出成就奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Richard Sutton is an American computer scientist and a founding figure in the field of reinforcement learning. He is currently a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, a Turing Mentor at Peking University, and a former research scientist at DeepMind. In March 2025, he and Andrew Barto were awarded the 2024 Turing Award.
He received his Bachelor’s degree in Psychology from Stanford University in 1978, and earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from the University of Massachusetts Amherst in 1984 under the supervision of Andrew Barto. Since 2003, he has served as a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, where he leads the Reinforcement Learning and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory. His co-authored book with Barto, Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction, is a foundational textbook in the field, introducing temporal difference learning and policy gradient methods that established the modern framework of reinforcement learning.
In 2023, he joined Keen Technologies, founded by John Carmack, with a mission to develop a prototype of artificial general intelligence (AGI) by 2030. In 2025, he delivered a keynote speech at the Bund Summit, proposing that artificial intelligence is entering an “era of experience” centered on continuous learning. He noted the limitations of large language models that rely on human data, criticizing that approach as a “dead end,” and argued that intelligent agents should generate new data through self-play and interaction with the environment.
He received the International Neural Network Society Presidential Award in 2003 and the University of Massachusetts Outstanding Achievement Award in 2013.

name: AI 开放计算与智能体技术生态论坛
nameEn: Open Compute for AI and AI Agent Ecosystem Forum
desc:
当前，全球人工智能产业中“算力需求增长与计算芯片生态碎片化”的结构性矛盾突出。AI训练与推理加速芯片互不兼容，大幅抬高AI模型跨芯片部署的适配成本与工程落地门槛。另一方面，AI智能体全面走进产业实操场景，高弹性、端云协同、多任务并行的新需求，倒逼底层智算底座走向通用化、开放化。
在此背景下，本论坛以“FlagOS筑基开放算力，Agent启幕智能涌现”为主线，集结中科院院士、国际开源基金会负责人、头部芯片和大模型企业高管、全球头部开源项目核心开发者等嘉宾，共探开放算力与智能体发展。依托80余家成员单位的FlagOS社区实践，破解算力碎片化难题，携手各方共建普惠、互通、开放的AI算力生态。
descEn:
The global AI industry faces a structural challenge: soaring demand for AI compute alongside fragmented accelerator ecosystems. The incompatibility of AI training and inference chips has increased the cost and complexity of deploying AI models across heterogeneous hardware platforms. Meanwhile, as AI Agents enter real-world applications, new requirements for elasticity, edge-cloud collaboration, and multi-task orchestration are driving AI infrastructure toward greater universality and openness.

Under the theme "FlagOS Anchors Open Compute, Agent Sparks Emergent Intelligence," the forum will bring together academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, open-source foundation leaders, large-model companies, and core developers to explore the future of open AI compute and intelligent agents. Backed by the FlagOS Community and its 80+ member organizations, the forum aims to overcome fragmented compute ecosystems and build an inclusive, interoperable, and open AI compute ecosystem.

name: IPI·东盟中国人工智能技术与产业合作生态论坛
nameEn: ASEAN–China AI Technology & Industry Collaboration Forum
desc:
在人工智能席卷全球的时代洪流中，一场无声却激烈的对决正在上演——“国际化幻象”与“跨境协同真实胜利”之间的正面交锋。企业面临的真正核心挑战，早已不再是技术是否存在，而是能否在真实世界中落地生根，在复杂多变的跨市场环境中成功突围、规模化应用。
本次由新加坡IPI携手MP集团精心打造的半日论坛，正是这场“认知战”的前线战场。论坛将直击东盟中国跨境人工智能合作的真实战况与落地路径，用一线实战经验揭穿空洞的国际化想象，并进一步探索如何将这些可复制、可扩展的成功模式引爆至整个东南亚。
descEn:
In the sweeping global tide of artificial intelligence, a silent yet intense confrontation is unfolding—an outright clash between the “illusion of internationalization” and the “real victories of cross-border collaboration.” The true core challenge facing enterprises is no longer whether the technology exists, but whether it can take root in the real world—successfully breaking through and scaling within complex and ever-changing cross-market environments.
This half-day forum, jointly curated by Singapore’s IPI and MP Group, represents the frontline of this “battle of cognition.” It will directly examine the realities and practical pathways of ASEAN–China cross-border AI collaboration, drawing on frontline, real-world experience to dispel hollow notions of internationalization. At the same time, it will explore how these replicable and scalable success models can be amplified across Southeast Asia.

name: WAICA研讨会·多模态智能体驱动的科学计算
nameEn: WAICA Workshop: Multi-Modal Agents for Science
desc: 本论坛聚焦AI for Science下一阶段：从辅助科研走向能思考会动手的AI科学家。近年来基础模型与智能体的发展，为构建科学发现系统提供了新的技术基础，但相关能力仍分散于感知、推理与执行等独立模块之中。本论坛探讨AI如何从科研辅助工具演进为具备感知、推理、实验能力的“科学家”。论坛将围绕多模态科学推理、干湿闭环、智能化实验等议题展开交流。论坛邀请厦大校长助理纪荣嵘教授、中科院脑科学与智能技术卓越创新中心副主任杜久林教授、上交大人工智能研究院常务副院长杨小康、港中文欧阳万里、中科大人数学院院长张燕咏、大连理工大学王智慧等知名学者作主题报告，共同探讨AI+科学发现的关键技术与未来图景。
descEn: This workshop focuses on the next stage of AI for Science: moving from AI as an assistant toward AI Scientists that can reason and act. Recent advances in foundation models and scientific agents have created new foundations for scientific discovery systems. Yet current capabilities remain fragmented across perception, reasoning, and embodied execution, without a unified framework connecting them into a complete scientific workflow. The workshop will explore how AI can evolve into an integrated discovery system capable of multimodal understanding, scientific reasoning, and experimental execution. Key topics include multimodal scientific reasoning, AI Scientists, and closed-loop discovery systems. Invited speakers include Prof. Rongrong Ji, Prof. Jiulin Du, Prof. Xiaokang Yang, Prof. Wanli Ouyang, Prof. Yanyong Zhang, and Prof. Zhihui Wang. Together, they will discuss frontier trends, key technologies, and future directions for AI-driven scientific discovery.

name: WAICA研讨会·具身智能空间交互
nameEn: Spacial Intelligence for Embodied AI
desc: “具身智能空间交互”论坛的举办，是希望通过学术界和工业界专家学者的交流，推动人工智能正从数字世界迈向物理空间的关键跨越。当前，人机交互长期受限于二维屏幕的桎梏，而人与人的交流本质上是三维、自然且充满空间感的。本论坛旨在突破这一瓶颈，聚焦于如何让机器人摆脱屏幕，通过多模态感知、空间计算和触觉反馈等前沿技术，实现与人类在三维空间中的自然交互。这不仅将解决具身智能落地中最欠缺的交互体验问题，更将催生新一代的空间计算芯片、柔性电子皮肤和沉浸式应用场景，从工业制造、医疗手术到日常陪伴，重塑人机关系，为社会带来深远变革。
descEn: The establishment of the workshop on Spatial Interaction for Embodied Intelligent hopes to make a pivotal leap for artificial intelligence from the digital world into physical space. Currently, human-machine interaction remains constrained by the limitations of two-dimensional screens, whereas human communication is inherently three-dimensional, natural, and spatially rich. This forum aims to break through this bottleneck by focusing on how robots can transcend screens and achieve natural interaction with humans in 3D space through cutting-edge technologies such as multimodal perception, spatial computing, and haptic feedback. This will not only address the most critical gap in embodied AI deployment—interactive experience—but also catalyze next-generation spatial computing chips, flexible electronic skins, and immersive applications.

name: WAICA研讨会·数学建模与科学计算中的人工智能
nameEn: WAICA Workshop: AI for Mathematical Modelling and Scientific Computing
desc:
本次研讨会将作为2026年世界人工智能大会（WAICA 2026）的一部分在中国上海举行。研讨会将汇聚来自人工智能、应用数学、科学计算和工程领域的研究人员，共同探讨基于数学基础的人工智能建模、仿真和发现方法。研讨会将重点关注偏微分方程及相关系统的人工智能方法，尤其关注物理信息神经网络、神经算子、降阶建模、代理模型、混合数据物理方法和数据驱动发现。
本次研讨会旨在探索现代人工智能方法如何推动数学建模、科学计算和基于数学基础的数据驱动发现的发展，并为来自人工智能、数学和工程领域的研究人员提供一个交流平台，共同探讨该领域的最新进展、数学挑战和未来机遇。
descEn:
This workshop will be held as part of WAICA 2026 in Shanghai, China. It brings together researchers from artificial intelligence, applied mathematics, scientific computing, and engineering to discuss mathematically grounded AI methods for modelling, simulation, and discovery. The workshop focuses on AI-enabled methods for partial differential equations and related systems, with particular interest in physics-informed neural networks, neural operators, reduced-order modelling, surrogate modelling, hybrid data-physics methods, and data-driven discovery.
The workshop aims to explore how modern AI methods can advance mathematical modelling, scientific computing, and mathematically grounded data-driven discovery, and to provide a forum for researchers from AI, mathematics, and engineering to exchange ideas on recent advances, mathematical challenges, and future opportunities in this area.

forumOrgStructureReqs.name: 同济大学

name: WAIC·Amplified Individual 在AI中看见具体的人(青春与锋芒)
nameEn: Amplified Individual: Seeing the Individual in AI (Youth and Fire)
desc:
上午场，我们想把 AI 从大词里捞出来，放回一个个具体的人身上。

看创作者如何重新理解创作，
看少年如何用 AI 建立自己的世界，
看创业者如何面对不确定，
看年轻学者如何在光环之下继续成长，
也看普通人如何从旁观者变成参与者。

你不用带着必须学到什么的压力来，就当听朋友讲讲他们的故事。
这不是一场预测未来的论坛，而是一次把未来拆开、拆到每个人身上的尝试。AI 不是远处的浪潮，它已经变成每个人生活里的水位。
descEn:
In the morning session, we pull AI out of big words and put it back onto real people. 

See how creators rethink creation, 
how the young build worlds with AI, 
how entrepreneurs face uncertainty, 
how scholars grow under the spotlight, 
and how ordinary people shift from onlookers to participants. 

Come without the pressure to learn—just listen to real people tell how AI has changed them and how they use it to change themselves. 
This is not a forum to predict the future; it's an attempt to break it open and hand it to everyone. AI is not a distant wave—it's already the water level in every life.

guestVisitList.introduce:
姜奕祺，清华大学计算机硕士，AIGC影视公司三生清影创始人&CEO,自媒体头部博主(清华姜学长)。中国AIGC技术应用落地探索者、先锋与超级创作者。
从事人工智能科学研究与应用落地工作十余年，曾任职阿里巴巴达摩院、华为2012实验核心技术团队负责人，主持研发多项视频生成大模型，发表iclr ，cvpr ，eccv等人工智能顶会论文。

name: WAIC·思想者论坛 李开复专场
nameEn: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum -Mr.Kai-Fu Lee
desc:
核心主题：AI 的第一性原理：回归本源・人才根基・全球共治
活动立意：
作为 WAIC 顶层核心高端思想 IP，全球集结图灵奖得主、中外院士、国际科技掌舵人、顶尖教育家与新生代产业领军者，跳出短期应用热点与流量喧嚣，锚定智能科学底层逻辑与本质内核。贯通数学本源 — 认知理论 — 数据智能 — 工程落地 — 人才培育 — 强化进化 — 全球治理全链路闭环，以跨学派、跨国界、跨代际的深度思辨，树立 WAIC 全球 AI 思想引领、战略定调的顶级标杆，为通用人工智能时代的技术演进、拔尖人才生态、全球协同治理，输出权威共识与长远方向。
descEn:
Core Theme: First Principles of AI: Return to Origin · Talent Foundation · Global Governance
Event Purpose:
As WAIC’s top-tier high-end thought leadership IP, we gather Turing Award laureates, Chinese and foreign academicians, international tech leaders, top educators, and new-generation industrial leaders globally. We move beyond short-term application trends and media hypee to anchor the underlying logic and essence of intelligent science. We connect the full closed-loop chain: mathematical origin – cognitive theory – data intelligence – engineering implementation – talent cultivation – reinforcement learning – global governance. Through cross-school, cross-border, and cross-generational in-depth speculation, we establish WAIC as a world-class benchmark for global AI thought leadership and strategic guidance, and deliver authoritative consensus and long-term direction for technological evolution, top talent ecosystems, and global collaborative governance in the era of AGI.

nameEn: AI into the Physical World: Models, Data, Devices, and Use cases
desc: 2026WAIC京东论坛以 “AI进入物理世界：模型、数据、终端与场景” 为主题，聚焦AI从数字世界走向物理世界的关键趋势。论坛将邀请学界专家、产业代表与京东相关技术负责人，围绕具身智能、智能终端与真实场景落地展开交流，探讨AI如何从理解与生成走向感知、决策与行动，共同探索物理世界智能化的新路径。
descEn: The 2026 WAIC JD Forum, with the theme "AI Entering the Physical World: Models, Data, Terminals and Scenarios", focuses on the key trends of AI moving from the digital world to the physical world. The forum will invite academic experts, industry representatives, and relevant technical leaders from JD to engage in discussions on embodied intelligence, intelligent terminals, and the implementation in real scenarios, exploring how AI progresses from understanding and generation to perception, decision-making, and action, and jointly exploring new paths for the intelligence of the physical world.

nameEn: Agentic Cloud: Infrastructure for the Agentic Era
desc: 阿里云将围绕“Agent时代的基础设施”举办主题论坛，将带来战略主旨演讲以及最新产品与技术的重磅发布，论坛还将围绕Agent Infra、Agentic Products、AI Native Cloud、Data Plane、Security等五大议题，展开技术拆解与生态对话，全面展现阿里云如何让智能体真正成为驱动千行百业转型升级的新质生产力引擎。同时，联动行业领军企业、智能体生态上下游伙伴，共同探讨前沿实践、分享深度应用成功案例。
descEn: The forum centers on "Infrastructure for the Agentic Era" with keynotes and major product launches. Deep-dive sessions and ecosystem dialogues cover five core themes — Agent Native Cloud (runtime, orchestration, governance, security, memory), AI Native Cloud (training and inference), Security, and more — showing how Alibaba Cloud's full-stack AI powers real industry transformation. Leading enterprises and ecosystem partners share frontline practices and real-world success stories.

name: 安永·AI规模化落地与增长新蓝图生态论坛
nameEn: Empowering Industries with Intelligence, Birthing New Value —— Large-scale AI Implementation and New Blueprint for Growth
desc:
安永「智赋产业，价值新生」论坛聚焦AI技术如何赋能全球商业生态。论坛将汇聚国际顶尖AI领袖、行业先锋及技术专家，深度探讨AI技术的最新趋势及其对商业模式的颠覆性影响
议程亮点：
战略洞察：全球AI领导者将解析AI技术前沿趋势，揭示其对商业决策、组织架构与市场格局的深远影响
行业实践：涵盖金融、生命科学、跨国企业等领域，分享AI驱动财务转型、生物医药研发创新及全球化业务优化等实战案例
场景赋能：通过机器人智能问答等现场演示，展现AI技术在客户服务与业务流程中的落地应用
生态共建：圆桌论坛聚焦“跨行业效率革命”，携手审计、MNC及出海领军企业，探讨AI如何打破行业壁垒，推动价值链协同升级
descEn: EY’s “Empowering Industries with Intelligence, Birthing New Value ” forum will convene global AI leaders, industry pioneers, and technical experts to explore how AI is fundamentally empower the business ecosystem. The forum will delve into the latest technological trends and their tangible, disruptive impact on established business models and value creation. This forum is designed to provide attendees with not only forward-looking strategic vision but also actionable insights for harnessing AI to drive sustainable growth and operational excellence in an evolving global landscape.

guestVisitList.name: 杰森·斯莱特
guestVisitList.introduce: 联合国工业发展组织（UNIDO）数字化转型与人工智能司司长、首席人工智能创新与数字官。统筹联合国工发组织人工智能、数字化转型、创新领域全部项目规划实施，聚焦全球数字经济普惠可持续发展，牵头推进《全球数字契约》目标二相关落地工作，致力于推动包容、普惠、可持续的全球数字化转型。入职工发组织后，历任信息技术、战略财务、业务转型、传播部门负责人，主导组织整体数字化升级方案落地；入职前深耕英国公共部门财务咨询，曾任大型跨国企业财务负责人，为特许管理会计师，持有工商管理硕士学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Chief, Division for Digital Transformation and Artificial Intelligence / Chief of AI, Innovation and Digital Officer, United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO)
He oversees all UNIDO projects and programmes on artificial intelligence, digital transformation and innovation with a strong focus on the global digital economy. He co-leads delivery work under Objective 2 of the Global Digital Compact, advancing inclusive and sustainable digital transition worldwide.
Previously as Digital and Innovation Officer of UNIDO, he steered the organization-wide digital transformation initiative and innovative solution development. He has headed UNIDO’s departments covering IT, strategic financial management, business transformation and communications. Prior to joining UNIDO, he led financial management consulting for the UK public sector and worked as finance lead at a large multinational corporation. He is a Chartered Management Accountant and holds an MBA.

name: 大数据国家工程研究中心·AI驱动东西部协同发展论坛
nameEn: The Guizhou Forum on AI-Driven East-West Collaborative Development
desc:
贵州·AI驱动东西部协同发展论坛作为2026世界人工智能大会的分论坛，由世界人工智能大会组委会办公室指导，贵州省大数据发展管理局组织，提升政府治理能力大数据应用技术国家工程研究中心联合贵州省人工智能实验室主办。
论坛聚焦贵州丰富的算力与场景资源比较优势，结合东部地区人工智能大模型前沿技术，推动构建东西部优势互补、深度耦合的人工智能产业新生态，探索东西部AI协同发展新范式，助力人工智能产业高质量发展。
descEn: As a sub-forum of the 2026 World AI Conference, the Guizhou Forum on AI-Driven Coordinated Development between Eastern and Western China is guided by the Organizing Committee Office of the World AI Conference, organized by Guizhou Provincial Big Data Administration Bureau, and co-hosted by the National Engineering Research Center for Big Data Application Technology to Improve Government Governance Capacity and Guizhou Provincial AI Laboratory. Centering on Guizhou’s comparative strengths in abundant computing power and scenario resources, it integrates cutting-edge large AI model technologies from eastern regions to forge a new mutually complementary and deeply integrated AI industrial ecosystem, pioneer a new model for cross-regional AI collaboration, and fuel high-quality growth of the AI industry.

name: 斗象科技·AI产业技术安全生态论坛
nameEn: Tophant AI Industry Technology Security Forum
desc: 本次论坛双向聚焦 Security for AI 与 AI for Security，深度剖析从大模型、算力基础设施到智能体的全链路安全防御与技术演进。 依托上海AI产业链与智能算力高地，结合斗象科技“安全平台+白帽子社区”的真实AI攻防触角与垂域资源知识生态，致力于构建高维度的全球AI安全技术对话域，为人工智能产业的稳健进化构筑坚实底座。
descEn:
This forum is dedicated to two key directions: Security for Al and Al for Security. It offers an in-depth analysis of end-to-end security defenses and technological evolution spanning larae models, computing infrastructure, and intelligent agents.
Leveraging Shanhai's AI lndustry chain and its leading position inintelligent computing power, the forum,together with Tophant's practical AI attack-defense capabilities derived from its "security platform+white-hat community"and the vertical domain knowledge & resource ecosystem,aims to bulid a high-dimensional global dialogue arena for AI security technology,thereby laying a solid foundation for the robust and healthy evolution of the AI industry.

guestVisitList.name: 郝建业
guestVisitList.introduce:
郝建业教授是国内外享有盛誉的人工智能学者，曾担任华为大模型算法实验室主任、华为决策推理实验室主任，以及天津大学智能与计算学部软件学院菁英教授、博士生导师。
2009年7月，郝建业进入香港中文大学攻读博士学位，师从梁浩锋教授，研究方向选择了博弈智能。毕业后，他又远赴国外留学，先后在麻省理工学院计算机科学与人工智能实验室、新加坡科技与设计大学担任博士后研究员。
在人工智能领域，郝建业教授在强化学习、大模型复杂推理、多智能体系统及具身智能等方向拥有极其深厚的学术造诣与丰富的产业落地经验。他先后在《Nature Communications》以及ICML、NeurIPS、ICLR等人工智能领域顶级国际会议和期刊发表学术论文100余篇，近两年在三大顶会的成果产出全球排名前10，谷歌学术引用超1.5万次，其研究成果多次在国际权威AI竞赛中摘得桂冠。作为入选全球前2%顶尖科学家榜单的学者，他还拥有深厚的产业背景，在华为任职期间，曾担任决策智能领域的首席专家，主导过从0到1孵化多个重量级产业项目。

name: 国地中心·人形机器人与具身智能创新发展论坛
nameEn: Humanoid Robotics and Embodied Intellicenge Development Forum
desc:
当前，人形机器人与具身智能正加速从实验室走向产业应用，成为全球科技竞争与产业升级的关键赛道。然而，技术与市场的深度融合仍面临核心挑战：真实场景数据获取门槛高、标注成本大、环境覆盖不全，导致模型泛化能力弱，难以支撑复杂任务的稳定执行。从“能演示”到“真有用”，高质量真实数据的采集与规模化应用已成为打通产业化“最后一公里”的关键突破口。
此背景下，“2026人形机器人与具身智能发展论坛”以“真实数据采集驱动场景落地”为主题，汇聚政产学研用各方力量，聚焦真实环境数据的获取、标注、治理与跨域共享，探讨如何以高质量真实数据驱动具身智能模型进化，加速人形机器人在制造、物流、服务等典型场景中的规模化部署。
descEn: The "2026 Humanoid Robot and Embodied Intelligence Development Forum," themed "Real-World Data Collection Driving Scenario Deployment," brings together government, industry, academia, and research sectors. The forum focuses on data acquisition, annotation, governance, and cross-domain sharing, exploring how real-world data drives embodied intelligence evolution and accelerates large-scale deployment in manufacturing, logistics, and services.

name: 华院计算· 认知智能论坛
nameEn: Cognition of the World , Innovation for Future
desc:
认知智能是人工智能发展的高级阶段，也是计算智能和感知智能的进阶形态。它使人工智能从单纯的信息处理工具升级为具备自主推理、规划与决策能力的智能系统。当前，认知智能正步入发展快车道，与大模型技术的深度融合正不断拓展其应用前景，持续突破认知智能的价值边界，为各行业智能化转型注入新动能。
本次论坛将围绕认知智能的最新理论、技术和应用场景展开深入交流，旨在搭建一个跨学科、多层次的交流平台，促进学术界和产业界的沟通与合作，推动认知智能领域的创新发展。
descEn: Cognitive intelligence represents the advanced stage of artificial intelligence development, evolving beyond computational and perceptual intelligence. This forumwill delve into the latest theories, technologies, and application scenarios of cognitive intelligence, aiming to establish a cross-disciplinary and multi-level communication platform to promote exchanges and cooperation between the academic and industrial sectors and drive the innovative development of the cognitive intelligence field.

name: 交通银行·数智金融 协同共创：AI+金融助力谱写高质量发展新篇章金融科技论坛
nameEn: Intelligent Finance, Collaborative Innovation: Powering a New Chapter of High-Quality Development through AI+Finance
desc:
当前，人工智能新浪潮不断涌现，正在引发金融服务人机协同、跨域融合的深刻变革。为进一步深入推进“人工智能＋”行动，做好“十五五”开篇谋划，交通银行将在 2026年世界人工智能大会举办“数智金融，协同共创，AI+金融助力谱写高质量发展新篇章”论坛。
本届论坛邀请来自政府机构、知名高校、金融同业、研究机构、科技公司等各界嘉宾，共同探讨数智协同新模式，金融服务新业态，产业发展新格局，推动金融业数智化转型与科创赋能，助力上海“五个中心”建设，携手阔步“十五五”开局新征程。
descEn: The surging AI wave is reshaping financial services through human-machine collaboration and cross-domain integration. To advance the "AI+" initiative and prepare for the 15th Five-Year Plan, Bank of Communications will host a forum at WAIC 2026. The forum gathers guests from government, universities, financial institutions, research bodies, and tech firms to explore new models of digital-intelligent synergy, new financial service formats, and new industrial patterns. It aims to drive the digital transformation and tech innovation of finance, support Shanghai's "five centers" development.

name: 开放处理器中心·RISC-V和物理智能论坛
nameEn: RISC-V and Physical AI Forum
desc:
在人工智能从“云端”向“物理世界”加速渗透的浪潮下，Physical AI（物理智能）正成为连接数字智能与实体应用的核心桥梁。RISC-V凭借其开放、灵活、可扩展的指令集架构，为应对空间计算与物理智能对高效、低功耗专用芯片的复杂需求，提供了前所未有的创新路径。
本届论坛聚焦“RISC-V × Physical AI”的技术交叉点，邀请一线专家与企业技术负责人，围绕底层架构优化、软硬协同设计、端侧部署挑战及商业化落地路径展开务实探讨。我们期望通过高密度的思想碰撞，促进技术成果的转化与国际研发资源的深度链接。
descEn:
As AI transitions from the cloud to the physical world, Physical AI has emerged as the critical bridge between digital intelligence and real-world application. RISC-V’s open, flexible, and scalable architecture provides a vital pathway to meet the complex demands of spatial computing and Physical AI through efficient, low-power custom silicon.
This forum explores the convergence of RISC-V and Physical AI. We have convened leading experts and industry pioneers for actionable discussions on architecture optimization, hardware-software co-design, edge deployment, and commercialization. Our objective is to catalyze high-impact dialogue that accelerates technology transfer and strengthens global R&D collaboration.

name: 联汇科技·端侧多模态基座赋能AI硬件论坛
nameEn: Om AI . End-side Multimodal Base Empowering AI Hardware Theme Forum
desc: 随着人工智能技术向物理世界延伸，端侧多模态模型作为连接数字智能与物理场景的核心载体，打破感知与执行的鸿沟，在人形机器人等领域迎来发展机遇。本次论坛聚焦端侧多模态模型的技术创新、产业协同与场景落地，汇聚学界专家和企业骨干，通过技术演讲等四大环节，探讨端侧模型研发等核心议题，辨析VLM模型与世界模型差异，挖掘端侧模型与AI硬件融合场景，搭建“产学研用”交流平台，推动端侧多模态技术走向产业实践，助力行业发展。论坛面向相关领域从业者等，打造一场兼具技术深度、思辨价值与产业导向的盛会，助力参会者把握技术端侧多模态领域的趋势与产业机遇，推动技术创新与资源整合，加速端侧智能落地。
descEn: As AI expands into the physical world, edge multimodal models bridge digital intelligence and real-world scenarios, closing gaps between sensing and actuation and unlocking huge growth for humanoid robots. Centered on technological breakthroughs, industrial collaboration and real-world deployment of such models, this forum gathers academic specialists and enterprise elites across four sessions. Participants discuss core R&D topics, distinguish VLMs from world models, explore integrations between edge models and AI hardware, and build an industry-university-research platform to advance commercial adoption and sector progress. Open to industry practitioners, the event serves as a premier gathering helping attendees capture tech trends and business chances, facilitate innovation and resource pooling, and speed up large-scale rollout of edge intelligence.

guestVisitList.name: 赵彬彬
guestVisitList.introduce: 赵彬彬，浙江大学计算机学院百人计划研究员、博士生导师，获美国佐治亚理工学院电子与计算机工程博士和硕士学位、浙江大学计算机科学与技术学士学位，入选优秀青年科学基金项目（海外），曾获国家优秀自费留学生奖学金。研究方向包括具身智能安全、人工智能安全、软件与系统安全等。近五年来，已累计在IEEE S&P、USENIX Security、NDSS、ASE、ISSTA、TDSC等CCF A类期刊/会议上发表论文20余篇。担任TIFS、CCS、USENIX Security、NDSS等CCF A类期刊/会议的评审人或程序委员会委员。

guestVisitList.name: 刘晨
guestVisitList.introduce: 杭州低空产业发展有限公司  董事长

guestVisitList.name: 梁俊卫
guestVisitList.introduce: 梁俊卫，香港科技大学（广州）人工智能学域助理教授/副研究员/博士生导师，卡内基梅隆大学计算机博士，百度奖学金（全球10名）、雅虎奖学金、世界人工智能大会云帆奖明日之星、《麻省理工科技评论》“AI100青年先锋”得主，获得CoRL2025 GenPriors最佳论文奖，研究工作曾多次被包括美国华盛顿邮报、纽约时报等媒体报道。研究内容包括计算机视觉与具身智能，近五年内于CoRL、ICRA、IROS、CVPR、TPAMI、NeurIPS等国际顶级期刊会议发表论文40余篇，谷歌学术引用量3000余次, h-index 28，常年组织举办CVPR Precognition Workshop，担任NeurIPS/CoRL Area Chair领域主席；主持国自然青年基金、多项广东省、广州市、腾讯RoboticsX、美团机器人研究院、华为、阿里等数百万元经费科研项目。

name: 联影智能·智能伙伴共建未来元医院论坛
nameEn: United Imaging Intelligence · Human–AI Partnership: Shaping the Digitelligent Hospital of Tomorrow
desc: 当前，人工智能正迈入规模化落地的关键期。医疗AI已从辅助工具进化为深度赋能医疗体系重构的“智能伙伴”。以此为驱动，“未来元医院”正在从前沿构想走向系统性的落地实践，成为行业聚力探索的核心方向。基于这一背景，联影智能将举办“智能伙伴共建未来元医院”主题论坛。论坛以“伙伴·共建·未来”为主线，设置多元环节，系统呈现AI医疗从单点能力深耕、场景落地验证，到顶层规划与生态协同的全链路成果。特别值得关注的是，论坛将重磅打造“元医院”发布、“超级医生”实景演示、未来思辨观点交锋、生态共建圆桌对话等特色环节，致力于推动行业共识与跨界融合。
descEn: Artificial Intelligence has entered a critical phase of large-scale application. Medical AI has evolved from an auxiliary tool into an "Human–AI Partnership" that deeply reshapes the healthcare ecosystem. Driven by this shift, the "Digitelligent Hospital" is transitioning from a futuristic concept into a systematic reality, becoming the core direction of industry exploration. Against this backdrop, United Imaging Intelligence will host the themed forum: "Human–AI Partnership: Shaping the Digitelligent Hospital of Tomorrow". The forum will present the full-chain achievements of AI healthcare. Key Highlights: The "Digitelligent Hospital" Launch and Live Demonstration, Future-Oriented Debates & Paradigm Shifts, Ecosystem Co-Creation Roundtable Dialogue.

guestVisitList.name: 周翔
guestVisitList.introduce:
周翔，上海联影智能医疗科技有限公司联合创始人、联席首席执行官。1993年获清华大学自动控制及经济管理双学士学位，后赴美国伊利诺伊大学香槟分校师从Thomas Huang教授获图像处理与机器视觉方向博士学位。曾任西门子研究院（美国普林斯顿）研发资深总监、首席核心专家，并担任西门子医疗计算机辅助诊断产品线全球负责人，主导开发基于模式识别的人机混合交互式智能医学成像系统，拥有60余项美国专利授权，曾获西门子集团“年度发明人”奖。
2018年回国后，周翔负责申报并获批总经费逾亿元的人机混合智能化医疗器械研发项目，发表医学人工智能领域论文百余篇，H指数达50。其团队开发了100余款医疗AI产品，涵盖影像分析、智能诊断辅助等领域，并于2024年推出uAI影智大模型基座。2022年荣获上海市“白玉兰纪念奖” ，2023年提出医疗AI应用三步战略，主导建设通才大模型实现诊疗流程自动化。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Xiang Zhou is co-founder and co-CEO of United Imaging Intelligence (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. He received dual bachelor’s degrees in Automatic Control and Economic Management from Tsinghua University in 1993, and later earned his Ph.D. in Image Processing and Machine Vision from the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, where he studied under Professor Thomas Huang.

He previously served as Senior Director and Principal Core Expert at Siemens Corporate Research (Princeton, USA), and as Global Head of the Computer-Aided Diagnosis product line at Siemens Healthcare. In these roles, he led the development of human-machine hybrid interactive intelligent medical imaging systems based on pattern recognition. He holds over 60 U.S. patents and received Siemens’ “Inventor of the Year” award.

After returning to China in 2018, Zhou led the application for and successful approval of a major human-machine hybrid intelligent medical device R&D project with total funding exceeding 100 million RMB. He has published over 100 papers in the field of medical artificial intelligence, with an H-index of 50. His team has developed more than 100 medical AI products, covering areas such as imaging analysis and intelligent diagnostic assistance. In 2024, the team launched the uAI Yingzhi Foundation Model. In 2022, he was awarded the Shanghai “Magnolia Memorial Award.” In 2023, he proposed a three-step strategy for medical AI applications and led the development of a generalist foundation model aimed at automating clinical workflows.

nameEn: Cross-Straits Forum on Artificial Intelligence Integrated Development and Innovation
desc: 本论坛以“智领新程 融创未来”为主题，聚焦人工智能产业应用和生态体系，汇聚两岸顶尖科学家、企业家、青年领军者共同推动技术突破、产业协同与生态共建，引领发展新程，共创两岸未来！
descEn: This forum focuses on AI industrial applications and ecosystem development, gathering renowned scientists, leading enterprise representatives, and young pioneers from both sides of the Taiwan Straits. It aims at promoting technological breakthroughs, Industrial Collaboration and eco-partnership, leading a new path of development, so as to jointly create a better future for both sides of the Taiwan Straits.

guestVisitList.name: 洪波
guestVisitList.introduce: 洪波，清华大学生物医学工程学院长聘教授，为先书院院长。主要研究方向为脑机接口与神经工程。研究团队设计开发了无线微创脑机接口NEO，2023年10月成功进行首例截瘫患者临床试验，2025年6月启动全球首个植入脑机接口多中心注册临床试验；团队在解析人脑语音语言处理机制和脑网络动态特性方面取得进展，成果发表于Nature Communications, Nature Neuroscience, PNAS等。

guestVisitList.name: 武剑
guestVisitList.introduce:
清华大学长聘教授、博士生导师、主任医师，清华大学医疗管理学院院长。
作为我国神经病学领域知名临床专家和医疗管理领域战略科学家，长期致力于脑血管病诊疗技术创新研究，积极推动医学与人工智能、信息技术的深度融合，并参与智慧医疗体系构建及现代医院管理改革工作。
作为我国神经血管介入领域的开拓者和引领者，率先在国内开展自膨式支架治疗弓上动脉狭窄技术，并发表首例自膨式颈动脉支架置入术治疗病例报告。在脑血管病领域创新性提出"血管内诊疗卒中单元"概念，通过整合血管造影、溶栓及支架置入等技术，建立了脑血管病一体化诊疗新范式。牵头构建脑卒中智慧防治网络体系，主持研发国内首个脑血管病专病AI大模型，开创性地将人工智能技术应用于脑血管病全流程管理，显著提升诊疗精准度与效率，相关成果获多项国家发明专利授权。

guestVisitList.name: 蔡荧煌
guestVisitList.introduce: 蔡荧煌，厦门长庚医院院长,2009年起担任台湾胸腔暨重症加护医学会理事长，同时担任台湾长庚医院院长，在医疗改革上做出诸多贡献，在我国台湾呼吸重症医界极具影响力。

guestVisitList.name: 李克强
guestVisitList.introduce:
李克强，清华大学车辆与运载学院教授，中国工程院院士，汽车智能驾驶系统专家。
长期致力于汽车智能驾驶系统动态设计与控制的理论研究和技术开发，针对汽车智能化技术演进及其产业化发展的重大需求，攻克了“控制协同、结构共用、车云融合”三大核心关键技术，先后主持研制“智能安全驾驶”、“智能集成驾驶”、“智能网联驾驶”三代系统装置，并实现产业化应用。为我国智能汽车系统核心技术突破和产业化做出重要贡献。
获国家技术发明二等奖2项、国家科技进步二等奖1项、中国汽车工业科学技术进步特等奖1项、首届全国创新争先奖等。获国内外发明专利70余项，发表高水平学术论文200余篇，出版学术专著3部。

guestVisitList.name: 罗仁权
guestVisitList.introduce: 台湾知名机器人与智能制造学者，IEEE/IET双院士，台湾研发管理经理人协会理事长、台大机器人研究中心主任。曾任IEEE工业电子学会主席，并担任欧盟产业发展指导委员会委员、美国北卡州立大学终身教授、智能机器人研究中心主任，台湾中正大学工学院院长、校长等职，现任台湾大学电机系特聘教授、智慧机器人及自动化国际研究中心主任，兼任台湾机器人学会荣誉理事长、友嘉实业集团技术长。主要研究智能型感测控制机器人系统、多样传感器融合、计算机视觉伺服控制、AI赋能机器人产业等方向，被誉为“台湾机器人之父”。

guestVisitList.name: 敖虎山
guestVisitList.introduce: 敖虎山，现任中国医学科学院阜外医院麻醉科主任医师、北京协和医学院博士生导师、中国循环杂志编委。同时任全国政协委员、北京市政协委员；九三学社中央医药卫生委员会、科普委员会副主任、委员；北京市健康科普专家；中国心胸血管麻醉学会法人秘书长；国际心血管麻醉医师学会理事。主要研究方向为血栓与出血、心脑缺血保护、麻醉学。

guestVisitList.name: 王骏发
guestVisitList.introduce:
台湾成功大学终身讲座教授，IEEE Fellow（电机电子领域最高荣誉之一，台湾成功大学首位获此称号者），IEEE Region 10（亚太区）执行委员会成员。曾担任台湾大仁科技大学校长，台湾成功大学工学院院长、电算中心主任、信息工程研究所所长，台湾科学工艺博物馆馆长，台南市信息软件协会理事长（多任期），IEEE台南分会主席等职务。
主要研究领域：语音辨识与语音处理，多媒体通讯IC设计，影像与讯号处理，人工智能与对话系统，VLSI（超大规模集成电路）/嵌入式系统。

name: 蚂蚁数科·向深处去：Enterprise AGI 价值落地与产业实证论坛
nameEn: Enterprise AGI: From Consensus to Commercial Value
desc:
当通用人工智能（AGI）的狂潮席卷而过，最激动人心的技术演示，终究要面对资产负债表上的无声拷问。真正的变革往往并不发生于喧哗的表面，而是潜行于产业的最深处。今天，企业决策者们正在追问一个本质命题：AI如何跨越“智能涌现”的惊艳，化作核心业务流程中确定的生产力？
基于此，蚂蚁数科联合《哈佛商业评论》中国，携手全球顶尖智慧与千行百业的数智先锋，不谈悬在云端的技术概念，只看扎根泥土的商业实证。这是一场探寻确定性的旅程：我们将以真实的数据、真实的路径、真实的案例，共同见证企业级AGI如何潜入金融、能源、医疗等产业的肌理，成为驱动增长、控制风险的核心力量。
descEn:
The most dazzling technology demonstrations still have to answer to the balance sheet. 
As the first wave of AGI enthusiasm begins to settle, a more essential question is taking shape in boardrooms across industries: how does artificial intelligence move beyond impressive capability — and into measurable, repeatable business value?
Real transformation rarely announces itself. It happens quietly, deep inside the workflows, systems, and decisions that keep industries running.
That is where this forum begins.
Jointly hosted by Ant Digital Technologies and Harvard Business Review China, the 2026 Enterprise AGI Forum brings together global thought leaders and industry pioneers — not to discuss what AI might do, but to examine what it has already done. Through real data, real deployments, and real outcomes, we will explore how enterprise AI adoption is moving from proof-of-concept to core infrastructure: driving growth, managing risk, and embedding intelligence where it matters most.

guestVisitList.name: 闫莺
guestVisitList.introduce:
闫莺博士，蚂蚁数字科技CTO，长期致力于区块链与隐私计算、人工智能等领域的技术研究与产业化实践。在区块链、隐私计算及数据库技术方向取得多项成果，拥有国内外授权专利300余项，在国际顶级会议与期刊发表论文60余篇，并主编《以太坊技术详解与实战》。

曾入选2019福布斯中国科技女性50人，现任中央网信办区块链试点专家组专家、IEEE跨链标准主席、中国计算机学会区块链专委及杰出会员。同时担任浙江大学区块链和数据安全国家重点实验室高级研究员、华东师范大学行业博士导师。此前，任微软亚洲研究院主管研究员及区块链业务负责人，在云计算、大数据分析等领域积累了丰富经验。

guestVisitList.name: 何刚
guestVisitList.introduce:
何刚，《哈佛商业评论》中文版主编、《财经》主编。先后于中国人民大学、中国社科院研究生院和英国克兰菲尔德管理学院新闻和工商管理专业毕业。
先后任职《财经时报》、《金融报》华东分社、评论部，历任编辑、助理总编、总编辑、社长助理和评论员等。参与创办《投资者报》，任执行总编。

guestVisitList.name: 赵闻飙
guestVisitList.introduce:
赵闻飙博士带领蚂蚁数字科技，专注区块链、人工智能、安全科技、物联网、隐私计算、云原生等核心技术突破，为千行百业数字化进程，提供领先的数字技术解决方案。

在加入蚂蚁数字科技前，赵闻飙作为蚂蚁集团大安全事业群总裁，构建了支付宝和蚂蚁集团领先全球的智能风控体系AlphaRisk和IMAGE, 同时带领团队围绕可信 AI、安全大模型等关键技术持续攻坚。

赵闻飙曾在美国运通公司担任副总裁，负责监管个人和小微企业的信用和欺诈风险，拥有丰富的风险管理、科技创新应用经验。

赵闻飙拥有上海交通大学和美国罗格斯大学的双博士学位，获得及申报技术专利一百三十余项，是上海交通大学博士生行业导师，曾荣获“William A.J. Golomski Awards”、“浙江省科技进步一等奖”、“吴文俊人工智能自然科学奖一等奖”、“CCF科学技术进步卓越奖”等多项有影响力的奖项 。

赵闻飙于2016年7月加入蚂蚁集团。

guestVisitList.name: 卢放
guestVisitList.introduce: 卢放，博士，正高级工程师，现任岚图汽车科技股份有限公司董事长、党委书记。曾任职一汽，先后负责大众、奥迪、奔腾、红旗、马自达等品牌车型的研发工作。卢放曾获中国汽车工业科技进步奖二等奖等荣誉，现任全国汽车标准化技术委员会第四届车身分技术委员会委员，拥有CAE智造系统发明专利，2019年入选武汉市产业领军人才-创新人才（黄鹤英才），在汽车工业技术领域成就突出。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Dr. LU Fang, Senior Engineer, serves as Chairman of the Board and Secretary of the Party Committee of VOYAH Automotive Technology Co., Ltd. He used to work for FAW group and was responsible for the research and development of Volkswagen, Audi, Pentium, Hongqi and Mazda models.Dr. LU Fang has won the second prize of the China Automotive Industry Science and Technology Progress Award and other honors, and is currently a member of the fourth Body Technology Committee of National Technical Committee of Auto Standardization (NTCAS), and holds a patent for the invention of CAE intelligent manufacturing system. He is outstanding in the field of automotive industry technology, and was selected as the Wuhan's Leading Industrial Talents - Innovative Talents (Yellow Crane Talent) in 2019.

guestVisitList.name: 龙永图
guestVisitList.introduce:
龙永图先生1965年毕业于贵州大学英文系，1973年至1974年在伦敦经济学院研究生院学习，获荣誉经济学博士学位。1978至1986年先后在中国驻联合国代表团、联合国开放计划署工作。1986年奉调回国，从1986年至2003年，先后任中国国际经济技术交流中心副主任、外经贸部国际司司长和外经贸部部长助理、副部长。1995年1月至2001年9月期间，他作为首席谈判代表，在第一线领导并最终成功结束了长达十五年的中国加入世贸组织的谈判。2003年1月至2010年7月，出任博鳌亚洲论坛秘书长，2010年7月2018年4月担任博鳌亚洲论坛国际咨询委员会委员。
曾多次受邀出席世界著名研究、学术机构和知名大学组织的研讨会，其中包括哈佛大学、华盛顿大学、荷兰全球论坛、日本淡岛论坛、太平洋经济论坛，英国皇家学会、美国亚洲协会、经济合作与发展组织以及亚洲开发银行等。
龙永图先生曾获“CCTV2003年度经济人物”称号；2004年10月，获联合国秘书长安南颁发的联合国特别奖，以表彰他对促进中国与联合国合作的杰出贡献。2005年8月8日，为表彰博鳌亚洲论坛秘书长龙永图在促进亚洲区域合作和促进中欧、中比经贸关系所做出的努力，比利时国王阿尔贝二世陛下授予龙永图秘书长莱奥波德国王勋章。2018年4月9日，被博鳌亚洲论坛新一届理事会授予荣誉会员称号。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Long Yongtu graduated from the English Department of Guizhou University in 1965. He studied at the Graduate School of the London School of Economics from 1973 to 1974 and received an Honorary Doctorate Degree in economics. From 1978 to 1986, he served as a diplomat in China’s mission to the United Nations and the United Nations Development Programme.

Mr. Long was instructed to return to China in 1986. Between 1986 to 2003, he was appointed deputy director of the China International Centre for Economic and Technical Exchange, Director-General of the International Department of the Ministry of Foreign Trade and Economic Cooperation, and Assistant Minister of the Ministry of Foreign Trade and Economic Cooperation. During the period from January 1995 to September 2001, being the Chief Negotiator leading in the front line, he successfully ended the fifteen-year negotiation of China's accession to the World Trade Organization.

He was the Secretary-General of the Boao Forum for Asia from January 2003 to July 2010, also a member of the Boao Forum for Asia International Advisory Board from July 2010 to April 2018.  He had been invited often to attend seminars organized by world-renowned research and academic institutions so as very famous universities, including Harvard University, University of Washington, World Forum, Awashima Forum, Pacific Economic Forum, Royal Society, Asia Society, Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development and Asian Development Bank.

He was awarded the "CCTV 2003 Economic Person of the Year".  He got the United Nations Special Award from United Nations Secretary-General Annan in October 2004, in recognition of his outstanding contribution to promoting cooperation between China and the United Nations.  On 8 August 2005, King Albert II of Belgium decreed the Insignia of Officer in the Order of Leopold to Long Yongtu, the Secretary-General of Boao Forum for Asia, in recognition of his efforts in facilitating regional cooperation in Asia and promoting Sino-European and Sino-Belgian economic and trade relations. On 9 April 2018, Long was awarded the title of Honorary Member from the new council of Boao Forum.

guestVisitList.name: 马文翰
guestVisitList.introduceEn: 马文翰先生，现任联影未来生命负责人、联影高级战略顾问，拥有全科医学临床背景及大健康产业战略视野，致力于整合尖端医疗技术与健康管理服务，推动医疗服务模式的创新与落地。作为联影未来生命负责人，全面负责联影未来生命的战略规划与运营管理工作，聚焦未来医疗生态布局，探索AI、大数据等技术在疾病预防、主动健康管理等领域的创新应用，推动医疗服务从「被动治疗」向「主动预防」转型，构建以人为本、数据驱动的未来健康新范式。

guestVisitList.name: Chee Mun Fong
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Chee Mun has made significant contributions to artificial intelligence (AI) and technology over a 25-year career, beginning as a founding member of Simulex Inc., where he worked on behavior prediction for the US Department of Defense and Fortune 500 companies. He then co-founded MoneyLion Inc., serving as CTO and applying AI to assist middle-class Americans, which was later listed on the NYSE. 
In MoneyLion, Chee Mun founded a technology and AI center in Kuala Lumpur, leading over 300 professionals and transforming Malaysia into an innovation hub, earning him recognition as one of the top 25 CTOs in fintech in 2019 and 2020. Currently, as the CEO of YTL AI Labs and Chief Product Officer of YTL-SEA Digital Bank Project, he aims to advance Malaysia's consumer and technology sectors through AI and fintech, showcasing Malaysia's potential in global technology leadership.

guestVisitList.name: 特伦斯·谢诺夫斯基
guestVisitList.introduce:
特伦斯·谢诺夫斯基（Terrence Sejnowski） 是全球公认的‌人工智能与计算神经科学先驱‌，被誉为“深度学习奠基人”之一。他于1947年8月13日出生于美国俄亥俄州克利夫兰，现任索尔克研究所弗朗西斯·克里克教授、计算神经生物学实验室主任，以及加利福尼亚大学圣迭戈分校神经生物学特聘教授。‌‌
核心学术贡献
	‌发明玻尔兹曼机‌：1983年，他与 Geoffrey Hinton 共同提出‌玻尔兹曼机（Boltzmann Machine）‌及其学习算法，这是多层神经网络的第一种有效学习算法，为现代深度学习奠定了理论基础
	‌独立分量分析（ICA）：开发了用于盲源分离的 ICA 方法，广泛应用于脑电图（EEG）和功能磁共振成像（fMRI）等神经数据分析 
	‌推动联结主义‌：作为“联结学派”领军人物，他证明了基于大脑生物学启发的神经网络可从数据中学习，挑战了当时主流的基于规则的人工智能方法
荣誉与身份
	‌四院院士‌：他是极少数同时当选‌美国国家科学院、国家工程院、国家医学院及美国艺术与科学学院‌院士的科学家
	‌重要奖项‌：2024年获颁‌大脑奖‌（Brain Prize），表彰其在计算和理论神经科学领域的开创性贡献；NeurIPS 基金会以其名字设立 ‌Sejnowski-Hinton 奖‌，以纪念其与 Hinton 的合作及对 AI 社区的推动
	‌学术职务‌：曾任 Howard Hughes 医学研究所研究员（1991-2017），并长期担任 NeurIPS 基金会主席
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Terrence Sejnowski is a globally recognized pioneer in artificial intelligence and computational neuroscience, widely regarded as one of the founding fathers of deep learning. Born on August 13, 1947, in Cleveland, Ohio, USA, he currently holds the Francis Crick Chair and serves as Professor and Head of the Computational Neurobiology Laboratory at the Salk Institute for Biological Studies, and is also a Distinguished Professor of Neurobiology at the University of California, San Diego.

Core Academic Contributions
Invention of the Boltzmann Machine: In 1983, together with Geoffrey Hinton, he proposed the Boltzmann Machine and its learning algorithm—the first effective learning algorithm for multi‑layer neural networks, which laid the theoretical foundation for modern deep learning.
Independent Component Analysis (ICA): He developed ICA methods for blind source separation, which have been widely applied in the analysis of neural data such as EEG and fMRI.
Advancing Connectionism: As a leading figure of the connectionist school, he demonstrated that neural networks inspired by brain biology could learn from data, challenging the then‑dominant rule‑based approach to artificial intelligence.

Honors and Affiliations
Member of All Four U.S. National Academies: He is one of the few scientists to be elected to the U.S. National Academy of Sciences, National Academy of Engineering, National Academy of Medicine, and the American Academy of Arts and Sciences.
Major Awards: In 2024, he received the Brain Prize for his pioneering contributions to computational and theoretical neuroscience. The NeurIPS Foundation established the Sejnowski‑Hinton Award in his name to honor his collaboration with Hinton and his impact on the AI community.
Academic Positions: He served as an Investigator at the Howard Hughes Medical Institute (1991–2017) and has long been the Chair of the NeurIPS Foundation.

guestVisitList.name: 余滨
guestVisitList.introduce:
余滨先生现任蚂蚁数科AI业务总裁，全面负责AI业务的战略规划与商业化落地，是推动蚂蚁数科全栈智能体产品走向产业的核心负责人。
余滨先生于2014年加入蚂蚁集团，曾出任支付宝数字行业事业部总经理，深耕企业服务与数字化解决方案。在加入蚂蚁之前，他于甲骨文中国担任咨询部总经理及首席架构师。横跨顶尖科技公司与领先互联网平台的丰富经历，使其在企业服务、技术架构与商业落地结合方面拥有超过20年的深厚积淀。
目前，余滨先生正带领团队，致力于将蚂蚁数科前沿的AI技术与行业Know-how相结合，打造“专于产业、易于落地、成于价值”的AI方案，携手行业客户共同跨越AI价值鸿沟，共同迈向“成果交付”的新未来。

guestVisitList.name: 杨锐
guestVisitList.introduce:
1986年毕业于上海外国语大学国际新闻专业，并获得英国威尔士大学新闻学硕士。他参与创办央视英语国际频道 CGTN，历任时事评论工作室总制片人，日播黄金时间金牌栏目《对话杨锐》主持人和制片人，央视播音员主持人专家委员会委员，正高播音指导。频道第一位获金话筒最佳主持人奖，共和国 60 年 60 人最佳主持人，两度荣获央视最佳主持人荣誉，被国际社会评为世界五大最客观公正的主持人之一，多年外研社与中国日报全国高校英语演讲比赛决赛评委，全国翻译家协会资深会员，杭州市B类人才。著有《精英对话》和《谁在误读中国》两本畅销书。七次担任博鳌亚洲论坛开幕式司仪，荣获长沙全国首届名博主金奖第一名。二十多年来，杨锐采访过众多国家政要，参与直播报道了许多国内外重大突发事件，曾担任法兰克福和伦敦国际书展主宾国中国的官方论坛主持人，主持过欧亚媒体论坛峰会，中澳媒体峰会，布鲁塞尔中欧政治对话，柏林中欧对话， FT 中文网年会， 财经年会， 三届中国人才交流大会论坛，并连续三年主持环球时报年会论坛。受聘清华大学，浙大，北师大和上外客座与兼聘教授。 

“锐哥账号”IP定位社会热点与国际时评，作为人文故事和国内时政圈内头部博主，三年时间在短视频平台迅速崛起，是讲中国故事有国际影响力的头部博主。目前在微博拥有126.3万粉丝，抖音132.8万粉丝，视频号45.4万粉丝,小红书13.9万粉丝，经常有100万+爆款，在国内外精英群体里的影响力远远大于一般意义上的社会知名度。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Yang Rui, Co-founded CCTV English Channel (CGTN); bachelor degree of British and American literature and international journalism from Shanghai International Studies University. Master degree of Journalism with University of Wales, UK; Guest and Adjunct Professor at Tsinghua University, Zhejiang University, Beijing Normal University, and Shanghai International Studies University. He is a founding member of CGTN (China Global Television Network) and served as the Chief Producer of the Current Affairs Commentary Studio. He was the host and producer of the prime-time, award-winning show Dialogue with Yang Rui for two decades, a tenure unmatched in CCTV's history for a single host on a flagship program. Additionally, he was a member of the Expert Committee for CCTV Anchors and held the title of Senior Broadcast Guide, the highest professional rank for News presentation. 

He was the first anchor at the channel to win the prestigious Golden Microphone Award, was named one of the "60 Best TV Hosts in the 60-year History of the People's Republic of China," and has twice been honored as CCTV's Best Anchor. Internationally, he was recognized by a South African media rating agency as one of the "World's Five Most Objective and Fair Television Hosts." A seasoned member of the China Translation Association and a B-Class Hangzhou Municipal Talent, he has also served as a national jury member for the English Speech Competition for University Students and the China Daily National English Speech Competition for many years. 

Yang Rui has authored two best-selling books: “Highlights of Dialogue ” and “Who is Misreading China?”. He has hosted the opening ceremony of the Boao Forum for Asia seven times and won the first-ever "Golden Blogger Award" at the Changsha National Blogger Awards. Throughout his more than two-decade career, he has interviewed numerous heads of state and government, provided live coverage for many major domestic and international breaking news events, and moderated high-level forums such as the Frankfurt and London International Book Fair, the Eurasian Media Forum, the China-Australia Media Summit, the China-EU Political Dialogue in Brussels and Berlin, and the annual forums of the Financial Times Chinese website and Caijing Magazine. He has also been appointed as a guest or part-time professor at Tsinghua University, Zhejiang University, Beijing Normal University, and his alma mater, the Shanghai International Studies University. 

The "Rui Talk" is an influential media brand positioning itself at the intersection of social hot topics and international commentary. As a leading human-interest storyteller and a top-tier commentator in China's political and social circles, it has risen to prominence on short video platforms within three years, becoming a highly influential Chinese voice on the global stage. Currently, the account boasts 1.263 million followers on Weibo, 1.328 million on Douyin (TikTok), 454,000 on WeChat Video Channel, and 139,000 on Xiaohongshu (RED Book), consistently producing viral hits with over a million views. Its influence among elite groups both domestically and internationally far exceeds its general social recognition.

guestVisitList.name: 毛基业
guestVisitList.introduce: 上海科技大学创业与管理学院院长、特聘教授；主要研究领域是传统企业的数字化转型与组织重构、数字化创新与创业、数字服务外包管理；他擅长使用案例方法构建管理理论，长期在国内管理学界推广案例研究方法。相关成果发表在国际和国内高水平学术期刊，包括《管理世界》 《南开管理评论》，Journal of Strategic Information Systems, Journal of Operations Management，Management and Organization Review，Journal of International Business Studies，Journal of Management Information Systems等；出版《迈向数智化：中国一汽组织与业务变革治理》和《数字服务外包模式》等著作。分别在中国人民大学、加拿大麦吉尔大学和不列颠哥伦比亚大学获学士、工商管理硕士学位（MBA）和博士学位；曾长期在中国人民大学商学院任教并担任院长、加拿大滑铁卢大学任教并获终身教职。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Mao, Jiye is a professor and Dean, School of Entrepreneurship and Management, Shanghaitech University, and former dean (2013-2021), School of Business, Renmin University of China. His areas of research focus on digital transformation and organizational changes, digital innovation and entrepreneurship, and IT outsourcing management. He has been using the case method in research and teaching for the past two decades, being the author of numerous award-winning teaching cases. His research has appeared in journals such as Journal of International Business Studies, Journal of Operations Management, Journal of Strategic Information Systems, Journal of Information Technology, and Journal of Management Information Systems. He used to be a faculty at Renmin University of China, and the Unversity of Waterloo. He holds a Ph.D in MIS from the University of British Columbia (1995), MBA from McGill University (1987), and B.Eng from Renmin University of China (1985).

guestVisitList.name: 胡德斌
guestVisitList.introduce: 胡德斌，男，1968年10月出生，毕业于吉林大学计算机软件与理论专业，工学博士，高级工程师。现任上海银行党委委员、副行长兼首席信息官。曾任中国工商银行软件开发中心总工程师助理、开发部经理、总经理助理，中国工商银行软件开发中心党委委员、副总经理，中国工商银行数据中心（上海）党委副书记、副总经理，上海银行首席信息官，城银清算服务有限责任公司董事等职务。

guestVisitList.name: 张胜男
guestVisitList.introduce: 张胜男是BrainCo的创始成员兼副总裁，该公司由哈佛创新实验室孵化，致力于开创脑机接口技术。她拥有哈佛大学教育学硕士学位，曾带领科学家和工程师团队开发以神经科学为基础的教育科技解决方案，充分释放学生的学习潜能。她还是一名认证团队教练，致力于支持组织发展与人才成长。作为连续创业者，张胜男创办了多家初创企业和教育类非政府组织，曾在28个国家与AIESEC、Atlas Corps等机构合作，为创新与领导力带来了真正全球化且富有实践性的视角。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Cicy Zhang is a founding member and Vice President of BrainCo, a Harvard iLab-incubated company pioneering brain-machine interface technology. A Harvard Ed.M. graduate, she has led teams of scientists and engineers to develop neuroscience-driven EdTech solutions that unlock student learning potential. She is also a certified team coach, supporting organizational and talent development. A serial entrepreneur and founder of multiple startups and educational NGOs, Cicy has worked across 28 countries with organizations like AIESEC and Atlas Corps—bringing a truly global, hands-on perspective to innovation and leadership.

guestVisitList.name: 朱虹
guestVisitList.introduce: 朱虹女士于2018年加入中金公司财富管理部，自加入后深度参与并落地了中金公司与中投证券并购整合、财富管理转型、全敏捷数字化转型和AI转型等一系列重大战略项目。加入中金公司前，朱虹女士曾任职于麦肯锡咨询大中华区及巴克莱全球市场部结构化产品团队。朱虹女士拥有宾夕法尼亚大学沃顿商学院工商管理硕士学位及北京大学光华管理学院金融学士学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Ms. Zhu joined the Wealth Management Department of China International Capital Corporation (CICC) in 2018. Since her onboarding, she has deeply participated in and delivered a series of core strategic initiatives, including the merger and integration of CICC and CISC, the wealth management transformation, company-wide agile digital transformation, and AI-driven wealth management transformation.

Prior to joining CICC, Ms. Zhu served at McKinsey & Company, as well as the Structured Products team within Barclays Global Markets. She holds an MBA from the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania and a Bachelor of Science in Finance from Guanghua School of Management, Peking University.

guestVisitList.name: 汤海涛
guestVisitList.introduce:
汤海涛，现任霸王茶姬首席技术官，全面负责公司数字化战略与信息技术体系建设，支持中国、亚太及北美市场业务发展，工作涵盖消费者数字产品、门店数字化、供应链与企业管理系统、数据治理、信息安全、人工智能及全球技术基础设施等领域。

加入霸王茶姬前，汤海涛曾任麦当劳中国数字化副总裁，先后负责全渠道零售技术及门店运营数字化相关产品研发，参与推动麦当劳中国从消费者点餐、会员与支付，到餐厅运营和研发基础设施的系统性数字化变革。

他长期专注于大型连锁消费企业数字化建设，擅长在高速增长与全球化场景下，将业务需求、技术架构、数据能力与组织机制相结合。当前，他重点关注生成式人工智能在零售运营、知识管理、员工协作及企业治理中的规模化应用，以及 AI 安全与治理体系建设，致力于推动技术与 AI 深度融合，持续提升企业运营效率与全球化发展能力。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Raymond Tang is the Chief Technology Officer (CTO) of CHAGEE, where he leads the company's digital strategy and technology organization, supporting business growth across China, Asia-Pacific, and North America. His responsibilities span consumer digital products, store digitalization, supply chain and enterprise systems, data governance, cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and global technology infrastructure.

Before joining CHAGEE, Raymond Tang served as VP of Digital at McDonald's China, where he was responsible for omnichannel retail technology and digital solutions for restaurant operations. He played a key role in advancing McDonald's China's end-to-end digital transformation, spanning consumer ordering, membership and payment systems, restaurant operations, and engineering infrastructure.

He has long focused on digital transformation for large-scale consumer businesses and is experienced in aligning business needs, technology architecture, data capabilities, and organizational development in high-growth and global environments. His current focus is on scaling generative AI across retail operations, knowledge management, employee collaboration, and enterprise governance, while advancing AI security and governance. He is committed to integrating technology and AI to enhance operational excellence and strengthen global business capabilities.

guestVisitList.name: 韩歆毅
guestVisitList.introduce:
韩歆毅先生2014年5月加入蚂蚁集团，历任资深总监、副总裁、首席财务官。2024年3月，韩歆毅先生出任蚂蚁集团总裁，2025年3月，出任蚂蚁集团首席执行官。
加入蚂蚁集团之前，韩歆毅先生于2011年9月加入阿里巴巴集团，担任阿里巴巴集团企业融资部资深总监。在此之前，韩歆毅先生2001年7月至2011年9月任职于中国国际金融有限公司投资银行部。韩歆毅先生分别于1999年7月及2001年6月获得清华大学经济学学士学位和经济学硕士学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mr. Han joined Ant Group in May 2014 and has held positions including Senior Director, Vice President, and Chief Financial Officer. In March 2024, Mr. Han was appointed President of Ant Group, and in March 2025, he became the Chief Executive Officer.

Prior to joining Ant Group, Mr. Han joined Alibaba in September 2011 as a Senior Director in the Corporate Finance Department. Before joining Alibaba, Mr. Han worked at the Investment Banking Division of China International Capital Corporation from July 2001 to September 2011. Mr. Han obtained his Bachelor's and Master's degrees in Economics from Tsinghua University in July 1999 and June 2001, respectively.

desc: 作为2026世界人工智能大会的核心分论坛之一，智在终端，惠及千行On-device AI for All——端侧AI创新和行业发展分论坛，锚定2026年端侧AI规模化落地元年的行业节点，由面壁智能牵头打造，是端侧AI2.0时代链接技术、产业与生态的行业盛会。2026年是端侧AI规模化落地的元年，全面进入端侧A12.0时代，面壁智能以端侧AI为基，普惠千行百业。
descEn:
As a sub-forum of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) 2026, the On-device AI for All: Innovation and Industry Development Forummarks the pivotal moment when on-device AI enters its era of scaled deployment. Led by ModelBest Inc., this event serves as a premier industry gathering connecting technology, industry, and ecosystem players in the On-device AI 2.0 era.
With 2026 heralded as the "First Year of Scaled On-device AI Deployment,"​ we are witnessing a full transition into the On-device AI 2.0 era. Grounded in cutting-edge edge intelligence, ModelBest is committed to democratizing AI across all industries, ensuring that intelligent terminals benefit every sector.

guestVisitList.introduce: 毕业于清华大学计算机系。曾历任TP-Link研发总监，360硬件合伙人，美团硬件委员会主席，Lexar（雷克沙）全球 CEO。拥有深厚的智能硬件与 AI 行业背景，兼具技术一号位与业务一号位能力，擅长从 0 到 1 打造全球化AI智能硬件产品。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Graduated from the Department of Computer Science at Tsinghua University. Previously served as R&D Director at TP-Link, Hardware Partner at 360, Chair of the Hardware Committee at Meituan, and Global CEO of Lexar. Has deep expertise in smart hardware and AI, with proven capability as both a technical leader and business leader. Skilled at building global AI smart hardware products from zero to one.

guestVisitList.name: 刘知远
guestVisitList.introduce:
提出大模型基础理论「Densing Law」
2019 年来受摩尔定律启发提出「Densing Law」，被 Anthropic CEO、OpenAI CEO 等 科学家和产业界广泛提及和接受

大模型方向国际顶尖科学家
清华计算机系长聘副教授，清华大学 NLP 实验室带头人，论文 200 余篇，被引 80,000 余次，H-index 113，申请 / 授权专利 50 余项
入选国家青年拔尖人才计划、《麻省理工科技评论》TR35 China 榜单，连续四年入选Elsevier高被引学者

持续培养和输送高水平人才
THUNLP 实验室是 中国最早全面投入高效大模型研究、技术布局最全面、全球范围领先的大模型高校实验室
累计培养 数十位大模型方向 优秀毕业生，进入面壁、DeepSeek、字节跳动等团队
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Proposed the fundamental large model theory — Densing Law
Inspired by Moore’s Law, the Densing Law was put forward starting in 2019, and has been widely referenced and recognized by scientists and industry leaders including the CEOs of Anthropic and OpenAI.

A world-leading scientist in large model research
Tenured Professor, Department of Computer Science, Tsinghua University
Director of Tsinghua University NLP Laboratory (THUNLP)
Author of over 200 research papers, with more than 80,000 citations and an H-index of 113
Inventor of over 50 filed or granted patents

Recipient of the National Young Top Talent Program
Named to MIT Technology Review TR35 China
Selected as an Elsevier Highly Cited Researcher for four consecutive years

Consistently cultivating and delivering high-level talent
The THUNLP Laboratory is one of China’s earliest university labs fully dedicated to efficient large model research, with the most comprehensive technology portfolio and a globally leading position among academic institutions.
He has nurtured dozens of outstanding graduates in large model research, many of whom have joined leading teams including ModelBest, DeepSeek, and ByteDance.

name: 摩尔线程·词元时代 万物智能论坛
nameEn: Token Era: Intelligence of Things
desc:
当Agentic AI将“词元（Token）”从技术术语推向核心驱动力，一个以词元为基本单位的智能时代正加速到来。万物智能已处于爆发前夜，而算力正成为决定这一进程深度的基石。
在此关键节点，摩尔线程将于WAIC 2026期间举办“词元时代，万物智能”主题分论坛，汇聚AI基础设施构建者、大模型领军人物、智能体开发者及产业生态伙伴，共同探讨从算力供给到智能生产的系统性变革。
论坛将直面一个核心命题：面对Token需求的指数级跃升，我们如何系统性地建设 “AI工厂”？摩尔线程将携手生态，从底层算力到上层智能体应用的全栈思考与落地实践中给出关键答案。
descEn:
As Agentic AI pushes "Token" from technical term to core driver, a new intelligent era—with token as basic unit—is accelerating. Intelligence in all things is on the brink of explosion, with computing power as its cornerstone.
At this key moment, Moore Threads will host a sub-forum, "Token Era: Intelligence of Things" at WAIC 2026. Bringing together AI infrastructure builders, LLM leaders, agent developers, and ecosystem partners, the forum will explore the shift from computing power supply to intelligent production.
The forum confronts one core question: Facing exponential token demand, how do we systematically build "AI factories"? Moore Threads, together with its ecosystem, will provide key answers through full-stack thinking and practice—from underlying compute to agent applications.

name: 普元·高质量数据集与AI编程实践创新论坛
nameEn: High-Quality Dataset and AI Programming Innovation Forum
desc:
大模型技术狂飙突进，然而企业如何真正从中获益？本次论坛告别“空中楼阁”式的纯技术布道，全程立足“客户价值视角”。	
一、 拒绝空谈：构建企业级 AI 全栈落地蓝图
	汇聚数据标准、算力基建、模型基座与场景应用，不秀技术肌肉，只谈工程实践。为您提供从底层硬件使能、高质量数据供给，到大模型训练推理与上层软件工程演进的端到端解决方案。
二、 直击痛点：让技术真正转化为生产力
会议聚焦企业最关心的 ROI（投资回报率）与落地难点。权威专家将拆解如何通过“AI 编程”与“自主智能体”重塑企业计算；探讨如何将闲置数据激活为“高质量数据集”以赋能数字员工。议题直指实际业务场景，为您解答如何利用 AI 技术切
descEn:
Large-model technologies are advancing at breakneck speed—but how can enterprises truly reap the benefits? This forum moves beyond “ivory‑tower” pure‑tech preaching and anchors every session in a customer‑value perspective.
I. No Empty Talk: Blueprint for Enterprise‑Grade Full‑Stack AI Implementation
II. Hitting Pain Points: Turning Technology into Tangible Productivity

name: 前沿AI与智能体安全论坛
nameEn: Frontier and Agentic AI Safety Forum
desc: 本论坛将汇聚20余位全球顶尖专家与决策者，国际嘉宾占比超过50%，涵盖图灵奖得主、中国两院院士、联合国AI高层顾问机构专家、国家级重点实验室主任、头部大模型企业安全与政策负责人，以及来自多国的AI政策制定者。论坛将围绕“前沿AI风险监测”、“智能体失控风险与应急管理”及“前沿AI风险管理与全球视角”3大核心主题，展开5场主题演讲和4场圆桌讨论。特别值得关注的是，论坛将发布5份重磅报告和成果，包括《前沿AI风险管理框架》2.0版、《前沿AI风险监测平台》2.0版、《通用型AI智能体L1-L5分级安全框架白皮书》、《前沿人工智能风险应急管理报告》及《中国人工智能安全全景报告（2026）》。
descEn: This Forum convenes 20+ leading global experts, including Turing Award laureates, UN AI advisory experts, frontier AI company safety leads, etc. It centers on 3 themes, featuring 5 keynotes and 4 roundtables. The Forum uniquely gathers voices across government, academia, and industry, and will release 5 publications on AI safety and governance, including Frontier AI Risk Management Framework v2.0,  Frontier AI Risk Monitoring Platform v2.0, White Paper on the L0–L5 Safety Framework for General-Purpose AI Agents, Research Report on Emergency Management of Frontier AI Risks, and State of AI Safety in China 2026.

forumOrgStructureReqs.name: 世界人工智能大会组委会
安远AI

guestVisitList.name: Rishub Jain
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Rishub Jain recently left Google DeepMind to launch a non-profit focused on keeping meaningful human oversight in place as AI systems grow more capable. At DeepMind, he worked for four years on AlphaFold, the Nobel Prize-winning protein-structure system, before moving into AI safety. His work focuses on scalable oversight and human-AI complementarity: building systems where people and AI check each other's work, catching errors, deception, and harmful behavior that neither would reliably catch alone. He co-led a DeepMind team on this problem and mentors a large cohort of researchers through the SPAR program — work that grew into the new non-profit, which pursues the same questions.

guestVisitList.name: 杜跃进
guestVisitList.introduce: 杜跃进，浙江大学网络空间安全学院教授，曾任国家网络安全应急中心副总工、研究所所长、贵州大数据安全工程研究中心主任，国务院特殊津贴获得者

guestVisitList.introduce: 联合国副秘书长兼秘书长技术特使
guestVisitList.introduceEn: UN Under-Secretary-General and Special Envoy for Technical Affairs of the Secretary-General

guestVisitList.name: 奥朗德拉·纳尔逊
guestVisitList.introduce: Alondra Nelson，美国社会科学研究委员会主席、普林斯顿高等研究院教授、联合国人工智能高层顾问机构专家、前美国白宫科学和技术政策办公室主任

guestVisitList.name: 约书亚·本吉奥
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Yoshua Bengio is Full Professor of Computer Science at Université de Montreal, Co-President and Scientific Director of LawZero, as well as the Founder and Scientific Advisor of Mila. He also holds a Canada CIFAR AI Chair. Considered one of the world’s leaders in Artificial Intelligence and Deep Learning, he is the recipient of the 2018 A.M. Turing Award, considered to be the “Nobel Prize of computing.” He is the most cited computer scientist worldwide, and the most-cited living scientist across all fields (by total citations).

Professor Bengio is a Fellow of both the Royal Society of London and Canada, an Officer of the Order of Canada, a Knight of the Legion of Honor of France, a member of the UN’s Scientific Advisory Board for Independent Advice on Breakthroughs in Science and Technology, and chairs the International AI Safety Report.

guestVisitList.name: Sam Daws
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Sam Daws is Senior Advisor to the Oxford Martin AI Governance Initiative, Oxford University, and Director of Multilateral AI. He has worked for 40 years in multilateral and science diplomacy. He served as First Officer to UN Secretary-General Kofi Annan in New York, and advised the British Prime Minister on the Sustainable Development Goals as Deputy Director (UN) in the Cabinet Office. He previously served as Senior Principal Research Analyst (Multilateral) in the FCO, Executive Director of UNA-UK, and UK Representative to the UN Foundation. He has written 14 books, and is a recognised expert in multilateral strategy and AI governance. His Oxford work focusses on: mechanisms to advance cooperation on AI risks between China and the West amidst geopolitical mistrust; advancing AI policy interoperability and scientific exchange through UN and other fora; AI diffusion and model cultural diversity across Central Asia, ASEAN, Africa and the Gulf.

name: 人工智能法治论坛
nameEn: AI Rule of Law Forum
desc: 2026年人工智能法治论坛以“智能体发展的法治回应”为主题，由上海市法学会和华东政法大学联合主办、中国－金砖国家人工智能合作与发展中心协办，汇聚哈佛、耶鲁、牛津、新国立、港大等全球高校顶尖学者和实务界专家，打造人工智能法治国际研讨矩阵，围绕国内外智能体治理实践与顶层政策开展深度法理推演，厘清权责界定、跨境管辖、执法协作等核心法律问题。论坛将发布《智能体服务健康发展的法治十原则》和多款涉外法治智能科技产品，敬请关注。
descEn: The 2026 AI Rule of Law Forum, themed “Legal Responses to the Development of Agentic AI”, is jointly hosted by the Shanghai Law Society and the East China University of Political Science and Law, with the support of the China–BRICS Artificial Intelligence Cooperation and Development Center. Bringing together leading scholars from top universities worldwide—including Harvard, Yale, Oxford, NUS, and HKU—as well as experts from legal practice, the Forum aims to conduct in-depth jurisprudential analysis of agentic AI governance practices and top-level policies both in China and abroad, clarifying core legal issues such as the delineation of rights and responsibilities, cross-border jurisdiction, and law enforcement cooperation. The Forum will release the Ten Legal Principles for the Healthy Development of Agentic AI Services along with a range of AI-enabled products designed to support international legal services and the rule of law. We warmly invite your attention and participation.

name: 人工智能赋能防震减灾高质量发展论坛
nameEn: Forum on High-Quality Development of Disaster Prevention and Mitigation Empowered by Artificial Intelligence
desc: 论坛以“人工智能赋能防震减灾高质量发展”为主题，围绕地震监测、预测、预警和震害防御等领域，集中发布近年人工智能在地震领域的成果，包括《防震减灾领域人工智能发展研究专项规划（2023-2035年）》、地震科学智能体、地震领域大模型、地震智能处理系统、地震数据集等方面的亮点成果，启动《防震减灾领域人工智能发展研究专项规划（2023-2035年）》2026-2028年三年行动方案，邀请院士专家做专题报告，研讨未来发展方向。
descEn: The forum, themed "AI Empowering High-Quality Development of Earthquake Prevention and Disaster Mitigation," focuses on areas such as seismic monitoring, prediction, early warning, and quake damage defense. It showcases recent AI achievements in the earthquake field, including highlights like the Special Research Plan for AI Development in Earthquake Prevention and Disaster Mitigation (2023–2035), an earthquake science agent, a large model for the earthquake domain, an intelligent seismic processing system, and earthquake datasets. The forum also launches the 2026–2028 three-year action plan under the same research plan, with academicians and experts invited to deliver keynote reports and discuss future development directions.

guestVisitList.name: 翟长海
guestVisitList.introduce:
翟长海，中国地震局工程力学研究所副所长；哈尔滨工业大学教授，国家杰出青年基金获得者、国家“万人计划”领军人才
在城市工程抗震韧性及智能防灾方面取得系统性研究成果，获国家科技进步一等奖1项、黑龙江省科技进步一等奖3项；主编我国首部城市工程抗震韧性标准，先后主持国家自然基金重点项目、重大项目课题、国家重点研发项目等20余项国家和省部级课题；发表学术论文300余篇。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Prof. Changhai Zhai is Deputy Director of the Institute of Engineering Mechanics, China Earthquake Administration, and a Professor at Harbin Institute of Technology. He is a recipient of the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars and a Leading Talent of the National “Ten Thousand Talents Program.” His research focuses on urban seismic resilience of engineering systems and intelligent disaster prevention. He has received one First Prize of the State Science and Technology Progress Award and three First Prizes of the Heilongjiang Provincial Science and Technology Progress Award. He served as chief editor of China’s first standard on seismic resilience of urban engineering systems. He has led more than 20 national and provincial/ministerial research projects, including key projects and sub-projects of major programs funded by the National Natural Science Foundation of China, as well as projects under the National Key R&D Program of China. He has published over 300 academic papers.

guestVisitList.name: 李泽峰
guestVisitList.introduce: 中国科学技术大学地球和空间科学学院特任教授、博士生导师，教育部青年长江学者。中科大本科毕业，美国佐治亚理工学院博士，加州理工学院博士后。主攻人工智能地震学与分布式光纤地震学，曾用机器学习揭示全球地震破裂统一规律，成果发表于《自然-地球科学》等顶刊。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Li Zefeng is a Tenured Associate Professor and Ph.D. Supervisor at the School of Earth and Space Sciences, University of Science and Technology of China (USTC), and a recipient of the Ministry of Education’s “Young Yangtze River Scholar” award. He graduated from USTC with a bachelor’s degree, earned his Ph.D. from the Georgia Institute of Technology in the United States, and conducted postdoctoral research at the California Institute of Technology. His primary research focuses on AI seismology and distributed acoustic sensing (DAS) seismology. He once applied machine learning to uncover universal patterns in global earthquake rupture processes, with findings published in top-tier journals such as Nature Geoscience.

guestVisitList.name: 安艳茹
guestVisitList.introduce: 中国地震台网中心测震台网部副主任，高级工程师，国际地震中心（ISC）执行委员会理事，中国地震学会理事。长期从事地震监测与人工智能业务应用工作，负责全国地震观测产品产出、国际资料交换工作。主持和参与10余项国家级工程及科研类项目，发表文章20余篇，获省部级及以上奖励9项。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: AN Yanru，Deputy Director of the Seismic Network Department at the China Earthquake Networks Center (CENC); Senior Engineer; the Executive Committee Member of the International Seismological Centre (ISC); and the Council Member of the Seismological Society of China. She has long been engaged in seismic monitoring and the operational application of artificial intelligence, and is responsible for the production of national seismic observation products and international data exchange. She has led and participated in more than 10 national-level engineering and scientific research projects, published more than 20 academic papers, and received 9 awards at or above the provincial and ministerial level.

guestVisitList.name: 张晓东
guestVisitList.introduce: 中国地震局地震预测研究所二级研究员，中国地震学会地震人工智能专业委员会主任,中国灾害防御协会常务理事、防灾减灾人工智能分会理事长，中国地震局科技委委员，中国科学院大学岗位教授。目前主要从事地球物理、人工智能地震预报的研究工作。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Zhang Xiaodong
Second-Class Research Professor, Institute of Earthquake Forecasting, China Earthquake Administration
Chairman, Special Committee on Seismic Artificial Intelligence, Seismological Society of China
Executive Director, China Association for Disaster Prevention; Chairman, Subcommittee on Artificial Intelligence for Disaster Prevention and Mitigation
Member, Science and Technology Committee of China Earthquake Administration
Adjunct Professor, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
His research focuses on geophysics and artificial intelligence-based earthquake prediction.
He has presided over 6 national-level research projects and 7 provincial/ministerial-level research projects. He is the recipient of 1 First Prize, 4 Second Prizes and 4 Third Prizes of the Excellent Scientific and Technological Achievements Award issued by China Earthquake Administration, and has published more than 100 academic papers.

guestVisitList.name: 陈晓非
guestVisitList.introduce: 南方科技大学讲席教授，中国科学院院士。1982年毕业于中国科学技术大学地球和空间科学系地球物理学专业，获学士学位；1985年在中国地震局地球物理研究所获硕士学位；1991年在美国南加州大学地球科学系获理学博士学位。1996年回国工作，曾先后任教于北京大学和中国科学技术大学, 2016年9月加盟南方科技大学。一直从事地球物理学的教学与科研工作，发表论文150余篇，已培养60余名博士和硕士，曾主持国家自然科学基金会杰青项目、优秀创新群体项目、重点项目、国际（地区）合作项目、重大项目课题以及科技部973项目课题等科研项目20余项。主要研究方向为理论与计算地球物理学、地球动力学及其在防震减灾和资源勘探领域的应用。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Chair Professor, Member of the Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS).
He received his B.S. in Geophysics from the Department of Earth and Space Sciences, University of Science and Technology of China (USTC) in 1982, his M.S. from the Institute of Geophysics, China Earthquake Administration in 1985, and his Ph.D. in Earth Sciences from the University of Southern California, USA, in 1991. After returning to China in 1996, he held academic positions at Peking University and USTC before joining SUSTech in September 2016.
He has long been engaged in teaching and research in geophysics, with over 150 peer-reviewed publications. He has supervised more than 60 doctoral and master's students. His research portfolio includes over 20 major grants, such as the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars, Key Projects, Innovative Research Groups, International Collaboration Projects, Major Program Sub-projects from the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC), and Key Projects under the National Basic Research Program of China (973 Program). His primary research interests lie in theoretical and computational geophysics and geodynamics, with applications to earthquake hazard mitigation and natural resource exploration.

guestVisitList.name: 陆新征
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Bio:
Prof. Xinzheng Lu got his BS and Ph.D. degrees from Tsinghua University of China. Now he is a full professor and the Head of the Institute of Disaster Prevention and Mitigation of the Department of Civil Engineering at Tsinghua University. He also serves as Editor of Earthquake Engineering & Structural Dynamics, among other academic appointments.

Prof. Lu’s major research interests cover intelligent design of civil engineering, and disaster prevention and mitigation. He has published more than 200 international journal papers and eight books, and his publications have received over 20,000 citations. He has been listed as one of the “most cited Chinese researchers from 2014-2025” by Elsevier. His research outcomes have been adopted by Chinese and international design codes, major disaster simulation systems, and structural calculation software, and have been applied to many landmark projects. He delivered multiple keynote presentations at significant international conferences, including the 18th World Conference on Earthquake Engineering. He has received several important awards, including the Second Class National Natural Science Award, the First-Class Science and Technology Progress Award of Beijing (first contributor), the First-Class Natural Science Award of Ministry of Education of China (first contributor), the Distinguished Professor of the Chang Jiang Scholars Program, the XPLORER PRIZE of the Tencent Foundation, Gold Award with congratulations of the jury of International Exhibition of Inventions of Geneva, and the J. M. Ko Award.

guestVisitList.name: 蒋策
guestVisitList.introduce: 广东省地震局工程师。主攻人工智能地震监测预警关键算法，作为骨干参与研发实时智能地震处理系统AIRES。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jiang Ce is an Engineer at the Guangdong Earthquake Agency. His main research centers on key algorithms for AI-based earthquake monitoring and early warning. As a core team member, he contributed to the development of AIRES, a real-time intelligent seismic processing system.

guestVisitList.name: 房立华
guestVisitList.introduce: 中国地震局地震预测研究所副所长、研究员，国务院特殊津贴获得者，中国地震局领军人才，中国知网TOP1%高被引学者，国家重大科技基础设施—中国地震科学实验场副首席科学家。长期从事人工智能地震学研究。主持和参与10多项国家级科研项目，发表学术论文150余篇，论文被引用7400多次。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Fang Lihua, Deputy Director of the Institute of Earthquake Forecasting, China Earthquake Administration; recipient of the Special Government Allowance of the State Council; Leading Talent of the China Earthquake Administration; CNKI Top 1% Highly Cited Scholar; Deputy Chief Scientist of the China Seismic Experimental Site, a national major scientific and technological infrastructure.
He has long been dedicated to research on artificial intelligence seismology. He has led and participated in more than 10 national-level scientific research projects, published over 150 academic papers, with total citations of his works exceeding 7,400.

guestVisitList.name: 陈石
guestVisitList.introduce: 陈石，中国地震局地球物理研究所副所长，二级研究员，地震动力学与强震预测全国重点实验室副主任；防震减灾AI+应用关键技术与智能装备北京市重点实验室主任。中国地震局领军人才，创新团队负责人。主持国家级科研项目10余项，成果获中国地震局防震减灾科学成果一等奖1项。个人获得傅承义青年科技奖等荣誉称号。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Prof. Shi Chen, Deputy Director of the Institute of Geophysics, China Earthquake Administration, Level 2 Researcher, Deputy Director of the State Key Laboratory of Earthquake Dynamics and Forecasting, Director of the Beijing Key Laboratory of AI+ Technology and Equipment for Earthquake Disaster Prevention and Mitigation. He is a leading talent of the China Earthquake Administration and head of the innovation team. He has presided over more than 10 national-level scientific research projects, and his achievements have won 1 first prize of the Earthquake Prevention and Disaster Reduction Science Achievement Award of the China Earthquake Administration. He has also been awarded honors including the Fu Chengyi Young Scientist Award.

name: 人工智能赋能物流网高质量发展论坛
nameEn: AI Empowering High-Quality Development of the Logistics Network
desc:
“十五五”规划首次将物流网纳入国家“六张网”战略布局，列为现代化基础设施体系建设重点。围绕加快构建供需适配、内外联通、安全高效、智慧绿色的国家物流网，物流基础设施正从“孤岛式运作”加速迈向“系统化组网”。多式联运作为串联公铁水空、实现物流网高效协同的核心纽带，亟需借助人工智能实现全链路效率跃升与协同变革。本论坛聚焦AI赋能多式联运与物流网数智底座建设，展示人工智能在智能调度、运筹优化、绿色低碳、跨主体协同等领域的前沿成果与落地路径。
论坛将汇聚政府机构、国际组织、央企龙头及科技创新主体，围绕大模型、AI Agent、数据要素等方向展开交流，推动物流网由点及线、由线成面、由面到链的系统性升级。
descEn: China's 15th Five-Year Plan places the Logistics Network among the nation's "Six Strategic Networks", calling for a system that is demand-aligned, connected, safe, efficient, smart and green. Infrastructure is shifting from "isolated operation" to "systematic networking", and multimodal transport — the critical link across road, rail, water and air — urgently needs AI to deliver end-to-end efficiency and collaborative transformation. The forum focuses on AI-empowered multimodal transport and the digital-intelligent foundation of the logistics network, showcasing frontier results and deployment paths in intelligent scheduling, operations optimization, green logistics and cross-stakeholder collaboration. Convening government bodies, international organizations, leading central enterprises and tech innovators, it will spotlight large models, AI agents and data elements, advancing the systematic upgrade of the network from points to lines, lines to networks, and networks to chains.

guestVisitList.name: 周志华
guestVisitList.introduce:
周志华，男，汉族，1973年11月出生，江苏盐城人，无党派人士，研究生学历，博士学位，教授，计算机科学家，人工智能专家。现任第十四届全国政协委员，中国科学院院士，南京大学副校长，计算机软件新技术国家重点实验室常务副主任、机器学习与数据挖掘研究所所长。 
周志华于1992年考入南京大学计算机科学与技术系，先后获得学士、硕士、博士学位；2001年留校任教；2002年被破格聘任为副教授；2003年获得国家杰出青年科学基金资助，同年被聘为教授；2004年被聘为博士生导师；2009年入选新世纪百千万人才工程国家级人选；2017年当选欧洲科学院院士；2018年担任南京大学计算机系主任兼人工智能学院院长；2020年出版著作《机器学习理论导引》；2021年入选中国科学院院士增选初步候选人名单。2023年当选为国际人工智能联合会理事会主席。2024年担任南京大学副校长。2025年，当选中国科学院院士。
周志华长期从事人工智能核心的机器学习理论与方法研究，做出了原创性、引领性成果。他曾获国家自然科学二等奖两项、国家级教学成果一等奖一项、首届全国教材建设奖全国优秀教材（高等教育类）一等奖、省部级科技一等奖四项、IEEE计算机学会技术成就奖、中国计算机学会王选奖等。他还是教育部“长江学者奖励计划”特聘教授、国家杰出青年科学基金获得者。教育部高等学校计算机类专业教学指导委员会副主任、国务院学位委员会计算机类学科评议组成员、国际人工智能联合会理事会主席。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Zhihua Zhou, male, Han ethnicity, born in November 1973 in Yancheng, Jiangsu Province, is a non-Party public figure. He holds a graduate degree and a Ph.D., and serves as a professor, computer scientist, and artificial intelligence expert. He is currently a member of the 14th National Committee of the Chinese People’s Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC), an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, Vice President of Nanjing University, Executive Deputy Director of the State Key Laboratory for Novel Software Technology, and Director of the Institute of Machine Learning and Data Mining.
Zhou enrolled in the Department of Computer Science and Technology at Nanjing University in 1992, where he successively obtained his bachelor’s, master’s, and doctoral degrees. In 2001, he joined the faculty. In 2002, he was exceptionally appointed as an associate professor. In 2003, he received support from the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars and was appointed as a professor. In 2004, he became a doctoral supervisor. In 2009, he was selected for the New Century Talents Project by the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security. In 2017, he was elected a foreign member of the Academia Europaea. In 2018, he became Chair of the Department of Computer Science and Dean of the School of Artificial Intelligence at Nanjing University. In 2020, he published the book Introduction to Machine Learning Theory. In 2021, he was shortlisted as a candidate for the Chinese Academy of Sciences. In 2023, he was elected President of the International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) Board of Trustees. In 2024, he was appointed Vice President of Nanjing University. In 2025, he was elected an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences.
Zhou has long dedicated himself to research on machine learning theory and methods—a core area of artificial intelligence—producing original and pioneering contributions. His honors include two National Natural Science Awards (Second Class), one National Teaching Achievement Award (First Class), one First-Class Award for National Excellent Textbooks (Higher Education) from the first National Textbook Award, four provincial or ministerial-level Science and Technology Awards (First Class), the IEEE Computer Society Technical Achievement Award, and the Wang Xuan Award from the China Computer Federation. He is also a Distinguished Professor under the Chang Jiang Scholars Program, recipient of the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars, Vice Chair of the Computer Science Teaching Steering Committee under the Ministry of Education, a member of the Computer Science Discipline Appraisal Group of the Academic Degrees Committee of the State Council, and President of the IJCAI Board of Trustees.

guestVisitList.name: 张雄
guestVisitList.introduce: 中国数联物流信息有限公司数据智能部副总经理。硕士研究生学历。深耕区块链、大数据和人工智能多年，担任国家区块链创新发展专家工作组专家、国家数据局可信数据空间发展联盟理事会专家、国务院国资委AI+揭榜挂帅课题评审专家。曾获国家级奖项1项，部委级奖项2项，行业奖项6项，牵头立项2项国际标准（ITU和IEEE），1项国家标准，专利近30项，研发可信边缘硬件产品1款。现主持国家级平台项目，入选上海市重大工程项目清单。

guestVisitList.name: 邱士奎
guestVisitList.introduce: 华为物流与仓储智慧化军团副总裁

guestVisitList.name: 陈秋平
guestVisitList.introduce: 陈秋萍（Eva Chan），贸易数字化独立顾问，联合国UN/CEFACT认可专家，主导修订《单一窗口互操作性》建议书。自1993年深耕单一窗口与海关实施领域，曾任Dagang Net国际业务负责人及马来西亚数字自贸区平台负责人，参与多国单一窗口可行性研究，推动跨境贸易数字化合作。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Eva Chan Chaw Peng is an independent consultant specializing in trade digitalization implementation, currently engaged in the Mongolia Foreign Trade Single Electronic Window (FTSEW) project.

As a recognized UN/CEFACT expert, Eva has contributed to the development of Recommendation No. 36 on Single Window Interoperability and the revision of Recommendation No. 33. She currently leads the UN/CEFACT project to revise Recommendation No. 36, ensuring its relevance to evolving digital trade initiatives including eCITES, ePhyto, and the Cross-Border Paperless Trade Agreement in Asia and the Pacific. She also led the White Paper on Gaps in Aligning Digitization with Transit Procedures.

With extensive Single Window and Customs implementation experience since 1993, Eva previously served as Head of International Business at Dagang Net Technologies in Malaysia, managing cross-border data exchange and port connectivity initiatives. In 2017, she was appointed Head of the Digital Free Trade Zone (DFTZ) Platform by MDEC, leading its implementation with Alibaba integration.

Eva has contributed to Single Window feasibility studies in Nigeria, Nepal, and Hong Kong SAR, and has collaborated with UN/CEFACT, UNESCAP, APMEN, IPCSA, and the ASEAN Single Window to advance trade digitalization.

name: 人工智能引领产业变革思客会
nameEn: Xinhuanet Thinker Conference：AI-Driven Industrial Transformation
desc: 随着“人工智能+”战略持续走深走实，人工智能正加速重塑千行百业。另一方面，随着人工智能大模型的加速演进与广泛应用，高水平推进人工智能安全治理的紧迫性也日益凸显。“人工智能引领产业变革思客会”将聚焦于人工智能赋能新型工业化、未来产业发展及人工智能治理的创新举措与典型案例，邀请政府机构、行业翘楚、专家学者莅临现场，凝聚各方智慧，共绘智能时代产业高质量发展新图景。
descEn: AI-Driven Industrial Transformation——Xinhuanet Thinker Conference will focus on innovative measures and typical cases of AI empowering new industrialization, future industry development, and AI governance. It will invite government agencies, industry leaders, and experts to the scene to pool wisdom from all sides and jointly draw a new picture of high-quality industrial development in the intelligent era.
