name: 上财·智能经济发展生态论坛
nameEn: Intelligent Economy Development Forum
desc:
本次论坛以“智能经济生态发展”为主题，以国际化、专业化、年轻化为核心标签，打造WAIC 2026最具思想纵深的学术峰会。
——国际化，是全球范式的对话场。 
——专业化，是经济链×组织链×制度链的穿透式解剖。 
——年轻化，是代际智慧的共创机制。
论坛旨在通过三小时高密度、高纯度、高互动性的思想碰撞，为全球政府、产业界与学术界前瞻布局智能原生基础设施、引领未来产业发展，提供具有前瞻性的政策洞见、可落地的商业策略与扎实的理论支撑。论坛尾声，六位主旨嘉宾将共同启动「WAIC智能经济生态图谱」，以可视化的认知基础设施，标记智能经济生态发展的第一块里程碑，并开启持续生长的全球共建。
descEn:
Under the theme of “Developing an Intelligent Economy Ecosystem,” the forum aims to become WAIC 2026’s most intellectually compelling academic summit, defined by international vision, professional depth, and youthful energy.
Internationalization makes it a platform for global paradigm dialogue. Professionalism enables deep analysis across the economic, organizational, and institutional chains. Youthfulness builds a mechanism for intergenerational co-creation.
Through three intensive, focused, and highly interactive hours, the forum will provide governments, industries, and academia worldwide with forward-looking policy insights, actionable business strategies, and solid theoretical support for planning intelligent-native infrastructure and leading future industries. At the finale, six keynote speakers will jointly launch the WAIC Intelligent Economy Ecosystem Map, marking the first milestone in the ecosystem’s development and opening a continuously evolving global co-building journey.

name: 上港集团·AI赋能智慧港口全球航运生态体系论坛
nameEn: SIPG AI-Empowered Smart Ports Forum on the Global Shipping Ecosystem
desc:
上港集团诚挚邀请行业各界专家学者、领军企业代表齐聚一堂，共同研讨港口智能体如何赋能全球航运生态重构。我们期待与各方深度交流、凝聚共识、共谋发展，携手共建开放协同的全球航运新生态，为高质量推进世界一流智慧港口建设注入更强创新动能。
港口智能体深度融合了人工智能、大数据、物联网与数字孪生等前沿技术，是推动港口由单点智能迈向全域系统智联、从单纯追求效率提升，转向效率、韧性与绿色低碳协同发展的关键支撑。其技术攻关与场景落地，已成为当前智慧港口建设的核心方向与重要课题。
descEn:
SIPG sincerely invites experts, scholars, and leading enterprise representatives from across the industry to come together and jointly build an open and collaborative global shipping ecosystem.
Port AI Agents deeply integrate cutting-edge technologies such as artificial intelligence, big data, the Internet of Things, and digital twins. They serve as a key enabler for ports to evolve from isolated, point-based intelligence toward system-wide intelligent connectivity and even ecosystem-level collaboration.

guestVisitList.name: 黄桁
guestVisitList.introduce:
黄桁先生是拥有超过20年行业经验的港航信息化领域资深专家 。教授级高工，享受国务院特殊津贴，为交通部、上海市多个委办专家和委员，深耕港航数字化领域29年，曾主导国家科技部、上海市的多个专项科研项目课题。 并多次获得上海市、行业学会和协会科技进步特等、一等奖。
近年来，其作为项目负责人，积极协调开展科技部  科技创新2030-“新一代人工智能”重大项目；作为课题负责人，参与负责国家重点研发计划-“基于全域融合架构的超大型自动化集装箱码头智能操作系统”的项目开展工作。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mr. Huang Heng is a senior expert in port and shipping informatization, with over 20 years of industry experience. He holds the title of Professorate Senior Engineer and is a recipient of the State Council Special Allowance. He serves as an expert and committee member for multiple authorities under the Ministry of Transport and the Shanghai Municipal Government. With 29 years of deep engagement in port and shipping digitalization, he has led numerous key research projects under China’s Ministry of Science and Technology and the Shanghai Municipal Government, and has received multiple top-tier and first-class awards for scientific and technological progress from Shanghai as well as industry societies and associations.
In recent years, as project leader, he has actively coordinated and advanced the Ministry of Science and Technology’s “Science and Technology Innovation 2030 – New Generation Artificial Intelligence” major project. As a principal investigator, he has also been responsible for advancing the National Key R&D Program project titled “Intelligent Operating System for Ultra-Large Automated Container Terminals Based on a Fully Integrated Architecture.”

name: 上海师范大学·国际人工智能教育论坛
nameEn: International Forum on Artificial Intelligence in Education
desc: 本论坛依托世界人工智能大会（WAIC）国际平台，汇聚国际组织代表、海内外高校校长、教育研究者、基础教育实践者、人工智能教育专家与产业界代表，围绕人工智能教育治理标准、智慧教育平台建设、教师教育创新、教育公平与技术普惠等议题展开高水平对话。论坛将通过主旨报告、平台发布、成立仪式、实践分享与圆桌讨论等环节，集中呈现中国在人工智能与教育深度融合进程中的理论探索、实践路径与标志性成果，推动不同国家、不同教育阶段与不同实践主体之间的交流互鉴，以中国实践回应全球教育变革议题，以中国方案参与人工智能时代教育治理对话，共同探索人智共生背景下教育创新发展的多元路径与未来图景。
descEn: Leveraging the platform of the WAIC, the forum unites international organization delegates, global university presidents, educational researchers, basic education practitioners, AI education experts, and industry representatives for high-level dialogues on AI education governance standards, smart education platforms, teacher education innovation, educational equity, and technological inclusivity. Through keynotes, platform launches, inaugurations, practice sharing, and roundtables, it centrally showcases China's theoretical explorations, practical pathways, and landmark achievements in deep AI-education integration to drive mutual exchange across nations, educational stages, and diverse practitioners. Addressing global educational transformation with Chinese practices and contributing Chinese solutions to AI-era education governance, the forum collaboratively explores diverse pathways and future visions for educational innovation within human-AI symbiosis.

guestVisitList.name: 朱新远
guestVisitList.introduce:
1994年，获得中国纺织大学（东华大学）化学纤维系学士学位。1997年，获得中国纺织大学（东华大学）材料科学与工程学院硕士学位。2001年，获得上海交通大学化学化工学院博士学位。2003年，在法国斯特拉斯堡大学从事博士后研究。2005年，担任上海交通大学分析测试中心副主任。2008年，担任金属基复合材料国家重点实验室副主任。2013年起，先后担任上海交通大学化学化工学院副院长、党委书记、院长。2018年，担任上海交通大学科学技术发展研究院常务副院长、院长。2021年，担任上海交通大学党委常委、副校长。2024年，担任上海李政道研究所法人、理事长，聚烯烃催化技术与高性能材料全国重点实验室副主任，上海理工大学校长、党委副书记 。2026年5月，担任上海市教育委员会主任 。
朱新远研究方向为聚合方法学、复杂聚合反应，高度支化聚合物的可控制备及功能化等 。主持国家自然科学基金创新研究群体、国家自然科学基金重大项目课题、国家杰出青年科学基金、国家自然科学基金面上项目、国家重大科学研究计划课题、国家重点研发计划课题、国家高层次人才计划等课题。2024年，获得上海市科技进步奖特等奖、中国石油和化学工业联合会科技进步奖一等奖、国务院政府津贴、庄长恭化学化工科技进步奖 。

name: 上海市消防救援局· AI原生智慧消防论坛
nameEn: Shanghai Fire and Rescue Brigade AI-Native Intelligent Fire Safety Forum
desc:
当前，人工智能技术已深度融入公共安全与应急管理体系，成为提升火灾防控、救援指挥及隐患治理能力的核心支撑。但城市场景复杂化、危险源多样化与传统消防手段有限性的矛盾日益凸显，制约着消防安全治理效能提升，构建AI驱动的全流程智能消防防护体系成为时代迫切需求。
本次由上海市消防救援局主导的论坛，将集中发布上海市消防救援总队在AI与消防领域的阶段性建设成果，搭建高端对话平台。论坛汇聚顶尖学者、技术领袖与行业龙头，共克时代挑战，探索构建“技术赋能、数据贯通、人机协同”的智慧消防技术基座、标准规范与治理模式，助力打造更安全、精准、高效的公共安全智能化防护路径，推进公共安全治理现代化。
descEn: This forum will focus on releasing the phased achievements of the Shanghai Fire and Rescue Brigade in AI and fire protection and build a high-end dialogue platform. It will gather top scholars, technical leaders and industry leaders to jointly address the challenges of the times, explore an intelligent fire protection technology base, standards and governance model with "technology empowerment, data connection and human-machine collaboration", help create a safer, more accurate and efficient intelligent public safety protection path, and promote the modernization of public safety governance.

name: 神州数码·AI管理创新论坛
nameEn: Unlocking Hidden Value AI for Management Innovation Forum
desc: 站在“十五五”人工智能高质量发展战略开局的节点，核心挑战已超越算法本身，直指生产关系的系统性重构。 本次论坛旨在探讨Al如何从技术深入到企业流程中，驱动自我进化的组织变革，重新规划企业增长路径。这场横跨学术、管理与产业的深度交流，将推动建立“AI for Process”的全新范式，描绘人机共舞的未来企业管理新秩序，见证生产力的“智变新生”。
descEn:
Unlocking Hidden Value   AI for Management Innovation Forum

Standing at the threshold of the 15th Five-Year Plan for high-quality AI development, the core challenge has moved beyond algorithms themselves and now centers on the systemic restructuring of production relations. This forum aims to explore how AI can move beyond technology and into enterprise processes, driving self-evolving organizational transformation and reshaping pathways for corporate growth. This in-depth dialogue spanning academia, management, and industry will advance the establishment of a new “AI for Process” paradigm, envision a future order of enterprise management where humans and machines dance in concert, and bear witness to the intelligent reinvention of productivity.

name: 实体世界智能科学论坛
nameEn: AI for the Real World
desc: 论坛将汇聚全球人工智能领域最具影响力的思想者、开拓者与实践者，聚焦AI与实体世界深度融合的关键命题，围绕三大前沿方向展开深入探讨：以 AI4S 重塑科学发现、以具身智能让 AI 走进物理世界、以可信 AI 守住安全底线。继去年与Hinton展开精彩对话后，姚期智先生将再度携手一位图灵奖得主同台论道，共话人工智能如何重塑科学发现、产业变革与人类社会未来。三位国际学术泰斗将带来重磅主旨报告。论坛还将汇聚多位国际顶尖学者、产业领军人物、青年科学家及“姚班”新锐代表，通过巅峰对话、特邀报告、主题演讲、圆桌讨论、开源成果发布及现场Demo展示等多元形式，共同探索AI创新、产业落地与生态共建的新机遇。

guestVisitList.name: 大卫·帕特森
guestVisitList.introduce:
David Patterson是加州大学伯克利分校荣誉教授，2017年图灵奖获得者，美国科学院、工程院、艺术与科学院院士，ACM Fellow，IEEE Fellow，美国科学促进会会士，RISC-V 之父。
致力于计算机体系结构与工程、计算机体系结构与系统：性能、安全、RISC-V操作系统和网络方面的研究。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
David Patterson is Emeritus Professor at the University of California, Berkeley, and recipient of the 2017 Turing Award. He is a Member of the National Academy of Sciences, the National Academy of Engineering, and the American Academy of Arts and Sciences, as well as an ACM Fellow, IEEE Fellow, and AAAS Fellow. He is widely regarded as the Father of RISC-V.
His research spans computer architecture and systems, with a focus on performance optimization, cybersecurity, RISC-V operating systems, and computer networking.

name: 索辰科技·世界物理模型：重塑工业AI新范式论坛
nameEn: World Physical Model: Reshaping the New Paradigm of Industrial AI
desc: 当生成式 AI 从文本、图像的虚拟世界，迈向理解物理规律、驱动实体交互的工业新赛道，世界物理模型正以新一代人工智能计算架构，打通数字空间与物理世界的壁垒，成为工业 AI 范式跃迁的核心引擎。本次论坛聚焦物理 AI 与空间生成融合的前沿突破，以 “世界物理模型：重塑工业 AI 新范式” 为主题，汇聚产业、算力等多方力量，深度解码世界物理模型驱动下的工业智能进化路径，共探具身智能、合成数据、物理 AI 工场的落地实践，共建产业生态，为工业数智化转型注入全新动能。
descEn:
As generative AI shifts from text and images to industrial physical interaction, world physical models bridge digital and physical worlds, spearheading industrial AI transformation.
Titled World Physical Models: Reshaping New Industrial AI Paradigms, this forum gathers industry and computing players to explore physical AI & spatial generation, discuss embodied intelligence, synthetic data and physical AI factory applications, build industrial ecosystems and accelerate industrial digital intelligence.

name: 太初元碁·大规模国产算力系统驱动AI+规模化落地论坛
nameEn: Large-Scale Homegrown Computing Systems Driving AI+ Scaled Application Forum
desc: 本论坛共探智算如何夯实智能经济底座，破解“AI+”规模化落地的"最后一公里"难题，除了汇聚院士专家、产业领袖、高校学者与生态伙伴，分享智算赋能产业升级的核心路径外，将重磅发布新一代国产AI4S计算平台，联合多家知名高校发起校企AI4S共创倡议。新一代国产AI4S计算平台以自研异构众核AI芯片为算力底座，构建全栈原生科研解决方案，面向气象预测、生物医药等前沿科学领域，可全面兼容国内外主流CPU与主流AI框架，助力科研与产业级科学计算高效落地。此外，为了促进产业协同发展，论坛还将举办Agentic AI 生态合作集中签约，并正式推出人工智能开发者社区2.0，持续完善国产算力生态体系。
descEn:
This forum explores how intelligent computing fortifies the intelligent economy foundation, tackling the "last mile" challenge in scaling "AI+" applications. Convening academicians, industry leaders, scholars, and partners, it will share strategies for intelligent computing-enabled upgrading, unveil the next-generation indigenous AI4S computing platform, and launch the university-industry AI4S co-creation initiative.
Powered by self-developed heterogeneous multi-core AI chips, the platform delivers a full-stack native scientific research solution. Targeting weather forecasting and biomedicine, it fully supports mainstream domestic and international CPUs and AI frameworks, accelerating both research and industrial scientific computing.
The forum will also host the Group Signing Ceremony for Cooperation on the Agentic AI Ecosystem, and launch Tecorigin AI Developer Community 2.0 to continuously enrich the indigenous computing ecosystem.

name: 腾讯·AI in Action 应用创新论坛
nameEn: AI in Action · Tencent AI Applications Forum
desc:
过去一年，AI 的进展超越想象。
Agent 从单点助理走向团队协同，正在重塑企业的生产力单元；智能调用重写了模型服务的成本结构，算力从一种技术资源变成企业级的战略资源；世界模型、具身智能、空间智能等新方向，也正在打开下一轮范式跃迁的想象空间。
「AI in Action·腾讯AI应用创新论坛」，聚焦 AI 在产业一线的真实进展，与同行者一起解构正在发生的三件事：
当机器人走出实验室，走进物理世界，AI 正从模拟迈向现实；
当 Agent 不再只是助理，从超级个人到超级团队，企业生产力被重新定义；
当人与 AI 彼此塑造、共同进化，下半场的协作方式正在被改写。
应用即答案。
descEn:
Over the past year, AI has advanced beyond imagination.
Agents have moved from solo copilots to coordinated teams, reshaping the very unit of enterprise productivity; Model-as-a-service has rewritten the cost structure of intelligence; Compute has shifted from a technical resource to an enterprise-level strategic asset. New frontiers , world models, embodied intelligence, spatial intelligence are opening up the next leap in paradigm.
AI in Action · Tencent AI Applications Forum turns the lens on what AI is actually delivering on the industry frontline. Together with our fellow travelers, we will unpack three shifts unfolding right now:
When robots step out of the lab and into the physical world, AI moves from simulation to reality.
When Agents are no longer mere assistants, scaling from super-individuals to super-teams, enterprise productivity is being redefined.
When humans and AI mutually shape and co-evolve, the way we collaborate in the second half is being rewritten.

guestVisitList.name: 林松涛
guestVisitList.introduce:
林松涛先生2003年加入腾讯，现任腾讯公司副总裁，全面负责腾讯移动应用分发业务、游戏直播等生态业务。
 
林松涛先生先后负责并主导了QQ、QQ空间、黄钻增值服务、朋友网、QQ农场、开放平台、广点通、应用宝、内容资讯、长短视频、游戏直播等业务的研发和管理工作。

guestVisitList.name: 汪牧远
guestVisitList.introduce:
专注互联网商业产品15年，曾在百度负责信息流广告产品，先后负责过多个垂直行业的变现探索，具备丰富的toC和toB产品经验。
加入腾讯后，不仅在垂直行业深耕产品能力变现，更专注于商业平台产品在全行业的落地应用，致力于通过产品升级&优化，全面提升腾讯营销的广告变现效率与收入量级。

guestVisitList.name: 黄俊洪
guestVisitList.introduce: 虎牙公司董事、首席执行官。2007年加入腾讯，曾任腾讯云副总裁。2023年出任虎牙CEO，推动公司从游戏直播平台向综合游戏生态服务商的战略转型，深化“AI+”战略。

guestVisitList.name: Darrick Rochili
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Darrick is the Chief Innovation Officer at DANA. A graduate of York University, he is a business and technology executive with over 22 years of experience and a diverse cultural background, having studied, worked, and lived in Australia, the USA, Canada, and Indonesia. 
    Darrick began his career in Canada, working for prominent companies such as Kraft, Hershey, and Petro from 1998 to 2000. In 2002, he joined TACF as Development Team Leader for two years before moving on to the Government of Ontario as a Senior Business Intelligence Analyst until 2006.
      He then returned to Indonesia, where he launched his career as Chief Technology Officer at Cell Box. Between 2010 and 2015, he founded his own ventures, R-cubed Digital and Jomblo.com. Darrick later joined DynEd Indonesia as Country Manager. Before joining DANA, Darrick served as Vice President at Ice House, where he played a key role in building the engineering team and leadership structure, helping transform the company into a larger, moreprofessional, world-class organization.

guestVisitList.name: 肖路
徐樱丹
guestVisitList.introduce:
徐樱丹，腾讯云与智慧产业事业群市场副总裁，腾讯集团营销通道会长。2003 年至2017曾在宝洁公司有十四年的专业品牌及市场营销工作经验，先后任职帮 宝适品牌和汰渍品牌的负责人，建立这两个品牌在中国市场完整的产品体系，任 职期间分别实现这两个品牌营收五年增长五倍及市场份额扭转式增长；2012年 起任职宝洁大中华区品牌运营部副总裁，带领宝洁大中华区整体广告媒介战略从 传统广告为主向数字媒体及社会化娱乐营销转型，打造本土数字化营销评估体系 及生态，建立移动互联网时代的CRM模式，任职期间达成宝洁中国区超过90% 的品牌TOMA和Penetration的增长。 
       2017 年进入腾讯，先后负责多个消费互联网门户类产品的市场营销，并于2018 年投入科技类产品的产业互联网营销工作，创建了腾讯云与智慧产业事业群市场 部及toB营销数字化体系，负责腾讯云，腾讯会议，安全与AI等产品的市场营 销工作，行业覆盖汽车，交通，教育，医疗，金融，零售、工业等，发起和创立 了腾讯与合作伙伴的营销加乘计划，同时也负责腾讯云全球市场工作。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Freda Xu is Vice President of Marketing at Tencent Cloud and Smart Industries Group and President of the Marketing Channel at Tencent Group.
    From 2003 to 2017, she built 14 years of professional brand and marketing expertise at Procter & Gamble, serving as Brand Director for both Pampers and Tide in China. During her tenure, she established comprehensive product portfolios for each brand in the Chinese market, delivering fivefold revenue growth over five years and achieving a decisive turnaround in market share for both. Starting in 2012, she served as Vice President of Brand Operations for P&G Greater China, leading the company's holistic advertising and media strategy through a landmark transformation — from traditional advertising-led to digital media and social entertainment marketing. She built a localized digital marketing measurement framework and ecosystem from the ground up, and pioneered a CRM model designed for the mobile internet era. Under her leadership, more than 90% of P&G China's brands achieved growth in both Top-of-Mind Awareness (TOMA) and Penetration.
    Freda joined Tencent in 2017, initially overseeing marketing for several consumer internet portal products. In 2018, she pivoted to B2B marketing for technology products in the industrial internet space, where she founded the CSIG Marketing Department and built Tencent's to-B marketing digitalization system from the ground up. She has led marketing initiatives for Tencent Cloud, Tencent Meeting, Security, and AI products across sectors including automotive, transportation, education, healthcare, financial services, retail and manufacturing. She also initiated and established the Tencent Marketing Amplification Program — a co-marketing initiative with ecosystem partners — and concurrently oversees Tencent Cloud's global marketing operations.

guestVisitList.name: 蒋晓峰
guestVisitList.introduce: 蒋晓峰在媒体AI领域深耕多年，始终致力于将AI技术与传媒行业深度融合，主导推动了多项具有行业影响力的AI项目从研发到规模化落地的全流程实践。在他的带领下，团队研发的Scube智媒魔方项目，凭借在智慧媒体领域的突破性创新与广泛的实际应用价值，于去年荣获国家广播电视总局科学技术奖一等奖——这是广播电视与网络视听领域科技创新的最高荣誉之一，充分彰显了他在AI赋能传媒方向上的深厚积累与卓越贡献，同时也是媒体转型发展的先驱者。

guestVisitList.name: 刘敏
guestVisitList.introduce: 刘敏女士现任博世中国战略副总裁、博世中国机器人中心负责人，全面统筹博世中国公司战略与业务发展工作，覆盖汽车、工业产品、消费品以及能源与建筑四大核心业务板块。她牵头推进全系列业务增长战略，统筹协调集团内部跨事业部协同创新；持续研判宏观经济环境与产业发展周期，识别行业潜在风险与发展变量，保障博世中国战略规划动态适配、高效落地。2026年，刘敏女士牵头筹建博世中国机器人中心，统筹机器人与具身智能技术研发、场景落地及产业链生态合作，推动博世自动化与智能机器人业务在中国市场规模化发展。加入博世中国前，她任职于科尔尼管理咨询公司，持有复旦大学经济学硕士学位。

guestVisitList.name: 陈广域
guestVisitList.introduce: 2002年4月加入腾讯，先后领导公司移动通信市场、集团行政和基建、无线互联网渠道、互联网+、医疗健康事业部等业务团队，在互联网+的多行业领域拥有丰富的管理实践经验及广泛的业界影响力。曾任腾讯CSIG（云与智慧产业事业群）产业生态合作部负责人，主要领导腾讯产业生态建设及合作伙伴拓展。 目前为腾讯公司人力资源副总裁，兼腾讯学堂院长。

guestVisitList.name: 李瑞龙
guestVisitList.introduce: 李瑞龙，腾讯研究院创新研究中心副主任、高级研究员，长期致力于互联网产业经济研究，关注人工智能、前沿科技等技术进展及其对经济和社会的影响，以及组织、产业和城市的创新发展模式等。中国科学院博士，清华大学博士后，北京师范大学国际商学院客座教授，广东省电子信息行业协会专家等。近期主导或参与的研究项目包括《AGI路线图年度报告》《2025大模型十大趋势》《行业大模型调研报告》与腾讯新总部园区科技图层规划等，在核心媒体、期刊发表相关领域学术与实务研究数十篇。

name: 同济大学·智能社会论坛：迈向人机共生的智能社会
nameEn: Tongji University · Intelligent Society Forum: Towards a Human-Machine Symbiotic Intelligent Society
desc: 2026 世界人工智能大会智能社会论坛由同济大学、上海市杨浦区人民政府联合主办，论坛以“迈向人机共生的智能社会”为主题，聚焦人机共生技术创新、伦理法治、社会治理与可持续发展。论坛联动海内外院士、国际组织、顶尖高校与领军企业，集开幕致辞、成果发布、主旨演讲、圆桌对话于一体，将发布人工智能就业影响监测系统、智能社会治理丛书、机器人社会训练场以及杨浦区“人工智能+”行动方案和典型案例等发展成果，推动人工智能向善发展，贡献人机共生的中国方案和同济智慧。
descEn: The 2026 WAIC Intelligent Society Forum is jointly hosted by Tongji University and the People's Government of Yangpu District, Shanghai. Under the theme "Towards a Human-Machine Symbiotic Intelligent Society," the forum focuses on human-machine symbiotic technological innovation, ethics and security governance, legal frameworks, and sustainable development. Bringing together Chinese and international academicians, international organizations, leading universities, and top-tier enterprises, the forum features opening remark, achievement releases, keynote speeche, and panel discussion. It will release the AI Employment Impact Monitoring System, the Intelligent Social Governance book series, the Robot Social Training Ground, and Yangpu District's "AI+" Action Plan, among other development outcomes.  The forum aims to promote the responsible development of AI and contribute China's vision and Tongji's wisdom to human-machine symbiosis.

name: 万兴科技×生数科技·世界模型驱动下的AI影视生产力新范式论坛
nameEn: World Models Driving a New Paradigm for AI Filmmaking
desc: 2026年，大模型技术正从概念加速走向产业落地，AI影视的全球化叙事迎来前所未有的变革窗口。值此产业变革之际，万兴科技联合生数科技共同承办WAIC 2026 “世界模型驱动下的AI影视生产力新范式” 专场论坛。论坛汇聚海内外产、学、研顶尖力量及知名影视导演、制作人等跨界嘉宾同台，聚焦世界模型技术前沿、AI影视产业化落地与全球化趋势等核心议题，将深度探讨世界模型技术前沿、AI影视产业化落地与全球化趋势。从技术突破、产业升级到内容创作与数据洞察，一场跨越学界、产业界与创作界的深度对话，即将在WAIC 2026的舞台上展开——7月20日9:00-12:00，敬请期待！
descEn: As foundation models accelerate the transformation of the film industry, AI filmmaking is entering a new era of scalable production and global storytelling. At WAIC 2026, Wondershare Technology and Shengshu Technology will jointly host the forum World Models Driving a New Paradigm for AI Filmmaking.The forum will bring together leading experts from industry, academia, and research, alongside renowned filmmakers and producers, to explore the latest advances in world models, AI-powered content creation, industrialized production workflows, and the global future of AI filmmaking.Through keynote speeches and panel discussions, the forum will showcase cutting-edge technologies, practical applications, and cross-industry insights, fostering collaboration across the AI and filmmaking ecosystem while advancing the next generation of intelligent content creation.

name: 网易智企·用可信AI构建企业新智生产力论坛
nameEn: Trusted AI Builds New Intelligent Productivity for Enterprises
desc:
当前，生成式 AI 正加速渗透产业场景，但技术与落地之间仍存鸿沟——如何在"可信"前提下让 AI真正释放企业生产力，成为行业核心命题。
网易智企 AI 产业技术论坛以"用可信 AI 构建企业新智生产力"为主题，邀请产业领袖与技术专家，聚焦 AI在企业场景中的真实落地路径。
本次论坛将探讨：
-可信 AI 前沿：AI 安全、合规与可信可控的技术架构
-全栈 Agent 平台：覆盖开发、客服、销售、数据及安全等场景的 Agent 能力
-行业落地实践：AI 在国央企、金融、游戏、零售等垂直行业的规模化商业案例
 我们期望通过思想交流与实践分享，推动AI技术真正赋能千行百业，助力企业迈向智能文明。
descEn:
As Generative AI accelerates its penetration into industrial scenarios, a critical gap remains between technology and real-world implementation—how to truly enable enterprise productivity through "trustworthy AI" has become a core challenge for the industry.
The NetEase Intelligent Enterprise AI Industry Technology Forum emerges in response to this pivotal moment. Themed "Trusted AI Builds New Intelligent Productivity for Enterprises," the forum brings together industry leaders,technology experts,and academic researchers to explore the practical pathways of AI deployment in enterprise context.

guestVisitList.name: 金日成
guestVisitList.introduce: 金日成，特聘研究员，浙江大学启真优秀青年学者。2015年获浙江大学学士学位(竺可桢学院荣誉学位)，2015年-2020年在美国北卡罗莱纳州立大学攻读博士学位，获得NCSU Provost Doctoral Recruitment Fellowship和NCSU University Graduate Fellowship，2021年-2022年在北卡罗莱纳州立大学电子与计算机工程系从事博士后研究，师从Huaiyu Dai 教授。2022年4月加入浙江大学信电学院。

guestVisitList.name: 王川
guestVisitList.introduce: 王川，北大光华硕士，人工智能行业从业10年以上，先后在腾讯，网易，百度等公司任职，主导AI技术在B端全周期产品化，成功上线3个千万级AIaaS/Maas平台。对大语言模型和业务场景的结合有丰富的落地经验。现在正在积极推动生成式视频大模型在影视，营销，游戏，动漫等行业新的生产方式和商业模式。

guestVisitList.name: 武岳
guestVisitList.introduce: 南开大学管理与信息系统硕士，南开大学商学院特邀讲师，二十二年政企客户数字化转型咨询经验；曾任钉钉政务金融中心总经理、钉钉解决方案&战略生态负责人、阿里云专有钉业务总经理、奇秦科技战略合作部总经理等职务，专注于企业组织数字化转型和AI Native组织建设方向，参与咨询和服务包括五矿集团、北京燃气、西部航空、交通银行、广东农信、太平洋寿险、大连商品交易所等中央企业和行业领袖公司

guestVisitList.name: 朱浩齐
guestVisitList.introduce:
易盾业务负责人，高级工程师，浙江省“万人计划”青年拔尖人才，浙江省科学技术进步一等奖获得者。毕业于浙江大学，2008年加入网易，拥有从 0 到 1 创立易盾业务线并将其打造为行业领军者的完整商业化经验。
深耕数字内容安全赛道，通过主导多项国家级及行业标准的制定和安全技术研发，为业务构建了极高的行业准入门槛与合规壁垒。面对 AI 产业浪潮，发布国内首个安全大模型，实现对国内 90% 以上通用模型企业的服务覆盖。不仅将安全能力转化为 AI 时代不可或缺的基础设施，更通过技术工程化落地，解决了企业在 AI 转型中的核心合规风险，确保了业务规模化增长的稳健性。

guestVisitList.name: 段毓铮
guestVisitList.introduce:
2005 年浙江大学计算机学院毕业，2006 年加入网易，2015年起专注ToB企业服务落地工作，先后任职七鱼产品总监、总经理及智企客户运营总监等，具备从研发、产品、解决方案、交付与客户运营等岗位的综合管理经验，以及从0到1构建ToB商业体系能力。
任职期间，先后成功构建了以客户成功为导向的增长体系，主导业务扭亏与规模化盈利，是网易 ToB 从技术产品到商业闭环的核心负责人之一。

name: 未来青年科技创新论坛
nameEn: Future Youth Science and Technology Innovation Forum
desc: 未来青年科技创新论坛是2026世界人工智能大会的特色分论坛，以“青年问未来：AI时代的科学担当与全球协作”为主题，将于7月20日在上海世博馆举行。本次论坛由中国科技发展基金会主办，信和集团、香港创新基金联合主办，汇聚海内外行业领军人士、学术权威、青年科创力量，为全球AI跨界协作、技术创新、合规发展搭建高效交流对接平台，助力青年科创力量扛起AI时代科学担当，共促全球协作。论坛设置“世界青创汇”圆桌对话，并推出《世界青创汇》原创节目，涵盖全球青年AI人才协作、AI科研成果产业转化、AI向善与全球科技治理三大维度，引导青年科研从业者勇担科技使命、深化国际协同创新。
descEn: The Future Youth Science and Technology Innovation Forum is a featured sub-forum of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). It will be held at the Shanghai World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center on July 20, under the theme "Youth Envisioning the Future: Scientific Responsibility and Global Collaboration in the AI Era". Hosted by the China Science and Technology Development Foundation and co-hosted by the Sino Group and the Hong Kong Innovation Foundation, the forum will bring together industry leaders, distinguished scholars, and young innovators from around the world to build an efficient platform for global AI cross-sector collaboration, technological innovation, and compliant development, empowering young innovators to shoulder their scientific responsibility in the AI era and jointly advance global collaboration.

name: 新一代智算云产业技术创新论坛
nameEn: Next-Generation Intelligent Computing Cloud Industry Technology Innovation Forum
desc: 立足数字经济发展新征程，智算云已然成为释放人工智能潜能、培育新质生产力的核心支撑，为产业高质量发展注入强劲动能。在本次科技盛会中，上海仪电（集团）有限公司将以“智算云启，万象新生”为主题，打造精彩纷呈，干货满满的世界人工智能大会分论坛。论坛将聚焦智算云前沿洞察、技术创新、应用生态与未来展望，搭建高端交流合作平台，汇聚多方智慧、碰撞思想火花，共创智算产业崭新未来。
descEn: As the digital economy enters a new stage of development, intelligent cloud has now become a core foundation for unlocking the full potential of artificial intelligence and cultivating new quality productive forces, providing powerful momentum for high-quality industrial growth. At this year’s premier technology conference, INESA will present a dedicated forum under the theme “Intelligent Cloud Industry Innovation and Development”. The forum will feature in-depth discussions on the latest trends in intelligent computing cloud, technological innovation, application ecosystems, and future development. By providing a high-level platform for cooperation and collaboration, bringing together industry leaders, technology experts, and ecosystem to exchange insights, spark innovation, and jointly shape the new future of the intelligent computing industry.

name: 智启具身:迎接物理AI智能涌现论坛
nameEn: Embodied Intelligence Forum:The Horizon of Physical AI Emergence
desc:
当Scaling Law遭遇"物理墙"，具身智能如何突破瓶颈,迎来真正的智能涌现？
2026世界人工智能大会(WAIC)期间，智元联合觅蜂科技将举办以"迎接物理AI智能涌现"为主题的智启具身论坛，集结全球学界、产业头部大咖,聚焦"撞破ScalingLaw的物理墙"，共探具身智能落地破局之路。
descEn:
When scaling laws run up against the “physical wall,” how can embodied intelligence break through these bottlenecks and usher in the true emergence of intelligence? 
During the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), Agibot and Maniformer will jointly host the Embodied Intelligence Forum: The Horizon of Physical AI Emergence. The forum will bring together leading voices from academia and industry worldwide to examine the challenges and breakthroughs of scaling laws in the physical world, and explore new pathways for embodied intelligence to advance from technological innovation to real-world deployment at scale.

name: 中国电子云·人工智能创新发展论坛
nameEn: CECLOUD Forum on AI Innovation and Development
desc: 论坛以 “聚算筑基·智融万象” 为核心主题，紧扣数智融合驱动产业变革的时代浪潮，汇聚院士、专家及政企生态伙伴等各界精英，共探数智融合前沿技术趋势与产业发展新路径。论坛聚焦技术创新与行业赋能双主线，通过技术与行业洞察、创新成果发布以及实践成果展示等多元环节，集中展示数智融合趋势下中国电子云的产品布局，并携手科研、央企等客户、生态伙伴联合发布行业解决方案、数智融合应用实践等创新成果，深度分享千行百业数智融合实践经验，共建数智融合产业生态，促进数智融合向行业场景纵深发展，推动人工智能产业高质量发展。
descEn: Centered on "Found Computing Power, Integrate All Intelligence", the forum follows the digital-intelligent integration-driven industrial transformation trend. It gathers elites to explore cutting-edge tech trends and new industrial paths, focuses on tech innovation and industrial empowerment via diverse sessions, show cases CECCloud’s product layout, joins hands with partners to release innovative achievements, shares practical experience, builds an industrial ecosystem, and drives high-quality development of the AI industry.

name: 中国信息协会· 数据要素赋能行业智能体论坛
nameEn: Forum on Data Elements Empowering Industry AI Agents| China Association of Information
desc: 2026年是“十五五”规划开局之年，也是国家数据局确立的“数据要素价值释放年”。本论坛紧扣“数智原力”主题，深度聚焦数据要素与行业智能体的协同创新与双向赋能。论坛将权威解读国家“人工智能+”行动及数据要素市场化最新政策，重磅发布首批“人工智能智能体管理能力成熟度评估”标杆案例、数据要素应用创新大赛智能体赛题优秀项目，并启动“全球AI华人项目库”计划，发布行业智能体“场景方+能力方”协同平台。汇聚政产学研用资多方领袖，搭建高端对话平台，共同探索数据驱动智能体进化、智能体反向驯化与净化数据的新范式，重构产业智能底层逻辑，助力培育智能经济新形态。
descEn: The year 2026 marks the start of China's 15th Five-Year Plan, designated by the National Data Bureau as the "Year of Data Element Value Release." Under the theme "Data Intelligence Origin," this forum focuses on two-way empowerment between data elements and industry agents.Key releases include benchmark cases, competition projects, the "Global AI Chinese Talent Project Library," and the "Scenario + Capability" Collaboration Platform.The forum brings together leaders from government, industry, academia, and investment to explore data-driven agent evolution and cultivate the intelligent economy.

name: 中昊芯英·专用算力时代下TPU的创新与共进论坛
nameEn: TPU Innovation and Collaborative Progress in the Era of Dedicated Computing Power
desc: 全球 AI 产业高速发展，有效算力与专用芯片是产业升级核心支撑。谷歌、苹果、OpenAI 等全球科技巨头持续布局 TPU，大量商业落地案例证明 TPU 是成熟、高潜力的主流 AI 芯片架构。国产自研 TPU 是我国 AI 自主可控发展的核心底座，技术迭代、规模化集群与生态搭建成为行业核心议题。本次论坛亮相 2026 世界人工智能大会，汇集政府、学界、行业专家与企业代表，围绕国产 TPU 全栈技术，交流芯片研发、软硬件适配、千卡智算集群落地实践，探讨有效算力时代架构共生之路，分享 TPU 赋能产业数字化实践。论坛将发布前沿技术新成果，联合各界共建开放协同、自主可控的国产 AI 算力生态。
descEn:
Global AI industry booms, with effective computing power and dedicated chips underpinning industrial upgrade. Leading firms Google, Apple and OpenAI heavily invest in TPUs. Widespread commercial deployments confirm TPU as a mature, high-potential mainstream AI chip architecture.
  Self-developed domestic TPUs underpin China’s independent, controllable AI industry. Tech iteration, large-scale clusters and ecosystem development are core industry priorities.
  Hosted at 2026 WAIC, this forum unites officials, scholars, experts and enterprises. Centered on full-stack domestic TPU tech, participants share experience in chip R&D, hardware-software adaptation and thousand-card computing clusters, discuss architectural symbiosis, and present TPU-enabled industrial digitalization cases. The forum will launch cutting-edge tech breakthroughs, partnering with all sectors to build an open, collaborative, self-reliant domestic AI computing ecosystem.

name: 中兴通讯·全栈智算生态论坛
nameEn: ZTE Full-Stack Intelligent Computing Ecosystem Forum
desc:
当前，AI产业正从“对话式”向“执行式”深刻变革，以OpenClaw为代表的框架标志着AI迈入“智能体时代”，AI产业以前所未有的速度，从技术探索走向垂直行业深水区，应用落地与执行能力成为新竞争焦点。
中兴通讯于本届世界人工大会期间以“极致协同 沪筑生态”为主题举办全栈智算生态论坛，以“系统级极致协同，推进token性价比提升、实现产业共赢”为核心，汇聚全栈产业引领者，定义AI工厂TCO新范式，构筑算力底座、构建共生生态，实现价值共创共享。
descEn:
The AI industry is undergoing a profound shift from Conversational AI to Agentic AI. Emerging frameworks such as OpenClaw mark the advent of the Agent Era. At an unprecedented pace, the industry is moving from technical exploration into the vertical industries, where practical application and execution capabilities have become the new frontier of competition.
ZTE is set to host the Full-Stack Intelligent Computing Ecosystem Forum during the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). Centered on "System-Level Synergy to Improve Token Efficiency and Achieve Win-Win Results for the Industry", the forum will bring together leading players across the full-stack industrial chain. It aims to redefine a new paradigm for the TCO of AI factory, build a robust computing infrastructure, foster an interdependent ecosystem, and jointly create the industrial value.

name: AI时代全球青少年创新素养培育论坛
nameEn: Forum on Cultivating Global Youth Innovation Literacy in the AI Era
desc: 本次论坛将以“AI时代青少年创新素养的培养路径与实践探索”为主题，围绕“AI时代青少年核心能力培育”“AI时代如何避免认知外包，保持独立思考？”“AI时代教师角色重塑”三个核心议题展开，充分展示全球优秀青少年创新成果，同时呈现全球不同国家在AI浪潮下开展青少年科创教育的实践路径与主要挑战，解读人工智能对学习方式和人才能力结构的影响，引领和展望未来科创教育发展方向。
descEn: This forum will center on the theme"Cultivating Pathways and Practical Explorations for  Youth Innovation Literacy in the AI Era," focusing on three core topics: "fostering core competencies for youth in the AI era", "how to avoid cognitive outsourcing to maintain independent thinking in the AI era", and "reshaping the role of teachers in the AI era". It will fully showcase outstanding global youth innovation achievements and present the practical pathways and main challenges of youth sci-tech education across different countries amid the AI wave. Furthermore, it will interpret the impact of artificial intelligence on learning methods and talent capability structures, leading and envisioning the future development direction of sci-tech education.

guestVisitList.name: 郑泉水
guestVisitList.introduce: 郑泉水，1961年3月出生，中国科学院院士(2019)，固体力学和微纳米力学专家。1978年3月进入江西工学院（现南昌大学）学习，1982年2月本科毕业后留校任教，1985年12月获湖南大学硕士学位，1989年12月获清华大学博士学位，1990年1月至1993年5月在英国、法国和德国访问研究，1993年5月调任清华大学教授至今。2009年起担任清华学堂钱学森力学班创办首席教授，2010年起担任清华大学微纳米力学与多学科交叉创新研究中心创办主任，2018年起担任深圳清华大学研究院超滑技术研究所所长。曾任清华大学工程力学系主任、中国力学学会旗舰杂志《力学学报》和Acta Mechanica Sinica主编等。

guestVisitList.name: 朱新远
guestVisitList.introduce:
1994年，获得中国纺织大学（东华大学）化学纤维系学士学位。1997年，获得中国纺织大学（东华大学）材料科学与工程学院硕士学位。2001年，获得上海交通大学化学化工学院博士学位。2003年，在法国斯特拉斯堡大学从事博士后研究。2005年，担任上海交通大学分析测试中心副主任。2008年，担任金属基复合材料国家重点实验室副主任。2013年起，先后担任上海交通大学化学化工学院副院长、党委书记、院长。2018年，担任上海交通大学科学技术发展研究院常务副院长、院长。2021年，担任上海交通大学党委常委、副校长。2024年，担任上海李政道研究所法人、理事长，聚烯烃催化技术与高性能材料全国重点实验室副主任，上海理工大学校长、党委副书记 。2026年5月，担任上海市教育委员会主任 。
朱新远研究方向为聚合方法学、复杂聚合反应，高度支化聚合物的可控制备及功能化等 。主持国家自然科学基金创新研究群体、国家自然科学基金重大项目课题、国家杰出青年科学基金、国家自然科学基金面上项目、国家重大科学研究计划课题、国家重点研发计划课题、国家高层次人才计划等课题。2024年，获得上海市科技进步奖特等奖、中国石油和化学工业联合会科技进步奖一等奖、国务院政府津贴、庄长恭化学化工科技进步奖 。

name: WAIC Future Tech·AI4S前沿极境与产业落地初创路演
nameEn: Future Tech Startup Roadshow: AI4S Frontiers & Applied AI
desc:
突破人类想象的极限边界，重塑千行百业的终极试验场！19号在上海世博展览馆H4馆创新路演舞台，Future Tech 初创路演第二场准时集结。本场聚焦前沿科技与行业应用，汇聚了深耕类脑智能、量子计算等前沿赛道的初创先锋，以及将 AI 深度嵌入真实业务场景的“爆改”玩家。他们拒绝纸上谈兵，正以颠覆性的跨界技术直击商业痛点，把科幻电影的狂想化作极具爆发力的商业现实。19号请锁定H4馆创新路演舞台，看前沿科技如何引爆产业未来！
【⚠️路演在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有19日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn:
Pushing the boundaries of what's possible and bypassing the hype to wire AI into real-world business workflows! On the 19th, Day 2 of the Future Tech Startup Roadshow takes over the Innovation Roadshow Stage in Hall H4 of the World Expo Exhibition and Convention Center. Featuring breakout startups in deep-tech frontiers and applied AI, this session tackles complex commercial challenges head-on to drive rapid digital transformation and bridge the gap between science fiction and measurable commercial results. Join us live at the Hall H4 stage on the 19th to see the frontiers in action!
【⚠️ Roadshow is located in Hall H4 of the World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center. Access is granted to all visitors with exhibition entry passes valid for the 19th.】

guestVisitList.name: 王轩泽
guestVisitList.introduce: 王轩泽，毕业于上海交通大学（本科，研究生）和清华大学（材料学博士），创材深造创始人兼CEO。公司全球首创“逆向材料设计引擎+AI Agent+高通量自动化实验室”三位一体架构，将传统5-10年研发周期压缩至2-6个月，研发成本降低2-3个数量级，缩小我国高端金属材料与国际间差距，实现高端金属材料研发模式的创新引领。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Theno Wang，a graduate of Shanghai Jiao Tong University (Bachelor's and Master's degrees) and Tsinghua University (Ph.D. in Materials Science), is the founder and CEO of Chuangcai Shenzao. The company has pioneered a "Reverse Materials Design Engine + AI Agent + High-Throughput Automated Laboratory" trinity architecture, which compresses the traditional 5–10 year R&D cycle to just 2–6 months while reducing development costs by 2–3 orders of magnitude. This breakthrough narrows the gap between China's high‑end metallic materials and international benchmarks, and leads a paradigm shift in the R&D model for advanced metallic materials.

guestVisitList.name: 于鑫阳
guestVisitList.introduce:
于鑫阳，复旦大学物理学系2022级博士生，入选复旦大学“卓博计划”，曾获复旦大学本科“优秀毕业生”、研究生国家奖学金等荣誉，师从李晓鹏教授，长期聚焦中性原子量子计算、原子精密测量与新型容错量子计算架构。科研方面，他在中性原子容错量子计算架构方向取得突破，相关方案有望显著提升原子量子计算纠错效率。
产业转化方面，于鑫阳作为上海不筹量子科技有限公司核心成员，现任体系架构算法中心负责人兼董事长秘书，深度参与公司技术路线、算法体系与产学研合作建设，主导开发了面向金融资产预测的原子量子储层计算算法，推动中性原子量子计算从底层硬件、纠错架构走向量子机器学习与行业应用验证。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Xinyang Yu is a Ph.D. student in the Department of Physics at Fudan University, selected for Fudan’s Excellent Doctoral Program. He has received honors including Outstanding Undergraduate Graduate of Fudan University and the National Scholarship for Graduate Students. Advised by Professor Xiaopeng Li, his research focuses on neutral-atom quantum computing, atomic precision measurement, and novel fault-tolerant quantum computing architectures. His work has contributed to new neutral-atom error-correction architectures with the potential to significantly accelerate quantum error-correction cycles.
On the industry side, Xinyang Yu is a core member of Shanghai BuChow Quantum Technology Co., Ltd., serving as Head of the Systems Architecture and Algorithms Center and Secretary to the Chairman. He has been deeply involved in the company’s technology roadmap, algorithm platform, and industry-academia collaboration, and has led the development of atomic quantum reservoir computing algorithms for financial asset prediction, helping translate neutral-atom quantum computing from hardware and error-correction research into quantum machine learning and real-world application validation.

guestVisitList.name: 樊钰纯
guestVisitList.introduce:
明视脑机商务负责人。传播学硕士，拥有跨学科背景与丰富的项目全流程管理经验。
曾任职于医疗垂直媒体，对话科学家、投资人及企业创始人上百位，对医疗技术的产业化路径有扎实认知。加入明视脑机前，已独立统筹执行30余场百万级国内外科技展会与峰会，涵盖方案策划、客户对接、现场总控等全环节。
当前专注于脑机接口技术的商业落地与市场沟通，致力于将前沿视觉重建方案高效传递给合作伙伴与行业公众。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mindtrix | Head of Business Development
Master’s degree in Communication Studies with an interdisciplinary academic background and extensive end-to-end project management experience.
Previously employed by a vertical medical media outlet, he has interviewed hundreds of scientists, investors and enterprise founders, building profound insights into the industrialization roadmap of medical technologies.
Prior to joining Mingshi BCI, he independently planned and delivered more than 30 domestic and international large-scale tech expos and summits with budgets exceeding one million each, overseeing the full spectrum of work including solution design, client liaison and on-site overall management.
Currently focused on the commercial implementation and market communication of brain-computer interface (BCI) technologies. He is dedicated to efficiently communicating cutting-edge visual reconstruction solutions to industry partners and the broader professional community.

guestVisitList.name: 叶宇轩
guestVisitList.introduce: 创始人叶宇轩，毕业于美国密歇根大学安娜堡分校本硕、清华大学机械工程系博士在读，2025年度中关村U30，清华大学创客空间协会会长，深耕医工交叉领域科研近10年，曾获中国大学生创业计划竞赛北京市特等奖（2026）、中国国际大学生创新大赛金奖（2025），世界人工智能大会Future Tech融资超新星（2025），清华大学创+路演一等奖（2025）、清华大学学生创新创业十佳团队季军（2025）、美国宾州创新大赛亚军等多项荣誉。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Founder Ye Yuxuan holds both bachelor’s and master’s degrees from the University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, and is currently a Ph.D. candidate in the Department of Mechanical Engineering at Tsinghua University. Recognized as a 2025 Zhongguancun U30 honoree and serving as President of the Tsinghua University Maker Space Association, he has dedicated nearly a decade to research at the intersection of medicine and engineering. His achievements include the Beijing Special Prize at the China College Student Entrepreneurship Competition (2026), a Gold Award at the China International College Students’ "Internet+" Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition (2025), the "Future Tech Financing Supernova" title at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (2025), First Prize at the Tsinghua University "Chuang+" Roadshow (2025), Third Place among Tsinghua’s Top 10 Student Innovation and Entrepreneurship Teams (2025), and runner-up honors at the Pennsylvania Innovation Competition, among other accolades.

guestVisitList.name: 张则扬
guestVisitList.introduce: 张则扬 第一推力联合创始人 北京大学第一推力物理智能联合实验室副主任，CSC公派访问学者，研究兴趣为流固耦合与物理仿真模拟，过往工作深耕前沿科技投资与科技成果转化，在清华大学出版社出版多本前沿科技书籍
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Co-founder of FirstmoveAI
Deputy Director, Peking University FirstmoveAI Laboratory of Physical Intelligence
CSC Sponsored Visiting Scholar

His research focuses on physical simulation. He has long been engaged in technology investment and the commercialization of scientific and technological achievements. He is the author of multiple cutting-edge science and technology books published by Tsinghua University Press.

guestVisitList.name: 司文祎
guestVisitList.introduce: 上海派晨智能联合创始人兼COO、IPmotion Group联合创始人兼CTO
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Co-founder & COO of IPVISE Shanghai, Co-founder & CTO of IPmotion Group

guestVisitList.name: 肖玛峰
guestVisitList.introduce:
肖玛峰 Max，AI+人才服务平台 True Talents Connect（TTC）创始人兼首席执行官，企业人力资源及组织管理专家，猎头行业连续创业者。

近20年高端猎头经验，面试超过10000名年薪百万以上高管，累计服务4000+企业，成功主导近400个中高端招聘项目。帮助多家知名科技企业成功招募副总裁级别核心人才。现任南开校友企业家联谊会董事、中国人力资源开发研究会智能分会理事，登上《北京日报》头版，曾被媒体称为"中国最会找AI人才的猎头"。

TTC于2022年成立，致力于成为全球科技人才流动关键枢纽，用科技高效链接人才和机会。公司专注于AI领域的人才招聘，已接连获得源码资本、创新工场、九合创投、中关村资本、厚雪资本和百度的投资，在国内外15个城市设立分支机构。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Max Xiao is the Founder and CEO of True Talents Connect (TTC), an AI-powered talent services platform. He is an expert in corporate human resources and organizational management, as well as a serial entrepreneur in the executive search industry.

With nearly 20 years of experience in senior executive search, Max has interviewed more than 10,000 executives with annual compensation packages of RMB 1 million or above, served over 4,000 companies, and successfully led nearly 400 mid- to senior-level recruitment projects. He has helped a number of leading technology companies recruit core vice president-level executives.

Max currently serves as a director of the Nankai University Alumni Entrepreneurs Association and a council member of the Intelligent Branch of the China Human Resources Development Research Association. He has been featured on the front page of Beijing Daily and was once described by the media as “the headhunter who best understands AI talent in China.”

Founded in 2022, TTC is redefining professional services through AI Agents, helping industry leaders identify and connect with top-tier AI talent. Backed by leading investors including Source Code Capital, Sinovation Ventures, Unity Ventures, ZGC Capital, Houxue Capital, and Baidu, TTC has completed four successful funding rounds and established 15 global offices.

guestVisitList.name: 周昌印
guestVisitList.introduce:
周昌印，Vozo AI 创始人兼 CEO，连续创业者，哥伦比亚大学计算机视觉博士。此前曾任 Google X 实验室、Google Research 高级科学家，并曾作为 Google Glass 项目早期科学家参与相关研发工作，长期专注于人工智能、计算机视觉与视频技术方向。此后，他曾担任硅谷 VR 公司 Visbit CTO，以及粤港澳大湾区数字经济研究院(IDEA)责任 CTO，拥有从前沿技术研发到产品化落地、产业转化与创业管理的丰富经验。

目前，周昌印带领 Vozo AI 专注于多模态视频翻译基础设施建设，通过 AI 技术帮助企业与内容创作者将视频高效转化为全球化内容，覆盖字幕翻译、语音翻译、口型同步及画面文字翻译等完整流程，推动视频内容在跨语言、跨市场和跨文化场景中的高效分发与商业化。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Changyin Zhou is the Founder and CEO of Vozo AI, a serial entrepreneur and a PhD in computer vision from Columbia University. Prior to founding Vozo AI, he was a Senior Scientist at Google X and Google Research, and an early scientist on the Google Glass project, where he worked on AI, computer vision, and video-related technologies. He later served as CTO of Silicon Valley VR company Visbit, and as Vistring CTO of International Digital Economy Academy (IDEA), building deep experience across frontier R&D, productization, industrial translation, and technology entrepreneurship.

He is now leading Vozo AI, a company building multimodal video translation infrastructure that helps enterprises and content creators turn videos into global content across subtitles, speech, lip sync, and on-screen text translation, enabling more efficient cross-language, cross-market, and cross-culture video distribution and monetization.

guestVisitList.name: 李锦威
guestVisitList.introduce: Open Design CMO/增长负责人
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Open Design CMO / Head of Growth

guestVisitList.name: 魏清松
guestVisitList.introduce: 埃法智造COO，公司运营与产品工程化负责人
guestVisitList.introduceEn: COO, Efaz Intelligence Manufacturing | Head of Operations and Product Engineering

guestVisitList.name: 蒋骧慧
guestVisitList.introduce: 现任物自体科技（Noumena）联合创始人兼 COO，获百度战投及顶级 VC 投资，并获 L'Oréal BIG BANG 2025 全球创新大赛奖项。带领团队用 AI 重构社媒营销全链路 —— 从消费者洞察、内容智能生产到精准投流与效果复盘，将 20 年营销实战经验沉淀为可规模化交付的 AI 产品体系，服务于欧莱雅等 30 家头部品牌。曾任小红书品牌客户部及快消行业群总经理，深度参与管理超 400 亿广告业务，覆盖 KOL 筛选、内容策略、投流优化全链路。此前任蚂蚁集团数字科技集团副总裁兼 CMO，业务从 5000 万增长至 20 亿；更早担任 SAP 中国区管理合伙人，横跨 15 国项目实战。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Co-founder & COO of Noumena. Backed by Baidu's strategic investment and top-tier VCs, and winner of the L'Oréal BIG BANG 2025 Global Innovation Award. Leading the team to rebuild the full social media marketing funnel with AI — spanning consumer insights, intelligent content creation, precision media buying, and performance analytics — turning 20 years of marketing expertise into a scalable, deliverable AI product system, serving 30 leading brands including L'Oréal. Formerly GM of Brand Client & FMCG Vertical at Xiaohongshu (RedNote), overseeing ¥40B+ in advertising business. Previously served as VP & CMO of Ant Group Digital Technology, scaling the business from ¥50M to ¥2B, and as Managing Partner at SAP China with project experience across 15 countries.

guestVisitList.name: 孙克强
guestVisitList.introduce:
孙克强，Mizzen AI 觅深科技创始人兼 CEO，AI 科学家、创业者，香港中文大学博士，曾任职于 Meta、商汤等机构，长期专注于生成式模型与人类偏好等方向。

2025 年，他创立 Mizzen AI 觅深科技，将对人类偏好的研究延伸到企业用户洞察与商业决策场景，并推出一站式 AI 用户洞察平台 Mizzen Insight 觅深洞察。平台通过 AI 深度访谈等核心能力，帮助企业以百倍速度更懂用户，目前已服务 300 余家企业客户，覆盖快消、互联网等多个行业。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Sun Keqiang is the Founder and CEO of Mizzen AI. He is an AI scientist and entrepreneur with a Ph.D. from The Chinese University of Hong Kong. He previously worked at Meta Reality Labs and SenseTime, focusing on generative models and human preference research.

In 2025, he founded Mizzen AI, bringing his research on human preference into enterprise user insight and business decision-making. The company’s flagship product, Mizzen Insight, is a one-stop AI user insight platform that helps enterprises understand users 100 times faster through AI-powered in-depth interviews and other core capabilities. Today, Mizzen AI serves more than 300 enterprise clients across industries including FMCG and internet.

guestVisitList.name: 刘净
guestVisitList.introduce: 拥有超过二十年深厚科学研究以及大规模AI系统研发与团队管理经验，是“AI+能源”领域具备体系化理论、全栈工程能力和全球化视野的技术专家。与微软、英伟达、阿里、西门子、华为等全球顶尖科技与能源企业建立了广泛而深入的技术合作。目前个人拥有十余项相关发明专利。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: With over twenty years of experience spanning scientific research, large-scale AI systems R&D, and team management, he is a technical expert in the AI+Energy domain with systematic theoretical grounding, full-stack engineering capabilities, and a global vision. He has established deep and extensive technical collaborations with world-leading technology and energy companies, including Microsoft, NVIDIA, Alibaba, Siemens, and Huawei, and holds over ten invention patents in related fields.

guestVisitList.name: 唐言为
guestVisitList.introduce: 中传中英双语播音主持专业大三，30w粉丝自媒体博主，央媒双语主持人
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Yeva Tang is a third-year undergraduate student pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Bilingual Broadcasting and Anchoring at Communication University of China. She is a content creator with 300,000 verified followers on social media platforms and a bilingual host for mainstream media outlets.

guestVisitList.name: 王奕文
guestVisitList.introduce: 北大元培通用人工智能专业大二，90w粉丝自媒体博主，24年浙江省高考状元。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Wendy Wang is a second-year undergraduate majoring in Artificial General Intelligence at Yuanpei College, Peking University.    He boasts a social media following of 900,000 verified followers and ranked first among all candidates in Zhejiang Province in the 2024 National College Entrance Examination.

guestVisitList.name: 张英楠
guestVisitList.introduce:
张英楠，博士，上海云工涌现科技有限公司总经理、首席执行官，“云工大模型”创始人，兼任中国建筑业协会人工智能专家、中国人工智能学会智能融合专委会委员、上海市人工智能行业协会理事，曾荣获上海市青年五四奖章、上海SHIE杰出工程师（青年），入选上海市东方英才计划、上海市青年科技启明星计划、工程建设科技创新人才万人计划。
作为国内较早探索 AI 与建筑产业深度融合的技术研究者、产品设计者、工程实践者与创业者，张英楠长期深耕建筑人工智能领域，牵头组建行业首支建筑人工智能专业研发团队，主导研发国内首个建筑业垂类大模型底座“云工大模型”、国内首个通过国家网信办算法备案的建筑大模型Construction-GPT等20余项首发成果；“云工大模型”及“云工”系列产品已累计服务行业用户超10万人，应用工程超百项，累计使用近1亿人次，成为极具影响力的建筑AI品牌，相关成果入选WAIC优秀案例集、上海市“模塑申城”住建行业人工智能十佳案例第一名、上海市浦东新区垂类大模型典型应用场景目录、上海市智能机器人应用场景推荐目录。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Dr. Yingnan Zhang is the General Manager and CEO of Shanghai Yungong Al Technology Co., Ltd., and the founder of Yungong Multimodal Construction-Specific Foundation Model. He also serves as an AI expert of the China Construction Industry Association, a member of the Intelligent Integration Committee of the Chinese Association for Artificial Intelligence, and a council member of the Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Industry Association. He has received honors including the Shanghai Youth May Fourth Medal and Shanghai SHIE Outstanding Engineer (Youth), and has been selected for the Shanghai Oriental Talent Program, the Shanghai Rising-Star Program, and the Engineering Construction Science and Technology Innovation Talent Program.
As one of the early technology researchers, product designers, engineering practitioners and entrepreneurs in China to explore the deep integration of AI with the construction industry, Dr. Zhang has long focused on the field of construction AI. He led the establishment of the industry’s first professional R&D team dedicated to construction AI, and spearheaded more than 20 first-of-their-kind achievements, including China’s first construction-specific foundation model, Yungong Multimodal Construction-Specific Foundation Model, and Construction-GPT, the first construction large model to complete algorithm filing with the Cyberspace Administration of China.
Yungong Multimodal Construction-Specific Foundation Model and the “Yungong” product series have served more than 100,000 industry users, been applied in over 100 engineering projects, and recorded nearly 100 million uses, making them a highly influential construction AI brand. Related achievements have been selected for the WAIC Excellent Case Collection, ranked first among Shanghai’s “Modeling Shanghai” Top 10 AI Cases in Housing and Urban-Rural Development, and included in the Pudong New Area Typical Application Scenarios Directory for Vertical Large Models and the Shanghai Recommended Application Scenarios Directory for Intelligent Robots.

name: WAIC Future Tech·AI原生与硬科技投资生态论坛
nameEn: WAIC Future Tech·AI-Native & Hard Tech Investment Ecosystem Forum
desc:
过去半年，全球创投生态发生深刻转移，资本焦点从大模型的“参数竞赛”决然转向“产业落地”与“技术硬核”。在此周期拐点，本次论坛聚焦三大核心议题：
探讨大模型在生命科学、具身智能等前沿领域如何告别同质化内卷，打造杀手级应用并实现商业闭环；
在估值体系重塑的当下，剖析投资人如何挖掘红海中的“非共识”机遇，并联合各类耐心资本跨界破局，构建常态化的AI原生生态圈；
关注新生代青年投资人如何以专业敏锐度迭代硬科技投资的底层逻辑，与资深导师完成资本力量的代际传承与思想碰撞。
【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有18日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn:
Recently, global venture capital has shifted from large model "parameter races" to practical applications and hard tech. At this turning point, our forum addresses three core topics. First, how AI in frontier fields like life sciences and embodied intelligence can overcome homogenous competition to create commercially viable killer apps. Second, how investors can find "non-consensus" opportunities amid shifting valuations, collaborating with patient capital to build sustainable AI ecosystems. Finally, how a new generation of scientist-like young investors is refining hard-tech investment logic, sparking intellectual collisions and passing the torch with veteran mentors.
【⚠️ Forum is located in Hall H4 of the World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center. Access is granted to all visitors with exhibition entry passes valid for the 18th.】

guestVisitList.introduce: 朱笑靖，美酷瑞AI创始人兼首席执行官，复旦大学EMBA。曾任盛大游戏副总裁、分众游戏总裁，主导多款知名游戏研发与发行，《热血传奇手游》年收入达80亿元。现专注AI原生游戏与世界引擎的创新与全球化发展。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Michael Zhu, Founder and CEO of Gamercury AI Technology Pte. Ltd., and an EMBA graduate of Fudan University. He previously served as Vice President of Shanda  Games and President of Focus Games, leading the development and launch of multiple renowned game titles. Legend of Mir Mobile generated an annual revenue of 8 billion yuan. He is now dedicated to innovating AI-native games and world engines, as well as advancing their global expansion.

guestVisitList.introduce: Zinc 创始人，前META 亚太战略主管
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Founder of Zinc, Ex-Meta APAC Strategy Lead

guestVisitList.name: 邓铸
guestVisitList.introduce: 邓铸，iEarth 技术负责人，清华大学博士，香港大学气候与碳中和研究院博士后，前阿里云算法专家。拥有十余年遥感、地球大数据、人工智能与碳核算交叉领域研究及技术实践经验，兼具科研创新、算法工程与产业转化经验，负责iEarth平台技术架构、核心算法体系与产品化落地。他曾主导近实时碳数据库Carbon Monitor等全球数据产品建设，研究成果多次发表于Nature系列期刊，总引用超过8000次，h指数32。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Zhu Deng is the Technical Lead of iEarth. He holds a Ph.D. from Tsinghua University and is currently a Postdoctoral Fellow at the Institute of Climate and Carbon Neutrality, The University of Hong Kong. Prior to this, he served as an Algorithm Expert at Alibaba Cloud. With over a decade of research and engineering experience spanning remote sensing, Earth big data, artificial intelligence, and carbon accounting, Zhu bridges scientific innovation, algorithm engineering, and industrial application. At iEarth, he leads the platform's technical architecture, core algorithm systems, and productization efforts. He previously led the development of multiple data products such as Carbon Monitor, a global near-real-time carbon emissions database. His research has been published repeatedly in Nature Portfolio journals, garnering over 8,000 citations and an h-index of 32.

guestVisitList.name: 毛祎航
guestVisitList.introduce: AUREN 联合创始人，负责公司战略与产品方向，主导 AUREN M1 的产品定义、AI 内容体验与多模态宠物理解能力落地。本次将介绍 AUREN 如何通过宠物第一视角智能穿戴硬件，把视频、声音、运动等信号转化为宠物日记、Vlog、高光记忆和行为线索。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Co-founder of AUREN, responsible for company strategy and product direction. He leads the product definition of AUREN M1, including AI content experiences and multimodal pet-understanding capabilities. In this roadshow, he will introduce how AUREN turns pet POV video, audio, and motion signals into pet diaries, vlogs, highlight memories, and behavior cues.

guestVisitList.name: 潘致綸
guestVisitList.introduce: 此前曾在特斯拉从事先进制造自动化工作，并在通用汽车从事自主系统研发。曾任特斯拉自动驾驶工厂负责人、通用汽车凯迪拉克自动驾驶系统架构师。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Previously worked on advanced manufacturing automation at Tesla and autonomous systems at General Motors. Ex-Tesla Autonomous Factory Lead, Ex-GM Cadillac Autonomous Vehicle System Architect.

guestVisitList.name: Banu Jafarli
guestVisitList.introduce:
Banu Jafarli 是 SpreeAI 的产品负责人，负责领导公司 AI 驱动零售产品的产品战略与落地执行。她在消费级和企业级技术领域均有丰富的产品构建经验，专长覆盖 AI、平台战略、商业化、企业解决方案及 0 到 1 产品开发。在加入 SpreeAI 之前，Banu 曾于亚马逊和微软担任产品领导职务，致力于零售、AI 与客户体验交叉领域的技术构建。

如需调整语气或风格，请告诉我。

Yongwoong Jung is the Chief Strategy Officer at HyperAccel, where he leads the company's business strategy and growth initiatives.
Prior to HyperAccel, he spent over 13 years in management consulting, including at Boston Consulting Group (BCG), advising clients on corporate strategy, business transformation, and growth. He also has more than seven years of executive leadership experience at startups. Yongwoong holds an MBA from INSEAD and a BBA from Korea University中文

在加入 HyperAccel 之前，他拥有超过 13 年的管理咨询经验，曾任职于波士顿咨询公司（BCG），为客户提供企业战略、业务转型与增长方面的咨询服务。此外，他还在初创企业积累了超过七年的高管领导经验。Yongwoong 拥有欧洲工商管理学院（INSEAD）的 MBA 学位以及高丽大学的工商管理学士学位。

She has built products across both consumer and enterprise technology, with expertise spanning AI, platform strategy, monetization, enterprise solutions, and 0 to 1 product development. Prior to SpreeAI, Banu held product leadership roles at Amazon and Microsoft, building technology at the intersection of retail, AI, and customer experience.

Future Tech 初创路演首日将于18号在【上海世博展览馆H4馆创新路演舞台】正式开启！本场路演火力全开，聚焦具身智能装备、智能终端、算力芯片以及智能 Agent。让我们赋予 AI 改变现实的物理躯体，构筑数字世界的超级计算引擎室！这批专注算力底座与智能 Agent 进化的顶尖初创黑马正疯狂输出，为整个生态系统提供源源稳定的底层动力，打造能感知、互动的物理终端，让 AI 真正破屏而出，触手可及。欢迎所有线下观众在18号亲临H4馆创新路演舞台，共同见证物理世界的硬核跃迁！

These innovators are laying the robust infrastructure and building tangible tech that perceives its environment. Drop by the Innovation Roadshow Stage at Hall H4 on the 18th to witness AI pulling out of the screen and putting it right in our hands!

guestVisitList.introduce: 张则扬 第一推力联合创始人 北京大学第一推力物理智能联合实验室副主任，CSC公派访问学者，研究兴趣为流固耦合与物理仿真模拟，过往工作深耕前沿科技投资与科技成果转化，在清华大学出版社出版多本前沿科技书籍

guestVisitList.introduceEn: BrainSight CEO

guestVisitList.name: 张涛
guestVisitList.introduce: 张涛，光象科技创始人兼CEO，清华大学博士，米兰理工大学博士后，原阿里巴巴高德地图技术总监，空间感知引擎负责人。主导开发世界领先的多传感器融合感知算法，连续三年国际定位大赛冠军，相关技术落地长城量产自动驾驶系统、导航辅助驾驶系统等，在国内外十余个头部车企推广落地，累计量产搭载终端数百万。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Tao Zhang, Founder & CEO of Sunrising AI, Ph.D. from Tsinghua University; Postdoctoral Researcher at Politecnico di Milano, and former Technical Director at Alibaba Amap, Head of the Spatial Perception Engine. He led the development of world-leading multi-sensor fusion perception algorithms and secured three consecutive IMC championships. The related technologies have been deployed in Great Wall Motor's mass-produced autonomous driving systems and navigation-assisted driving systems, and have been adopted by more than ten leading automotive manufacturers in China and overseas, with millions of mass-produced terminal units.

guestVisitList.name: 沈彤欣
guestVisitList.introduce: 沈彤欣，Blinkko创始人&CEO，ex-Apple 体验设计师，毕业于加州大学伯克利分校，具备设计、心理学与商业融合的跨学科背景。大学期间创立校园社交产品，成功击败由前雅虎总裁创办的竞争对手Raftr；后联合创立国内市场占有率领先的AI 3D摄影工作室。曾担任全美最大华人学生科技峰会DECODE主席，长期关注年轻人的社交行为与消费文化。创始人同时运营面向年轻消费者的内容账号，并拥有覆盖时尚、生活方式、留学及校园群体的创作者网络，具备天然的用户触达和社区运营能力。作为连续创业者，她兼具产品设计、用户洞察与商业化能力，拥有丰富的中美市场经验。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Tongxin (Sophia) Shen is the Founder and CEO of Blinkko, with a multidisciplinary background in design, psychology, and business. A UC Berkeley graduate and former Apple Experience Designer, she has been has been passionate about creating meaningful connections since college, where she founded a campus social platform that outperformed Raftr, a competitor founded by a former Yahoo president. She later co-founded a leading AI-powered 3D photography studio in China and served as President of DECODE, the largest Chinese student technology summit in the U.S. As a serial entrepreneur with deep expertise in product design, user behavior, and community building, she brings extensive experience across both the U.S. and Chinese markets.

guestVisitList.name: 李少章
guestVisitList.introduce: 毕业于清华大学计算机系。曾历任TP-Link研发总监，360硬件合伙人，美团硬件委员会主席，Lexar（雷克沙）全球 CEO。拥有深厚的智能硬件与 AI 行业背景，兼具技术一号位与业务一号位能力，擅长从 0 到 1 打造全球化AI智能硬件产品。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Graduated from the Department of Computer Science at Tsinghua University. Previously served as R&D Director at TP-Link, Hardware Partner at 360, Chair of the Hardware Committee at Meituan, and Global CEO of Lexar. Has deep expertise in smart hardware and AI, with proven capability as both a technical leader and business leader. Skilled at building global AI smart hardware products from zero to one.

guestVisitList.name: 武善征
guestVisitList.introduce:
OpenWorld CEO
清华大学创客空间协会理事长
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
OpenWorld CEO
President of Tsinghua University Makerspace Association

guestVisitList.name: 高敬智
guestVisitList.introduce:
1995年生，法国国立民航大学硕士，专注时空智能、高精度定位、AI误差建模、时空大模型优化核心领域研究与工程落地，是兼具底层算法研发、大型项目管控、产品工程化落地能力的复合型核心人才。曾作为核心研发人员深度参与阿里系千寻位置亿元级时空智能算法重大项目（项目总经费超1亿元），主攻大气层复杂环境误差AI建模、时空信息大模型高程误差优化等核心攻坚方向。针对低空、复杂户外场景定位精度不足、信号波动、固定率低等行业痛点，主导算法模型迭代与优化升级，通过AI智能建模优化方案，成功将项目定位精度、定位固定率核心指标提升10%，大幅提升复杂场景下时空智能系统的稳定性与实用性，赋能全域高精度定位服务落地。具备极强的技术成果转化能力与项目管理能力，累计申请国家发明专利7项（多项
处于审核公示阶段），技术沉淀深厚。现主要负责公司技术项目落地管控、产品工程化迭代、研发流程体系搭建、供应链与量产管理、产学研协同落地、整体运营体系统筹，衔接上交大类脑中心前沿技术、公司研发团队与产品市场端，保障技术高效转化、产品快速迭代、项目高效交付，构建公司标准化、体系化的运营落地能力。2024年作为产品合伙人，加人最终序列(上海)科技有限公司，全面负责公司产品的定义、研发及落地工作.现主要负责公司技术项目落地管控、产品工程化迭代、研发流程体系搭建、供应链与量产管理、产学研协同落地、整体运营体系统筹，衔接上交大类脑中心前沿技术、公司研发团队与产品市场端，保障技术高效转化、产品快速迭代、项目高效交付，构建公司标准化、体系化的运营落地能力。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Born in 1995, he holds a Master’s degree from École Nationale de l’Aviation Civile (ENAC, France). His core research and engineering implementation focus on spatiotemporal intelligence, high-precision positioning, AI error modeling, and optimization of spatiotemporal foundation large models. He is a versatile core talent with comprehensive capabilities covering underlying algorithm R&D, large-scale project governance, and industrialized product delivery.
As a core R&D engineer, he took in-depth part in a RMB 100 million-level major spatiotemporal intelligence algorithm project at Qianxun Spatial Intelligence (an Alibaba affiliate). His key research priorities included AI error modeling for complex atmospheric environments and elevation error optimization of spatiotemporal large models.
To address prevalent industry pain points such as insufficient positioning accuracy, signal fluctuation and low fix rate in low-altitude airspace and complex outdoor environments, he led iterative upgrades and optimization of algorithm models. Leveraging AI intelligent modeling and optimization solutions, he lifted two core indicators — positioning accuracy and positioning fix rate — by 10%, greatly improving the stability and practicality of spatiotemporal intelligent systems in complex scenarios and enabling the rollout of full-domain high-precision positioning services.
He excels at commercialization of technical achievements and project management. He has filed 7 national invention patents, several of which are currently under public examination, representing solid technical accumulation.
Since joining Ultimate Sequence (Shanghai) Technology Co., Ltd. as Product Partner in 2024, he has overseen full-cycle product definition, R&D and commercialization. His current responsibilities encompass governance of technical project delivery, iterative industrialization of products, establishment of standardized R&D workflows, supply chain and mass production management, industry-university-research collaboration, and overall operational system orchestration. He acts as the liaison between cutting-edge technologies from the Brain-Inspired Intelligence Center of Shanghai Jiao Tong University, the company’s R&D team and product & marketing departments. His work accelerates efficient technology transfer, rapid product iteration and timely project delivery, and builds standardized, systematic operational delivery capabilities for the company.

guestVisitList.name: 杜昔熺
guestVisitList.introduce: 杜昔熺，共绩科技联合创始人&CMO，深圳清华大学研究院弹性算力调度研发中心副主任。本科毕业于电子科技大学金融专业，硕士毕业于英国斯旺西大学金融专业。曾就职于世界500强华润集团，任科创板块业务中心市场生态负责人，深耕产业生态构建与产研成果转化落地，拥有丰富的科创平台运营经验及产业链资源整合能力和市场推广能力。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Du Xixi, Co-founder & CMO of ComNergy Tech Ltd., Deputy Director of RITS Elastic Computing Resource Scheduling R&D Center.
Bachelor of Finance, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China; Master of Finance, Swansea University, UK.
Formerly with China Resources Group, a Fortune Global 500 enterprise, serving as Head of Market Ecosystem of the Science and Innovation Business Division. Deeply engaged in industrial ecosystem construction and the transformation and implementation of industry-research achievements, with rich practical experience in sci-tech innovation platform operation, as well as strong competence in industrial chain resource integration and market promotion.

guestVisitList.name: 姚航
guestVisitList.introduce: 姚航，清昴智能联合创始人兼首席运营官（COO）。毕业于上海交通大学，获学士学位，后于新加坡国立大学取得硕士学位。在人工智能基础设施领域拥有丰富的技术商业化经验，曾就职于华为，主导完成10余款1C（AI芯片及核心组件）产品的全周期研发与规模化商用导入，成功推动多项尖端技术实现产业落地。因卓越的技术贡献与项目管理能力获评"华为英雄个人"称号。长期深耕人工智能底层架构领域，兼具深厚的技术洞察与成熟的商业运营能力。现任清昴智能COO，全面负责公司战略实施、产品商业化与市场运营，致力于推动新一代AI基础设施的创新与落地。公司与多家行业领军企业达成深度合作，助力人工智能技术在产业端的规模化应用。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Yao Hang is the Co-founder and Chief Operating Officer (COO) of Qingmao Intelligence. He earned his bachelor’s degree from Shanghai Jiao Tong University and later obtained a master’s degree from the National University of Singapore.
He boasts extensive experience in technology commercialization within the AI infrastructure sector. Previously employed at Huawei, he led the full-cycle R&D and large-scale commercial rollout of more than 10 IC products (AI chips and core components), facilitating the industrial implementation of multiple cutting-edge technologies. He was honored as a "Huawei Hero Individual" for his outstanding technical contributions and project management expertise.
With long-term in-depth engagement in underlying AI architecture, he possesses profound technical insights and sophisticated commercial operation capabilities. Currently serving as COO of Qingmao Intelligence, he oversees corporate strategy execution, product commercialization and market operations, committing to the innovation and industrial adoption of next-generation AI infrastructure. The company has established in-depth partnerships with multiple industry-leading enterprises to accelerate the large-scale industrial application of AI technologies.

guestVisitList.name: 吴晓萱
guestVisitList.introduce: 光子芯力合伙人。光子芯力由清华博士团队创立，致力于光电融合计算革新。硬件端，我们摒弃传统MZI波导拼接，采用全波超表面技术将波动光学效应转化为可计算物理算子，实现高算力密度与低功耗；软件端，自研PhotonCore EPDA平台，打通从物理设计、逆设计到GDS版图导出的全流程，并兼容主流AI框架，为光电融合芯片产业化提供“软硬协同”的全栈解决方案。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Partner at Photoncore. Spearheaded by a team of Tsinghua University PhDs, PhotonCore is at the forefront of the paradigm shift towards photonic-electronic fusion computing. Technologically, we have replaced legacy MZI waveguide splicing with full-wave metasurface technology, integrating diffractive and interferometric effects as physical compute operators to realize high-density, low-power heterogeneous chips. Complementing this, our self-developed PhotonCore EPDA suite​ automates the pipeline from device physics to DRC-compliant GDSII generation. By ensuring interoperability with leading AI frameworks, PhotonCore provides a comprehensive co-design ecosystem to accelerate the industrialization of photonic integrated circuits.

guestVisitList.name: 陈柏安
guestVisitList.introduce:
Mindverse（心洲科技）创始人&总裁 深圳清华大学研究院智能内容生成研发中心主任
Mindverse是粤港澳大湾区国创中心国际总部孵化项目，专注于万亿参数大模型强化学习基座研发。团队成员来自麻省理工学院、清华大学、OpenAI、腾讯等顶尖机构，累计发表论文超200篇，其中AI顶会论文超100篇，谷歌学术总引用超30000次。公司自主研发的MinT托管式强化学习平台，突破万亿参数模型训练的算力与效率瓶颈，GPU成本降低至约10%。基于该技术平台，打造Macaron个人生活智能体等多个现象级应用，覆盖数字娱乐、智慧生活、医疗健康等领域，服务全球数百万用户。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Andrew
Mindverse Founder & President, RITS Intelligent Content Generation Research Center Director
Mindverse, incubated within CIITS, specializes in the R&D of reinforcement learning (RL) foundations for trillion-parameter large models. The team comprises experts from top-tier institutions such as MIT, Tsinghua University, OpenAI, and Tencent. Collectively, they have published over 200 papers—including more than 100 at premier AI conferences—with a total of over 30,000 citations on Google Scholar. The company’s proprietary MinT managed reinforcement learning platform has broken through the computational and efficiency bottlenecks of trillion-parameter model training, reducing GPU costs to approximately 10%. Leveraging this platform, Mindverse has developed several "phenomenal" applications, such as the Macaron personal life agent. These solutions span digital entertainment, smart living, and healthcare, serving millions of users worldwide.

guestVisitList.name: 周银汉
guestVisitList.introduce: 周银汉，AnyInt 创始人、连续创业者，前谷歌 AI 创始工程师、YouTube 技术负责人，上海交大、芝加哥大学背景。深耕大模型底层调度与智能体基础设施，创立 AnyInt 一站式多模型接入平台，长期面向开发者赛事、创业社群提供模型资源与技术扶持，致力于降低 AI 开发门槛。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Brian Zhou, Founder of AnyInt and a serial entrepreneur. He previously served as a founding engineer on Google’s AI team and a technical lead at YouTube, and holds academic credentials from Shanghai Jiao Tong University and the University of Chicago.
Specializing in large-model underlying scheduling and agent infrastructure, he founded AnyInt, a one-stop multi-model access platform. He has long provided model resources and technical support for developer competitions and startup communities, committed to lowering the barriers to AI development.

guestVisitList.name: 赵炜慈
guestVisitList.introduce: EigenFlux：全球首个Agent原生通信和广播网络
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Chief Product Operator @EigenFlux

guestVisitList.name: 黃煒鏘
guestVisitList.introduce: 现任 EvoMap 解决方案工程副总裁。前 Dify 全球解决方案负责人，曾任微软、Kong、GitLab 架构师。拥有 10+ 年 APAC 区域 AI 与云原生实战经验，主导过金融、汽车、监管等多行业头部客户从 PoC 到生产级的完整交付。现聚焦于企业级智能体规模化落地、Agent 自进化与多 Agent 协作。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: VP of Solutions Engineering at EvoMap with 10+ years of APAC experience in AI and cloud-native architecture. Previously Global Head of Solution Architecture at Dify and Solutions Architect at Microsoft, Kong, and GitLab. Proven track record of leading production-grade AI and modernization deliveries for industry leaders across finance, automotive, and regulation. Currently pioneering the enterprise scale-up of AI Agents, focusing on self-evolution, multi-agent collaboration, and production stability.

guestVisitList.name: 李卓
guestVisitList.introduce:
李卓 ｜ 联合创始人 & COO
资深全球化营销专家，拥有亿级用户产品的增长操盘经验。曾主导多款AI创新产品从0到1的全球发布，并搭建了覆盖7大语种、100+国家的全渠道海外营销网络。
在深涌智能，她全面负责国际业务拓展与营收增长，当前正集中推进新加坡、东南亚、中东、日本及美国等核心市场的进入。目前已与多家区域头部客户达成合作，为AI产品的全球化落地打开了实质性突破口。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Jolie Li | Co-founder & COO

A global growth and marketing leader with a proven track record of scaling products to hundreds of millions of users. Successfully led the 0-to-1 global launch of multiple AI products and built a worldwide marketing network spanning 100+ countries and seven languages.

At Shenyong Intelligence, she oversees global expansion and revenue growth, leading the company's market entry across Singapore, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Japan, and the U.S. She has secured partnerships with leading regional enterprises, driving the global adoption of the company's AI solutions.

guestVisitList.name: 丁哲章
guestVisitList.introduce:
艾欧智能联合创始人
北京大学硕士，自动驾驶规划与控制专家，曾在自动驾驶及机器人领域核心刊物与顶尖国际会议上发表多篇学术论文，并连续数届担任国内知名自动驾驶挑战赛专项赛事负责人。
曾担任北京大学信息科学技术学院学生会主席，北京大学黑客马拉松发起人。曾任中国上市公司柯力传感机器人事业部负责人。同时，作为深圳理工大学人工智能研究院创业导师，深化校企合作的同时，积极赋能下一代科技创新人才。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
IO-AI Tech Co-Founder
Autonomous driving planning and control expert with a Master's from Peking University. Former Head of Robotics Division at Keli Sensing. Multiple papers in leading robotics journals and conferences.

guestVisitList.name: 刘思齐
guestVisitList.introduce: 奇点变量创始人&CEO，业内首个机器人海马体仿生记忆系统，前地平线机器人高级产品经理，深耕AI与机器人行业近十年，赋能客户数十家。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Founder and CEO of Singvar Variable Technology Co., Ltd.
Developer of the industry's first bionic hippocampus memory system for robots.
Former Senior Product Manager at Horizon Robotics.
Nearly ten years of experience specializing in AI and robotics, having provided technological empowerment for dozens of enterprise clients.

guestVisitList.name: 徐世哲
guestVisitList.introduce: 观点跃迁CEO徐世哲，毕业于帝国理工学院 英国皇家艺术学院；前联影集团AI创新业务负责人，集团前0.1%绩效得主；IF DIA IDEA等十余项设计奖大满贯硬件Maker；其硬件作品曾合作央视撒贝宁带货、登陆老罗科技春晚、合作影视飓风Tim、湖视汪涵带货的国民级C端硬件产品创造者；
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Xu Shizhe, CEO of VP Leap, holds degrees from Imperial College London and the Royal College of Art. Former Head of AI Innovation Business at United Imaging Group, where he ranked in the top 0.1% of performers. A hardware maker with a grand slam of over a dozen design awards including iF, DIA, and IDEA. His hardware creations have gained national prominence—featured on CCTV with host Beining Sa , launched at yonghao Luo's annual tech gala, collaborated with tech influencer Tim of Mediastorm, and promoted by Hunan TV host Han Wang, making him the creator of iconic consumer hardware products beloved by the Chinese public.

guestVisitList.name: 林修醇
guestVisitList.introduce:
拥有计算机科学与计算密码学的跨学科教育背景，本科攻读计算机专业，后获北京大学光华管理学院硕士学位，现于北京大学新结构经济学研究院攻读经济学博士，学习期间创立荆华密算，聚焦密码科技与信息安全领域的创新研究及技术转化。

作为“清华系”AI科技创业者，林修醇带领荆华密算将高性能AI密态计算技术的研发与商业化落地。他主导研发的核心技术成功将AI密态计算的时间性能损耗降低了千倍，并在数据传输、存储、计算全流程实现了零精度损耗下的“可用不可见”。这一突破从根本上打破加密技术中关于安全、效率与通用性的行业“不可能三角”，解决了大模型时代AI Agent落地“最后一公里”的AI安全难题。

2025年，他带领团队参加了创业邦2025 DEMO CHINA大赛。经过多轮评审与角逐，他率领团队在126家科技企业脱颖而出，并斩获2025 DEMO CHINA最高荣誉“DEMO GOD”，成为首位获此殊荣的“00后”创业者，得到了《人民日报》、《光明日报》、《新华社》等权威媒体的关注和报道，团队的创新成果获得行业与社会的双重高度认可。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Lin Xiuchun brings a cross-disciplinary background in computer science and computational cryptography. He earned his bachelor's degree in computer science, followed by a master's degree from Peking University's Guanghua School of Management. He is currently pursuing a PhD in economics at Peking University's Institute of New Structural Economics. During his studies, he founded Jinghua Misuan, a company focused on cryptographic technology and information security innovation and technology transfer.

    As a Tsinghua-affiliated AI tech entrepreneur, Lin Xiuchun leads Jinghua Misuan in the R&D and commercial deployment of high-performance AI confidential computing technology. Under his leadership, the core technology reduced the time-performance overhead of AI confidential computing by roughly three orders of magnitude, while achieving full-pipeline "usable but invisible" data protection across transmission, storage, and computation with zero precision loss. This breakthrough fundamentally dismantles the long-standing "impossible triangle" of security, efficiency, and universality in encryption technology, solving the critical last-mile AI security challenge for AI Agent deployment in the LLM era.

    In 2025, he led his team to compete at the DEMO CHINA 2025 competition, organized by CYzone. After multiple rounds of evaluation and competition, his team emerged from 126 tech startups to claim the top honor—"DEMO GOD"—making him the first post-2000s founder to receive this recognition. The achievement drew coverage from People's Daily, Guangming Daily, and Xinhua News Agency, earning dual recognition from both the industry and society at large.

guestVisitList.name: 陆游
guestVisitList.introduce: AI SEMI 联合创始人&首席执行官
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Co-Founder & CEO of AI SEMI

guestVisitList.name: 黄一
guestVisitList.introduce:
黄一，2004年出生，现任上海萝博派对科技有限公司创始人兼 CEO。其本科就读于哈尔滨工业大学未来技术学院，方向为机器人工程。

黄一长期专注机器人本体、运动控制与具身智能系统研发。早期曾参与陆空两栖无人机项目，负责从仿真到实物的系统搭建，并完成路径规划、结构拓扑优化与飞控电路设计等工作；随后主导双足机器人 Alexbot 的结构与步态规划，完成五自由度单腿机构及拓扑优化验证，并基于 Isaac Gym 完成仿真步态规划与实机部署；2024年，其在哈工大科技支持下完成 AlexbotMini 全栈开源项目，覆盖机械、硬件、控制系统、自然学习训练与 Sim2Real 部署，推动项目被多家创业公司与高校实验室应用。

2025年，黄一创立萝博派对，带领团队在较短时间内完成双足机器人从机械结构、电控到控制系统的全栈开发，并持续推进全开源人形机器人平台、具身智能 Infra、运动控制、VLA 与世界模型等方向的研发与生态建设。公司成立后快速获得资本市场认可，种子轮及天使轮融资总计超过 1 亿美元，投资方包括经纬创投、小米战投等知名机构及产业资本，为公司在全栈开源人形机器人平台、核心技术研发和全球开发者生态建设方面的持续投入提供了重要支撑。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Huang Yi, born in 2004, is the Founder and CEO of RoboParty Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. He earned his bachelor’s degree in Robotics Engineering from the School of Future Technology, Harbin Institute of Technology.
Huang Yi has long dedicated himself to the research and development of robot bodies, motion control, and embodied intelligence systems. Early in his career, he participated in an air-land amphibious UAV project, where he oversaw end-to-end system development from simulation to physical prototyping, including path planning, structural topology optimization, and flight control circuit design. He later led the mechanical design and gait planning of Alexbot, a bipedal robot. He developed and validated a five-degree-of-freedom single-leg mechanism with topology optimization, and implemented simulated gait planning and real-robot deployment based on NVIDIA Isaac Gym. In 2024, with technological support from Harbin Institute of Technology, he launched AlexbotMini as a fully open-source full-stack project. The project covers mechanical design, hardware electronics, control systems, reinforcement learning training, and Sim2Real transfer, and has been adopted by numerous startups and university research labs.
In 2025, Huang Yi founded RoboParty. Under his leadership, the team completed full-stack development of bipedal robots—spanning mechanical structures, electronic control units, and control systems—in a condensed timeframe. The team continues to advance R&D and ecosystem development across fully open-source humanoid robot platforms, embodied intelligence infrastructure, motion control, Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, and world models. The company has quickly gained recognition from capital markets, securing aggregate funding exceeding $100 million across its seed and angel rounds. Investors include prominent institutions and industrial capital such as Matrix Partners China and Xiaomi Strategic Investment. This funding provides critical backing for sustained investment in fully open-source humanoid robot platforms, core technology R&D, and the development of a global developer ecosystem.

guestVisitList.name: 陈泽洲
guestVisitList.introduce: 陈泽洲，万维流形 ForFlow.ai 创始人。公司团队具备全球头部云厂商、搜索引擎、数据基础设施、深度学习和产业 AI 工程经验。万维流形定位为 AI 资产运营方，面向 AI+ 与数据要素时代，服务政府、国央企、园区和区域产业链，在安全可控的前提下，把 AI 从一次性试点变成可验证、可复用、可持续增长的产业能力，让 AI 投入更清楚地对应效率、成本和收益结果，并建设“场景评估、资产台账、合规证据链、区域运营”一体化基础设施。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Zezhou Chen founded ForFlow.ai, positioned as an AI asset operator for the AI+ and data-element era. The founding team brings hands-on experience from leading global cloud providers, search engines, data infrastructure, deep learning, and industrial AI engineering.

ForFlow works with governments, state-owned enterprises (SOEs), industrial parks, and regional supply chains to turn AI from a one-off pilot into verifiable, reusable, and sustainably scalable industrial capability — under a secure and controllable framework. The company is building an integrated infrastructure spanning four layers: scenario evaluation, asset ledgering, compliance evidence chains, and regional operations — so that every AI investment maps clearly to measurable efficiency, cost, and revenue outcomes.

nameEn: Yangtze River Delta Investment Corporation · Yangtze River Delta Artificial Intelligence Industrial Cluster Development Synergy Forum
desc: 论坛由长三角投资（上海）有限公司主办，活动汇聚沪苏浙皖产业主管领导、国际AI领域权威专家、中科院院士、长三角一体化顶层规划智库，集结高校科研院所、头部AI企业、产业投资机构等产学研投融用翘楚。论坛设置领导致辞、省市工信主题分享、海内外专家主旨演讲、跨区域战略合作签约、高端圆桌研讨等多元环节。活动围绕长三角AI产业协同发展核心议题，落地人工智能基础研究、协同投资、场景应用三大跨区域合作平台，打通技术、人才、资本、项目跨区域流转通道。论坛紧扣长三角一体化国家战略，破除区域产业协同壁垒，完善全域人工智能创新生态，持续赋能产业链资源联动，聚力培育长三角世界级人工智能产业集群，助推区域高质量一体化发展。
descEn:
Hosted by Yangtze River Delta Investment (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., the forum brings together regional industrial authorities, global AI experts, CAS academicians, top Yangtze River Delta think tank specialists, and elites from universities, leading AI firms and investment institutions.
Its agenda includes opening remarks, provincial industrial authority speeches, keynote addresses, cross-regional cooperation signing and high-end panel dialogues. Centered on coordinated AI industrial growth, it launches three cross-regional platforms for basic research, joint investment and scenario applications to circulate technologies, talents, capital and projects across regions.
In line with the Yangtze River Delta integration strategy, the forum removes industrial collaboration barriers, optimizes regional AI innovation ecosystems, links industrial chain resources, builds a world-class local AI cluster and drives high-quality regional integrated development.
