guestVisitList.name: 彭慈湘
guestVisitList.introduce: 彭慈湘，高级经济师，现任中国国投高新产业投资有限公司党委委员、副总经理，兼任亚普股份董事。长期在国投体系从事产业战略、股权投资、园区运营管理工作，牵头布局人工智能、半导体、先进材料等战略性新兴产业投资，统筹科创项目孵化与产业链资源整合，深度参与国家级科创产业生态搭建，具备国资赋能 AI 产业集群发展丰富实操经验

guestVisitList.name: 路易斯·塞科
guestVisitList.introduce:
路易斯・塞科，多伦多大学数学系教授、数学金融硕士项目主任，1996 年创办量化金融与资产管理专业研究实验室 RiskLab。1989 年于普林斯顿大学取得数学博士学位，师从菲尔兹奖得主查尔斯・费弗曼，曾任加州理工学院贝特曼讲师，1992 年入职多伦多大学。
现任菲尔兹研究所可持续发展中心主席、加拿大向量研究院附属教授，主攻人工智能、可持续发展与金融交叉融合研究，长期探索人工智能技术破解全球可持续发展难题。
在人工智能方向成果丰硕：团队研发金融时序神经嵌入算法、面向 ESG 自动配置的弱监督学习框架、基于 Transformer 的财报会议文本分析模型；主持多项 MITACS 资助生成式大模型研究课题，围绕大语言模型落地负责任投资平台开展系统攻关；深耕因果 AI，搭建基于有向无环图的可持续金融因果推断体系；运用可解释人工智能开展气候风险建模、碳排放智能分析；提出深度时间神经网络，高效求解高维偏微分方程，相关成果发表于《金融数据科学杂志》《应用数学与计算》等权威期刊。
先后斩获加拿大 NSERC 协同创新奖、西班牙民事功勋骑士勋章、西班牙伊莎贝尔天主教勋章（西班牙国家级最高功勋荣誉之一）；受聘中国人民大学、慕尼黑工业大学、苏黎世大学等多所国际知名高校客座教授。产业层面，联合创立资产管理公司 Sigma Analysis & Management，曾任总裁兼首席执行官；现为 AI 可持续投资平台 NatureBrain 联合创始人、首席科学官。
曾受邀在 2023、2025 世界人工智能大会、2022 达沃斯论坛等顶级国际峰会作专题分享，长期以数学、数据科学与人工智能为工具，聚焦气候风险、碳交易市场、ESG 投资、生物多样性保护等全球性可持续发展议题开展产学研创新。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Professor Luis Seco is a Professor of Mathematics at the University of Toronto, Director of the Mathematical Finance Program, and Founding Director of RiskLab, a university research laboratory established in 1996 dedicated to quantitative finance and asset management. He holds a Ph.D. in Mathematics from Princeton University (1989), where he studied under Fields Medalist Charles Fefferman, and began his academic career as a Bateman Instructor at the California Institute of Technology before joining the University of Toronto in 1992.
Professor Seco's current research is centered at the intersection of artificial intelligence, sustainability, and finance. He serves as Chair of the Centre for Sustainable Development at the Fields Institute and is an Affiliate Faculty member at the Vector Institute, where his work bridges advanced AI with real-world transformation. His core professional mission is bringing artificial intelligence into today's sustainability challenges to build a better world for future generations.
In the AI domain, Professor Seco has made significant contributions across multiple areas:
Machine Learning for Finance: His research group has developed neural embedding techniques for financial time-series data ("Neural Embeddings of Financial Time Series Data," Journal of Financial Data Science, 2020), weak supervision frameworks for automated ESG portfolio construction, and transformer-based language models for analyzing financial call transcript data.
Generative AI and LLMs: He has led multiple MITACS-funded projects (2023–2026) integrating large-scale data sources with Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) using advanced NLP techniques for quantitative modeling. He also led a project on "Improvements and Large Language Model Research for the Responsible Investment Research Platform" (2023–2025).
AI for Climate and Sustainability: His work applies mathematical modeling and machine learning to challenges involving climate, finance, and environmental systems. Recent projects include climate risk modeling with explainable AI, causal discovery in sustainable finance, and AI-driven carbon emissions analysis.
Causal AI: He has pioneered work on automating causal discovery in financial markets and beyond, and developed frameworks for causal inference in sustainable finance using directed acyclic graphs (DAGs).
Deep Learning for PDEs: His team developed "Deep-Time Neural Networks," an efficient approach for solving high-dimensional partial differential equations (Applied Mathematics and Computation, 2025).
Professor Seco has received numerous honors recognizing his contributions, including the Order of Isabel la Católica (2025)—one of Spain's three highest orders of merit—the Knight of the Order of Civil Merit from the Government of Spain (2011), and the NSERC Synergy Award for Innovation (2007). He holds adjunct and guest professorships at multiple international institutions, including Renmin University (Beijing), Technical University of Munich, University of Zurich, Florida International University, and Kutaisi International University.
Beyond academia, he is Co-founder and Chief Science Officer of NatureBrain, an AI-powered investment platform for nature-based solutions, and previously served as President and CEO of Sigma Analysis & Management Ltd., an asset management firm he co-founded in 1999. His expertise has been sought in high-level forums including the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (Shanghai, 2023, 2025), the Davos Economic Forum (2022), and numerous international conferences on AI, sustainability, and finance.
Professor Seco's work is defined by a singular focus: using artificial intelligence, mathematics, and data science to address the world's most pressing sustainability challenges—from climate risk and carbon markets to ESG investing and biodiversity.

guestVisitList.name: 王战
guestVisitList.introduce: 王战，经济学教授、博导，国务院特殊津贴专家。现任上海社科院国家高端智库顾问、中国国际经济交流中心常务理事，复旦大学客座教授。曾任上海市委副秘书长、上海社科院院长、上海市社联主席等重要职务，全国政协委员、全国人大代表。深耕宏观经济、城市战略四十余年，主导浦东开发、入世配套、自贸区等多项国家重大战略研究，近年聚焦人工智能、数字经济赋能区域高质量发展研究，是国内顶尖决策咨询专家。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Professor of Economics and Doctoral Supervisor, Recipient of Special Government Allowance from the State Council. He currently serves as Advisor to the National Top Think Tank at Shanghai Academy of Social Sciences, Executive Director of the China Center for International Economic Exchanges, and Guest Professor at Fudan University.
He previously held key posts including Deputy Secretary-General of the CPC Shanghai Municipal Committee, President of Shanghai Academy of Social Sciences, and Chairman of Shanghai Federation of Social Science Associations. He has served as a Member of the National Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference and a Deputy to the National People's Congress.
With over four decades of research in macroeconomics and urban strategy, he has presided over major national strategic studies covering Pudong Development & Opening-up, China’s WTO accession supporting measures, pilot free trade zone construction and more. In recent years, his research has focused on how artificial intelligence and digital economy empower high-quality regional development, making him a top national expert in decision-making consultation.

guestVisitList.name: 杰森·斯莱特
guestVisitList.introduce: 联合国工业发展组织（UNIDO）数字化转型与人工智能司司长、首席人工智能创新与数字官。统筹联合国工发组织人工智能、数字化转型、创新领域全部项目规划实施，聚焦全球数字经济普惠可持续发展，牵头推进《全球数字契约》目标二相关落地工作，致力于推动包容、普惠、可持续的全球数字化转型。入职工发组织后，历任信息技术、战略财务、业务转型、传播部门负责人，主导组织整体数字化升级方案落地；入职前深耕英国公共部门财务咨询，曾任大型跨国企业财务负责人，为特许管理会计师，持有工商管理硕士学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Chief, Division for Digital Transformation and Artificial Intelligence / Chief of AI, Innovation and Digital Officer, United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO)
He oversees all UNIDO projects and programmes on artificial intelligence, digital transformation and innovation with a strong focus on the global digital economy. He co-leads delivery work under Objective 2 of the Global Digital Compact, advancing inclusive and sustainable digital transition worldwide.
Previously as Digital and Innovation Officer of UNIDO, he steered the organization-wide digital transformation initiative and innovative solution development. He has headed UNIDO’s departments covering IT, strategic financial management, business transformation and communications. Prior to joining UNIDO, he led financial management consulting for the UK public sector and worked as finance lead at a large multinational corporation. He is a Chartered Management Accountant and holds an MBA.

guestVisitList.name: 宋海涛
guestVisitList.introduce:
职位/头衔：上海人工智能研究院院长，全球工业人工智能联盟卓越中心秘书长
专业领域：前沿技术创新、全球AI治理与合作

guestVisitList.name: 刘俊华
guestVisitList.introduce: 科大讯飞副总裁、讯飞人工智能研究院副院长、数据资源部总经理，机器翻译技术总负责人。长期深耕自然语言处理、多语种语音交互、机器翻译与星火认知大模型技术研发及产业化落地，牵头北京 2022 冬奥会官方多语种语言服务平台建设，打造多项国家级标杆应用。主导大模型数据体系搭建、多语种能力迭代与技术攻关，持续推动智能语音与跨语言智能技术行业标准共建。频繁受邀出席国内外人工智能高端峰会，围绕通用大模型创新、AI 产业落地、人工智能全球化布局、产学研协同创新发表专业观点，是国内跨语言人工智能领域资深技术专家。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Vice President of iFLYTEK, Vice Dean of iFLYTEK AI Research Institute, General Manager of Data Resource Department and Chief Technical Lead of Machine Translation. He has long been committed to the research, development and industrial application of natural language processing, multilingual speech interaction, machine translation and Spark cognitive large models. He led the construction of the official multilingual language service platform for the Beijing 2022 Winter Olympics and delivered multiple national benchmark AI applications. He presides over the construction of large-model data systems and iteration of multilingual capabilities, and promotes the formulation of industrial standards for intelligent speech and cross-lingual technologies. He is a frequent speaker at top AI summits at home and abroad, sharing insights on general large model innovation, AI commercial implementation, global layout of artificial intelligence and industry-university-research collaboration, and is a senior expert in cross-lingual artificial intelligence in China.

guestVisitList.name: 刘道福
guestVisitList.introduce:
刘道福，寒武纪联合创始人&副总裁，2010年于中国科学技术大学计算机学院获学士学位，2015年于中国科学院计算技术研究所获博士学位。历任中国科学院计算技术研究所助理研究员、高级工程师和硕士生导师。2016年3月作为创始团队成员加入寒武纪并任副总裁。
刘道福博士从事人工智能和体系结构交叉领域的研究多年，提出了全球首个通用机器学习处理器架构，具有超过10年芯片研发经验，并成功负责多款芯片的流片。曾在寒武纪负责芯片研发、产品和市场等工作，目前负责寒武纪的战略和投资工作。刘道福获得了中国科学院杰出科技成就奖（2019年）、中关村高聚工程企业创新领军人才等奖励。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Dr. Liu Daofu received his bachelor's degree in computer science from the University of Science and Technology of China in 2010 and received a doctorate degree from the Institute of Computing Technology, Chinese Academy of Sciences in 2015, in where he served as assistant researcher, senior engineer, and graduate mentor.
Dr. Liu Daofu joined Cambricon as one of the founding team members in March 2016 and served as Vice President since then.
Dr. Liu Daofu has conducted research for many years at the intersection of artificial intelligence and computer architecture, and he proposed the world's first general-purpose machine learning processor architecture. Dr. Liu has over 10 years of experience in chip development, and has successfully led the tape-out of multiple chips. 
He was previously in charge of chip development, product, and marketing team at Cambricon, and is currently responsible for strategy and investment at the company. Liu Daofu has received awards including the Outstanding Science and Technology Achievement Award of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and Enterprise Innovation Leading Talent under the Zhongguancun High-end Leading Talents Aggregation Project.

guestVisitList.name: 毛军发
guestVisitList.introduce:
毛军发，1965年8月出生于湖南邵阳，工学博士、教授。中国科学院院士，射频异质异构集成全国重点实验室主任。
毛军发在国防科技大学应用物理系辐射物理专业学习，获学士学位；在中国科学院上海原子核研究所实验核物理专业读硕士研究生，获硕士学位；在上海交通大学电子工程系电磁场与微波技术专业读博士研究生，获博士学位；先后在香港中文大学、美国加州大学伯克莱分校做博士后研究。
毛军发主要从事高速电路互连与射频电子封装研究，担任相关领域国家自然基金委创新群体负责人、基础科学中心负责人以及973首席科学家。曾获得国家科技进步一等奖、国家自然科学二等奖、国家技术发明二等奖、国家科技进步二等奖、全国创新争先奖、光华工程科技奖、何梁何利科学与技术创新奖各1项，获国家教学成果二等奖2项。担任中国电子学会副理事长，IEEE Fellow。
发表IEEE刊物论文170多篇（包括我国电子封装领域首篇IEEE JSSC论文），被他引评价为相关领域的“基础性工作”，被《国际半导体技术发展路线图》3次采用。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Mao Junfa, born in Shaoyang, Hunan in August 1965, holds a Doctor of Engineering and is a Professor, Member of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, Director of the National Key Laboratory of Radio Frequency Heterogeneous Integration, and IEEE Fellow. He received his bachelor’s, master’s and doctoral degrees from National University of Defense Technology, Shanghai Institute of Nuclear Research, CAS and Shanghai Jiao Tong University respectively, and completed postdoctoral research at the Chinese University of Hong Kong and UC Berkeley. His research focuses on high-speed circuit interconnection and RF electronic packaging. He has served as the chief scientist of a 973 Program project, leader of NSFC innovative research group and basic science center. He has published more than 170 IEEE journal papers, including China’s first IEEE JSSC paper in electronic packaging, with research adopted three times by the International Technology Roadmap for Semiconductors. He has won numerous national science and technology awards, and serves as Vice Chairman of the China Institute of Electronics, supporting underlying hardware innovation for AI chips and heterogeneous integration systems.

guestVisitList.name: 顾志鹏
guestVisitList.introduce: 顾志鹏是长三角战略性新兴产业股权投资、科创企业资本赋能领域资深专家，现任江苏高科技投资集团党委委员、江苏高投创业投资管理有限公司总经理，负责多只省级百亿级产业基金运营管理。深耕国有创投行业多年，聚焦人工智能、集成电路、生物医药、数字经济等前沿赛道开展股权投资与拟上市企业全周期培育，深度布局AI算力、智能科技领域优质项目，赋能区域科创产业集群集聚，高度契合WAIC算力底座、AI产业资本协同发展主题。长期参与长三角科创投融资体系搭建、独角兽企业培育与企业境内外上市赋能，拥有丰富的政企资源整合、产业链投融资对接经验，在长三角创投圈具备深厚行业影响力。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Gu Zhipeng is a seasoned expert in equity investment for strategic emerging industries and capital empowerment for tech startups in the Yangtze River Delta. He currently serves as a Member of the Party Committee of Jiangsu High-Tech Investment Group and General Manager of Jiangsu High-Tech Venture Capital Management Co., Ltd., overseeing the operation and management of multiple provincial-level 10-billion-yuan industrial funds.
With years of in-depth experience in state-owned venture capital, he focuses on equity investment and full-cycle incubation of pre-listed enterprises across cutting-edge sectors including artificial intelligence, integrated circuits, biomedicine and the digital economy. He has invested heavily in high-quality projects related to AI computing infrastructure and intelligent technology to foster the agglomeration of regional tech innovation clusters, which is highly aligned with WAIC’s core themes of computing infrastructure development and collaborative growth of the AI industrial ecosystem.
He has long participated in building the investment and financing system for technological innovation, nurturing unicorn enterprises and supporting domestic and overseas IPOs in the Yangtze River Delta, with extensive experience in government-enterprise resource integration and industrial chain investment & financing matchmaking, enjoying profound industry influence within the Yangtze River Delta venture capital community.

guestVisitList.name: 许春山
guestVisitList.introduce: 上海人工智能研究院副院长，亿嘉和创始合伙人、灵巧智能董事长。深耕机器人与具身智能产业化近 30 年，吴文俊人工智能一等奖获得者，工信部人形机器人标委会委员，专注特种巡检、灵巧操作机器人研发，推动 AI 技术落地制造、电力等实体经济场景。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Dr. Xu Chunshan Vice President, Shanghai AI Research Institute Co-founder of Yijiahe, Chairman of Dexterous Intelligence Nearly 30 years in robotics & embodied intelligence industrialization, winner of Wu Wenjun AI Progress First Prize, Committee Member of MIIT Humanoid Robot Standardization Committee, focusing on special inspection robots and dexterous manipulation to deploy AI in manufacturing, power and real economy.

guestVisitList.name: 程鹏
guestVisitList.introduce: 第十二届上海市委委员，长三角投资（上海）有限公司党委书记、董事长。曾任中共上海市经济和信息化工作委员会书记，上海市规划和国土资源管理局副局长，上海市金山区委副书记，上海市生态环境局党组书记、局长。长期统筹战略性新兴产业、数字经济与区域协同发展工作，牵头推进长三角一体化示范区科创载体、人工智能产业投资与跨区域智能产业生态建设，持续推动人工智能赋能长三角高质量协同发展。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Cheng Peng, Member of the 12th CPC Shanghai Municipal Committee, Secretary of the Party Committee and Chairman of Yangtze River Delta Investment (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. He previously served as Secretary of CPC Shanghai Municipal Commission of Economy and Informatization, Deputy Director of Shanghai Municipal Bureau of Planning and Land Resources, Deputy Secretary of CPC Jinshan District Committee, and Secretary of the Party Leadership Group & Director of Shanghai Ecology and Environment Bureau. He has long coordinated the development of emerging strategic industries, digital economy and regional collaboration, led the construction of sci-tech carriers, AI industrial investment and cross-regional intelligent industrial ecosystem within the Yangtze River Delta Integrated Demonstration Zone, and consistently promoted high-quality coordinated development empowered by artificial intelligence.

name: 高鹄资本·AI Frontier talks：引领智能新高度，创新智能新形态AI论坛
nameEn: AI Frontier Talks: Elevating Intelligence. Evolving the Form
desc:
2026年，人工智能正走向新的分岔路口。大模型竞争进入深水区，后训练与Agent成为新的创新焦点；世界模型与具身智能加速融合，AI正从数字世界迈向真实世界；智能硬件则不断拓展智能能力的边界与入口。
面对技术路线的分化、产业格局的重塑与资本方向的重构，高鹄资本邀请来自多个AI领域的创新企业创始人及核心负责人，分享他们对于AI未来的最新实践与关键判断。
没有空泛预测，只有来自创业一线的真实思考。欢迎到场交流。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有19日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn:
In 2026, artificial intelligence stands at a new crossroads.
As foundation models enter a deeper stage of competition, post-training and AI agents have emerged as the next frontier of innovation. Meanwhile, world models and embodied AI are rapidly converging, bringing intelligence from the digital realm into the physical world. At the same time, intelligent hardware is expanding the boundaries and interfaces of AI capabilities.
Against a backdrop of diverging technology paths, evolving industry dynamics, and shifting capital allocation, Cygnus Equity brings together founders and leaders from across the AI ecosystem to share their latest practices, insights, and perspectives on the future of artificial intelligence.
We look forward to welcoming founders, investors, industry leaders, and AI enthusiasts to the conversation.

name: 昆仑万维·世界模型与多模态范式跃迁论坛
nameEn: World Model and Multimodal Paradigm Transition
desc: 昆仑万维世界模型与多模态革命论坛作为 WAIC 官方重点专场，以 “智融万象 重构范式”为主题，聚焦可交互世界模型、AI 视频大模型、AI 音乐大模型、机器人模型四大前沿方向，汇聚全球顶尖院士、学者、企业家、艺术家、创作者，集中发布昆仑万维新一代 AIGC 技术矩阵与全球化战略，推动 AI 技术从实验室走向工业化、全球化、大众化，构建面向未来的AI 原生内容生态 。论坛以 “技术发布、产业落地、生态共建、全球共赢” 为核心，打造中国 AIGC 走向世界的顶级展示平台，发布全球领先的四大旗舰模型，定义下一代内容生成范式。
descEn:
The Kunlun Tech World Models and Multimodal Revolution Forum, an official key session of WAIC, will be held under the theme “Intelligent Integration of All Things, Reshaping Paradigms.” The forum will focus on four frontier areas: interactive world models, AI video foundation models, AI music foundation models, and robotics models.
It will bring together leading academicians, scholars, entrepreneurs, artists, and creators from around the world to unveil Kunlun Wanwei’s next-generation AIGC technology matrix and global strategy. The forum aims to advance AI technologies from the laboratory toward industrialization, globalization, and mass adoption, while building a future-oriented AI-native content ecosystem.
Centered on “technology launches, industrial implementation, ecosystem co-creation, and global shared success,” the forum will serve as a premier platform for showcasing China’s AIGC innovations to the world. It will introduce four globally leading flagship models and help define

guestVisitList.name: 王珞丹
guestVisitList.introduce: 王珞丹，中国内地女演员。1984年1月30日出生于内蒙古自治区赤峰市，2005年毕业于北京电影学院表演系本科班。2007年，因出演青春励志剧《奋斗》而走红。2008年1月29日，王珞丹加入陕西卫视组织的“朝阳行动2008·水窖寄深情”大型公益活动。2009年主演电视剧《我的青春谁做主》。2012年主演的两部年代剧《红娘子》和《山楂树之恋》在江苏卫视连续播出。[1-5] 2013年，王珞丹凭借电影《搜索》获得第29届中国电影金鸡奖最佳女配角奖。2014年主演电影《后会无期》。2015年主演的电影《宅女侦探桂香》于8月13日上映。2016年主演的电影《我的战争》9月15日上映。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Wang Luodan is an actress from Chinese mainland. She was born on January 30, 1984 in Chifeng, Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region, and graduated from the Performance Department of Beijing Film Academy with a bachelor’s degree in 2005.
She rose to fame in 2007 for starring in the inspirational youth drama Struggle. On January 29, 2008, she took part in the large-scale public welfare activity "Chaoyang Campaign 2008 · Water Cellars Carry Deep Affection" organized by Shaanxi Satellite TV. In 2009, she headlined the TV drama Who Is in Charge of My Youth. Two period dramas she starred in, Red Lady and Under the Hawthorn Tree, aired consecutively on Jiangsu Satellite TV in 2012.
In 2013, Wang Luodan won the Best Supporting Actress Award at the 29th China Golden Rooster Awards for the film Caught in the Web. She starred in the movie The Continent in 2014. Her film Detective Gui hit theaters on August 13, 2015, and another starring work My War was released on September 15, 2016.

guestVisitList.name: 崔睿
guestVisitList.introduce: 崔睿是国内知名青年导演、编剧、制片人，签约于陈思诚创立的壹同制作（北京壹同传奇影视文化有限公司），同时自主创立影视工作室 VIVA Inspirations；他本科毕业于中国传媒大学动画与数字艺术学院数字媒体艺术专业，硕士就读美国南加州大学电影学院导演系，是唯一连续三年入选该校年度十佳导演的华人，旅美八年深耕好莱坞工业化影视体系，曾以联合执行制片人身份参与《决战中途岛》，深度参与《速度与激情 7》《侏罗纪世界》《蚁人》等大片制作，短片《玉蝴蝶》《自由意志》《春花》斩获奥斯卡学生组、北美青年电影节等多项国际奖项，2020 年入选全美华人 30 位 30 岁以下精英榜单；回国后深耕悬疑类型创作，长片处女作《消失的她》斩获 35.23 亿票房，入围北京国际电影节天坛奖并拿下长春电影节最佳处女作，还执导《唐人街探案之青年侦探团》《2023 最美表演》等作品，擅长融合成熟海外工业拍摄体系与本土现实议题，持续在壹同制作体系内开发原创影视项目。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Cui Rui is a renowned young Chinese director, screenwriter and producer signed with Yi Tong Productions (Beijing Yitong Legend Film & Television Culture Co., Ltd.), a label founded by Chen Sicheng. He also founded his own film studio VIVA Inspirations. He earned his bachelor’s degree in Digital Media Arts from the School of Animation and Digital Arts, Communication University of China, and completed his Master’s degree in Directing at the USC School of Cinematic Arts. He is the only Chinese filmmaker to be named one of USC’s Top 10 Student Directors for three consecutive years. Having spent eight years in the U.S., he immersed himself in Hollywood’s industrial film production system. He served as co-executive producer on Midway and took part in major blockbuster productions including Furious 7, Jurassic World and Ant-Man. His short films such as Jade Butterfly, Free Will and Spring Blossom won numerous international honors including awards at the Student Academy Awards and North American Youth Film Festivals. In 2020, he was featured on the list of 30 Under 30 Outstanding Chinese Americans. After returning to China, he has focused on suspense genre filmmaking. His debut feature film Lost in the Stars grossed 3.523 billion RMB at the box office, was shortlisted for the Tiantan Awards at the Beijing International Film Festival, and won the Best First Feature Award at the Changchun Film Festival. He also directed works including Detective Chinatown: Teen Detectives and the 2023 installment of The Most Beautiful Performance. Specializing in integrating mature Hollywood industrial filmmaking techniques with local realistic themes, he continues to develop original film and television projects under Yi Tong Productions.

guestVisitList.name: Alberto Taiuti
guestVisitList.introduce:
Alberto Taiuti 现任Reactor AI首席技术官（CTO），是深耕世界模型与实时视频AI领域的资深工程师，现定居美国加州。此前于英国工作生活，毕业于苏格兰阿伯泰邓迪大学；成长于意大利佛罗伦萨周边，拥有丰富的欧美跨国从业与学术背景。
他专注于研发并落地具备实际产业价值的科技产品，目前正在布局全新技术创新项目，积极开放行业交流与合作。
从业履历履历丰厚，曾任Skydio高级自主系统软件工程师、Luma AI联合创始人，曾任职于苹果公司，负责AR/VR核心技术研发，同时拥有Codeplay Software技术研发经验。此外，他独立推出Slide AR产品，并为多个iOS端AR项目提供专业技术咨询服务。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Alberto Taiuti is a professional engineer specializing in world models and real-time video AI technologies. Currently serving as CTO of Reactor AI, he is based in California, USA. He previously worked and resided in the United Kingdom and earned his academic background from the University of Abertay Dundee in Scotland. Raised in the vicinity of Florence, Italy, he has accumulated rich international study and work experience across Europe and the United States.
With a passion for developing and launching high-value, market-oriented tech products, Alberto Taiuti is currently incubating innovative new technological projects at Reactor AI and is open to industry communication and cooperation.
Throughout his professional career, Alberto Taiuti has served as a Senior Autonomy Software Engineer at Skydio, co-founded Luma AI, and participated in core AR/VR technology research and development at Apple. He also worked as a key technical engineer at Codeplay Software. Beyond his industrial roles, he has independently launched the Slide AR product and provided professional technical consulting for multiple iOS AR projects.

guestVisitList.name: 黄晓明
guestVisitList.introduce: 黄晓明，演员、监制、出品人，中国电影家协会副主席。2000年毕业于北京电影学院表演系，2001年因出演电视剧《大汉天子》被观众熟知。出道20多年，他在《小城大事》《阳光俱乐部》《中国合伙人》《烈火英雄》《风声》《无问西东》《神雕侠侣》《新上海滩》《潜行者》《好事成双》等众多电影电视作品中的精彩表演，助其成为中国乃至亚洲备受关注与赞誉的国民演员。他曾凭借电影《中国合伙人》中“成东青”一角，揽获了第29届中国电影金鸡奖、第15届中国电影华表奖以及第32届大众电影百花奖——中国三大电影节的最佳男主角奖，成为中国最年轻的内地最佳男主角大满贯。2020年，他再次凭借电影《烈火英雄》中的“消防队长江立伟”，荣获第33届中国电影金鸡奖、第35届大众电影百花奖最佳男主角奖。2024，他凭借《阳光俱乐部》中的“智商水平停留在孩童时期的中年男子吴优”获得第26届上海国际电影节金爵奖“最佳男演员”、第38届金鸡奖最佳男主角提名。他还两次担任中法文化之春法国电影展推广大使，是法国艺术与文学骑士勋章得主。除了演员之外，他还进一步解锁了新身份——监制、出品人。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Huang Xiaoming is an actor, producer and presenter, as well as Vice‑Chairman of the China Film Association.
He graduated from the Performance Department of the Beijing Film Academy in 2000 and rose to fame among audiences in 2001 for his role in the TV drama The Prince of Han Dynasty.
Over a career spanning more than 20 years, his outstanding performances in an array of films and television productions, including Small‑Town Affair, Sunshine Club, American Dreams in China, The Bravest, The Message, Forever Young, Return of the Condor Heroes, Shanghai Bund, The Infiltrator and All the Way to Happiness, have established him as a nationally‑renowned actor revered across China and wider Asia.
For his portrayal of Cheng Dongqing in American Dreams in China, he won the Best‑Actor awards from China’s three top‑tier film festivals: the 29th China Golden Rooster Awards, the 15th Huabiao Film Awards and the 32nd Hundred Flowers Awards. He became the youngest mainland Chinese actor ever to achieve this triple‑award grand slam.
In 2020, his performance as firefighter captain Jiang Liwei in The Bravest earned him the Best‑Actor honours at the 33rd China Golden Rooster Awards and the 35th Hundred Flowers Awards.
In 2024, his depiction of Wu You, a middle‑aged man stuck at a child‑like mental age in Sunshine Club, brought him the Best‑Actor prize at the 26th Shanghai International Film Festival Golden Goblet Awards, alongside a nomination for Best Actor at the 38th China Golden Rooster Awards.
He has twice served as promotional ambassador for the French Cinema Section of the Croisements Festival (Sino‑French Culture Spring) and is a recipient of the Ordre des Arts et des Lettres (Chevalier) bestowed by France.
Beyond his acting career, he has branched out to work as a supervising producer and production investor.

guestVisitList.name: 成宇
guestVisitList.introduce: 昆仑万维首席科学家，香港中文大学计算机系教授。从 2018年到2023年，担任微软雷德蒙德研究院的首席研究员。在加入微软之前，是IBM Research & MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab 的研究员。研究涵盖深度学习，特别关注模型压缩和效率、深度生成模型和语言/多模态大模型等。从2021年开始，带领团队和OpenAI团队紧密合作，对GPT系列模型进行了效率、鲁棒性和扩展性优化，推动相关服务和应用的产品化，包括以GPT-4作为主要模型的New Bing、由GPT-3.5提供后台服务的Github Copilot以及由DALL-E-2提供支持的Image Creator。从2023年到2025年，主导或者参与了Minimax abab6.5, M1/Hailuo Video模型, 腾讯Huanyun T1/TurboS以及Skywork R1V2/V3, Super Agent等产品和模型。

guestVisitList.introduce: 昆仑万维旗下Skywork首席科学家

guestVisitList.name: 杨海涛
guestVisitList.introduce: 杨海涛，爱奇艺高级副总裁、初创核心成员。2009 年入职，统筹内容运营、分账影视、微短剧与创作者生态。首创纪录片付费分账模式，打造多部爆款分账作品，推出青年创作者扶持计划，深耕 AIGC 下内容商业化，监制多部网络影视。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Yang Haitao, Senior VP & core founding member of iQIYI, joined in 2009. He oversees content operation, revenue-sharing productions, micro-dramas and creator ecosystem. He pioneered paid documentary revenue-sharing, created hit works and launched youth creator programs. He advances content commercialization amid AIGC inflation and serves as executive producer for online films & series.

guestVisitList.name: 周志华
guestVisitList.introduce:
周志华，男，汉族，1973年11月出生，江苏盐城人，无党派人士，研究生学历，博士学位，教授，计算机科学家，人工智能专家。现任第十四届全国政协委员，中国科学院院士，南京大学副校长，计算机软件新技术国家重点实验室常务副主任、机器学习与数据挖掘研究所所长。 
周志华于1992年考入南京大学计算机科学与技术系，先后获得学士、硕士、博士学位；2001年留校任教；2002年被破格聘任为副教授；2003年获得国家杰出青年科学基金资助，同年被聘为教授；2004年被聘为博士生导师；2009年入选新世纪百千万人才工程国家级人选；2017年当选欧洲科学院院士；2018年担任南京大学计算机系主任兼人工智能学院院长；2020年出版著作《机器学习理论导引》；2021年入选中国科学院院士增选初步候选人名单。2023年当选为国际人工智能联合会理事会主席。2024年担任南京大学副校长。2025年，当选中国科学院院士。
周志华长期从事人工智能核心的机器学习理论与方法研究，做出了原创性、引领性成果。他曾获国家自然科学二等奖两项、国家级教学成果一等奖一项、首届全国教材建设奖全国优秀教材（高等教育类）一等奖、省部级科技一等奖四项、IEEE计算机学会技术成就奖、中国计算机学会王选奖等。他还是教育部“长江学者奖励计划”特聘教授、国家杰出青年科学基金获得者。教育部高等学校计算机类专业教学指导委员会副主任、国务院学位委员会计算机类学科评议组成员、国际人工智能联合会理事会主席。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Zhihua Zhou, male, Han ethnicity, born in November 1973 in Yancheng, Jiangsu Province, is a non-Party public figure. He holds a graduate degree and a Ph.D., and serves as a professor, computer scientist, and artificial intelligence expert. He is currently a member of the 14th National Committee of the Chinese People’s Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC), an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, Vice President of Nanjing University, Executive Deputy Director of the State Key Laboratory for Novel Software Technology, and Director of the Institute of Machine Learning and Data Mining.
Zhou enrolled in the Department of Computer Science and Technology at Nanjing University in 1992, where he successively obtained his bachelor’s, master’s, and doctoral degrees. In 2001, he joined the faculty. In 2002, he was exceptionally appointed as an associate professor. In 2003, he received support from the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars and was appointed as a professor. In 2004, he became a doctoral supervisor. In 2009, he was selected for the New Century Talents Project by the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security. In 2017, he was elected a foreign member of the Academia Europaea. In 2018, he became Chair of the Department of Computer Science and Dean of the School of Artificial Intelligence at Nanjing University. In 2020, he published the book Introduction to Machine Learning Theory. In 2021, he was shortlisted as a candidate for the Chinese Academy of Sciences. In 2023, he was elected President of the International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) Board of Trustees. In 2024, he was appointed Vice President of Nanjing University. In 2025, he was elected an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences.
Zhou has long dedicated himself to research on machine learning theory and methods—a core area of artificial intelligence—producing original and pioneering contributions. His honors include two National Natural Science Awards (Second Class), one National Teaching Achievement Award (First Class), one First-Class Award for National Excellent Textbooks (Higher Education) from the first National Textbook Award, four provincial or ministerial-level Science and Technology Awards (First Class), the IEEE Computer Society Technical Achievement Award, and the Wang Xuan Award from the China Computer Federation. He is also a Distinguished Professor under the Chang Jiang Scholars Program, recipient of the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars, Vice Chair of the Computer Science Teaching Steering Committee under the Ministry of Education, a member of the Computer Science Discipline Appraisal Group of the Academic Degrees Committee of the State Council, and President of the IJCAI Board of Trustees.

name: 容联云· 企业级 Agent 的进化与商业落地论坛
nameEn: The Evolution and Business Adoption of CLOOPEN Enterprise AI Agents
desc:
站在人工智能从“模型中心”迈向“Agent驱动”的关键拐点，本论坛旨在定义企业级智能体的系统化生产力标准，呈现容联云在全场景Agent化的前沿突破。通过全新发布多个战略级Agentic OS平台，容联云将率先定义AI从“辅助位”向“业务主体位”的战略位移，实现软件定义逻辑的彻底重写。
国际顶尖AI学者将与产业领袖共话企业级OpenClaw，深度复盘在金融等高复杂度行业如何通过多Agent协同实现ROI闭环。
这不仅是技术展示，更是人机协同新范式的深度预演，旨在传递容联云的核心判断：未来组织，将由“人类员工 + Agent团队”共同构成，并为全球企业构建系统化AI执行力提供可落地的中国方案。
descEn:
At the shift from Model-Centric to Agent-Driven AI, this forum defines enterprise productivity standards, showcasing CLOOPEN’s breakthroughs in Agentization.
By launching Agentic OS, CLOOPEN pioneers AI's shift from "assistant" to "business principal," rewriting software logic. Experts will discuss Enterprise OpenClaw and ROI closure via multi-Agent synergy in finance.
Future organizations will consist of "Human Employees + Agent Teams." CLOOPEN provides a systematic, China-originated blueprint for global AI execution.

guestVisitList.name: 彭波
guestVisitList.introduce:
资深 AI 与 B2B 产品战略专家，十年企业服务及 AI 商业化落地经验。聚焦大模型融合联络中心、企业经营场景，主导多款 AI 原生产品架构迭代，搭建标准化大模型工具链，深耕复杂状态流、多模态智能体协同落地。
深耕银行、证券、保险等金融行业，统筹从 POC 到规模化商用全流程交付，打造多款行业标杆大模型应用，依托大模型与数据能力助力企业智能化降本增效。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Senior AI & B2B Product Strategy Specialist with 10 years of experience in enterprise services and commercial AI deployment. Focused on integrating large language models into contact center and enterprise operation scenarios. Led architectural iterations of multiple AI-native products and built standardized LLM toolchains, with deep practical experience in complex state flow control and multi-modal Agent collaboration implementation.
Specialized in high-threshold financial industries including banking, securities and insurance. Managed end-to-end delivery from POC verification to large-scale commercialization, and developed multiple industry benchmark LLM applications. Leverages LLM and data capabilities to help enterprises cut costs, improve efficiency and advance intelligent transformation.

name: 上海交通大学·AI未来发展论坛
nameEn: AI Future Forum
desc: 2026上海交通大学AI 未来发展论坛以“年轻事业·无限未来”为主线，以“产学研深度融合”为主题，发布青年科学家代表性成果，特邀图灵奖得主 Rich Sutton、中科院院士鄂维南联袂开展高端对话，北京智源人工智能研究院理事长黄铁军带来主旨报告，并集结宁德时代、无问芯穹、壁仞科技、阶跃星辰、观壹智能等新锐企业创始人深度对话，搭建一个链接全球、打开边界的交流平台和展现舞台。
descEn:
AI-driven technological and industrial transformation is profoundly reshaping global research systems, industrial layouts and talent training models. In response to national strategic needs, Shanghai Jiao Tong University actively undertakes innovation and talent cultivation missions. 
Drawing on its strong disciplinary and research strengths in artificial intelligence, the university will host the AI Future Development Forum on July 18, a sub-forum of the 2026 WAIC. The event will bring together global experts and industry leaders to discuss frontier AI technologies, while showcasing outstanding university and regional achievements in AI innovation and elite talent training.
It also promotes industry-research integration, technology transfer and collaborative education. Taking this opportunity, SJTU will advance original AI innovation, optimize research and talent training models, and support national AI development and regional industrial upgrading with high-quality talents .

guestVisitList.name: 严骏驰
guestVisitList.introduce: 严骏驰，上海交通大学人工智能学院教授、博士生导师，现任上海交通大学人工智能教育部重点实验室主任助理。他曾任职于IBM研究院（首席研究员）和亚马逊（高级顾问）累计10年，是CCF全国优秀博士学位论文奖获得者。严骏驰的主要研究领域包括机器学习、图神经网络、组合优化及科学智能（AI for Science）。他担任ICML理事会成员（中国大陆首位）、ACM Multimedia 2026程序共同主席等多个国际顶级会议和期刊的重要职务。其学术成果丰硕，论文被引用超过4万次，入选爱思唯尔中国高被引学者榜单，并荣获IEEE计算智能学会杰出青年奖（2026）、IEEE CS AI's 10 to Watch等国际荣誉。

guestVisitList.name: 理查德·萨顿
guestVisitList.introduce: 理查德·萨顿（Richard Sutton），美国计算机科学家，强化学习领域主要奠基人，现任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授、北京大学图灵导师、前DeepMind研究科学家，2025年3月与安德鲁·巴托共同获2024年图灵奖。1978年获斯坦福大学心理学学士学位，1984年在安德鲁·巴托指导下获马萨诸塞大学安姆斯特分校计算机科学博士学位。2003年起担任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授，领导强化学习与人工智能实验室。其与巴托合著的《强化学习导论》是该领域奠基性教材，提出时序差分学习和策略梯度方法，开创现代强化学习体系。2023年加入John Carmack创立的Keen Technologies公司，致力于2030年实现通用人工智能（AGI）原型 。2025年在外滩大会发表主旨演讲，提出人工智能进入以持续学习为核心的“经验时代”，指出大型语言模型依赖人类数据具有局限性并批评其为“死路一条”，主张智能体通过自我博弈和环境交互生成新数据。2003年获国际神经网络学会总统奖，2013年获马萨诸塞大学杰出成就奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Richard Sutton is an American computer scientist and a founding figure in the field of reinforcement learning. He is currently a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, a Turing Mentor at Peking University, and a former research scientist at DeepMind. In March 2025, he and Andrew Barto were awarded the 2024 Turing Award.
He received his Bachelor’s degree in Psychology from Stanford University in 1978, and earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from the University of Massachusetts Amherst in 1984 under the supervision of Andrew Barto. Since 2003, he has served as a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, where he leads the Reinforcement Learning and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory. His co-authored book with Barto, Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction, is a foundational textbook in the field, introducing temporal difference learning and policy gradient methods that established the modern framework of reinforcement learning.
In 2023, he joined Keen Technologies, founded by John Carmack, with a mission to develop a prototype of artificial general intelligence (AGI) by 2030. In 2025, he delivered a keynote speech at the Bund Summit, proposing that artificial intelligence is entering an “era of experience” centered on continuous learning. He noted the limitations of large language models that rely on human data, criticizing that approach as a “dead end,” and argued that intelligent agents should generate new data through self-play and interaction with the environment.
He received the International Neural Network Society Presidential Award in 2003 and the University of Massachusetts Outstanding Achievement Award in 2013.

nameEn: AI Computing Applications Innovation Global Forum 2026
desc: “2026昇腾AI应用创新全球论坛”，主要面向定向邀请的海外受众。本论坛聚焦全球AI发展动态，各种场景的AI应用创新与落地实践。在这里，您不仅可以深入了解最新AI发展趋势与大模型训推方案，还能与全球AI科技领袖、行业大咖共同探讨在泛政府、金融、电力等领域的AI创新应用实践，交流AI落地经验，见证AI为千行万业创造的价值，提升用户体验与生产效益效率，共同探索全球AI发展路径与未来AI图景。
descEn: The AI Computing Applications Innovation Global Forum 2026 is primarily targeted at invited overseas customers. The forum focuses on global AI development trends, AI applications innovation, and implementation practices in various scenarios. You will explore the latest AI trends and model solutions, engage with global tech leaders and industry pioneers, and discover how innovative applications of AI are creating value for various industries. Together, we will map the road ahead for AI and the world it will shape.

name: 西门子·工业AI迈进现实 - 工业AI创新论坛暨Eigen工程智能体发布会
nameEn: Make Industrial AI Real - Siemens Industrial AI Innovation Forum and Eigen Engineering Agent Launch Ceremony
desc: 本次论坛以"工业AI迈进现实"为主线，汇聚西门子全球及中国高层、行业专家与生态伙伴，深入探讨人工智能驱动工业变革的前沿趋势与中国实践。我们将隆重发布西门子首款工程智能体Eigen Engineering Agent（Eigen工程智能体），展示其在工业自动化领域的革命性能力；同步启动2026西门子Xcelerator公开赛，激发创新生态活力。通过趋势洞察、产业升级、圆桌对话及工业AI战略展望等多元环节，全面呈现西门子从自动化到自主化的技术演进、前沿实践与开放生态愿景，与各界伙伴携手，共同开启智能制造的新篇章。
descEn: Centered on the theme "Make Industrial AI Real," this forum brings together Siemens global and China leadership, industry experts, and ecosystem partners to explore the cutting-edge trends and China practices of AI-driven industrial transformation. We will proudly unveil Siemens' first engineering agent, Eigen Engineering Agent, showcasing its revolutionary capabilities in industrial automation, while launching the 2026 Siemens Xcelerator Open Competition to energize the innovation ecosystem. Through trend insights, industrial upgrading discussions, panel dialogues, and the strategic outlook of Industrial AI, we will present Siemens' technology evolution from automation to autonomy, cutting-edge practices, and open ecosystem vision—joining hands with partners to usher in a new chapter of intelligent manufacturing.

guestVisitList.name: Vasi Philomin
guestVisitList.introduce: Vasi Philomin，拥有计算机科学博士学位（主修机器学习和计算机视觉）及机械工程与计算机科学双硕士学位，现任西门子股份公司执行副总裁兼数据与人工智能主管。曾任亚马逊云科技（AWS）生成式人工智能全球副总裁。Vasi Philomin在AWS任职期间主导推进基础大模型Amazon Titan、全托管生成式AI服务Amazon Bedrock，管理语言类AI服务、视觉类AI服务、工业类AI服务及开发者工具Amazon CodeWhisperer。其领导的团队于2024年发布Amazon Nova系列大模型及Trainium3芯片，构建Bedrock平台整合自研与第三方模型，服务超万家企业。

guestVisitList.introduce: 西门子（中国）有限公司工业AI与数字化业务总负责人

guestVisitList.name: 胡建钧
guestVisitList.introduce: 胡建钧，现任西门子（中国）有限公司副总裁、西门子Xcelerator中国总经理及西门子数字科技（深圳）有限公司董事长。他于2005年加入西门子，拥有超过15年的网络信息安全、数字化及低碳化研发与运营经验。胡建钧早年以“白帽黑客”身份入职，逐步转型为企业安全与业务创新的领军人物，曾创立西门子中国首家工业信息安全实验室及亚太区运营中心。在任期间，他主导了西门子在中国的数字孪生、工业AI及绿色转型战略，推动Xcelerator开放式数字商业平台的生态建设，并倡导中国企业通过数字化手段实现绿色出海。

guestVisitList.name: Schrapp, Michael
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Michael Schrapp received the Diploma and Ph.D. degrees in general physics from Technische Universität München, in 2011 and 2015, respectively, and the master’s degree in stochastic engineering in business and finance from Hochschule München, in 2015. In 2015, he joined Siemens Corporate Technology as the Research Project Manager and later became a Senior Key Expert for industrial computed tomography. In 2017, he moved to Siemens Healthineers as the Head of Business Data Analytics, focusing on internal and field data analysis, as well as business intelligence. Since December 2020, he leads a program to enable customer sellable real-time monitoring and predictive services.

name: 曦智科技·光计算与光互连双轮驱动的AI基础设施新范式论坛
nameEn: Optical Computing and Optical Interconnects: A New Dual-Engine Paradigm for AI Infrastructure Forum
desc: 大模型参数量从千亿迈向万亿，传统电芯片受限于摩尔定律放缓与“内存墙”“互连墙”，算力供给严重滞后。光技术成为破局关键：光互连为算力集群提供低时延、高带宽、低能耗的“数据高铁”；光计算利用光子并行性与线性运算优势，绕过电子晶体管微缩极限。借助WAIC顶级平台，明确“光是中国乃至全球突破AI算力瓶颈的关键路径”这一行业共识，并向全球展示中国的“光技术方案”。
descEn: The parameter count of large models has increased from billions to trillions, and traditional electronic chips are limited by the slowing down of Moore's Law and the "memory wall" and "interconnect wall", resulting in a serious lag in computing power supply. Optical technology has become a key breakthrough: optical interconnection provides a "data high-speed rail" with low latency, high bandwidth, and low energy consumption for computing power clusters; Optical computing utilizes the advantages of photon parallelism and linear operation to bypass the miniaturization limit of electronic transis

desc: 上海正率先构建以“数据驱动、模型引领、生态协同”为核心的自动驾驶实训场公共服务平台，围绕战略启航、政策赋能、标准引领、生态共建四大主线，系统推动政策发布、数据产品首发、跨域协同等一系列标杆成果落地，加速自动驾驶从“单车智能试点”迈向“体系化能力输出”。依托WAIC全球影响力，智能汽车创新发展平台将于2026年7月举办WAIC2026高级别自动驾驶创新发展论坛。论坛将汇聚政府、顶尖科学家、产业领袖与生态合作伙伴，聚焦自动驾驶大模型、数据运营新范式与产业生态建设等核心议题，集中发布一批具有行业标杆意义的技术成果与治理标准，为全球自动驾驶高质量发展贡献“上海方案”与“中国路径”。
descEn: Shanghai is developing a public service platform for autonomous driving training scenarios centered on data-driven, model-led, and ecosystem-coordinated approaches. Hosted by the CIV-IP, this forum will bring together government officials, leading scientists, industry leaders, and ecosystem partners. Discussions will focus on autonomous driving foundation models, data operations, and industry ecosystems, featuring the release of benchmark technical outcomes. The forum aims to contribute the "Shanghai Solution" and "China Pathway" to the high-quality global development of autonomous driving.

name: 中国电信·星辰共生人工智能生态论坛
nameEn: China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Ecological Conference (2026)
desc: 迈向“十五五”数字中国建设新征程，中国电信全面落实国家“人工智能+”行动，夯实AI新型基础设施底座。拥抱新一轮产业变革机遇，我们将全面实施“云改数转智惠”战略，持续深化“五位一体”智能云服务体系，构建“L”型能力布局，致力于打造领先的AI服务商。以AI之力赋能千行百业数智升级，以智惠服务温暖千家万户。中国电信作为WAIC常设论坛承办单位，本届大会将应邀于7月18日上午举办“2026中国电信人工智能生态论坛”，并于WAIC大会期间设立专属展区，重磅发布中国电信在智能云、AI+赋能等领域的落地成效与实践成果。
descEn: Embarking on the new journey toward the "15th Five-Year Plan" for Digital China, China Telecom fully implements the national "AI+" action and strengthens the AI infrastructure base. Seizing industrial transformation opportunities, we execute the "Cloud Transformation, Digitalization, Smart Empowerment" strategy, deepen the "Five-in-One" intelligent cloud service system, build an "L-shaped" capability layout, and strive to become a leading AI service provider. We empower industries with AI for digital upgrade and bring smart services to millions of households.As the organizer of the WAIC permanent forum, China Telecom will host the "2026 China Telecom AI Ecosystem Forum" on the morning of July 18, and set up a dedicated exhibition area during WAIC, showcasing its achievements in intelligent cloud and AI+ empowerment.

desc: 中国中小企业协会举办AI For SMEs——人工智能赋能中小企业高质量发展生态论坛，旨在推动完善人工智能赋能中小企业生态体系，围绕研发设计、生产制造、智能营销、精细化运营、供应链与物流优化等中小企业关键业务场景应用与普及，支持中小企业高质量发展。  搭建中小企业与AI服务商的合作平台，降低技术应用门槛。为中小企业搭建国际合作平台，打造AI for SME领域的中国实践。
descEn: The CASME hosted the "AI For SMEs - Ecosystem Forum" to enhance the AI-empowered ecosystem for SMEs. The forum focused on applying and popularizing AI in key SME business areas like R&D design, production, intelligent marketing, refined operations, and supply chain optimization, supporting their high-quality growth. By publishing "AI Solutions for SMEs Recommended by CASME", we set a replicable benchmark for AI solutions for SMEs. We'll build a platform for SMEs & AI providers to lower tech barriers, and an international one to showcase China's AI for SMEs practices.

name: 小红书·让Builders被看见
nameEn: See the Builders
desc:
在这个时代，创造不只发生在代码里，也发生在一次提问、一条评论、一篇笔记、一个作品、一次被看见的表达中。
AI让更多人开始Build，也让Builder有了更多样子。
这一次，小红书科技邀请Builders登上WAIC舞台，讲述他们如何把想法变成作品，把想法带到真实世界，也让每一次创造被更多人看见。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有19日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn:
In this era, creation no longer happens only in code. It begins with a question, a comment, a post, a work of creation, or a moment of expression that gets seen.

AI is enabling more people to build, while expanding what it means to be a Builder.

This time, Xiaohongshu Tech invites Builders to the WAIC stage to share how they turn ideas into creations, bring imagination into the real world, and make every act of creation visible to a wider audience.

name: 引力场：无界共生——AI时代的基础设施升维
nameEn: Gravity Field: Beyond Borders——Infrastructure Upgrades in the AI Era
desc: 在AI全球化的浪潮下，中国企业出海正面临前所未有的机遇与挑战。7月20日 10:00–11:00，于世博展览馆H4领航舞台，AI GRAVITY将隆重举办“引力场：无界共生——AI时代的基础设施升维”主题圆桌论坛。 重点聚焦“AI时代，中国公司出海的新基础设施与新打法”。特别邀请了五位行业资深嘉宾带来全方位视角。论坛将围绕“一个入口，一个出口，一个操盘手，一个观察者”的独特框架，深度剖析搜索、支付、市场与生态四大出海核心维度。 诚邀您参与这场前沿思想碰撞，共同探索无界共生的全球化新版图！ 【活动在世博展览馆H4展区舞台，有当日展览票即可参与】
descEn: Amid the global wave of artificial intelligence, Chinese enterprises venturing overseas are presented with unprecedented opportunities alongside daunting challenges. From 10:00 to 11:00 on July 20, AI GRAVITY will host the keynote roundtable forum Gravity Field: Boundless Symbiosis – Upgrading Infrastructure in the AI Era at the Pioneer Stage, Hall H4. The forum will center on New Infrastructure & New Strategies for Chinese Companies Going Global in the AI Age. Five distinguished industry veterans will share multi-dimensional insights. Adopting a unique analytical framework of "one entry point, one exit channel, one operator, one observer", the discussion will conduct in-depth analysis of four core overseas expansion pillars: search, payment, market access and ecosystem development. We sincerely invite you to join this exchange of ideas! 【Venue Note: Pioneer Stage, Hall H4, World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center. Admission is free with a valid exhibition ticket for the day.】

name: WAIC·思想者论坛 Richard S Sutton 专场
nameEn: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum - Prof.Richard S Sutton
desc:
核心主题：AI 的第一性原理：回归本源・人才根基・全球共治
活动立意：
作为 WAIC 顶层核心高端思想 IP，全球集结图灵奖得主、中外院士、国际科技掌舵人、顶尖教育家与新生代产业领军者，跳出短期应用热点与流量喧嚣，锚定智能科学底层逻辑与本质内核。贯通数学本源 — 认知理论 — 数据智能 — 工程落地 — 人才培育 — 强化进化 — 全球治理全链路闭环，以跨学派、跨国界、跨代际的深度思辨，树立 WAIC 全球 AI 思想引领、战略定调的顶级标杆，为通用人工智能时代的技术演进、拔尖人才生态、全球协同治理，输出权威共识与长远方向。
descEn:
Core Theme: First Principles of AI: Return to Origin · Talent Foundation · Global Governance
Event Purpose:
As WAIC’s top-tier high-end thought leadership IP, we gather Turing Award laureates, Chinese and foreign academicians, international tech leaders, top educators, and new-generation industrial leaders globally. We move beyond short-term application trends and media hypee to anchor the underlying logic and essence of intelligent science. We connect the full closed-loop chain: mathematical origin – cognitive theory – data intelligence – engineering implementation – talent cultivation – reinforcement learning – global governance. Through cross-school, cross-border, and cross-generational in-depth speculation, we establish WAIC as a world-class benchmark for global AI thought leadership and strategic guidance, and deliver authoritative consensus and long-term direction for technological evolution, top talent ecosystems, and global collaborative governance in the era of AGI.

forumOrgStructureReqs.name: WAIC组委会

guestVisitList.name: 理查德·萨顿
guestVisitList.introduce: 理查德·萨顿（Richard Sutton），美国计算机科学家，强化学习领域主要奠基人，现任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授、北京大学图灵导师、前DeepMind研究科学家，2025年3月与安德鲁·巴托共同获2024年图灵奖。1978年获斯坦福大学心理学学士学位，1984年在安德鲁·巴托指导下获马萨诸塞大学安姆斯特分校计算机科学博士学位。2003年起担任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授，领导强化学习与人工智能实验室。其与巴托合著的《强化学习导论》是该领域奠基性教材，提出时序差分学习和策略梯度方法，开创现代强化学习体系。2023年加入John Carmack创立的Keen Technologies公司，致力于2030年实现通用人工智能（AGI）原型 。2025年在外滩大会发表主旨演讲，提出人工智能进入以持续学习为核心的“经验时代”，指出大型语言模型依赖人类数据具有局限性并批评其为“死路一条”，主张智能体通过自我博弈和环境交互生成新数据。2003年获国际神经网络学会总统奖，2013年获马萨诸塞大学杰出成就奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Richard Sutton is an American computer scientist and a founding figure in the field of reinforcement learning. He is currently a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, a Turing Mentor at Peking University, and a former research scientist at DeepMind. In March 2025, he and Andrew Barto were awarded the 2024 Turing Award.
He received his Bachelor’s degree in Psychology from Stanford University in 1978, and earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from the University of Massachusetts Amherst in 1984 under the supervision of Andrew Barto. Since 2003, he has served as a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, where he leads the Reinforcement Learning and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory. His co-authored book with Barto, Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction, is a foundational textbook in the field, introducing temporal difference learning and policy gradient methods that established the modern framework of reinforcement learning.
In 2023, he joined Keen Technologies, founded by John Carmack, with a mission to develop a prototype of artificial general intelligence (AGI) by 2030. In 2025, he delivered a keynote speech at the Bund Summit, proposing that artificial intelligence is entering an “era of experience” centered on continuous learning. He noted the limitations of large language models that rely on human data, criticizing that approach as a “dead end,” and argued that intelligent agents should generate new data through self-play and interaction with the environment.
He received the International Neural Network Society Presidential Award in 2003 and the University of Massachusetts Outstanding Achievement Award in 2013.

name: Airwallex 空中云汇·领航 AI 驱动的全球金融变革：打造适配 AI 的现代化财务职能体系论坛
nameEn: Leading the AI-Driven Transformation of Global Finance: Building An AI-Ready Finance Function
desc:
随着AI从效率工具向决策核心演进，财务职能正经历深刻变革。
本论坛将现场发布由Airwallex空中云汇携手Forrester Consulting撰写的《打造适配 AI 的现代化财务职能体系》白皮书，基于对全球11个市场、1,279名财务决策者的最新调研，揭示AI在财务领域规模化落地的关键挑战与制胜路径。
论坛将深入探讨：如何在低容错率的财务场景中建立AI信任机制？如何通过流程协同调度打破数据孤岛与系统集成难题？财务团队如何从AI使用者转型为构建者？
同时，空中云汇将展示其面向全球化AI企业的一站式用户收款与资金收付解决方案。【论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，需有18日展览入场权限】
descEn:
As AI evolves from an efficiency tool into a core enabler of business decision-making, the finance function is undergoing profound transformation.
At this forum, Airwallex will launch Building An AI-Ready Finance Function, a global thought leadership paper commissioned from Forrester Consulting. Based on research involving 1,279 finance decision-makers across 11 markets, the report examines the key challenges and success factors for scaling AI in finance.
The session will explore how organizations can build trust in AI, overcome fragmented data and integration complexity through workflow orchestration, and enable finance teams to evolve from AI users into builders.
Airwallex will also showcase how its intelligent financial platform helps global AI companies manage payments, treasury, and spend, enabling them to accept customer payments, move funds globally, and scale with greater speed and control.

name: GMI Cloud·AI出海基础设施行业洞察发布
nameEn: WAIC Future Tech Leadership Stage
desc: 伴随全球AI产业迎来深度变革，国际市场竞争已不再局限于单一模型比拼，而是演变为推理优化、智能体落地与底层算力的综合实力角逐。对此，GMI Cloud深刻洞察行业趋势：模型划定全球技术上限，推理引擎推动产品在全球市场规模化应用，AI基础设施则为企业全球化布局夯实成本与可靠性底座。面向全球市场，GMI Cloud正推动企业级AI从基础智能，全面升级为适配全球场景的AI全栈落地解决方案。本次分享中，GMI Cloud将围绕品牌升级、数据中心规模扩大、产品创新、全球化生态合作四大维度，解读2026年全球AI出海发展趋势，并阐述全新品牌战略。【论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，需18日展览入场权限】
descEn:
Amid the profound transformation of the global AI industry, international competition has shifted from single-model rivalry to an all-round contest of inference optimization, AI agent implementation and underlying computing power.
GMI Cloud clearly grasps this industry trend: models define the upper limit of global AI technology, inference engines enable large-scale global product deployment, and AI infrastructure provides solid cost and reliability support for corporate global expansion.
Focusing on the global market, GMI Cloud is upgrading enterprise AI from basic intelligence to full-stack AI deployment solutions for global scenarios. In this session, it will interpret the 2026 global AI overseas development trends and unveil its new brand strategy from four dimensions: brand upgrading, data center scale expansion, product innovation and global ecological cooperation.

name: WAIC企业家论坛
nameEn: WAIC Entrepreneurs Forum
desc:
本次 AI 企业家论坛，由世界人工智能大会组委会办公室指导、WAIC CONNECT 主办，依托 WAIC 这一国家级行业高地，为中国企业搭建了一个直面 AI 转型真问题的顶层对话平台。正是为回应这 “AI 转型三问” 而生。
1、战略挑战：AI是工具升级，还是商业重构？
2、策略混沌：AI能否从试点到组织、数据、人才全域跨越？
3、价值焦虑：AI 投入如何转化为看得见、算得清的长期增长？
这是一场关于AI转型新定位的顶层对话。我们的目标是，重塑产业新质繁华。我们直面 AI 转型真问题、输出产业落地真解法，凝聚政企学研各界力量，共探中国企业数智化转型新路径，重塑产业新质繁华。
descEn:
Hosted by WAIC CONNECT, the AI Entrepreneurs Forum provides a top-tier dialogue platform for Chinese enterprises to confront real challenges in AI adoption.
We aim to address the "Three Ultimate Questions of AI Transformation": 1. Strategy: Is AI just a tool upgrade, or a fundamental business paradigm shift? 2. Tactics: Can AI transcend isolated pilots for full-scale organizational integration? 3. Value: How to turn AI investments into tangible, measurable long-term growth?
This C-level dialogue redefines the core positioning of AI transformation. By delivering proven solutions, we unite government, industry, and academia to explore novel paths for digital transformation—ultimately reshaping the new quality prosperity of the industry.

guestVisitList.name: 曹琦峰
guestVisitList.introduce:
曹琦峰先生现任埃森哲大中华区人工智能与数据业务负责人，拥有超过18年的行业经验，是一位既有战略视野，又注重实际成效的数据与人工智能领域领军者。他曾在全球顶尖科技与咨询机构担任要职，主导企业级人工智能解决方案的研发与部署，在自然语言处理、数据分析及生成式人工智能等前沿方向积累了深厚的技术功底与丰富的实战经验，覆盖航空、制药、能源、电信、保险及教育等多个行业。
作为埃森哲大中华区人工智能与数据业务负责人，他专注于提升团队技能、构建与人工智能及数据生态核心参与者的战略合作，并助力客户重塑运营模式、把握人工智能带来的新机遇。他曾用短短五个月时间，从零起步组建起一支超过150人的专业团队，迅速确立了在该领域的市场影响力。此外，他撰写的AI专著广受业界关注，并多次受邀在世界经济论坛、《经济学人》论坛等国际高端平台上发表演讲。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Qifeng Cao is a strategic, results-driven Data & AI leader with 18+ years delivering enterprise-scale AI solutions at leading global technology and consulting firms. He has a strong track record leading complex Natural Language Processing, Data Analytics and Generative AI projects across aviation, pharma, energy, telecom, insurance and education.
As Accenture Greater China AI&Data Lead, Mr. Cao focuses on upskilling teams, building partnerships with key AI and data ecosystem players, and helping clients reinvent operations and capture new AI-enabled opportunities. He built Accenture Japan’s Generative AI practice from scratch to over 150 professionals in five months, strengthened market positioning via high-profile projects, authored a best-selling AI book, and spoke at elite forums including the World Economic Forum and The Economist events.

name: 谷歌·Google全链路生态初创出海增长论坛
nameEn: Empowering Chinese startups: Scaling global success with Google’s integrated solutions
desc:
在全球化与AI浪潮下，初创企业如何高效破局，赢在全球？Google 为创业者量身定制了一条全链路增长路线图
Google Cloud ｜ 技术筑基：提供坚实的AI算力与全球化技术底座，陪伴初创企业稳健行远，让创新步履不停。
Google Ads ｜ 全球营销：带来最新的AI营销生态与前沿洞察，赋能海外市场实现从0到1的超速爆发。
Google AdMob ｜ 商业变现：深度拆解混合变现模式，助力企业打破盈利天花板，转动持续增长的生态飞轮。
Google Play ｜ 全球分发：解锁全球分发渠道的生态红利，让中国优秀的优质与游戏直连全球数十亿用户。【论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内，需有展览入场权限】
descEn: Google’s integrated solutions empower startups going global and clear the path from technological innovation to scale expansion and global expansion. This fully releases their development potential and assists export startups in growing efficiently in the worldwide market.

name: 机器人在线·具身人形机器人落地与核心零部件发展论坛
nameEn: The Future of Embodied Humanoid Robots and the Intelligent Upgrade of Core Components
desc: 具身智能正推动AI从“感知”迈向“行动”，人形机器人作为其核心载体，将在工业、服务与民生领域释放巨大价值。当前产业已迈入量产前夜，但核心零部件——减速器、伺服系统、灵巧手、传感器与控制器——仍面临精度不足、成本高、可靠性低及供应链风险等“卡脖子”难题，严重制约规模化落地。  本届论坛紧扣WAIC“智联世界、生成未来”主题，聚焦这一最硬核、最迫切的环节，从现状、技术、量产、生态四大维度，系统剖析瓶颈、展示创新突破、输出可行方案、凝聚产业共识，致力于打造有深度、有数据、有案例、有结论的专业内容，夯实人形机器人产业底层根基，加速高质量发展。
descEn: Embodied intelligence is driving AI from “perception” to “action,” with humanoid robots as its primary vehicle—set to reshape industry, services, and society.  As the field nears mass production, core components—reducers, servo systems, dexterous hands, sensors, and controllers—remain major bottlenecks due to limited precision, high cost, reliability gaps, and supply chain risks, hindering commercial scale-up. Aligned with WAIC’s theme “Intelligence for a Connected World, Shaping the Future,” this forum focuses on this most critical and constrained layer of the robotics stack. Through four pillars—status, technology, scale-up, and ecosystem—we will analyze challenges, showcase innovations, propose solutions, and build consensus. The aim: deliver sharp, data-backed insights—supported by real cases and clear conclusions—to strengthen the industry’s foundation and accelerate the high-quality development of humanoid robotics.

guestVisitList.name: 俞俊承
guestVisitList.introduce:
俞俊承｜机器人在线CEO（全网20万+粉丝·行业20年深耕）
标签：｜机器人老炮｜工业机器人产业互联网先行者
- 全网影响力：抖音/视频号等平台20万+粉丝，行业头部KOL，账号“机器人老炮”输出干货内容。
- 行业资历：20年工业机器人行业深耕，从销售到创业，亲历行业从萌芽到爆发。
- 教育背景：同济大学本科、加州州立大学MBA。
- 行业职务：上海机器人行业协会理事，受邀担任WAIC 世界人工智能大会CMO。
  
1. 2005–2013 ABB机器人：最年轻销售→连续Top Sales，深耕工业机器人销售与市场，懂产品、懂应用、懂客户。
2. 2013 创立机器人在线：打造工业机器人领域“产业互联网+系统集成+职业教育”综合服务平台（上海库茂机器人股份有限公司），获多轮融资，为ABB/库卡战略合作伙伴 。
3. 2015至今 平台升级：业务覆盖B2B交易、系统集成、职业培训，解决行业“找、买、用、人”四大痛点，服务全产业链 。
  
- 定位：链接机器人产业链，让天下没有难用的机器人。
- 资源：20年行业沉淀，覆盖上下游资源，擅长趋势解读、方案落地、资源对接。
- 人设：接地气、讲真话、重实战，被粉丝称为“机器人老炮”。

Jason Yu
 CEO, Robot Online | Industry Veteran with 20+ Years in Robotics | 200K+ Followers Across Chinese Social Platforms
Tags: Robotics Insider | Pioneer of Industrial Robotics Industry Internet
Digital Influence: With over 200,000 followers on Douyin, WeChat Channels, and other platforms, Junsheng is a top-tier KOL in China’s robotics space. Under his personal brand “Robotics Old Cannon” (a nickname reflecting his no-nonsense, battle-tested insights), he delivers practical, high-value content to engineers, integrators, and decision-makers.
Industry Experience: Two decades deep in industrial robotics—from frontline sales to entrepreneurship—having witnessed and shaped the sector’s evolution from infancy to boom.
Education: B.Eng., Tongji University; MBA, California State University.
Leadership Roles: Council Member, Shanghai Robotics Association; appointed CMO of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC).
Career Highlights:
2005–2013 | ABB Robotics
 Rose from the company’s youngest sales rep to consistent Top Performer, mastering industrial robot applications, customer needs, and market dynamics.
2013 | Founded Robot Online
 Launched what would become a leading integrated platform—combining industrial internet, system integration, and vocational training—under Shanghai Kuma Robotics Co., Ltd. The company has secured multiple rounds of funding and is a strategic partner of ABB and KUKA.
2015–Present | Platform Expansion
 Scaled the business into a full-stack B2B ecosystem covering product discovery, procurement, deployment, and talent development—solving the industry’s four core pain points: finding, buying, using, and staffing.
Mission: To connect the entire robotics value chain and make robots truly accessible and usable for everyone.
Strengths: Deep network across upstream and downstream players; expert in trend analysis, solution implementation, and resource matchmaking.
Personal Brand: Down-to-earth, brutally honest, and relentlessly practical—earning him the affectionate title “Robotics Old Cannon” among his followers.

guestVisitList.introduce:
英飞凌科技消费、计算与通讯业务(C3)
中国区销售副总裁
邹聪先生于 2026 年 5 月 1 日加入英飞凌，担任英飞凌科技消费、计算与通讯业务中国
区销售副总裁，负责该业务在中国区的销售战略规划与落地执行，推动业务稳健发展
及业绩增长。
加入英飞凌前，邹聪先生曾担任 Wolfspeed 公司亚洲销售与市场副总裁，成功领导包
括中国在内的亚洲销售及 FAE 团队，通过高效的战略规划与执行，有力推动区域业务
收入持续增长。在此之前，他还在 CREE 及 International Rectifier 等知名公司担任多
个管理职位，积累了丰富的行业与管理经验。
邹聪先生在电子与功率半导体行业拥有超过 20 年的从业经验，在销售与市场营销领域

guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mark Zou   Vice President of Sales of Consumer, Computing & Communication, Infineon Technologies China
Mark Zou joined Infineon on May 1, 2026, as Vice President of Sales of Consumer, 
Computing & Communication, Infineon Technologies China. In this role, he is 
responsible for developing and executing the sales strategies, driving steady business 
growth and sustained performance in China market. 
Prior to joining Infineon, Mark served as Asia Vice President of Sales and Marketing 
at Wolfspeed, where he successfully led the regional sales and Field Application 
Engineering (FAE) teams, including those in China. Through effective strategic 
planning and execution, he played a key role in driving continuous revenue growth 
across the region. Earlier in his career, he held various leadership positions at leading 
companies such as CREE and International Rectifier, where he built extensive industry 
expertise and management experience.
Mark brings over 20 years of experience in the electronics and power semiconductor 
industry. He has a strong track record in sales and marketing, coupled with proven 
capabilities in leadership development, business expansion, and team management.
Mark holds an Executive MBA from China Europe International Business School 
(CEIBS) and a bachelor’s degree in electronic engineering from South China 
University of Technology.

nameEn: Model Matrix Community · Black Tech Flash Show
desc: 「模力黑科技秀」为 2026WAIC 模力社区重点展示的舞台环节。活动通过前期海选筛选出 10 家优质企业参与现场展示，企业将在 H4馆领航舞台开展路演，并依照具身智能、科学智能、应用智能三大赛道分为三轮依次登台。活动设置 180 秒限时路演规则，要求各企业精简内容、高效输出，集中介绍企业技术方向、核心亮点，集中呈现辖区科创企业的技术水平与创新成果。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有19日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn: Model Matrix Community · Black Tech Flash Show is a key stage presentation by Model Matrix Community at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). Following a preliminary screening, 10 selected enterprises will take the stage at the H4 Hall Pilot Stage for roadshow presentations, appearing in three sequential rounds across the three tracks: Embodied Intelligence, Scientific Intelligence, and Applied Intelligence. Each presentation is limited to 180 seconds, requiring enterprises to deliver concise, high-impact content that highlights their technological focus and core innovations, thereby showcasing the technical competence and innovative achievements of the community's sci-tech enterprises.

desc: 有鹿机器人（UDEER.AI）是专注通用具身智能的科技企业，自研 Master 2000 GEN-II 具身智能大脑，斩获数十项全球算法公开赛第一及多项国际工业设计大奖。旗舰产品 AI130S 巡扫机器人搭载该大脑，结合高强度镁合金框架等多项创新技术，实现真正的即插即用与智能化自主作业。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有18日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn: UDEER.AI is a technology enterprise focusing on general embodied intelligence. It independently developed the Master 2000 GEN-II Embodied Intelligence Brain, winning dozens of first prizes in global algorithm open competitions as well as multiple international industrial design awards. Equipped with this brain, its flagship AI130S Patrol & Sweep Robot adopts numerous innovative technologies including a high-strength magnesium alloy frame, enabling true plug-and-play and intelligent autonomous operation.

desc: 为系统总结、展示我国新一代智慧港口建设重大创新成果，中国港口协会特举办“院士看洋山”活动。本次活动以“智联港口 科创未来——院士共话AI赋能港口”为主题，诚邀多领域院士专家汇聚高端智慧，通过实地观摩、现场调研、座谈指导，助力交通强国、海洋强国建设，打造可复制、可推广的智慧港口中国方案。
descEn: To systematically summarize and showcase major innovative achievements in the development of new-generation smart ports in China, the China Ports & Harbors Association specially organizes the event "Academicians Visit Yangshan".Centered on the theme "Smart Connected Ports, Innovation Shaping the Future – Academicians Discuss AI Empowerment for Ports", this event brings together academicians and experts from multiple fields to pool top-tier expertise. Through on-site observation, field research and panel consultations, the initiative bolsters the development of a powerful transportation country and a strong maritime nation, and develops replicable and scalable Chinese solutions for smart ports.

name: 斯梅尔数学与计算研究院·数学与人工智能论坛
nameEn: Resonance Summit : Al x Mathematics and the Next Paradigm Shift
desc:
作为人工智能发展的底层语言与理论基石，数学是连接抽象规律与现实世界的重要桥梁，为AI提供核心支撑；人工智能也正在以新的计算、推理与发现方式，拓展数学研究和科学创新的边界。二者的深度融合，正在催生智能科学的新范式，并持续推动人类认知、工程创新与产业升级进入新的阶段。
本论坛以“共振之巅：AI×数学的范式跃迁”为主题，聚焦二者的双向塑造关系，围绕“数学何以塑造AI的本质能力”“AI如何改变数学研究范式”“数学与人工智能如何走向现实世界”三条主线展开交流。论坛将汇聚菲尔兹奖得主、图灵奖得主、中国科学院院士及全球顶尖青年学者，通过主旨演讲、思想对话、圆桌交流等形式，共同探讨二者融合发展的前沿方向。
descEn:
As the foundational language and theoretical bedrock of artificial intelligence, mathematics provides essential support for the development of AI while serving as a vital bridge between abstract principles and the real world. At the same time, AI is expanding the frontiers of mathematical research and scientific discovery through new modes of computation, reasoning, and exploration. The deep convergence of mathematics and AI is giving rise to new paradigms in intelligent science, while further advancing human knowledge, engineering innovation, and industrial transformation.
Under the theme “Resonance Summit: AI × Mathematics and the Next Paradigm Shift,” this forum will focus on the mutual shaping of mathematics and artificial intelligence. Discussions will center on three core themes: “How Mathematics Shapes the Essential Capabilities of AI,” “How AI Transforms Mathematical Research Paradigms,” and “How  Mathematics & AI Extends into the Real World.”

name: AI创新者思享汇
nameEn: AI Innovators Summit & Thought Share
desc:
聚焦AI从工具到伙伴的演进路径，探讨这一变革对产业、社会与人类文明的长远。

活动以“AI与我：人机关系下一程”为主议题，设置三场圆桌论坛：从工具到伙伴，人与AI如何共事——探讨人机协同的信任建立与责任边界；从“AI能做什么”到“用AI实际做什么”，AI如何成为产业不可或缺的伙伴——审视AI驱动产业升级的真实路径与“采用鸿沟”；从并立共存到共同进化，碳基与硅基如何同行——追问人类价值的再定义与文明的未来。
descEn:
AI Innovators Thought Exchange

Focusing on the evolutionary trajectory of AI from a tool to a partner, this event explores the long-term implications for industries, society, and human civilization.

Under the overarching theme "AI and Me: The Next Chapter in Human-Machine Relationships," the event features three roundtable forums:

From Tool to Partner: How Humans and AI Work Together – Delving into the building of trust and the boundaries of responsibility in human-AI collaboration.

From "What AI Can Do" to "What AI Actually Does in Practice": How AI Becomes an Indispensable Partner in Industry – Examining the real-world pathways of AI-driven industrial upgrading and the "adoption gap."

From Coexistence to Co-evolution: How Carbon-Based and Silicon-Based Intelligence Advance Together – Questioning the redefinition of human value and the future of civilization.

guestVisitList.name: 孙博文
guestVisitList.introduce: 孙博文  蚂蚁集团可信AI“蚁天鉴”技术负责人、AI工程基础设施总监

guestVisitList.name: 赵五岳
guestVisitList.introduce: 赵五岳为宇泛智能创始人、董事长兼总经理，高级工程师，杭州市C类高层次人才、西湖明珠青年拔尖人才，毕业于杭州电子科技大学，曾任职华为，2014年创办宇泛智能。他深耕AI视觉、边缘智能硬件与空间智能领域，带领企业成长为国家级专精特新小巨人企业，业务遍及全球近90国。个人斩获浙江省科技进步奖、中国自动化学会科技进步奖，持续布局智慧场景解决方案与具身智能、服务机器人研发。

guestVisitList.name: 杨宇东
guestVisitList.introduce: 杨宇东，现任第一财经传媒集团总编辑、《第一财经日报》总编辑，上海证券交易所上市公司信息披露专家委员会委员，中国经济传媒协会副会长、上海市报业传媒行业协会副会长。

guestVisitList.name: 齐鹏
guestVisitList.introduce: 齐鹏，同济大学电子与信息工程学院教授、博士生导师，未来机器人实验室负责人、上海市青年科技人才协会副会长。主要研究机器人学、具身智能、智能传感与交互等。首届上海科技青年35人引领计划获奖者、上海市青年科技启明星、上海市“东方英才”，入选“全球前2%顶尖科学家榜单”，主持国家重点研发计划“智能机器人”专项青年科学家项目、国家自然科学基金、上海市“科技创新行动计划”等，担任剑桥大学出版社Robotica期刊副主编、Nature旗下《npj DigitalSurgery》编委、中国工程院院刊《Engineering》、《科学通报》&Science Bulletin青年编委、高等教育出版社"机器人科学与技术丛书“编委会委员等，荣获上海市青年五四奖章、上海科普教育教育创新奖、机器人行业年会应用创新奖等荣誉。

guestVisitList.name: 陈天润
guestVisitList.introduce:
魔芯科技创始人兼CEO陈天润系浙江大学博士，师从中国工程院院士潘云鹤。

· 深耕空间智能与4D世界模型领域，在 Science、Nature Photonics、IEEE TPAMI 等期刊及 ICCV、CVPR、ICML、SIGGRAPH 等会议发表高水平论文50余篇。

·多项研究成果入选会议Highlight、Oral、Spotlight，获2024年Chinagraph最佳论文奖。同时担任 NeurIPS、ICML、CVPR 国际会议审稿人。

· 2022年荣获共青团中央科技创新最高奖项“中国青少年科技创新奖”，系浙江省高校唯一获奖者。

·先后入选2024福布斯Forbes Asia 30 Under 30、2022胡润U30中国创业先锋、2023创业邦30 Under 30+等青年科创领域主流权威榜单。

guestVisitList.name: 周伟然
guestVisitList.introduce:
周伟然，普华永道全球科技、媒体及通信 (TMT) 行业主管合伙人及中国人工智能主管合伙人

周伟然先生领导着普华永道全球科技、媒体和电信 (TMT) 行业团队，同时也是中国内地和香港TMT行业主管合伙人及中国人工智能主管合伙人。

新兴技术和数字部署正在重塑所有行业和企业，并带来TMT行业公司的快速增长和发展。周伟然先生一直领导并支持涵盖所有服务领域（审计、税务和咨询）的普华永道全球网络，为TMT行业的公司以及寻求通过数字化转型重塑自身的客户提供一站式专业解决方案和服务。

周伟然先生在中国内地和香港的公共会计业务领域有超过30年的工作经历。他在为TMT行业公司提供审计和咨询服务方面拥有丰富的经验，客户范围涵盖从初创企业到全球科技巨头，业务包括资本市场交易、审计业务、系统和控制咨询以及交易服务。

周伟然先生是中国注册会计师协会，英国特许会计师公会及香港会计师公会的执业会员。此外，周伟然先生还是香港互联网广告委员会顾问。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Wilson Chow
Global & China TMT Industry Leader, PwC China

Wilson heads PwC’s global technology, media and telecommunications (TMT) industry practice. He is also the TMT industry leader and Artificial Intelligence leader for the firm’s Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong SAR practice. 

Emerging technologies and digital deployment are redefining all industries and businesses. They also lead to rapid growth and developments of companies in the TMT industry. Wilson has been leading and supporting the PwC global network across all lines of service - Assurance, Taxation and Advisory - to provide one-stop professional solutions and services to companies in the TMT industry, as well as to clients looking for reinventing themselves through digital transformations.

Wilson has been working in the public accounting practice in Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong SAR for more than 30 years. He has extensive experience in providing assurance and advisory services to companies in the TMT industry, ranging from start-ups to global tech giants, for capital market transactions, assurance engagements, systems and controls advisory, and deals. 

He is a practising member of the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Accountants, China Institute of Certified Public Accountants, and the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants. Wilson is also an adviser to the Internet Advertising Board of Hong Kong.

nameEn: AI Leap · Her Momentum：The Rise of Female Power
desc: 本届论坛紧扣习近平总书记关于人工智能发展、女性发展及全球治理的重要论述，呼应世界人工智能大会核心主题，打造“赛+展+会”三位一体的特色活动。论坛聚焦AI演化趋势、AIGC女性创造、AI人才培育、AI全球治理四大方向，汇聚政府、国际组织、AI领域专家、青年科创代表、女性菁英等多方力量，通过成果发布、主旨演讲、AIGC创作大赛成果展示，探讨AI跃迁中的女性创新实践与生态构建，聚焦女性视角与青年创意，打造优质AIGC成果矩阵；同步打造沉浸式主题展览，以“科技+艺术+互动”为亮点，将大赛成果转化为可视化、可体验、可打卡的线下场景，实现“论坛听观点、展区看成果、沉浸式感受女性科创力量”的联动体验。
descEn: Aligned closely with General Secretary Xi Jinping’s important expositions on artificial intelligence advancement, women’s development and global governance, this Forum echoes the core theme of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) and builds a distinctive three-in-one framework integrating competitions, exhibitions and conferences.Centering on four key pillars—the evolutionary trends of AI, women-led AIGC innovation, AI talent cultivation, and global AI governance—the Forum brings together stakeholders including government authorities, international organizations, top AI experts, young tech innovators and elite female professionals. Through achievement releases, keynote speeches and showcases of award-winning AIGC competition works, participants will explore women’s innovative practices and ecosystem development amid AI’s transformative leap. Prioritizing female perspectives and youthful creativity, the Forum assembles a high-quality matrix of AIGC outcomes.
