guestVisitList.position: 全国妇联党组书记、副主席、书记处第一书记

guestVisitList.name: 华张果而
guestVisitList.introduce: 华张果而女士是上海市商业学校2025级数字媒体艺术中本贯通班在读学生，共青团员。在校期间，曾获第二届全国青少年数字艺术创意大赛二等奖、2026年上海市职业院校学生技能大赛（新闻传播赛道）二等奖、2026年上海市校园足球联盟足球比赛一等奖；获评校级优秀学生干部、文明礼仪标兵等荣誉称号。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Ms. Hua Zhangguo'er is a student in the Class of 2025 Digital Media Art Integrated Program at Shanghai Commercial School and a member of the Communist Youth League of China. During her time at the school, she has received the Second Prize in the 2nd National Youth Digital Art Creativity Competition, the Second Prize in the 2026 Shanghai Vocational Student Skills Competition (Journalism and Communication Track), and the First Prize in the 2026 Shanghai Campus Football League. She has also been recognized with honorary titles including Outstanding Student Cadre and Etiquette Model at the school level.

guestVisitList.name: 何婕
guestVisitList.introduce: 何婕女士是上海广播电视台融媒体中心首席主持人,播音指导。常年工作在新闻评论领域,主持东方卫视《这就是中国》、《今晚》、《中国长三角》等节目。曾获全国播音员主持人金话筒奖、全国德艺双馨电视艺术工作者称号、上海市三八红旗手、上海五四青年奖章、上海广播电视台“领军人才"等称号。多次获得上海新闻奖一等奖、上海广播电视奖一等奖。著有《书单思维》《书单更新》等作品。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: 何婕女士是上海广播电视台融媒体中心首席主持人,播音指导。常年工作在新闻评论领域,主持东方卫视《这就是中国》、《今晚》、《中国长三角》等节目。曾获全国播音员主持人金话筒奖、全国德艺双馨电视艺术工作者称号、上海市三八红旗手、上海五四青年奖章、上海广播电视台“领军人才"等称号。多次获得上海新闻奖一等奖、上海广播电视奖一等奖。著有《书单思维》《书单更新》等作品。

guestVisitList.name: 陈波平
guestVisitList.introduce: C40城市气候领导联盟东亚区总监。曾任世界未来委员会（德国）北京代表处首席代表、中国区总监，推动世界未来委员会在中国开展循环城市相关工作，经文茂部批准正式设立代表处，并在中欧政府首脑见证下，与中国城市签署合作协议推进循环城市建设；曾任世界自然基金会（WWF）中国政策与国际战略总监，全面负责WWF中国的政策研究与倡导工作，以及相关战略规划制定工作；职业生涯早期先后任职于英国可再生能源企业、法国德夏银行股份有限公司北京代表处、国家林业局中欧天然林管理项目，参与碳基金筹备、公用事业融资政策研究、市场分析及环保项目开发等工作。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Chen Boping is the Director of the East Asia Region of the C40 Cities Climate Leadership Group. She once served as the Chief Representative and Director for China of the Beijing Representative Office of the World Future Council (Germany), promoting the World Future Council's work on circular cities in China. With the approval of the Ministry of Culture and Tourism, the representative office was officially established, and under the witness of Chinese and European government leaders, cooperation agreements were signed with Chinese cities to advance the construction of circular cities. She also once served as the Director of Policy and International Strategy for WWF China, fully responsible for WWF China's policy research and advocacy work, as well as the formulation of relevant strategic plans. In the early stage of her career, she successively worked at a British renewable energy enterprise, the Beijing Representative Office of Crédit Agricole Corporate and Investment Bank, and the China-Europe Natural Forest Management Project of the National Forestry and Grassland Administration, participating in work such as the preparation of carbon funds, research on utility financing policies, market analysis, and the development of environmental protection projects.

guestVisitList.name: 宋春景
guestVisitList.introduce: 宋春景女士是国家电力投资集团上海核工程研究设计院股份有限公司工艺系统所副所长兼副总工，一直从事保障核电厂安全的专设安全系统的研发和设计。曾获全国三八红旗手，上海市三八红旗手，上海市巾帼建功标兵，上海市巾帼创新新秀，中国核能行业协会青年优秀创新人物等称号。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Ms. Song Chunjing is Deputy Director and Deputy Chief Engineer of the Process System Department at Shanghai Nuclear Engineering Research & Design Institute Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of State Power Investment Corporation. She has long been engaged in the research, development, and design of engineered safety features that ensure the safe operation of nuclear power plants. She is the recipient of numerous honors, including the National March 8th Red Banner Holder, the Shanghai March 8th Red Banner Holder, the Shanghai Model Woman Achiever, the Shanghai Rising Star in Women's Innovation, and the Outstanding Young Innovative Talent Award from the China Nuclear Energy Industry Association.

guestVisitList.name: 汪博伦
guestVisitList.introduce: 汪博伦女士是粤港澳大湾区首位入选国家级高层次人才计划的AI年轻女性科学家，曾任职于原武汉国家光电实验室、美国加州大学类脑智能实验室等世界级科研机构。她领衔女性占比70%的国际顶尖类脑AI团队，实现了包括全球参数量最大的原生类脑模型、全球首款毫瓦级动态功耗AI推理芯片、国产自研非Transformer算法模型备案首例等世界级技术突破。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Ms. Wang Bolun is the first young female AI scientist from the Guangdong–Hong Kong–Macao Greater Bay Area to be selected for the National High-Level Talent Program. She has worked at world-class research institutions including the former Wuhan National Laboratory for Optoelectronics and the Brain-Inspired Intelligence Lab at the University of California. She leads an internationally top-tier brain-inspired AI team, in which women account for 70%. Under her leadership, the team has achieved world-class technological breakthroughs, including training the world's largest native brain-inspired AI model, developing the world's first milliwatt-level dynamic-power AI inference chip, and completing China's first domestic non-Transformer algorithm model filing.

guestVisitList.name: 常进
guestVisitList.introduce: 常  进，中国科学院院士，中国共产党第二十届中央委员会候补委员，现任中国科学技术大学校长、党委副书记。空间天文领域的领军学者，曾任中国科学院紫金山天文台台长，担任我国首颗暗物质粒子探测卫星“悟空”号首席科学家，擅长领域在于空间天文前沿研究、高等教育管理、顶尖科创人才培养、人工智能与前沿科学交叉学科建设。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Chang Jin, Academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, Alternate Member of the 20th Central Committee of the Communist Party of China, currently serving as President and Deputy Secretary of the Party Committee of the University of Science and Technology of China.A leading scholar in space astronomy, former Director of the Purple Mountain Observatory, Chinese Academy of Sciences, and Chief Scientist of "Wukong" — China's first dark matter particle detection satellite. His areas of expertise include frontier research in space astronomy, higher education management, cultivation of top-tier sci-tech innovation talents, and interdisciplinary development of artificial intelligence with frontier sciences.

guestVisitList.name: 阮小燚
guestVisitList.introduce: 阮小燚女士，毕业于韩国建国大学电影导演系。早期从事影视剧组工作，担任策划助理、导演助理等岗位，积累完整影视工业流程经验。2020年至今转向商业广告领域，担任广告导演，长期与多家广告公司及知名品牌合作，参与多部TVC及品牌视觉项目，为家乡等多地拍摄城市宣传片。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Ms. Ruan Xiaoyi is a graduate of the Film Directing Department at Konkuk University in South Korea. In the early stages of her career, she worked in film and television production crews, serving as a planning assistant and assistant director, and gaining comprehensive experience in the film and television production workflow. Since 2020, she has transitioned into commercial advertising as a director, collaborating with numerous advertising agencies and well-known brands on various TV commercials and brand visual projects, including city promotional films for her hometown and other regions.

guestVisitList.name: 何佳珊
guestVisitList.introduce: 何佳珊，深耕品牌、IP与前沿科技领域的跨界从业者，现任上海稀宇科技（MiniMax）多模态全球市场战略负责人，主导品牌市场、内容合作及商业化布局。频繁受邀出席戛纳世界人工智能电影节、上海国际电影节等影视行业盛会，在戛纳活动中亦与众多明星艺人、行业先锋同台交流，同时多次参与国内重量级影视行业峰会，担任核心嘉宾及AIGC专业评审。 兼具海外留学经历与跨文化视野，早年联合打造现象级国际艺术潮流IPi，并独立运营原创饰品品牌，斩获2024福布斯U30荣誉。在潮流艺术、IP跨界合作领域积淀深厚，成功落地多个海内外知名品牌联名案例。近年来聚焦AI与内容产业结合，推动多模态技术在影视及文化内容中的创新应用与商业化落地。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
He Jiashan is a cross-disciplinary professional deeply engaged in branding, IP, and cutting-edge technologies. She currently serves as the Head of Multimodal Global Market Strategy at MiniMax, where she oversees brand marketing, content partnerships, and commercialization initiatives. She is a frequent guest at major film and entertainment events, including the Cannes World AI Film Festival and the Shanghai International Film Festival, where she has shared the stage with prominent celebrities and industry pioneers. She has also participated in numerous prestigious domestic film industry summits as a keynote speaker and AIGC professional judge.

With overseas study experience and a cross-cultural perspective, she co-created a trendsetting international art and lifestyle IP in her early career and independently operated her own original accessory brand, earning a spot on the Forbes 30 Under 30 list in 2024. With deep expertise in trend art and IP cross-industry collaborations, she has successfully executed multiple well-known co-branding initiatives with both domestic and international brands. In recent years, she has focused on integrating AI with the content industry, driving the innovative application and commercialization of multimodal technologies in film, television, and cultural content.

guestVisitList.name: 金江波
guestVisitList.introduce: 金江波， 上海大学上海美术学院执行院长、教授、博士生导师，上海市政协常委，民进上海市委常委，民进宝山区委会主委，国家一级美术师，是国内科技艺术、数字创意领域领军学者。深耕艺术与人工智能交叉创新领域，主持多项国家级重大艺术科技项目，推动AIGC、元宇宙、数字媒介赋能视觉艺术、公共美育与文化创意产业，擅长领域在于数字艺术、科技艺术、AIGC艺术创作、非遗数字化活化、数字文博、艺术与人工智能交叉融合、公共艺术与数字美育、文创产业创新。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jin Jiangbo, Executive Dean, Professor, and Doctoral Supervisor of Shanghai Academy of Fine Arts, Shanghai University, Standing Committee Member of the Shanghai Municipal Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC), Standing Committee Member of the Shanghai Municipal Committee of the China Democratic League, Chairman of the Baoshan District Committee of the China Democratic League, and National First-Class Artist. He is a leading scholar in the fields of technology art and digital creativity in China. He has long focused on the cross-innovation of art and artificial intelligence, leading multiple major national art and technology projects, and promoting AIGC, the metaverse, and digital media to empower visual arts, public aesthetic education, and cultural and creative industries. His expertise spans digital art, technology art, AIGC artistic creation, digital revitalization of intangible cultural heritage, digital museums and cultural heritage, the integration of art and artificial intelligence, public art and digital aesthetic education, and cultural and creative industry innovation.

guestVisitList.name: 张笑涵
guestVisitList.introduce: 张笑涵女士，19岁，就读于东北师范大学，主修广播电视与编剧专业。她曾是校园抖音媒体团队的成员，掌握拍摄、编剧、剪辑和AIGC制作等技能。她以生活为主题、采用双线叙事的短片获得了多个国际电影节的提名，并荣获一项微电影剪辑奖。她工作高效且善于协作，将人工智能与实景拍摄相结合创作，作出能引起共鸣的现实题材故事。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Ms. Zhang Xiaohan, 19, is a student majoring in Radio, Television and Screenwriting at Northeast Normal University. She previously served as a member of her campus Douyin media team and is skilled in filming, scriptwriting, editing, and AIGC production. Her short films, which explore life-themed subjects through dual-narrative storytelling, have earned nominations at multiple international film festivals and received a microfilm editing award. Efficient and collaborative, she integrates AI with live-action filming to craft empathetic, realistic stories.

guestVisitList.name: 陆记
guestVisitList.introduce: 陆记，上海智汇万联创始人，WaytoAGI 社区上海负责人、上海市创新创业导师团导师、上海商业会计学校科创导师，主导多项 AIGC 商业项目与赛事活动，行业活动策划执行。搭建AI 生产力体系、个人 AI 第二大脑构建以及超级个体生态打造，持续输出 AI 实战课程与内容作品，推进企业AI数字化转型落地实践。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Lu Ji is the founder of Shanghai Zhihui Wanlian, the Shanghai head of the WaytoAGI community, a mentor of the Shanghai Innovation and Entrepreneurship Mentor Group, and a science and technology innovation mentor at the Shanghai Business Accounting School. He has led multiple AIGC business projects and competitions, and is responsible for the planning and execution of industry events. He is dedicated to building an AI productivity system, constructing a personal AI second brain, and creating a super-individual ecosystem. He continuously outputs AI practical courses and content works, promoting the practical implementation of AI digital transformation in enterprises.

guestVisitList.name: 王薇
guestVisitList.introduce: 作为上海首个AI广告一人公司实践者，野仙仙没有庞大的创意、设计、执行团队，仅凭自身创意能力+AI工具辅助，一人包揽创意策划、视觉生成、文案撰写、客户交付全链路工作，轻装上阵承接品牌广告项目。她创作的《AI心跳 超级有AI》作品，斩获2025AI广告品牌创新设计大赛案例类银奖，凭借优质作品拿下多个品牌长期合作订单。入驻上海本地创业社区后，更是实现“一人打通完整产业链”，不用承担高额团队成本和场地费用，靠专业创意和AI赋能，把一人广告公司做得有声有色。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
以下是英文翻译：

**As Shanghai's first independent practitioner running a one-person AI advertising business, Ye Xianxian operates without a large creative, design, or execution team. Relying solely on her own creative capabilities augmented by AI tools, she single-handedly manages the entire workflow—from creative planning and visual generation to copywriting and client delivery—enabling her to take on brand advertising projects with remarkable agility. Her work *AI Heartbeat: Super AI* won a Silver Award in the case category at the 2025 AI Advertising Brand Innovation Design Competition, and she has secured long-term partnerships with multiple brands through her high-quality output. Since joining a local startup community in Shanghai, she has achieved an end-to-end model of "one person, complete industry chain"—free from the burden of high team costs and office rent, she has built a thriving one-person advertising business through professional creativity and AI empowerment.**

guestVisitList.name: 李金金
guestVisitList.introduce: 上海交通大学教授、博士生导师，人工智能与微结构实验室主任，国家高层次青年人才。她长期深耕 AI for Science 交叉领域，融合人工智能与材料、生物化工方向，主持多项国家级重点科研项目。获评 2024 年全国十大杰出女科技工作者，发表高水平 SCI 论文两百余篇，获数十项国家发明专利。她创立上海金珵科技有限公司，主导研发 ManuDrive 工业时序 AI 大模型，已落地川宁生物等大型制造企业，实现发酵生产提效。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Li Jinjin Professor and PhD Supervisor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Director of the Artificial Intelligence and Microstructure Laboratory, and a National High-level Young Talent.
She has long been dedicated to the interdisciplinary field of AI for Science, integrating artificial intelligence with materials science and biochemical engineering, and has led multiple key national scientific research projects.
Named one of China's Top 10 Outstanding Female Scientific and Technological Workers in 2024, she has published over 200 high-quality SCI papers and holds dozens of national invention patents. She founded Shanghai Jincheng Technology Co., Ltd. and spearheaded the development of ManuDrive, an industrial time-series AI large model. The model has been deployed in large manufacturing enterprises including Chuanning Biotechnology, driving efficiency improvements in fermentation production.

name: SCDI·国际AI城市生态论坛
nameEn: Earth Intelligence Drives AI Cities– 2026 International AI Cities Ecology Forum
desc: 本次论坛以"地球智能驱动AI城市"为主题，汇聚全球政产学研各界力量，系统探讨地球智能如何赋能城市的气候韧性、应急响应、绿色低碳与空间治理，论坛致力于打通技术、政策与实践壁垒，推动国际经验共享与场景协同创新，为全球城市迈向更智能、更可持续、更具韧性的未来共同探索新范式。
descEn: Centered on the theme "Earth Intelligence Drives AI Cities", the 2026 International AI Cities Ecology Forum unites global stakeholders from government, industry, academia and research. It conducts in-depth discussions on Earth Intelligence’s enabling role in urban climate resilience, emergency management, green low-carbon transition and spatial governance. The forum bridges gaps between technology, policy and practice, promotes global experience exchange and scenario-based collaborative innovation, and co-creates new models for smarter, sustainable and resilient cities worldwide.

name: WAIC UP! 2026 ——青年观察家·思享会
nameEn: WAIC UP! 2026 Youth Observer Ideas Sharing Session
desc:
WAIC UP! 2026 —— 青年观察家·思享会

当AI重写人生坐标，青年如何找到方向、担起未来？2026年7月19日13:30-21:30，上海世博展览馆，世界人工智能大会首份期刊平台WAIC UP! 携手全球顶尖思想家、教育者、创业者与青年代表，展开一场从白天到黑夜的深度思享会。

活动以“醒—择—立”三幕结构，直面教育脱节、就业重构与创业逻辑失效三大断裂带——从唤醒认知、看清时代，做出选择、找到路径，到确立自我、向上生长。这将是一场代际同台、行动落地的共谋——发布国际青年观察家联盟、启动创新教育案例集，让对话转化为青年的方向感与行动力。
descEn:
WAIC UP! 2026 — Young Observers · Ideas Forum

As AI rewrites the coordinates of life, how can young people find their direction and embrace the future? On July 19, 2026, from 13:30 to 21:30 at the Shanghai World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center, WAIC UP! — the inaugural journal platform of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference — joins hands with the world's leading thinkers, educators, entrepreneurs, and youth representatives to host a deep-thinking forum that spans from day to night.

Structured in three acts — "Awaken, Choose, Establish" — the event confronts three major ruptures: the disconnect between education and market demands, the restructuring of employment, and the breakdown of traditional entrepreneurial logic. It moves from awakening cognition and seeing the times clearly, to making choices and finding pathways, and finally to establishing self-identity and growing upward. This is not a one-way lecture, but a shared endeavor where generations meet and actions tak

guestVisitList.name: Bill Reichert
guestVisitList.introduce: Bill Reichert 是飞马科技风险投资公司（Pegasus Tech Ventures）的合伙人，专注于深度科技投资，包括人工智能、量子计算、下一代芯片、材料科学和医疗技术。他同时也是全球规模最大、奖金最高的风险投资竞赛——创业世界杯（Startup World Cup）的首席布道官，该赛事奖金总额超过150万美元，其中包括100万美元的最高奖金。比尔是商业路演指南《如何惊艳全场！硅谷创业者路演秘诀》（Getting to Wow! Silicon Valley Pitch Secrets for Entrepreneurs）的合著者。他拥有20年的风险投资经验，最初是Garage Technology Ventures的联合创始人兼董事总经理，该公司是一家专注于种子期和早期阶段的风险投资公司，后被飞马科技收购。他曾在斯坦福大学和加州大学伯克利分校任教，并在世界各地发表主题演讲和举办研讨会。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Bill Reichert is a Partner at Pegasus Tech Ventures, a venture capital firm focused on deep tech investments, including artificial intelligence, quantum computing, next-generation chips, materials science, and medical technology. He also serves as the Chief Evangelist of the Startup World Cup, the world's largest and highest-prize venture capital competition, with total prizes exceeding $1.5 million, including a grand prize of $1 million. Bill is the co-author of the business pitch guide Getting to Wow! Silicon Valley Pitch Secrets for Entrepreneurs. With 20 years of experience in venture capital, he began his career as a co-founder and Managing Director of Garage Technology Ventures, a seed-stage and early-stage venture capital firm that was later acquired by Pegasus Tech. He has taught at Stanford University and the University of California, Berkeley, and has delivered keynote speeches and conducted workshops around the world.

guestVisitList.name: 吴嘉愉
guestVisitList.introduce: 吴嘉愉（ Ng）是维多利亚（中国）教育集团的第三代核心成员，目前担任集团校董、总园长及英文课程总监。维多利亚教育机构成立于1965年，是香港从事教育培训的机构，创始人丁毓珠女士在香港创办首家幼儿园 。该机构以中英文双语教学为特色，提供涵盖幼儿园至中学阶段的国际文凭（IB）课程，包括IB PYP项目及哥伦比亚大学早期阅读项目（TCRWP）。旗下设有幼儿园、中小学及早教中心，业务覆盖香港、上海、深圳等城市。机构初期在香港开设多所幼儿园及小学，1984年创办维多利亚小学，2007年与沪江大学同学会合办香港首所一贯制IB学校沪江维多利亚学校。1998年进入中国内地市场，于上海、深圳等地开设幼儿园。2000年创办Arts Plus游学院，专注0-3岁婴幼儿早期教育。创始人丁毓珠与其女孔美琪、其子孔庆旸形成三代传承，推动教育版图扩展至杭州、苏州等地。2018年第三代成员吴嘉愉加入并参与上海校区运营。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Melanie Ng is the third-generation core member of Victoria (China) Education Group, currently serving as a School Board Member, Chief Principal, and Director of the English Curriculum. Founded in 1965, Victoria Education Organization is an educational institution based in Hong Kong, with founder Ms. Ding Yuzhu establishing the first kindergarten in the city. The organization is distinguished by its bilingual Chinese-English teaching model and offers International Baccalaureate (IB) programs spanning kindergarten through secondary levels, including the IB PYP program and the Columbia University Teachers College Reading and Writing Project (TCRWP). It operates kindergartens, primary and secondary schools, and early childhood education centers across Hong Kong, Shanghai, Shenzhen, and other cities.

In its early years, the organization established multiple kindergartens and primary schools in Hong Kong. In 1984, it founded Victoria Primary School, and in 2007, in partnership with the Shanghai University Alumni Association, it established Hong Kong's first through-train IB school—Victoria Shanghai Academy. In 1998, the group expanded into the mainland Chinese market, opening kindergartens in cities such as Shanghai and Shenzhen. In 2000, it launched Arts Plus Academy, focusing on early childhood education for children aged 0 to 3. Founder Ding Yuzhu, together with her daughter Maggie Kong and her son Kong Hing Yeung, have formed a three-generation succession, driving the group's expansion into cities including Hangzhou and Suzhou. In 2018, the third-generation member Jia Yu Ng joined the organization and became involved in the operations of the Shanghai campuses.

guestVisitList.name: 姜迅
guestVisitList.introduce: 曾任阿里巴巴技术总监：主导数据平台分布式架构升级，成为初代推荐系统的技术底座；曾任盛大集团高级总监：改组盛大创新院为以数据驱动的核心创新院；曾任平安好医生技术副总裁；此后作为创始人创立医云健康，提供慢病管理服务；曾任云从科技数据研究院院长、首席架构师：作为核心技术人员全程参与公司科创板上市；2023年起任盛大AI副总裁：牵头集团「长期记忆」方向研究，并将人体「身体」数据视为生命的长期记忆。现任Theta Health AI的CEO，并创立了专注于个性化健康数据的公司。作品：《第五维度：AI时代如何生存，成为不可替代的人》。本书用通俗易懂的语言，围绕三个问题展开：AI如何运作？AI做不了什么？我们该如何借助AI更好地生存？
guestVisitList.introduceEn: He previously served as Technical Director at Alibaba, where he led the distributed architecture upgrade of the data platform, which became the technical foundation for the company's first-generation recommendation system. He then served as Senior Director at Shanda Group, where he reorganized Shanda Innovation Institute into a data-driven core innovation institute. He later served as Vice President of Technology at Ping An Good Doctor. Subsequently, he founded E-Health Cloud as its CEO, providing chronic disease management services. He also served as Dean of the Data Research Institute and Chief Architect at Cloudwalk Technology, where he participated as a core technical member throughout the company's IPO on the STAR Market. In 2023, he took on the role of Vice President of AI at Shanda Group, leading the company's research in "long-term memory" and regarding the human body's "biological data" as the long-term memory of life. He is currently the CEO of Theta Health AI and has founded a company focused on personalized health data. He is the author of The Fifth Dimension: How to Survive in the Age of AI and Become Irreplaceable. Written in accessible language, the book revolves around three key questions: How does AI work? What can AI not do? And how can we leverage AI to thrive?

guestVisitList.name: 郭放
guestVisitList.introduce: 2025年，中国人民大学与西湖大学联合成立“未来人类联合研究院”，郭放与另一名博士生卿成林共同担任执行院长。研究院定位：这是国内首个聚焦未来人类发展前沿议题的跨学科研究平台，旨在打破传统学科壁垒。意义与模式：该研究院由中国科学院院士汤超担任院长，形成 “院士点题、博士主导” 的创新型治理模式。这一安排旨在真正把研究和决策权交给年轻人。2010年，郭放于杭州外国语学校毕业，成为伊利诺伊大学厄巴纳-香槟分校（UIUC）数学专业的一名本科生。2014年底，郭放本科毕业回国后，加入了创业大军。因为喜爱运动和健身，他和他的合伙人以运动零食电商为起点，开启了一段加强版“gap year”般的创业故事。“虽然公司能让我挣钱，但它没办法引领我，让我走得更远。”2017年，郭放回到UIUC读研，后于2021年进入西湖大学就读，在两位工学院PI张岳与李凌的联合交叉培养下，他将把自然语言处理和数据挖掘的技术应用到环境科学、生物医药和农业领域中。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
In 2025, Guo Fang and fellow doctoral candidate Qing Chenglin were appointed co-executive directors of the newly established Future Human Joint Research Institute, a collaboration between Renmin University of China and Westlake University. As China's first interdisciplinary research platform dedicated to future human development, the institute is designed to transcend traditional academic boundaries. Under the leadership of Dean Tang Chao, an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, the institute operates on an innovative model where "academicians set the vision, and doctoral students drive the execution"—ensuring that young researchers hold real decision-making power.

A 2010 graduate of Hangzhou Foreign Languages School, Guo Fang earned his bachelor's degree in Mathematics from the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (UIUC) in 2014. Upon returning to China, he dove into entrepreneurship, co-founding a sports snack e-commerce venture that reflected his passion for fitness. Though the business was profitable, he felt it lacked the intellectual depth to sustain his long-term growth. In 2017, he returned to UIUC for graduate studies, and in 2021, he joined Westlake University, where he works under the joint mentorship of PIs Zhang Yue and Li Ling, applying NLP and data mining techniques to environmental science, biomedicine, and agriculture.

name: WAIC·“涌现·无限”未来科技产业生态论坛
nameEn: Emergence & Infinity | Future Technology Industry Ecosystem Forum
desc:
2026年，我们正站在一个少见的历史节点上。AI for Science 重塑了科研的底层逻辑，核聚变点火的消息已不再是科幻，量子计算的纠错里程碑接连刷新，新材料、未来能源、未来制造……这些曾被视为“下一代人的事”，正在以惊人的速度成为这一代人的创业题目和投资命题。
边界在消失，新物种在涌现。在这个技术爆发的前夜，光源资本“涌现·无限 | 未来科技产业生态论坛”将把顶尖科学家、跨界创业者、产业领袖与长期主义的投资人聚在同一个屋檐下，围绕 AI 驱动科学发现、核聚变、量子、新材料、航空航天等硬科技落地的完整链条，展开一场有密度、有温度的深度对话。
descEn:
In 2026, we stand at a rare historical juncture. AI for Science is reshaping research fundamentals; nuclear fusion has left science fiction, and quantum error correction milestones are falling rapidly. New materials, future energy, and advanced manufacturing—once "next-generation" dreams—are now today's urgent ventures and investment imperatives.
As boundaries dissolve and new paradigms emerge, Lighthouse Capital's ​"Emergence & Infinity | Future Technology Industry Ecosystem Forum" convenes top scientists, cross-disciplinary founders, industry leaders, and long-term investors. Together, we will engage in a dense, resonant dialogue on the full commercialization chain of hard tech: from AI-driven discovery to nuclear fusion, quantum computing, new materials, and aerospace.

guestVisitList.name: 郑烜乐
guestVisitList.introduce:
郑烜乐先生 2014 年创建光源资本，带领其成为中国新一代领军产业投行，业务覆盖融资与并购、证券承销、资产管理等领域，成立十年来，光源资本始终致力于探寻卓越创新企业，以全体系金融服务与生态赋能，助力产业创新升级发展，为全球企业家和投资人打造长期可信赖的投行服务和资产管理一体化平台。目前光源资本已成长为中国最具影响力新型投行，接连获评“中国财务顾问榜单” “中国最佳新型投行” 首位。
2021 年，郑烜乐先生入选机械工业经济管理研究院“中国产业研究青年学者百强”，曾获 21 世纪经济报道 2020-2021 年度中国最具影响力青年投资家、36 氪年度 36 位 36 岁以下了不起的投资人等奖项。创建光源资本前，他长期从事企业融资与并购重组相关工作，先后任职于安永 (Ernst&Young)、中化国际和清科资本。
郑烜乐先生长期关注技术革命带来的时代变革、产业变革及企业价值的演变。他善于通过研究发掘价值，并以此建立起行之有效的发现企业价值拐点的范式，发掘并助力快手（HKEX: 01024）、哔哩哔哩（Bilibili）（NASDAQ: BILI）、货拉拉、得物、奕斯伟、知乎（NYSE: ZH）、百川智能等极具代表性的顶尖创新企业蓬勃发展，并与三一集团、协鑫集团、吉利集团、正泰集团、公牛集团等多个产业集团建立了紧密的“资本 + 创新”战略合作，为创新产业企业、科研院所构建起行之有效的产学研体系，助力产业创新落地与升级发展。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mr. Zheng Xuanle founded Lighthouse Capital in 2014, leading it to become one of China's next-generation leading industrial investment banks, with business operations spanning financing, mergers & acquisitions (M&A), securities underwriting, and asset management. Over the past decade, Lighthouse Capital has remained dedicated to identifying outstanding innovative enterprises, fostering industrial innovation, upgrading, and development through comprehensive financial services and ecosystem empowerment. It is committed to building a long-term, trustworthy integrated platform of investment banking services and asset management for global entrepreneurs and investors. Currently, Lighthouse Capital has grown into one of China's most influential new-type investment banks, consistently ranking first on the "China Financial Advisor List" and being recognized as "China's Best New-Type Investment Bank."
In 2021, Mr. Zheng was named to the "Top 100 Young Scholars in Chinese Industry Research" by the Research Institute of Machinery Industry Economic & Management. He was also honored as "China's Most Influential Young Investor of the Year 2020-2021" by 21st Century Business Herald and one of 36Kr's "36 Under 36 Outstanding Investors."
Prior to founding Lighthouse Capital, he had extensive experience in corporate finance, and M & A, having held key positions at Ernst & Young, SinoChem International, and Zero2IPO Capital.
Mr. Zheng maintains a long-standing focus on the epochal changes, industrial transformations, and the evolution of corporate value driven by technological revolutions. He excels at discovering value through research, based on which he has established an effective paradigm for identifying crucial inflection points in enterprise value. He has identified and propelled the robust growth of highly representative, top-tier innovative enterprises such as Kuaishou (HKEX: 01024), Bilibili (NASDAQ: BILI), Lalamove, Dewu (Poizon), ESWIN, Zhihu (NYSE: ZH), and Baichuan Intelligence. Furthermore, Mr. Zheng has forged close "Capital + Innovation" strategic partnerships with numerous industrial groups, including SANY Group, GCL-Poly Energy Holdings, Geely Group, CHINT Group, and Bull Group. He has also been instrumental in building effective industry-academia-research collaboration systems for innovative industrial enterprises and scientific research institutions, thereby facilitating the tangible application and progressive development of industrial innovation.

guestVisitList.name: 洪镭
guestVisitList.introduce:
专注于医疗投资和研究相关工作，以及支持公司医疗领域核心能力的建设。
在加入光源前拥有超过7年医疗领域投资经验，曾就职于汇桥资本和清池资本等全亚洲领先的医疗投资机构，具有丰富的一级市场投资经验。投资阶段覆盖从孵化到 Cross-over 轮，共领导和参与超过30个医疗领域项目投资。
拥有北京大学生科院博士就读经历，毕业于香港大学医学院，获得硕士学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mr. Lei Hong focuses on healthcare investment and research, while also supporting the development of the company's core capabilities in the healthcare sector.
Prior to joining Lighthouse Capital, he gained over seven years of healthcare investment experience at leading pan-Asian healthcare investment firms, including Ally Bridge Group and Lake Bleu Capital. With extensive primary market investment experience, his investment activities have spanned the full spectrum from incubation to cross-over rounds. He has led or participated in over 30 investments in healthcare projects.
He pursued doctoral studies at the School of Life Sciences, Peking University, and holds a master's degree from the University of Hong Kong.

guestVisitList.name: 林义伟
guestVisitList.introduce:
林义伟先生历任市场化国有投资平台及头部上市公司核心管理岗，深耕新一代信息技术、半导体、先进制造、生物医药、新能源新材料等赛道，主导投资平台架构设计、团队搭建、产业基金设立与运营、科创项目全周期管理赋能，及上市公司资本运作与产业并购重组。
其职业生涯资产管理规模超 300 亿人民币，主导投资的科创项目中，拉普拉斯 (688726.SH)、方邦股份 (688020.SH)、慧智微 (688512.SH)、长风药业 (02652.HK)、思林杰 (688115.SH) 等 53 家企业已登陆境内外资本市场。
林义伟先生本科毕业于厦门大学会计学专业，在中山大学获得工商管理硕士学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Yiwei Lin has held core management positions at market-oriented state-owned investment platforms and leading listed companies. He possesses deep expertise across multiple high-growth sectors, including next-generation information technology, semiconductors, advanced manufacturing, biopharmaceuticals, and new energy & new materials. His leadership experience encompasses the architectural design of investment platforms, team building, the establishment and operation of industry funds, full-cycle management and empowerment of sci-tech innovation projects, as well as capital operations and industrial M&A restructuring for listed companies.
Throughout his career, he has overseen an asset management portfolio exceeding RMB 30 billion. Among the sci-tech innovation projects he has spearheaded, 53 companies have successfully listed on domestic and international capital markets. Notable portfolio companies include Laplace (688726.SH), Fangbang Electronics (688020.SH), Smarter Microelectronics (688512.SH), CF PharmTech (02652.HK), and Smartgiant Technology (688115.SH).
He earned his Bachelor's degree in Accounting from Xiamen University and holds an MBA from Sun Yat-sen University.

guestVisitList.name: 拉马克瑞斯纳·西拉姆
guestVisitList.introduce:
拉马克瑞斯纳·西拉姆院士现任清华大学讲席教授及智能可穿戴研究中心主任。清华大学在亚洲排名第一，在全球工程与技术领域位列前七。
他入选“全球最具影响力科学思想家”，并跻身全球被引用次数最多的前1%研究人员（斯坦福大学榜单）。其谷歌学术显示引用总次数逾243,737次，H指数达227。他所获得的最高学术荣誉包括：英国皇家工程院院士（FREng）、中国工程院院士、新加坡工程院院士、印度国家工程院院士、东盟工程与技术学院院士，以及国际工程与技术学院院士。此外，他还当选美国科学促进会（AAAS）会士、美国金属学会（ASM International）会士、美国机械工程师学会（ASME）会士、美国医学与生物工程学院（AIMBE）会士；英国机械工程师学会（IMechE）会士、英国材料、矿物与采矿学会（IoM3）会士；印度工程技术学会（ISTE）会士；以及国际生物与科学工程学会（IUBSE，FBSE）会士。他获得英国剑桥大学博士学位，并在哈佛大学完成高级管理课程（TGMP）培训，同时在美国麻省理工学院、约翰斯·霍普金斯大学及日本九州工业大学（KIT）积累了深厚的高端科研经历。
其主要高校领导职务包括：新加坡国立大学（NUS）副校长（研究战略）、NUS工学院院长、NUS企业发展处主任、国际关系处主任、新加坡太阳能研究院（SERIS）主席、NUS生物工程研究计划主任，以及NUS纳米科学与纳米技术研究计划（NUSNNI）主任。NUS工学院是全球规模最大的工程学院之一。在其担任院长期间，他引领该学院跻身世界十大顶尖工程学府之列。担任NUS副校长期间，他积极推动全球研发合作与创业生态建设，并主导在太阳能、水资源、纳米技术及生物医学工程领域建立了多个试验基地。
他曾荣获东盟杰出工程师奖，以及国际工程与技术教育联合会（IFEES）颁发的“全球远见卓识者”主席奖。英国皇家工程院对其评价如下：“在引领新加坡及国际工程教育发展方面做出了卓越贡献。”
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Academician Seeram Ramakrishna is a Xinghua Distinguished Chair Professor and Director of iWearables Center at Tsinghua University, which is ranked as number one in Asia and among the top 7 universities in the world for Engineering and Technology.
He is among the World’s Most Influential Scientific Minds, and the Top 1% Highly Cited Researchers in the world (Stanford list). His Google Scholar shows over 243,737 citations and 227 H-index. Highest professional distinctions include an Academician | Fellow of UK Royal Academy of Engineering (FREng); Chinese Academy of Engineering; Singapore Academy of Engineering; Indian National Academy of Engineering; ASEAN Academy of Engineering & Technology; and International Academy of Engineering and Technology. He is also an elected Fellow of AAAS, ASM International, ASME, AIMBE, USA; IMechE and IoM3, UK; ISTE, India; and IUBSE (FBSE). He received a PhD from the University of Cambridge, UK, and TGMP from Harvard University, USA. He received advanced research experiences from MIT and Johns Hopkins University, USA and KIT, Japan.
His senior academic leadership includes NUS Vice-President (Research Strategy); Dean of NUS Engineering; Director of NUS Enterprise; Director of International Relations Office; Chairman of Solar Energy Institute of Singapore (SERIS); Director of NUS Bioengineering Initiative; and Director of NUS Nanoscience & Nanotechnology Initiative (NUSNNI). NUS Faculty of Engineering is among the largest engineering schools in the world.  As it’s Dean, he led its ascent to the world’s top ten best engineering institutions. As Vice-President of NUS, he championed global R&D partnerships, entrepreneurships, and establishment of test beds in solar energy, water, nanotechnology, and biomedical engineering.
He was awarded the ASEAN Outstanding Engineer Award; and IFEES’s President Award- Global Visionary.  UK Royal Academy of Engineering cited him “Distinguished for leadership of engineering education both in Singapore and internationally”.

guestVisitList.name: 焦李成
guestVisitList.introduce: 欧洲科学院院士、IEEE Life Fellow、第八届全国人大代表、中国人工智能学会会士、西安电子科技大学华山杰出教授、人工智能研究院院长。

guestVisitList.name: 黄欣欣
guestVisitList.introduce:
黄欣欣于 2024 年加入光源资本，全面负责孵化业务，拓展科创孵化、创业孵化、产业孵化三大战略方向。作为光源孵化业务体系的核心构建者，在三个月内完成从方法论设计到资源网络搭建的全链条闭环，推动光源“产业投行+生态孵化”双轮模式落地。通过精准切入 AI 产业链核心环节，主导孵化芯寒智能、第七生命、凌云智矿等多个标杆项目，引入多家产业方和机构投资人，孵化版图已全面对比清北浙交复和中科院等核心科研单位。
加入光源前，其六年连续创业经历沉淀出“创业者基因+产业投行思维”的复合能力，年均对接20余家产业集团与超百个科研团队，成功推动十余项实验室技术商业化验证。凭借对AI+产业的前瞻布局，持续突破“技术-产业-资本”生态闭环。黄欣欣先生拥有浙江大学管理学硕士学位。

guestVisitList.name: 张海霞
guestVisitList.introduce: 张海霞（Alice Zhang），河南籍，北京大学信息科学技术学院教授、博士生导师，国际大学生iCAN创新创业大赛发起人，全球华人微纳米分子系统学会秘书长，IEEENTC北京分会主席。长期从事微纳系统与微能源技术研究，研究方向涵盖振动能量采集理论、复合式能量采集器、摩擦纳米发电机等，研制出折叠式摩擦发电机和透明单表面摩擦发电机，发表学术论文250余篇，获42项中国发明专利及5项美国授权专利 [3] [8-10]。2006年发起IEEE NEMS国际会议，2010年扩展为国际赛事并覆盖全球20余国高校 [6-7] [12]。主持国家自然科学基金、国家重点研发计划等项目30余项，获2006年国家技术发明二等奖、2014年日内瓦国际发明展金奖、2020年福布斯中国科技女性榜等荣誉 [5-6] [8] [10]。2019年5月因抗议IEEE限制华为员工担任编辑事件退出其期刊编委会。

name: 埃森哲·智能体时代：引领企业价值跃迁论坛
nameEn: Reinvent with Agentic AI
desc:
伴随中国迈入“十五五”开局之年，AI正成为推动中国经济社会系统性变革的战略支点。然而，当前企业应用大多仍停留在“降本增效”层面。伴随智能体时代的来临，行业虽已形成“AI驱动全局增长”的共识，多数企业却陷入“有技术，无增长”“重投入、少回报”的困境，难以完成从“效率工具”到“增长动能”的价值跃迁。

本次论坛将汇聚全球知名企业决策者、技术领袖及创新专家，通过主旨演讲、圆桌对话与案例研讨，共同探索智能体企业的增长路径。我们将聚焦战略协同、组织变革、运营重构、智能制造，以及生态创新，深入探讨企业如何跨越从“技术投入”到“增长回报”之间的鸿沟，构建可持续的竞争新优势。
descEn: As China enters its 15th Five-Year Plan, AI is emerging as a strategic pivot for driving systemic growth. However, most enterprises today still apply AI primarily for “cost and efficiency gains”. With the advent of the era of Agentic Enterprise, many organizations find themselves struggling to complete the value leap from “efficiency tool” to “growth engine”. This forum will convene global business decision-makers, technology leaders, and innovation experts. Through keynote speeches, roundtable dialogues, and case studies, we will jointly explore the growth pathways for Agentic Enterprises.

guestVisitList.introduceEn: As the COO, Asia Oceania at Accenture, Glenn leads the company's business operations, execute its business strategy, and ensure operational excellence, including its adoption of AI and continued digital transformation. name: 国泰海通·智见AI 合创未来——人工智能投融资论坛
nameEn: AI Foresight, Co-creating the Future——AI Investment & Financing Forum
desc:
2026年7月18日下午，上海世博中心，由国泰海通证券主办的“智见AI 合创未来”人工智能投融资论坛将正式举行。论坛设置研究智库篇、产业趋势篇、资本赋能篇三大篇章，汇聚政府高层、顶尖学者、产业领袖与金融机构代表，系统探讨人工智能技术演进、产业路径与资本赋能等议题。
现场将发布全球AI趋势研究报告。主旨演讲将邀请来自顶尖高校及AI芯片、算力基础设施、具身智能等领域专家，分享芯片技术突破、算力底座构建及规模化应用发展等话题，来自市场相关机构嘉宾将就科创企业融资与产业资本赋能发表见解。圆桌对话将由中外资投资机构代表围绕AI产业投资策略及未来投资方向展开多维度交流，共话AI时代的产业蓝图与资本机遇。
descEn:
On July 18, 2026, the “AI Foresight, Co-creating the Future——Guotai Haitong AI Investment & Financing Forum”, hosted by Guotai Haitong Securities, will be held at the Shanghai World Expo Center. The forum features three sessions, bringing together government officials, top academics, industry leaders and financial institution representatives to systematically explore topics such as AI technology evolution, industrial pathways and capital empowerment.
A global AI trends research report will be released on-site. Keynote speakers from top universities and frontier fields including AI chips, computing infrastructure, and embodied intelligence will share insights on technological breakthroughs and large-scale applications. Representatives from market institutions will also address financing and industrial capital empowerment. Roundtable dialogues will bring together investment institutions to discuss AI industry investment strategies and future directions.

name: 量子城市空间智能论坛
nameEn: Quantum City Spatial Intelligence Forum
addr: 复兴岛复兴云厅（共青路136号）
addrEn: Fuxing Island Fuxing Cloud Hall ( Gongqing Road No. 136)
desc: 贯彻落实党的二十届四中全会精神和习近平总书记考察上海重要讲话精神，按照市委、市政府工作部署，在自然资源部、世界人工智能大会组委会办公室指导下，自然资源部信息中心、上海市规划和自然资源局、杨浦区人民政府、同济大学共同举办2026世界人工智能大会·上海量子城市空间智能建设分论坛.本论坛以“量子城市：空间智能+未来城市”为主题，拟采取“1个主论坛+4个平行论坛”形式，邀请自然资源部相关单位、上海市相关委办局及相关区委区政府、规资相关部门、“上数营”各成员单位代表参会，聚焦人工智能赋能超大城市空间治理，探讨空间探讨空间智能的前沿技术，展示上海量子城市空间智能创新实践案例。
descEn: This forum  adopts a format of  one main forum and four parallel sub-forums. It invites representatives from relevant units of the Ministry of Natural Resources, relevant municipal commissions, bureaus and offices of Shanghai, relevant district committees and district governments, planning and resources departments, and member units of the 'Shangshu Camp. The forum will focus on empowering megacity spatial governance with AI, exploring cutting-edge technologies in spatial intelligence, and showcasing practical innovation cases of Shanghai's Quantum City spatial intelligence.

name: 迈向自主化：工业AI落地的真实挑战与解法论坛
nameEn: Intelligent Trending Forum Toward Autonomy & Real Challenges and Solutions for Industrial Al Implementation
desc: “迈向自主化：工业AI落地的真实挑战与解法”聚焦“十五五”开局背景下AI与制造业深度融合的战略机遇，汇聚政策制定者、院士专家与产业领袖，围绕技术落地、开放自动化、智能工厂等核心议题展开深度探讨。通过主旨演讲与圆桌思辨对话，直面数据之困、模型之难及落地场景复杂等行业痛点，提供从技术到场景的可执行跃迁路径，助力制造业把握AI重构全链条的战略先机。
descEn: "Towards Autonomy: Real Challenges and Solutions for Industrial AI Implementation" focuses on the strategic opportunities for deep integration of AI and manufacturing at the beginning of the 15th Five-Year Plan period. It brings together policymakers, academicians, and industry leaders to engage in in-depth discussions on core topics such as technology deployment, open automation, and smart factories. Through keynote speeches and roundtable dialogues, the event directly addresses industry pain points including data difficulties, model complexities, and challenging implementation scenarios. It provides actionable pathways from technology to real-world applications, helping the manufacturing sector seize the strategic opportunities brought by AI-driven transformation across the entire value chain.

guestVisitList.introduce: 裘皓明，东浩兰生会展集团85后副总裁，2018 年主动揭榜承办世界人工智能大会，组建 9 人初始团队。自 2019 年起，携团队在集团支持下不断创新，至 2025 年成功承办七届大会。2024 年 12 月，原项目部成立威客引力公司，其任总经理。威客引力未来将持续在AI行业深耕，以“成为AI原生、国际一流的人工智能生态服务商”为愿景，向世界展示“中国智慧”、“上海方案”，不断以中国新发展为世界提供新机遇。

name: 全球人工智能创新治理中心·人工智能全球治理与可持续发展挑战与应对论坛
nameEn: CGAIG·Global AI Governance and Sustainable Development: Challenges and Responses
desc: 本次论坛由全球人工智能创新治理中心、复旦大学主办，阿里巴巴云智能集团协办，复旦大学IRDR国际卓越中心、中国科协-复旦大学科技伦理与人类未来研究院、复旦大学发展研究院支持，以“人工智能全球治理与可持续发展：挑战与应对”为主题，汇聚全球顶尖的国际组织、专家学者、产业界和智库机构代表，围绕人工智能治理的伦理框架、能力建设、公共产品以及赋能可持续发展等议题展开深入研讨，通过主题发言、系列成果发布和圆桌讨论等形式，分享联合国支持下的全球人工智能能力发展网络最新动向，共同探讨推动人工智能安全、普惠、可持续发展的治理路径，为完善全球人工智能治理体系、促进智能技术更好服务全人类发展贡献智慧和方案。
descEn: Under the theme “Global AI Governance and Sustainable Development: Challenges and Responses,” the forum is hosted by the Center for Global AI Innovative Governance and Fudan University, co-organized by Alibaba Cloud Intelligence Group, and supported by the IRDR International Centre of Excellence at Fudan University, the CAST-FDU Institute of Technology Ethics for Human Future, and the Fudan Development Institute. It will bring together representatives of international organizations, academia, industry, and think tanks to discuss AI governance, including ethical frameworks, capacity building, global public goods, and sustainable development. Through keynote speeches, research output launches, and roundtable discussions, participants will share updates on the Global AI Capacity Development Network, supported by the UN, and explore pathways toward safe, inclusive, and sustainable AI. The forum aims to advance global AI governance and help AI better serve humanity.

name: 人工智能标准国际化论坛
nameEn: INTERNATIONAL ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE STANDARDIZATION FORUM
desc: 人工智能技术正以前所未有的速度重塑全球经济、社会和文化格局，但技术快速迭代的同时也暴露出标准缺失、伦理争议、安全风险等问题。全球范围内亟需建立统一、开放、包容的人工智能标准体系，以推动技术健康可持续发展，确保AI向善、可信、可控。中国作为全球AI技术发展的核心参与者和贡献者，始终倡导国际合作与标准共建。本次论坛旨在联合国际组织、学术界、产业界及政策制定者，围绕技术标准制定、伦理治理、跨境协作等议题展开深度对话，推动形成具有全球共识的AI标准化框架，并为《人工智能全球治理倡议》提供实践参考。
descEn: Artificial intelligence technology is reshaping the global economic, social and cultural landscape at an unprecedented rate. However, the rapid iteration of technology also exposes problems such as lack of standards, ethical disputes, and security risks. There is an urgent need to establish a unified, open and inclusive artificial intelligence standard system worldwide to promote the healthy and sustainable development of technology and ensure that AI is good, credible and controllable. As a core participant and contributor to the development of global AI technology, China has always advocated

中国电子技术标准化研究院

guestVisitList.name: 龚昕
guestVisitList.introduce:
龚昕，曹操出行CEO，电子科技大学通信工程专业研究生。持续深耕于共享出行领域，历任多家知名公司产品运营高级管理职位，在数字化、共享经济、现代服务业等新生态领域拥有卓越的产品理念和丰富的运营管理经验。

2021年5月担任曹操出行CEO，在网约车领域创造性提出并实施以“New Car”（定制车）、“New Power”（新能源）、“New Ecosystem”（生态体系）为核心的N³战略，深度整合车辆生产、智能化研发、出行平台及多元用户，以科技重塑绿色共享出行，带动产业链升级，推动网约车行业实现可持续发展的共享出行新模式。

2024年，宣布曹操出行成功构建国内首个“智能定制车+智能驾驶技术+智能运营”三位一体的全要素闭环生态，带领公司向Robotaxi领域迈进。2025年2月28日，曹操智行自动驾驶平台正式上线，并在苏州、杭州启动Robotaxi示范运营。

在其领导下，曹操出行自2021年起市场份额稳居国内网约车平台前三，并于2024年跃升至行业第二。在2023至2024年的五次独立第三方调查中，曹操出行凭借卓越的服务品质，荣获“服务口碑最佳”称号。通过战略规划、技术革新和生态合作，推动曹操出行成功实现从区域性平台向全国性智能出行服务平台的转型，并在自动驾驶领域前瞻性布局，为行业树立了“技术驱动效率”的典范，并于2025年6月25日在香港成功上市。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Gong Xin is the CEO of CaoCao Inc. He holds a postgraduate degree in Communications Engineering from the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China. He has extensive experience in the shared mobility sector and has held senior management positions in product operations at several well-known companies. He possesses strong product vision and extensive operational management experience across emerging fields including digitalization, the sharing economy and modern services.

Gong Xin became CEO of CaoCao in May 2021. In the ride-hailing sector, he pioneered and implemented the N³ strategy centered on “NewCar” (purpose-built vehicles), “NewPower” (new energy) and “NewEcosystem” (an integrated ecosystem). By deeply integrating vehicle manufacturing, intelligent technology R&D, mobility platforms and diverse user groups, he has promoted the use of technology to redefine green shared mobility, drive industrial-chain upgrading and advance a new, sustainable model for the ride-hailing industry.

In 2024, he announced that CaoCao had successfully established China’s first full-capability, closed-loop ecosystem that integrates intelligent purpose-built vehicles, intelligent driving technologies and intelligent operations, leading the company into the Robotaxi sector. On February 28, 2025, the CaoCao Zhixing autonomous driving platform was officially launched, with Robotaxi demonstration operations commencing in Suzhou and Hangzhou.

Under his leadership, CaoCao has consistently ranked among China’s top three ride-hailing platforms by market share since 2021 and rose to second place in the industry in 2024. In five independent third-party surveys conducted between 2023 and 2024, CaoCao was rated as having the best service reputation in recognition of its outstanding service quality. Through strategic planning, technological innovation and ecosystem partnerships, Gong Xin has led CaoCao’s successful transformation from a regional platform into a nationwide intelligent mobility services platform. He has also positioned the company at the forefront of autonomous driving, setting an industry benchmark for “technology-driven efficiency.” CaoCao was successfully listed in Hong Kong on June 25, 2025.

guestVisitList.name: 阿曼迪普·辛格·吉尔
guestVisitList.introduce: 联合国副秘书长兼秘书长技术特使
guestVisitList.introduceEn: UN Under-Secretary-General and Special Envoy for Technical Affairs of the Secretary-General

guestVisitList.name: 施炜
guestVisitList.introduce:
施炜先生在信息技术与管理咨询行业有超过25年的从业经验。他擅长于企业信息技术战略规划咨询、业务流程优化、组织变革、信息系统建设、安全合规、隐私保护与敏捷交付、运营优化等专业领域，具备丰富的实战经验。
过去30年信息技术从互联网、移动互联网、云平台和人工智能不断演进发展的浪潮中，施先生善于把握技术本质，因地制宜创新咨询方法和跨行业的最佳实践导入，协助全球500强的高科技、汽车、零售、消费电子等行业领导企业客户，通过咨询规划+落地变革+持续运营等方式，成功实现业务变革并取得显著的技术与业务收益。

guestVisitList.name: 刘贤刚
guestVisitList.introduce: 刘贤刚现任中国电子技术标准化研究院副院长，在标准化领域持续推动多项重点工作：主持修订数据管理成熟度（DCMM）标准，参与制定《音视频、信息技术和通信技术设备安全要求》强制性国家标准，并牵头电动自行车及电池相关标准修订工作。同时担任人工智能标准化技术委员会副主任委员、全国静电标准化技术委员会副主任委员等职务，深度参与量子科技、静电等领域标准体系建设。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
XianGang LIU currently serves as Vice President of the China Electronics Standardization Institute. He has consistently advanced multiple key initiatives in the field of standardization: he presided over the revision of the Data Management Capability Maturity Model (DCMM) standard, participated in the formulation of the mandatory national standard “Safety Requirements for Audio, Video, Information Technology and Communication Technology Equipment”, and led the revision of standards related to electric bicycles and their batteries.
In addition, he holds concurrent posts including Deputy Director of the Artificial Intelligence Standardization Technical Committee and Deputy Director of the National Electrostatic Standardization Technical Committee, and is deeply involved in the development of standard systems covering quantum technology, electrostatic engineering and other fields.

guestVisitList.name: 安德烈・德米特里耶维奇・崔
孙博
guestVisitList.introduce: 孙博，上海灵境智源科技有限公司创始人兼CEO。拥有上海交通大学自动化与人工智能本硕学位及浙江大学博士学位，学术背景涵盖智能控制、机器学习等前沿领域，为技术研发奠定了坚实的跨学科基础。曾任美国国家仪器（NI）华南区域总，深耕测控技术本土化应用；后作为创始合伙人兼总经理，带领珠海精实测控从零起步成长为年产值超10亿元、服务全球的国家级重点“小巨人”企业，累计获得专利超580项（其中发明专利超200项），其自主研发的“风扇异音检测系统”荣获2020年中国专利优秀奖。现任上海人工智能研究院智脑创新中心主任，主导产学研协同创新。2025年，孙博创立灵境智源，致力于攻克具身智能核心计算难题，首创“德沃夏克”超异构架构，打造全栈自主可控的“硅基大脑”平台，推动国产机器人从“精确执行”迈向“自主认知”。他个人拥有60余项发明专利，获评珠海市高层次人才、入选广东省民营企业家智库，受聘担任专利转化运用专项行动技术专家。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Dr. Sun Bo is the Founder and CEO of Shanghai MScape Technology Co., Ltd. He holds a bachelor's and master's degree in Automation and Artificial Intelligence from Shanghai Jiao Tong University, as well as a Ph.D. from Zhejiang University. His academic training spans intelligent control, machine learning, and other cutting-edge fields, providing a solid interdisciplinary foundation for technological innovation.

Previously, Mr. Sun served as General Manager for South China at National Instruments (NI), where he specialized in the localized application of measurement and control technologies. He later co-founded and served as General Manager of Zhuhai Precision Measurement & Control Co., Ltd., leading the company from its inception to become a national-level "Little Giant" enterprise with an annual output exceeding RMB 1 billion and a global service footprint. Under his leadership, the company accumulated over 580 patents (including more than 200 invention patents), and its proprietary "Fan Abnormal Noise Detection System" was honored with the 2020 China Patent Excellence Award.

Currently, Mr. Sun also serves as Director of the Smart Brain Innovation Center at Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Research Institute, where he spearheads industry-university-research collaborative innovation. In 2025, he founded MScape, dedicated to tackling the core computational challenges in embodied intelligence. He pioneered the "Dvořák" ultra-heterogeneous architecture and developed the fully self‑controlled "Silicon Brain" platform, aiming to elevate domestic robotics from precise execution to autonomous cognition.

Mr. Sun holds over 60 invention patents and has been recognized as a Zhuhai High-Level Talent. He is a member of the Guangdong Provincial Private Entrepreneur Think Tank and has been appointed as a Technical Expert for the Special Action on Patent Commercialization and Utilization.

guestVisitList.name: 佩德罗·阿尔托埃
guestVisitList.introduce: 佩德罗·阿尔托伊（Pedro Altoe）现任 Daniel Law 律师事务所合伙人及专利专家，常驻巴西里约热内卢。他拥有电气工程师专业背景，专注于专利及工业外观设计领域，为国内外客户提供技术资产的结构化保护、战略布局及商业化方面的专业咨询，并参与业务拓展及相关法律与技术策略的制定。他毕业于里约热内卢联邦大学。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Pedro Altoe is a Partner and Patent Specialist at Daniel Law, based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. With a background in electrical engineering, he specializes in patents and industrial designs, providing domestic and international clients with strategic advisory on the protection, structuring, and commercialization of technological assets. He is also involved in business development and the formulation of legal and technical strategies. He is a graduate of Universidade Federal do Rio de Janeiro.

guestVisitList.name: 塞巴斯蒂安·哈勒斯莱本
guestVisitList.introduce: Sebastian Hallensleben是CEN-CENELEC JTC 21的主席，该委员会正在制定欧洲人工智能标准以支持欧盟法规，是欧盟StandICT计划专家咨询委员会的成员，也是可信信息工作组的主席。他在OECD ONE.AI中共同主持AI风险和问责制，并在欧洲理事会和教科文组织的AI委员会中担任职务。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Sebastian Hallensleben is the Chair of CEN-CENELEC JTC 21 where European AI standards to underpin EU regulation are being developed, a member of the Expert Advisory Board of the EU StandICT programme and Chair of the Trusted Information working group.   
He co-chairs AI risk and accountability in OECD ONE.AI and has roles in AI committees in the Council of Europe and UNESCO.

guestVisitList.name: 万鑫
guestVisitList.introduce:
万鑫先生具有20多年ICT领域工作经验，包括15年信息安全与隐私保护管理咨询、专业培训、体系审核经验；7年网络架构规划与管理、软件研发、系统运维、信息安全技术服务经验；5年学术理论研究经历。
业界知名信息安全与隐私保护专家及布道者，发表行业大会演讲40余场；IAPP官方讲师、考官，ISO27001/20000/27701主任审核员，云安全STAR评估师，累计交付培训200余场、学员超4000人，是国内IAPP CIPT及IRCA ISO27001主任审核员授课场次及学员数量最多的讲师。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mr. Wan has over 20 years of ICT experience, including 15 years in information security & privacy protection consulting, training, and auditing; 7 years in network architecture, software development, system operations, and security technical services; and 5 years in academic research.
Dr. Wan is a renowned expert and evangelist in information security and privacy protection, having delivered over 40 conference speeches. He is an official IAPP instructor/examiner, ISO27001/20000/27701 Lead Auditor, and Cloud Security STAR Assessor. He has conducted over 200 training sessions for more than 4,000 participants, ranking first in China for IAPP CIPT and IRCA ISO27001 Lead Auditor courses.

guestVisitList.name: 宋海涛
guestVisitList.introduce:
职位/头衔：上海人工智能研究院院长，全球工业人工智能联盟卓越中心秘书长
专业领域：前沿技术创新、全球AI治理与合作

guestVisitList.name: 哈立德·苏菲
guestVisitList.introduce: 现任埃及标准化组织（EOS）主席，国际标准化组织（ISO）主席，以哲学博士学位毕业于开罗大学。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: He currently serves as President of the Egyptian Organization for Standardization (EOS) and President of the International Organization for Standardization (ISO), and holds a Doctor degree of Philosophy (PhD) from Cairo University.

guestVisitList.name: 克莱西奥·德邦
guestVisitList.introduce: 巴西科学院院士、巴西物理研究中心教授、技术研究员
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Professor and Technology Researcher at the Brazilian Center for Physics Research (CBPF), where he leads the Laboratory for Artificial Intelligence Applied to Physics (LAB-IA). His current work is focused on pushing the frontiers of AI in physics applications, including the inverse modelling with Neural Posterior Estimation, Physics-Informed Neural Networks and Agentic AI for physics in multiple fields including Astrophysics and Geophysics.

name: 上海马桥人工智能创新试验区·具身智能产业生态论坛
nameEn: AI Convergence · 2026 Embodied Intelligence Ecosystem Forum
desc:
当前，具身智能正经历从“技术炫技”向“产业落地”的关键转折。2026年被视为具身智能量产爆发的前夜，行业在迎来资本热潮的同时，也面临着“标准缺失”、“数据孤岛”、“场景适配难”以及“商业化闭环”等深层挑战。
【AI聚变·具身智能产业生态论坛】将由世界人工智能大会组委会办公室指导，闵行区经济委员会、闵行区投资促进中心、上海马桥人工智能创新试验区建设发展有限公司、马桥镇人民政府主办，聚焦具身智能与智能机器人产业，邀请国内外院校研究带头人，人形机器人、大模型、机器人头部厂商、零部件厂商等方向数十位嘉宾齐聚，共同探讨从技术突破到商业落地的关键路径，搭建生态合作场域，促进产业上下游合作。
descEn:
Embodied intelligence is shifting from technological demonstration to industrial deployment. As 2026 marks the next stage of commercialization, the industry faces challenges in standards, data, real-world deployment, and sustainable business models.

Guided by the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) Organizing Committee, the AI Convergence · Embodied Intelligence Ecosystem Forum is jointly hosted by the Minhang District Commission of Economy, the Minhang Investment Promotion Center, Shanghai Maqiao AI Innovation Pilot Zone Development Co., Ltd., and the People's Government of Maqiao Town.

The forum will bring together leading researchers, robotics companies, foundation model developers, manufacturers, suppliers, and investors to explore industry trends, commercialization, and ecosystem collaboration.

guestVisitList.name: 王田苗
guestVisitList.introduce:
王田苗，男，1960年2月出生，湖北籍，现任北京航空航天大学机器人研究所教授、博导，北航机器人所名誉所长，北航校学术委员会副主任，中关村智友人工智能与机器人研究院院长，2024年4月荣获“感动海淀”文明人物称号。
1978年至1990年间先后获得西安交通大学计算机应用学士、西北工业大学工业电子硕士及水下信号处理与识别博士学位，1990年至1995年在清华大学智能技术与系统国家重点实验室和意大利国家仿生力学实验室完成博士后研究。1995年起历任北京航空航天大学机器人研究所副教授、教授、博导，2000年起担任国家863计划“十五”机器人主题、“十一五”先进制造技术领域首席专家，2011年起任机械工业服务机器人重点实验室主任。
主要研究方向为医疗外科机器人与仿生机器人技术，主持研发的远程无框架脑外科机器人系统获2008年国家科技进步二等奖，仿生机器鱼推进机理研究应用于南极科考“极地漫游者”机器人实验。2025年发布《中国具身智能产业星图》，提出垂直场景智能定界理论，推动无人配送、医疗辅助等领域的具身智能技术应用。
获国家杰出青年基金、茅以升北京青年科技提名奖，入选“新世纪百千万人才工程”国家级人选，担任IEEE机器人与自动化北京大区主席。在国内外期刊发表SCI/EI收录论文。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Tianmiao Wang , male, born in February 1960 in Hubei Province, is a professor and doctoral supervisor at the Robotics Institute of Beihang University, where he serves as Honorary Director of the Institute and Deputy Director of the University Academic Committee. He is also President of the Zhongguancun Zhiyou Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Research Institute. In April 2024, he was honored with the “Moved Haidian” Civilian Role Model Award.
From 1978 to 1990, he earned a bachelor’s degree in computer applications from Xi’an Jiaotong University, a master’s degree in industrial electronics from Northwestern Polytechnical University, and a doctorate in underwater signal processing and recognition. Between 1990 and 1995, he completed postdoctoral research at the State Key Laboratory of Intelligent Technology and Systems at Tsinghua University and the Italian National Laboratory of Biomechanics. Since 1995, he has served as associate professor, professor, and doctoral supervisor at the Robotics Institute of Beihang University. From 2000, he acted as Chief Expert for the National 863 Program’s “Robotics” theme during the 10th Five-Year Plan period and “Advanced Manufacturing Technology” field during the 11th Five-Year Plan period. In 2011, he became Director of the Key Laboratory of Service Robotics under the Ministry of Machinery Industry.
His research focuses on medical surgical robotics and bionic robot technology. He led the development of a remote frameless neurosurgical robot system, which received the Second-Class National Science and Technology Progress Award in 2008. His research on bionic robotic fish propulsion mechanisms has been applied to the Antarctic scientific expedition robot “Polar Rover.” In 2025, he released the China Embodied AI Industry Map and proposed the theory of vertical scenario intelligence boundaries, advancing embodied AI applications in areas such as unmanned delivery and medical assistance.
He has received the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars and the Mao Yisheng Beijing Youth Science and Technology Nomination Award. He has been selected as a member of the New Century Talents Project and serves as Chair of the IEEE Robotics and Automation Society Beijing Chapter. He has published numerous papers in both domestic and international journals indexed by SCI and EI.

guestVisitList.name: 乔·韦曼
guestVisitList.introduce: 乔・韦曼，知名 AI 与云计算战略专家、云经济学奠基人、美国未来产业研究院创始人，拥有康奈尔大学与威斯康星大学硕士学位。深耕 ICT 行业三十余年，先后任职贝尔实验室、AT&T、惠普等头部科技企业高管。首创云经济学、雾经济学理论，著有《云经济学》等多部 Wiley 全球重磅专著，担任 IEEE 权威期刊专栏主编，在 SCI 源刊发表多篇学术论文，手握 27 项国际技术专利。常年受聘全球头部科技企业战略顾问，受邀在六大洲四百余场行业峰会担任主讲嘉宾。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Joe Weinman is a distinguished expert in AI and cloud strategy, the father of Cloudonomics and founder of the International Institute of Future Industries. He holds degrees from Cornell University and the University of Wisconsin‑Madison. With over 30 years’ senior management experience at Bell Labs, AT&T and HP, he pioneered core theories of Cloudonomics and Fogonomics. As a bestselling Wiley author, he has published influential monographs including Cloudonomics. He served as column editor for IEEE’s SCI-indexed journal and has published numerous academic papers, alongside 27 global patents. He works as strategic advisor for worldwide leading tech firms and has delivered keynote speeches at more than 450 conferences across six continents.

guestVisitList.name: 程昊
guestVisitList.introduce: 程昊毕业于清华大学自动化系（本硕），曾任飞书产品副总裁，具有丰富的技术研发与商业化经验。该公司成立于2023年，核心团队成员多出身于清华大学机器人控制实验室及火神足球队，专注于人形机器人及其具身智能的研发与落地。

name: 实体世界智能科学论坛
nameEn: AI for the Real World
desc: 论坛将汇聚全球人工智能领域最具影响力的思想者、开拓者与实践者，聚焦AI与实体世界深度融合的关键命题，围绕三大前沿方向展开深入探讨：以 AI4S 重塑科学发现、以具身智能让 AI 走进物理世界、以可信 AI 守住安全底线。继去年与Hinton展开精彩对话后，姚期智先生将再度携手一位图灵奖得主同台论道，共话人工智能如何重塑科学发现、产业变革与人类社会未来。三位国际学术泰斗将带来重磅主旨报告。论坛还将汇聚多位国际顶尖学者、产业领军人物、青年科学家及“姚班”新锐代表，通过巅峰对话、特邀报告、主题演讲、圆桌讨论、开源成果发布及现场Demo展示等多元形式，共同探索AI创新、产业落地与生态共建的新机遇。

guestVisitList.name: 刘知远
guestVisitList.introduce:
提出大模型基础理论「Densing Law」
2019 年来受摩尔定律启发提出「Densing Law」，被 Anthropic CEO、OpenAI CEO 等 科学家和产业界广泛提及和接受

大模型方向国际顶尖科学家
清华计算机系长聘副教授，清华大学 NLP 实验室带头人，论文 200 余篇，被引 80,000 余次，H-index 113，申请 / 授权专利 50 余项
入选国家青年拔尖人才计划、《麻省理工科技评论》TR35 China 榜单，连续四年入选Elsevier高被引学者

持续培养和输送高水平人才
THUNLP 实验室是 中国最早全面投入高效大模型研究、技术布局最全面、全球范围领先的大模型高校实验室
累计培养 数十位大模型方向 优秀毕业生，进入面壁、DeepSeek、字节跳动等团队
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Proposed the fundamental large model theory — Densing Law
Inspired by Moore’s Law, the Densing Law was put forward starting in 2019, and has been widely referenced and recognized by scientists and industry leaders including the CEOs of Anthropic and OpenAI.

A world-leading scientist in large model research
Tenured Professor, Department of Computer Science, Tsinghua University
Director of Tsinghua University NLP Laboratory (THUNLP)
Author of over 200 research papers, with more than 80,000 citations and an H-index of 113
Inventor of over 50 filed or granted patents

Recipient of the National Young Top Talent Program
Named to MIT Technology Review TR35 China
Selected as an Elsevier Highly Cited Researcher for four consecutive years

Consistently cultivating and delivering high-level talent
The THUNLP Laboratory is one of China’s earliest university labs fully dedicated to efficient large model research, with the most comprehensive technology portfolio and a globally leading position among academic institutions.
He has nurtured dozens of outstanding graduates in large model research, many of whom have joined leading teams including ModelBest, DeepSeek, and ByteDance.

name: 算丰信息·AI 在全球医疗领域的应用实践与监督机制论坛
nameEn: The Real-World Application and Governance Mechanisms of AI in Global Healthcare
desc: AI 在全球范围内推动医疗体系变革，已落地的应用包括医学影像分析、辅助诊断、药物研发、辅助生殖、医疗管理、生成式 AI 应用等。虽然 AI 在医疗领域展现了巨大的潜力，但目前仍面临炒作与现实的差距、算法偏见、数据隐私以及监管滞后等挑战。算丰信息拟主办本次论坛，邀请海内外专家分享AI在医疗领域的前沿研究成果，同时探讨如何在推动医疗创新与保障患者安全之间寻求平衡。来自约翰斯·霍普金斯、麻省理工、香港大学、香港理工大学、香港医管局等海外医学专家，将与国家医学中心、上海交通大学、复旦大学、中国科学技术大学、浙江大学等医学院和附属医院的跨AI和医疗专家齐聚一堂，进行思维碰撞。
descEn: AI is driving a transformative shift in healthcare systems worldwide. Implemented applications already include medical imaging analysis, assisted diagnosis, drug discovery, assisted reproduction, healthcare administration, and generative AI.Suanova Information intends to organize this forum to invite experts from home and abroad to share cutting-edge research on AI in healthcare. Simultaneously, the forum will explore how to strike a balance between fostering medical innovation and ensuring patient safety.

guestVisitList.name: 张文宏
guestVisitList.introduce:
张文宏，男， 1969年8月出生于浙江瑞安，籍贯浙江瑞安， [65]教授，主任医师，博士生导师，国家传染病医学中心主任，复旦大学感染与健康研究院院长，华山医院感染科主任。
1987年本科就读于上海医科大学。 1993年毕业后任职于华山医院感染科；1993-1996年在上海医科大学攻读硕士；1997年博士就读于复旦大学；1998年任华山医院感染科主治医师；2001年在香港大学做访问学者。2002年升任副主任医师；2003-2004年于哈佛大学医学院做博士后研究；2007年升任主任医师；2008年任感染科教授。2012年起任复旦大学卫生部重点分子病毒实验室教授。 2013年牵头全国多中心临床研究； 2014年组织援助西非抗击埃博拉病毒； 2016年主持华山医院肝病中心揭牌仪式； 2018年起任复旦大学生命科学学院教授。 2020年11月任上海市传染病与生物安全应急响应重点实验室主任。 2022年任海南医学院客座教授。 2023年报道奥密克戎长新冠队列随访结果。 2024年参加世卫组织耐多药结核病诊治指南制定。 2025年发布结核病预防性治疗的研究结果； 2026年1月参加高山书院十周年论坛。 
张文宏致力于重大传染性疾病流行消除诊治创新技术及对新发突发传染病的预警与大流行应对技术的研究。 2015年获上海市领军人才；2020年获上海市科普工作先进工作者、 第十二届中国医师奖、 全国抗击新冠肺炎疫情先进个人等奖项； 2021年当选中国城市人物，同年获上海市市长质量奖； 2022年获评中国经济社会发展十大杰出贡献人物； 截至2026年1月发表论文300余篇。

name: 未来计算与未来算力论坛
nameEn: Future Computing · Future Computing Power Forum
desc: 本论坛将聚焦探讨以GPU+量子计算为核心的前沿计算范式变革，以及涵盖太空算力在内的新型算力基础设施，深入研判人工智能基础设施的未来发展方向，为全球顶尖科学家、产业领袖与政策制定者提供一个高水平的思想交汇平台
descEn: This forum will focus on frontier shifts in computing paradigms centered on “GPU + Quantum Computing,” together with new-generation computing-power infrastructure that includes space-based computing. The forum will offer an in-depth assessment of the future direction of artificial-intelligence infrastructure, and will serve as a high-level platform for the exchange of ideas among the world’s leading scientists, industry leaders, and policymakers.

guestVisitList.name: Bill Reichert
guestVisitList.introduce: Bill Reichert 是飞马科技风险投资公司（Pegasus Tech Ventures）的合伙人，专注于深度科技投资，包括人工智能、量子计算、下一代芯片、材料科学和医疗技术。他同时也是全球规模最大、奖金最高的风险投资竞赛——创业世界杯（Startup World Cup）的首席布道官，该赛事奖金总额超过150万美元，其中包括100万美元的最高奖金。比尔是商业路演指南《如何惊艳全场！硅谷创业者路演秘诀》（Getting to Wow! Silicon Valley Pitch Secrets for Entrepreneurs）的合著者。他拥有20年的风险投资经验，最初是Garage Technology Ventures的联合创始人兼董事总经理，该公司是一家专注于种子期和早期阶段的风险投资公司，后被飞马科技收购。他曾在斯坦福大学和加州大学伯克利分校任教，并在世界各地发表主题演讲和举办研讨会。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Bill Reichert is a Partner at Pegasus Tech Ventures, a venture capital firm focused on deep tech investments, including artificial intelligence, quantum computing, next-generation chips, materials science, and medical technology. He also serves as the Chief Evangelist of the Startup World Cup, the world's largest and highest-prize venture capital competition, with total prizes exceeding $1.5 million, including a grand prize of $1 million. Bill is the co-author of the business pitch guide Getting to Wow! Silicon Valley Pitch Secrets for Entrepreneurs. With 20 years of experience in venture capital, he began his career as a co-founder and Managing Director of Garage Technology Ventures, a seed-stage and early-stage venture capital firm that was later acquired by Pegasus Tech. He has taught at Stanford University and the University of California, Berkeley, and has delivered keynote speeches and conducted workshops around the world.

guestVisitList.name: 常进
guestVisitList.introduce: 常  进，中国科学院院士，中国共产党第二十届中央委员会候补委员，现任中国科学技术大学校长、党委副书记。空间天文领域的领军学者，曾任中国科学院紫金山天文台台长，担任我国首颗暗物质粒子探测卫星“悟空”号首席科学家，擅长领域在于空间天文前沿研究、高等教育管理、顶尖科创人才培养、人工智能与前沿科学交叉学科建设。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Chang Jin, Academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, Alternate Member of the 20th Central Committee of the Communist Party of China, currently serving as President and Deputy Secretary of the Party Committee of the University of Science and Technology of China.A leading scholar in space astronomy, former Director of the Purple Mountain Observatory, Chinese Academy of Sciences, and Chief Scientist of "Wukong" — China's first dark matter particle detection satellite. His areas of expertise include frontier research in space astronomy, higher education management, cultivation of top-tier sci-tech innovation talents, and interdisciplinary development of artificial intelligence with frontier sciences.

name: 香港科技大学·国际AI产业创新生态论坛
nameEn: HKUST·Awaken Forum '26 AI Industry Innovation Network
desc: 论坛以“从智识到算力，从场景到文明：唤醒AI时代的创新网络“为主线，整体内容围绕人机共生、物理 AI、跨境数据治理、企业出海等前沿议题开展高峰对话，采用电影叙事的方式串联全场，届时将联合发布多项港科大重磅成果，以及“awaken创新网络”。嘉宾阵容汇聚众多顶尖学者，产业领军者与创投机构代表，形成“政策前瞻+学界前沿+产业实战”的黄金三角。最终以“唤醒awaken | 点亮网络 ”结束仪式收尾，从智识到资本、技术到产业形成完整生态闭环，在AI重塑文明基座的时代关口，共同点亮创新网络，让算力照进现实，让场景孕育文明。
descEn: The forum, themed 'From Intellect to Compute, from Scenarios to Civilization: Awakening the Innovation Network in the AI Era,' features high-level dialogues on human‑machine symbiosis, physical AI, cross‑border data governance, and enterprise globalization, presented in a cinematic narrative format. The major achievements will be announced, alongside the launch of the 'awaken Innovation Network.' The speaker lineup brings together renowned academics, industry leaders, and venture capitalists, forming a golden triangle of policy foresight, academic frontier, and industrial practice. The event concludes with the 'Awaken | Light Up the Network' ceremony, closing the loop from knowledge to capital and from technology to industry. At this pivotal moment when AI reshapes civilization, we come together to illuminate the innovation network, turning compute into reality and scenarios into a new era of intelligence.

guestVisitList.name: 汪军
guestVisitList.introduce: 汪军，伦敦大学学院计算机科学系讲席教授、信息与数据科学教授，英国艾伦·图灵研究所 Turing Fellow。其主要研究方向包括人工智能与智能系统、多智能体强化学习、深度生成模型、信息检索、推荐系统、个性化、数据挖掘、智慧城市、智能体规划和计算广告等。汪军教授获荷兰代尔夫特理工大学博士学位、新加坡国立大学硕士学位、东南大学学士学位；曾创立 UCL MSc Web Science and Big Data Analytics 项目，并联合创办 UCL 衍生企业 MediaGamma，担任联合创始人兼首席科学家，推动强化学习和数据智能在智能受众决策等产业场景中的应用。其团队曾获全球实时竞价算法竞赛冠军，并曾获 Microsoft Research “Beyond Search: Semantic Computing and Internet Economics” 奖、Yahoo! Faculty Research and Engagement Program 奖等荣誉。其在多智能体学习、强化学习和真实场景决策优化方面的研究，可为 AI for Materials 中的科研智能体、自主实验室调度、实验策略优化和 Research-as-a-Service 模式提供重要方法支撑。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jun Wang is Chair Professor of Computer Science and Professor of Information and Data Science at University College London, and a Turing Fellow of The Alan Turing Institute. His research focuses on artificial intelligence and intelligent systems, including multi-agent reinforcement learning, deep generative models, information retrieval, recommender systems, personalization, data mining, smart cities, agent planning, and computational advertising. He received his Ph.D. from Delft University of Technology, his M.Sc. from the National University of Singapore, and his bachelor’s degree from Southeast University. He was the founding director of UCL’s MSc Web Science and Big Data Analytics programme, and co-founded MediaGamma, a UCL spin-out where he served as Co-founder and Chief Scientist, applying reinforcement learning and data intelligence to intelligent audience decision-making in industry. His team won the first global real-time bidding algorithm competition, and he has received awards including Microsoft Research’s “Beyond Search: Semantic Computing and Internet Economics” award and the Yahoo! Faculty Research and Engagement Program award. His expertise in multi-agent learning, reinforcement learning, and real-world decision optimization provides important methodological support for research agents, autonomous laboratory scheduling, experimental strategy optimization, and Research-as-a-Service in AI for Materials.

guestVisitList.name: 吴海
guestVisitList.introduce: 现任中国互联网投资基金秘书长，兼任中国互联网投资基金管理有限公司党委书记、董事长。担任数字经济投融资联盟副理事长、数字中国产业发展联盟副理事长。

guestVisitList.name: 陈迪源
guestVisitList.introduce:
陈迪源是香港生成式人工智能研发中心的首席产品战略官及达数字科技有限公司创办人，拥有逾三十年在工业自动化系统、网络广告及数字出版解决方案方面的研究与开发经验。他发明的专利技术成功将传统刺绣数据纸带转换为可编辑的电脑数码格式，其领导及参与的项目屡获殊荣，包括香港资讯及通讯科技奖「最佳商业系统大奖」、亚太资讯及通讯科技联盟（ APICTA ）双料大奖、世界信息峰会（ WSA ）「m-Media & News」奖项、香港工业奖「机器及设备设计奖」、「科技成就奖」及香港工商业奖「生产力及品质奖」等。
他热心教育及人才培育，积极参与多个师友计划，包括香港特区政府主办的「共创明Teen」计划星级导师，并大力推动STEAM教育，现亦出任两所学校的校董，推动学校治理及教学质量持续提升。
陈先生现担任多项公职，包括：香港创科发展协会创会主席、香港互联网注册管理有限公司副主席、旅游业监管局非业界成员及旅游业监管局发展委员会主席、香港特别行政区政府司法机构民事法庭使用者委员会委员、香港人工智能研发院（ AIRDI ）董事会成员、中国传媒大学（ CUC ）港澳台与世界事务研究中心副主任、中国计算机学会会员代表（港澳及境外）、资历架构资讯及通讯科技业行业培训咨询委员会委员、大湾区5G产业联盟副主席，以及「学校IT创新实验室」计划评审委员会成员等。他致力推动香港创新科技及数码经济发展，尤其在网络安全、人工智能应用及专业监管框架方面贡献卓著，于2025年获香港特别行政区政府颁授荣誉勋章以表扬其公共及社会服务。

guestVisitList.name: 李毅
guestVisitList.introduce: 脑玑医疗创始人，中国科学院脑科学与智能技术卓越创新中心研究员

guestVisitList.name: 董家鸿
guestVisitList.introduce:
董家鸿，清华大学教授，中国工程院院士，清华大学临床医学院院长，北京清华长庚医院院长，清华大学精准医学研究院院长，中国医师协会常务副会长。
董家鸿教授是国际著名肝胆外科专家和肝脏移植专家，在国际上首次提出“精准外科”新理念，创立了精准肝胆外科范式。这一理念已被广泛应用于胰腺外科、神经外科、脊柱外科、整形外科、介入治疗科等诸多临床专科领域，促进了当代外科理念和范式的革新。

name: 心智与智能青年生态论坛
nameEn: Mind Meets Machine Youth Forum
desc: 本届论坛以“AI 原生·心智之问”为主题，汇聚 AI for Science 领域的青年科学家、国际顶尖期刊编辑、哲学与社会科学学者、青年创业者，共同探讨智能时代科学发现、社会变迁与人类心智的交汇。过去一年，AI 正进一步走出“工具”角色，不仅重塑科学发现的路径，也迫使人们重新追问理解、意识与价值这些根本问题——Anthropic、OpenAI 等机构相继引入哲学家参与模型构建，正是“造智能”与“追问心智”走向同一探索的信号。本论坛立足这一交汇点，以“短演讲 + 跨学科圆桌”的形式，打破学科与代际边界，让青年科学家、编辑、学者与创业者真正同台对话，并拟将讨论沉淀为一篇面向国际期刊的观点综述。
descEn: This forum is themed "AI Natively · Questions of the Mind", bringing together young scientists in the field of AI for Science, top international journal editors, scholars in philosophy and social sciences, and young entrepreneurs. They jointly explore the intersection of scientific discoveries, social changes, and human minds in the era of intelligence. Over the past year, AI has further moved beyond its "tool" role, not only reshaping the paths of scientific discoveries but also compelling people to re-examine fundamental questions such as understanding, consciousness, and values - institutions like Anthropic and OpenAI have successively invited philosophers to participate in model construction, which is a sign that "creating intelligence" and "inquiring about the mind" are moving towards the same exploration.

name: 智法共生·法律大模型推理革新与应用生态论坛
nameEn: Legal Tech Scenario Restructuring & Global Governance in the LLM Era
desc: 当前，大模型技术持续突破，法律科技正迎来从“辅助工具”到“智能专家”的范式跃迁，深刻重塑司法实践、企业合规与涉外法律服务模式，成为推动法治现代化发展的核心引擎。在此背景下，7月18日下午，由上海市司法局、徐汇区人民政府、清华互联网司法研究院、星火晓法（上海）科技有限公司联合主办的“智法共生·法律大模型推理革新与应用生态论坛”正式启幕，论坛聚焦法律大模型推理能力革新与应用生态建设，汇聚顶尖专家学者、司法机构代表、科技企业领袖及法律实务工作者，通过主旨演讲、成果发布、行业分享、圆桌对话等多元形式，共同探讨大模型时代法律科技的场景重构与全球治理路径，发挥“AI+法律”深度融合的推动价值。
descEn:
Driven by sustained breakthroughs in large language model (LLM) technologies, legal technology is experiencing a pivotal paradigm leap from a mere auxiliary tool to a professional intelligent expert. This transformative shift is profoundly reshaping judicial practices, corporate compliance systems and cross-border legal service models, and has evolved into a core engine bolstering the modernization of the rule of law.
Against such a backdrop, the Forum on Symbiotic Intelligence & Law: Reasoning Innovation and Application Ecosystem of Legal Large Models grandly kicked off on the afternoon of July 18. Jointly hosted by the Shanghai Municipal Bureau of Justice, the People’s Government of Xuhui District, the Tsinghua Institute of Internet Judicial Studies, and StarSpark Xiaofa (Shanghai) Technology Co., Ltd., the forum focuses on the reasoning capability innovation and application ecosystem construction of legal large models.

name: 中国信通院·从大模型到智能体 迈向自主智能新纪元论坛
nameEn: CAICT Agent Forum: From Large Models to Agents   Towards a New Era of Autonomous Intelligence Forum
desc: 2026年3月，“智能体”首次写入我国政府工作报告，“智能经济”首次被提及，标志着人工智能从技术概念上升为国家战略支柱。上海作为全国人工智能发展高地，深入实施“人工智能+”行动，推动智能体、新一代智能终端等广泛运用。本论坛由中国信通院主办，中国信通院华东分院联合中国信通院云大所承办，聚焦智能体技术的全产业链发展、全球共识、技术迭代、伦理治理、产业落地、互联互通核心议题展开，助推智能体规模化赋能各行各业，构筑开放共赢的智能体产业新生态。
descEn:
In March 2026, "AI Agents" was included in China’s Government Work Report for the first time, and "smart economy" was also mentioned for the first time, marking that artificial intelligence has evolved from a technical concept into a pillar of national strategy. As a national hub for AI development, Shanghai has thoroughly rolled out the "AI Plus" initiative to advance the extensive application of AI agents and next-generation smart terminals.
Hosted by the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology (CAICT) and co-organized by CAICT East China and CAICT Cloud Computing and Digitalization Research Institute, this forum centers on core themes covering the full industrial chain of AI agent technology, global consensus, technological iteration, ethical governance, industrial implementation and cross-system interconnection. It aims to boost the large-scale empowerment of all industries via AI agents and build a new open, win-win industrial ecosystem for AI agents.
