guestVisitList.name: 周志华
guestVisitList.introduce:
周志华，男，汉族，1973年11月出生，江苏盐城人，无党派人士，研究生学历，博士学位，教授，计算机科学家，人工智能专家。现任第十四届全国政协委员，中国科学院院士，南京大学副校长，计算机软件新技术国家重点实验室常务副主任、机器学习与数据挖掘研究所所长。 
周志华于1992年考入南京大学计算机科学与技术系，先后获得学士、硕士、博士学位；2001年留校任教；2002年被破格聘任为副教授；2003年获得国家杰出青年科学基金资助，同年被聘为教授；2004年被聘为博士生导师；2009年入选新世纪百千万人才工程国家级人选；2017年当选欧洲科学院院士；2018年担任南京大学计算机系主任兼人工智能学院院长；2020年出版著作《机器学习理论导引》；2021年入选中国科学院院士增选初步候选人名单。2023年当选为国际人工智能联合会理事会主席。2024年担任南京大学副校长。2025年，当选中国科学院院士。
周志华长期从事人工智能核心的机器学习理论与方法研究，做出了原创性、引领性成果。他曾获国家自然科学二等奖两项、国家级教学成果一等奖一项、首届全国教材建设奖全国优秀教材（高等教育类）一等奖、省部级科技一等奖四项、IEEE计算机学会技术成就奖、中国计算机学会王选奖等。他还是教育部“长江学者奖励计划”特聘教授、国家杰出青年科学基金获得者。教育部高等学校计算机类专业教学指导委员会副主任、国务院学位委员会计算机类学科评议组成员、国际人工智能联合会理事会主席。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Zhihua Zhou, male, Han ethnicity, born in November 1973 in Yancheng, Jiangsu Province, is a non-Party public figure. He holds a graduate degree and a Ph.D., and serves as a professor, computer scientist, and artificial intelligence expert. He is currently a member of the 14th National Committee of the Chinese People’s Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC), an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, Vice President of Nanjing University, Executive Deputy Director of the State Key Laboratory for Novel Software Technology, and Director of the Institute of Machine Learning and Data Mining.
Zhou enrolled in the Department of Computer Science and Technology at Nanjing University in 1992, where he successively obtained his bachelor’s, master’s, and doctoral degrees. In 2001, he joined the faculty. In 2002, he was exceptionally appointed as an associate professor. In 2003, he received support from the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars and was appointed as a professor. In 2004, he became a doctoral supervisor. In 2009, he was selected for the New Century Talents Project by the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security. In 2017, he was elected a foreign member of the Academia Europaea. In 2018, he became Chair of the Department of Computer Science and Dean of the School of Artificial Intelligence at Nanjing University. In 2020, he published the book Introduction to Machine Learning Theory. In 2021, he was shortlisted as a candidate for the Chinese Academy of Sciences. In 2023, he was elected President of the International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) Board of Trustees. In 2024, he was appointed Vice President of Nanjing University. In 2025, he was elected an academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences.
Zhou has long dedicated himself to research on machine learning theory and methods—a core area of artificial intelligence—producing original and pioneering contributions. His honors include two National Natural Science Awards (Second Class), one National Teaching Achievement Award (First Class), one First-Class Award for National Excellent Textbooks (Higher Education) from the first National Textbook Award, four provincial or ministerial-level Science and Technology Awards (First Class), the IEEE Computer Society Technical Achievement Award, and the Wang Xuan Award from the China Computer Federation. He is also a Distinguished Professor under the Chang Jiang Scholars Program, recipient of the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars, Vice Chair of the Computer Science Teaching Steering Committee under the Ministry of Education, a member of the Computer Science Discipline Appraisal Group of the Academic Degrees Committee of the State Council, and President of the IJCAI Board of Trustees.

guestVisitList.name: 比尔·安德森
guestVisitList.introduce: 比尔·安德森（Bill Anderson），化学工程师，现任德国拜耳集团董事长兼首席执行官。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Bill Anderson is a chemical engineer who currently serves as Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Bayer AG.

guestVisitList.name: 理查德·萨顿
guestVisitList.introduce: 理查德·萨顿（Richard Sutton），美国计算机科学家，强化学习领域主要奠基人，现任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授、北京大学图灵导师、前DeepMind研究科学家，2025年3月与安德鲁·巴托共同获2024年图灵奖。1978年获斯坦福大学心理学学士学位，1984年在安德鲁·巴托指导下获马萨诸塞大学安姆斯特分校计算机科学博士学位。2003年起担任阿尔伯塔大学计算机科学教授，领导强化学习与人工智能实验室。其与巴托合著的《强化学习导论》是该领域奠基性教材，提出时序差分学习和策略梯度方法，开创现代强化学习体系。2023年加入John Carmack创立的Keen Technologies公司，致力于2030年实现通用人工智能（AGI）原型 。2025年在外滩大会发表主旨演讲，提出人工智能进入以持续学习为核心的“经验时代”，指出大型语言模型依赖人类数据具有局限性并批评其为“死路一条”，主张智能体通过自我博弈和环境交互生成新数据。2003年获国际神经网络学会总统奖，2013年获马萨诸塞大学杰出成就奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Richard Sutton is an American computer scientist and a founding figure in the field of reinforcement learning. He is currently a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, a Turing Mentor at Peking University, and a former research scientist at DeepMind. In March 2025, he and Andrew Barto were awarded the 2024 Turing Award.
He received his Bachelor’s degree in Psychology from Stanford University in 1978, and earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from the University of Massachusetts Amherst in 1984 under the supervision of Andrew Barto. Since 2003, he has served as a Professor of Computer Science at the University of Alberta, where he leads the Reinforcement Learning and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory. His co-authored book with Barto, Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction, is a foundational textbook in the field, introducing temporal difference learning and policy gradient methods that established the modern framework of reinforcement learning.
In 2023, he joined Keen Technologies, founded by John Carmack, with a mission to develop a prototype of artificial general intelligence (AGI) by 2030. In 2025, he delivered a keynote speech at the Bund Summit, proposing that artificial intelligence is entering an “era of experience” centered on continuous learning. He noted the limitations of large language models that rely on human data, criticizing that approach as a “dead end,” and argued that intelligent agents should generate new data through self-play and interaction with the environment.
He received the International Neural Network Society Presidential Award in 2003 and the University of Massachusetts Outstanding Achievement Award in 2013.

guestVisitList.name: 周翔
guestVisitList.introduce:
周翔，上海联影智能医疗科技有限公司联合创始人、联席首席执行官。1993年获清华大学自动控制及经济管理双学士学位，后赴美国伊利诺伊大学香槟分校师从Thomas Huang教授获图像处理与机器视觉方向博士学位。曾任西门子研究院（美国普林斯顿）研发资深总监、首席核心专家，并担任西门子医疗计算机辅助诊断产品线全球负责人，主导开发基于模式识别的人机混合交互式智能医学成像系统，拥有60余项美国专利授权，曾获西门子集团“年度发明人”奖。
2018年回国后，周翔负责申报并获批总经费逾亿元的人机混合智能化医疗器械研发项目，发表医学人工智能领域论文百余篇，H指数达50。其团队开发了100余款医疗AI产品，涵盖影像分析、智能诊断辅助等领域，并于2024年推出uAI影智大模型基座。2022年荣获上海市“白玉兰纪念奖” ，2023年提出医疗AI应用三步战略，主导建设通才大模型实现诊疗流程自动化。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Xiang Zhou is co-founder and co-CEO of United Imaging Intelligence (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. He received dual bachelor’s degrees in Automatic Control and Economic Management from Tsinghua University in 1993, and later earned his Ph.D. in Image Processing and Machine Vision from the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, where he studied under Professor Thomas Huang.

He previously served as Senior Director and Principal Core Expert at Siemens Corporate Research (Princeton, USA), and as Global Head of the Computer-Aided Diagnosis product line at Siemens Healthcare. In these roles, he led the development of human-machine hybrid interactive intelligent medical imaging systems based on pattern recognition. He holds over 60 U.S. patents and received Siemens’ “Inventor of the Year” award.

After returning to China in 2018, Zhou led the application for and successful approval of a major human-machine hybrid intelligent medical device R&D project with total funding exceeding 100 million RMB. He has published over 100 papers in the field of medical artificial intelligence, with an H-index of 50. His team has developed more than 100 medical AI products, covering areas such as imaging analysis and intelligent diagnostic assistance. In 2024, the team launched the uAI Yingzhi Foundation Model. In 2022, he was awarded the Shanghai “Magnolia Memorial Award.” In 2023, he proposed a three-step strategy for medical AI applications and led the development of a generalist foundation model aimed at automating clinical workflows.

guestVisitList.name: 刘庆峰
guestVisitList.introduce: 刘庆峰，男，汉族，1973年2月出生于安徽泾县，1990年考入中国科学技术大学，1998年获“通信与电子系统”专业硕士学位，2003年7月获“信号与信息处理”专业博士学位。现任科大讯飞董事长，全国工商联物联网委员会主席团成员，中国科学技术大学兼职教授、博士生导师，徽商总会执行会长，语音及语言信息处理国家工程研究中心主任，中国科学院人工智能产学研创新联盟联合理事长。第十届、十一届、十二届、十三届、十四届全国人大代表，历任全国青联常委、中国青年科技工作者协会副会长、安徽省青年企业家协会会长。 2008年，带领科大讯飞在深圳证交所上市。2025年全国两会期间围绕自主可控大模型生态建设、AI人才培养、民生领域应用等提出系列建议。同年6月向中国科学技术大学捐赠2000万元人民币支持学生创新创业活动，同年9月在安徽理工大学作人工智能赋能高等教育专题报告，10月与贵州省就人工智能应用场景合作达成共识。同年11月发布深度推理大模型讯飞星火X1.5，提出AI红利兑现需攻克自主可控、软硬一体、行业纵深和个性化四大核心要素。 刘庆峰曾获2013年第十四届中国经济年度人物、2018年改革开放40年百名杰出民营企业家、2020年全国劳动模范、2023福布斯中国最佳CEO（第20位）等荣誉。2024年6月24日，由刘庆峰等人完成的项目《多语种智能语音关键技术及产业化》获得2023年度国家科技进步奖一等奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Qingfeng Liu, male, Han ethnicity, born in February 1973 in Jing County, Anhui Province. He was admitted to the University of Science and Technology of China (USTC) in 1990, received his Master’s degree in Communication and Electronic Systems in 1998, and earned his Ph.D. in Signal and Information Processing in July 2003. He currently serves as Chairman of iFlytek, a member of the Presidium of the Internet of Things Committee of the All-China Federation of Industry and Commerce, Adjunct Professor and Doctoral Supervisor at USTC, Executive Vice President of the Anhui Federation of Merchants, Director of the National Engineering Research Center for Speech and Language Information Processing, and Co-Chairman of the CAS AI Industry-Academia-Research Innovation Alliance. He is a deputy to the 10th, 11th, 12th, 13th, and 14th National People’s Congress, and has served as a member of the Standing Committee of the All-China Youth Federation, Vice President of the China Association of Young Science and Technology Workers, and President of the Anhui Young Entrepreneurs Association.

In 2008, he led iFlytek to its listing on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange. During the 2025 National People’s Congress, he proposed a series of recommendations on the development of independent and controllable foundation model ecosystems, AI talent cultivation, and applications in public welfare sectors. In June 2025, he donated RMB 20 million to USTC to support student innovation and entrepreneurship. In September, he delivered a keynote report on AI-enabled higher education at Anhui University of Science and Technology. In October, he reached a consensus with Guizhou Province on cooperation in AI application scenarios. In November, iFlytek released the deep-reasoning foundation model iFlytek Spark X1.5, proposing that realizing the value of AI requires addressing four core elements: independent and controllable technology, integrated hardware and software, industry depth, and personalization.

Liu has received numerous honors, including the 14th China Economic Person of the Year in 2013, one of the 100 Outstanding Private Entrepreneurs in the 40 Years of Reform and Opening-Up in 2018, National Model Worker in 2020, and ranked 20th on Forbes China’s Best CEOs list in 2023. On June 24, 2024, the project Key Technologies and Industrialization of Multilingual Intelligent Speech, completed by Liu and his team, won the First Prize of the National Science and Technology Progress Award.

name: 中科曙光·人工智能时代的开放计算与产业生态论坛
nameEn: Sugon · Open Computing Infrastructure Empowering Digital-Intelligent Application Innovation Forum
desc:
当前，AI算力市场竞争已从单点技术突破全面转向系统生态博弈。在“人工智能+”行动深化与“十五五”未来产业布局的政策背景下，具身智能、低空经济、生物制造、商业航天等新兴赛道对算力底座提出了差异化、体系化的新需求。
本论坛由中科曙光联合光合组织生态伙伴共同呈现，以“开放架构·四算融合”为核心主张，聚焦国产算力底座如何从“替代可用”走向“好用、原生、创新”的跃迁路径。论坛将邀请具身智能、低空经济、AI4S等前沿领域的顶尖专家，围绕通用计算、智能计算、超算、量子计算四算融合的技术架构与应用实践展开深度分享。
同时，论坛将发布光合组织“四算融合”开发者扶持计划，面向未来产业方向的开发者提供算力、工具与生
descEn:
Against the backdrop of deepening "AI+" initiatives and the 15th Five-Year Plan's future industry blueprint, emerging sectors such as Embodied AI, Low-Altitude Economy, Bio-Manufacturing, and Commercial Space are placing differentiated, systematic demands on computing infrastructure.
This forum, co-organized by Sugon and Guanghe Organization ecosystem partners, champions the theme of "Open Architecture · Quad-Computing Convergence." It focuses on how sovereign computing infrastructure can evolve from "substitution-ready" to "high-performance, native, and innovative." Leading experts from Embod

guestVisitList.introduce: ‌海光信息总裁助理兼智能计算产品部总经理‌，同时也是‌国家超级计算郑州中心导师‌及‌正高级工程师‌，是国产算力与人工智能领域的资深技术专家 。‌‌‌

guestVisitList.introduce: 负责过科技部国家重点研发计划，比如某计算机系统研制、人工智能基础模型支撑平台等项目。早在 2016 年就参与了“中国天眼”FAST 的计算系统设计，给天眼配了“最强大脑”。

guestVisitList.name: 任京暘
guestVisitList.introduce: 任京暘，现任曙光信息产业股份有限公司高级副总裁， 曙光数创股份有限公司董事长，中科星图股份有限公司董事， 分管中科曙光集团战略、市场、对外合作、生态建设等方面工作。

guestVisitList.name: 葛东东
guestVisitList.introduce: 葛冬冬，现任上海交通大学智能计算研究院院长、数据与商务智能系系主任、安泰经济与管理学院特聘教授，杉数科技联合创始人兼首席科学官，斯坦福大学运筹学博士。长期致力于大规模优化算法与人工智能交叉领域研究，兼具深厚的国际学术视野与顶尖的工程实践能力。作为国家杰出青年科学基金获得者，曾主持多项国家级重大科研项目，发表顶级期刊及会议论文百余篇，并多次荣获中国运筹学会科技奖。其研究成果成功应用于智能制造、智慧物流等关键领域，实现了从底层算法到产业落地的闭环，与京东、华为、波音等企业合作研发工业优化算法，推动优化技术在供应链管理、网络调度等场景应用。其团队开发的 GPU 加速求解器 COPT 实现 CPU 与 GPU 混合兼容，应用于量子化学、具身智能等领域。

guestVisitList.name: 王长冕
guestVisitList.introduce: 参与国家级AI数据基础设施建设，推动上海打造人工智能高地，并多次代表库帕思参与金融大模型评测、西岸“双A融合”等政产学研活动。‌‌

name: 全球视野破局智能财务新范式论坛
nameEn: Global perspective, breaking the mould : redefining the paradigm of intelligent finance
desc: 2026世界人工智能大会-智能财务论坛以"全球视野 破局智能财务新范式”为主题，汇聚国内外全球商业、AI技术及财会领域的顶尖专家与行业领袖，从理论研究和政府规制、产业政策和发展趋势、技术应用和生态共建等不同视角，共同研讨人工智能技术对全球商业和会计行业的冲击与机遇，拆解人工智能在会计、审计、财务管理的转型难点、复盘真实案例、输出可复制路径。探讨会计人员能力升级与行业转型方向。聚焦三大实战对话环节，搭建政企学研交流对接平台，推动会计行业在人工智能时代实现高质量发展。
descEn:
Generative AI, especially large models, is moving from “understanding conversation” to “autonomous execution,” fundamentally changing financial work. Its rapid evolution disrupts accounting—offering cost and efficiency gains, but also posing challenges like job restructuring, skill upgrades, data security, and compliance.
1. Clarify AI’s roles in accounting, audit, tax, and finance to guide transformation
2. Build international platform to share solutions.
3. Guide lifelong learning for AI-era jobs.
4. Shift from record-keeping to value creation.
5. Learn global best, strengthen China's voice.

guestVisitList.name: 肖兴喜
guestVisitList.introduce:
中国总会计师协会信息化分会副会长，中国商业会计学会企业分会副会长，中国施工企业管理协会信息化专家委员。
深耕大型企业管理软件行业 20 余年，在建筑地产、交通、能源等行业信息化数字化方面经验丰富，先后为中国建筑、中国铁建、中国远洋海运、中国华能等 20 多家世界 500 强企业提供数智财务与企业数字化转型咨询和系统建设服务。主导开发的央企及大型集团企业的信息系统多次荣获 CGMA、财政部、国资委和交通运输部颁发的重量级奖项。

guestVisitList.name: 周晔
guestVisitList.introduce:
汇付天下有限公司创始人、董事长兼CEO。
周晔先生长期从事支付和软件行业，曾参与金卡工程建设，主持银联网上支付网关的建设和运营，推动收单渠道市场建设，创新多个支付行业方案。他始终关注前沿金融科技和数字化，创建国内首个支付PaaS斗拱平台，推动支付与不同行业的软件和运营融为数字生态。他领导的汇付天下成为国内第一家上市的支付公司。
他曾获上海市领军人才称号，两次获评上海市十大金融创新人物。现兼任上海交通大学上海高级金融学院客聘教授、上海国家会计学院兼职教授。
周晔先生毕业于复旦大学电子工程系，获中欧国际工商学院EMBA、美国亚利桑那州立大学工商管理博士。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Jerry Ye Zhou is the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Huifu Payment.
Jerry’s extensive experience in payment solutions and software has been instrumental in his success. He played a key role in the Gold Card Project and was responsible for leading the development and operation of UnionPay’s online payment gateway. He also pushed for the growth of acquiring channels and innovated new payment methods. Focused on cutting-edge financial technology and digitization, Jerry created the first-ever payment PaaS platform in China called “Dougong”. He merged payment systems with various industries, creating a comprehensive digital ecosystem. Under his capable leadership, Huifu Payment became the first payment company in China to go public. 
Jerry has been recognized as a Shanghai Leading Talent and has been named one of the “Top 10 Figures in Financial Innovation in Shanghai” twice. He is also a guest professor at the Shanghai Advanced Institute of Finance at SJTU and an adjunct professor at the Shanghai National Accounting Institute. 
Jerry holds a bachelor’s degree from Fudan University’s Department of Electronic Engineering, an EMBA from China Europe International Business School, and a DBA from Arizona State University.

name: 2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议主论坛
nameEn: 2026 WORLD AI CONFERENCE & HIGH-LEVEL MEETING ON GLOBAL AI GOVERNANCE MAIN FORUM
desc: 论坛将聚焦“智能伙伴”的技术根基与产业实践，展开一场从底层架构到应用蓝图的纵深探讨。内容将直面智能体的物理底座挑战，审视从能源、芯片到基础设施、模型的全栈创新，探讨如何突破算力瓶颈，以更坚实的基石支撑指数级增长的智能需求。同时，讨论将延伸至更广阔的应用疆域，聚焦世界模型、科学智能等前沿领域，揭示人工智能如何从虚拟走向现实，驱动物理世界与具身智能的深刻变革。论坛同样关注可持续发展的关键维度——安全与治理。围绕“AI行为边界”的国际对话，旨在为智能伙伴构筑稳健、可信的防线。一系列汇聚创新力量的实践分享，将通过鲜活的赋能案例，勾勒出人工智能与人类协同共创的“Brighter Future”生动图景。
descEn: The forum will focus on the technological foundations and industrial practices of "Intelligent Companions," exploring everything from underlying architectures to application blueprints. It will address the physical foundation of intelligent agents—from energy and chips to infrastructure and models—and examine how to break through computing bottlenecks to sustain exponential intelligence growth. Discussions will extend to world models and scientific intelligence, revealing AI's transition from virtual to physical realms and its impact on embodied intelligence. The forum also emphasizes safety and governance through an international dialogue on defining AI behavioral boundaries, aiming to build robust safeguards. A series of practice-sharing sessions will showcase vivid use cases, painting a picture of a "Brighter Future" forged through human-AI collaboration.

name: AI TIME ·AGI前夜：智能如何突破自己的上限
nameEn: AGI on the Horizon: How Can Intelligence Transcend Its Own Limits
desc: 当大模型能力不断逼近新的边界，AGI竞争正从“更大的模型”走向“更会行动、协作与成长的智能系统”。本论坛以“AGI前夜：智能如何突破自己的上限？”为主题，围绕模型能力与Agent系统、多Agent协作、Agent价值场景及自主进化四大前沿议题展开讨论。论坛将通过观点交锋与案例解析，探讨AGI的关键能力究竟来自模型Scaling，还是工具、记忆、规划与Agent Harness；多Agent是真实协同，还是计算堆叠；Agent将率先在工作流还是真实世界证明价值；智能的下一次增长，又将依赖更多训练，还是走向自我学习与持续进化。最终共同回答：AGI前夜：智能如何突破自己的上限？
descEn: As foundation models continue to push the boundaries of intelligence, the race toward AGI is shifting from building “larger models” to creating intelligent systems that can act, collaborate, and evolve.Under the theme “On the Eve of AGI: How Can Intelligence Break Through Its Own Limits?”, this forum will explore four frontier debates: foundation models versus Agent systems, single-Agent versus multi-Agent collaboration, workflow automation versus real-world interaction, and continued training versus autonomous evolution.Through sharp exchanges and real-world cases, leading researchers will examine whether AGI will emerge primarily from scaling, or from tools, memory, planning, Agent Harnesses, and self-improving systems. The forum ultimately asks one defining question:AGI on the Horizon: How Can Intelligence Transcend Its Own Limits?

name: AI重构增长：从内容博弈到系统性变革 AI+广告营销创新论坛
nameEn: SHAI Forum AI-Driven Growth: From Content Game to Systemic Shift
desc:
2026世界人工智能大会（WAIC）首设AI+广告营销创新论坛。作为WAIC从技术研发向产业应用深化的关键板块，论坛以“AI重构增长：从内容博弈到系统性变革”为主题，聚焦行业系统性升级。
论坛设三大板块：创意与内容生态板块，邀头部机构、AI平台及数字创作者，重构规模化生产下创意的稀缺性与人文价值；智能决策与品牌增长板块，聚国际传媒集团、标杆品牌及AI平台，拆解从“流量至上”到“资产沉淀”的转型路径；出海赋能板块，联动出海企业及合规专家，破解数据合规、跨文化适配痛点，助力中国品牌从“走出去”到“走进去”。
现场将发布多项国际合作，推动中国广告实践与国际标准接轨，注入行业新动能。
descEn:
The 2026 WAIC debuts the AI+Advertising & Marketing Innovation Forum, marking a shift from R&D to deep industrial application. Under the theme "AI Restructuring Growth: From Content Competition to Systemic Transformation," it addresses the shift from technical trials to strategic upgrades.
The forum features three core pillars:
Creativity & Content Growth Ecosystem: Top creative agencies, AI platforms, and digital creators discuss original value and human warmth in the AI era.
AI Intelligent Decision-Making & Brand Growth: International media giants, benchmark brands, and AI marketing platforms map the shift from traffic operations to asset accumulation and intelligent decisions.
AI-Driven Global Expansion: Leading global marketing firms tackle data compliance, cross-cultural adaptation, and global growth strategies for Chinese brands.

name: RISC-V与AI融合发展论坛
nameEn: RISC-V & AI  Integrated Development Forum
desc: 当前，RISC-V凭借开放、灵活、可扩展的优势，正在成为智能计算的重要技术路径。本论坛聚焦“RISC-V+AI”融合发展话题，邀请RISC-V领域院士，以及来自高校、科研院所、国际组织、知名企业的专家，深入探讨如何从指令集层面更好支持人工智能训练、推理等应用。论坛嘉宾将分享RISC-V人工智能芯片发展趋势、落地案例与生态建设实践，提出RISC-V与人工智能相互促进、协同演进的新思路、新方法、新路径。
descEn: Currently, RISC‑V, with its advantages of openness, flexibility, and scalability, is becoming a vital technology path for intelligent computing.This forum focuses on the integrated development of “RISC‑V + AI” and brings together RISC‑V academicians as well as experts from universities, research institutes, international organizations, and leading enterprises to explore in depth how to better support AI training, inference, and other applications at the instruction set level.Forum speakers will share development trends, deployment cases, and ecosystem building practices for RISC‑V AI chips, and propose new ideas, new methods, and new pathways for the mutual reinforcement and synergistic evolution of RISC‑V and artificial intelligence.

name: WAIC Future Tech·AI Agent 时代的一人公司与 Token 经济论坛
nameEn: WAIC Future Tech·One-Person Company and Token Economics in the AI Agent Era
desc:
2026 WAIC Future Tech OPC生态前沿论坛聚焦AI Agent时代的生产关系重构 。论坛以“超级个体觉醒”为核心 ，深度探讨“一人公司”如何凭借行业Know-how与智能体军团实现极轻量化创业 。活动前沿性切入的日活智能体时代重构价值度量 ，破局Token经济学从“算力计费”向“能力分润”的分布式演进 。论坛汇聚顶尖Hacker、大厂极客与先锋VC ，全面揭示智能体互联网（Agentic Web）流量重构下的商业新入口 。
【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有17日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn:
The WAIC 2026 Future Tech: OPC Ecosystem Forum is dedicated to reshaping production relations in the era of AI Agents. Centered on the "Awakening of Super Individuals," the forum explores how One-Person Companies (OPCs) utilize industry know-how and autonomous Agent armies to achieve ultra-lean entrepreneurship. Cutting into the industry's vanguard, the event examines the newly emerging DAA (Daily Active Agents) metric as a novel benchmark for value, while decoding the evolution of Token Economics from traditional "compute-based billing" to decentralized "capability-based profit sharing." Bringing together elite hackers, tech pioneers, and visionary VCs, the forum will fully unveil the next generation of commercial gateways emerging from the traffic restructuring of the Agentic Web.
【⚠️ Open Stage is located in Hall H4 of the World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center. Access is granted to all visitors with exhibition entry passes valid for the 17th】

guestVisitList.name: 王伟嘉
guestVisitList.introduce:
腾讯云 CloudBase / 微信云开发产品负责人，负责国内最大规模的云原生开发者平台的产品工作。
本科毕业于复旦大学，Node.js 社区早期贡献者。曾任 CloudBase 平台核心数据面架构研发，拥有海量云服务架构设计与落地经验。近年专注于 AI-native Developer Infra 与下一代 DX（开发者体验）设计领域，持续探索并落地 AI 时代下的下一代全栈开发范式。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Product Lead of Tencent CloudBase and WeChat Cloud Service, responsible for the product strategy of the largest cloud-native developer platform in China.
Graduated from Fudan University and an early contributor to the Node.js community, he previously served as a core architect for CloudBase's data plane, with deep expertise in designing and deploying massive-scale cloud services. Currently, he focuses on AI-native Developer Infra and next-gen DX, dedicated to exploring and implementing the next-generation full-stack development paradigm in the AI era.

guestVisitList.name: 徐翀
guestVisitList.introduce: 徐翀，葱花投研创始人。本次OPC组的金奖，是目前中国REITs数据赛道的隐形冠军——REITs投资主要头部投资人40余家头部买方客户全部自己上门，靠写3年公众号深度内容做私域转化，按投资金额算市占率超50%。徐翀是非技术出身，早年做不动产和金融的投资与资管，代码自学，却独自搭出覆盖财报解析、量化估值、多Agent协同的全流程AI系统，搭建产品和公司运营都靠AI驱动。一个人跨界三个领域，做到赛道第一。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Xu Chong, founder of ChopInsight. Gold winner of the OPC competition and the hidden champion of China's REITs data market — over 40 leading institutional investors, representing the majority of REITs capital in the country, all came to her organically, converted through three years of in-depth content published on her WeChat blog. She commands over 50% market share by assets under coverage. With no formal technical background — her early career was in real estate investment and asset management — she taught herself to code and single-handedly built a full-stack AI research platform spanning automated financial analysis, quantitative valuation, and multi-agent orchestration. Both product development and company operations run on AI. One person, across three domains, leading the field.

guestVisitList.name: 常楠
guestVisitList.introduce: 我在游戏行业拥有15 年的从业经历，之前10多年都是在北美的3A游戏大厂工作，像 EA、CAPCOM、2K等，并且是北美游戏行业里极少数做到技术管理岗的华人；回国之后，我在腾讯负责研发，后来又牵头搭建了英雄游戏研究院。这些年参与过3A项目的核心研发工作，像《星战》《圣歌》《丧尸围城》等，也参与了几款世界级游戏引擎底层的技术研发，像寒霜、虚幻、Re等。而且早在 2016 年，就开始做AI在互动娱乐产业的研究。参与了强化学习、AI driven的动画生成、场景生成等技术的研发，并把这些技术落地到了实际的项目中。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: I have 15 years of experience in the games industry. For over 10 of those years I worked at North American 3A studios — EA, CAPCOM, 2K, and others — and I was one of the very few Chinese professionals in the North American games industry to reach a technical management role. After returning to China, I led R&D at Tencent, and later spearheaded the building of the Hero Games Research Institute. Over the years I've worked on the core development of 3A titles such as *Star Wars*, *Anthem*, and *Dead Rising*, and contributed to the low-level technical R&D of several world-class game engines, including Frostbite, Unreal, and RE. And as far back as 2016, I began researching AI in the interactive entertainment industry. I worked on technologies such as reinforcement learning and AI-driven animation and scene generation, and brought these technologies into real, shipping projects.

guestVisitList.name: 鹍鹏
guestVisitList.introduce: 鹍鹏（Gary），互影科技创始人兼CEO，约翰·霍普金斯大学硕士，中国互动叙事领域先行者。他长期深耕人机交互、AI与互动叙事的融合，主导研发了面向互动叙事的底层引擎与云游戏交互技术体系，是国家级互动技术与云游戏标准的重要参与者。他推出中国首部互动剧《古董局中局之佛头起源》，制作的《飞越13号房》等多部作品列入Steam年度国产销量TOP5并入选戛纳、威尼斯等国际电影节；AI驱动的互动直播《超级狸谱表决》实现超300万用户实时参与。2025年，他发起AltNext全球互动体验创作者社区，致力于构建下一代互动创作者生态。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Kun Peng (Gary), Founder and CEO of AltStory Technology, holds a Master's degree from Johns Hopkins University and is a pioneer in China's interactive narrative space. With deep expertise at the intersection of human-computer interaction, AI, and interactive storytelling, he led the development of a proprietary engine for interactive narrative and a cloud-gaming-compatible interactive technology framework, and is a key contributor to China's national standards for interactive technology and cloud gaming. He produced China's first interactive drama, <Mystery of Antiques: Origin of the Buddha Head>, and his subsequent works including erta: <Breakout 13> have ranked among the Top 5 best-selling Chinese titles on Steam and been selected for the Cannes and Venice international film festivals. His AI-powered interactive live experience, Super Tanuki Vote, engaged over 3 million users in real time. In 2025, he founded AltNext, a global community for interactive experience creators dedicated to building the next-generation interactive creator ecosystem.

guestVisitList.name: 胡学文
guestVisitList.introduce: AI科技投资人，深耕人工智能软硬件赛道，专注AI核心技术、智能应用与算力硬件领域的投资布局，聚焦前沿技术商业化落地，精准挖掘AI产业长期价值项目，赋能智能科技产业创新发展
guestVisitList.introduceEn: As an emerging AI-focused tech investor, he focuses on investment layout in AI software and hardware tracks, including core AI technologies, intelligent applications and computing hardware. He concentrates on the commercialization of cutting-edge technologies, explores long-term value projects in the AI industry, and empowers the innovative development of intelligent technology

guestVisitList.name: 李昕悦
guestVisitList.introduce: OR Lab 联合创始人，狂热的创造者。OR Lab，向无限延伸的产品实验室——斩获 WAIC OPC 复赛金奖、AI Hackathon Tour 全国铜奖、环球 Hackathon 最佳创意奖、Deep Hackathon 最佳交互设计奖……等多项赛事荣誉。正在 Build 一些疯狂的产品 ;)
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Co-founder of OR Lab, a passionate creator. OR Lab — a product lab extending to infinity. Winner of WAIC OPC Semi-Finals Gold, AI Hackathon Tour National Bronze, Global Hackathon Best Creativity, Deep Hackathon Best Interaction Design, and many more. Building some crazy stuff right now ;)

guestVisitList.name: 刘罡
guestVisitList.introduce:
刘罡现担任阿尔法公社合伙人，主管机构投资业务，主要关注AI与物理世界交汇，包括AI软硬件，具身智能，硬科技等，十年如一日深耕早期投资领域，专注于发现和支持具有国际化视野的非凡创始人。

以“洞察超级个体成长之路”为内容主题，刘罡是 Linkedin 最有影响力的内容贡献者，拥有超过 70 万全球关注者;还是创投领域影响力公众号「胖福馒头」主理人。入选福布斯U30 投资人，36 氪U36 投资人。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Gang Liu is a Partner at Alpha Startups Fund, where he oversees the firm’s early-stage investment strategy. He focuses on where AI meets the physical world, with a particular emphasis on AI-native software and hardware, Embodied AI, and DeepTech opportunities. Over the past decade, he has built his career in early-stage investing around discovering and supporting AlphaFounders with a global outlook.

A three-time LinkedIn Top Voice, Gang writes on the theme of “decoding the growth paths of super individuals” and reaches more than 700,000 followers worldwide on LinkedIn. He is also the creator and curator of Pangfu Mantou, an influential WeChat Official Account in the venture capital and startup ecosystem. His honors include Forbes China 30 Under 30 in Venture Capital and 36Kr’s 36 Under 36 Investors.

guestVisitList.name: 戎镇宇
guestVisitList.introduce: 微信开放平台行业负责人，近期重点是建立 Agent 服务生态，支持开发者的创意落地
guestVisitList.introduceEn: WeChat Open Platform Industry Lead; recent focus is on building an Agent services ecosystem to support developers in bringing their ideas to reality

guestVisitList.name: 林晓翠
guestVisitList.introduce: 阿里云百炼产品运营专家，深耕开发者生态领域十余年。现负责百炼开源社区运营与全球化推广，主导 ModelStudio AI 开源生态建设，推动 AI 能力以开源方式触达全球开发者。个人主理科技播客「迪魔王 Devmore」，持续连接行业前沿实践者与社区开发者，关注 AI 工程化落地与开发者成长。

guestVisitList.name: 张婕
guestVisitList.introduce: 张婕是一位在科技、创意、商业交界处的创业者。作为上海创新创意设计研究院（DIIS）创始团队成员，她负责从战略发展、生态建设，到内容出品、公共关系的综合事务，致力于建设世界级创新转化引擎。在此，她创立了国际科技孵化平台D.Transformer，联合英伟达Inception、Aptar、Kickstarter等产业链主，覆盖AI、绿色低碳、健康科技等多个重点行业，为初创企业提供深度赋能。她毕业于耶鲁大学与麻省理工学院，曾获红点Best of the Best等国际奖项，并兼任MIT、昆山杜克大学等高校客座导师。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jie Zhang is an entrepreneur at the intersection of technology, design, and business. As a founding team member of Design Innovation Institute Shanghai, she leads strategy, development, content, and public affairs. There, she launched D.Transformer, an international incubation platform supporting ventures in AI, hardware, sustainability and wellness tech with industry partners including NVIDIA Inception, Aptar and Kickstarter. An award-winning designer, she holds degrees from Yale University and MIT and serves as a mentor at institutions including MIT, CAA, and DKU.

We warmly welcome you to join us for this exchange!

name: WAICA研讨会·人工智能驱动的量子计算
nameEn: WAICA Workshop: AI Acceleration in Quantum Computing
desc: 本次 WAICA “人工智能驱动的量子计算加速” Workshop 聚焦于下一代异构计算体系架构的前沿演进。我们关注如何跨越经典与量子的物理边界，着眼于量子计算在高维空间与复杂优化中的底层潜能。我们的报告涵盖量子计算，量子信息，量子通信，量子调控，量子人工智能，QPU 与超算集群等话题。我们致力于将硬核的架构革新与理论探讨转化为跨界叙事，以汇聚广泛的产业共识，加速量子-人工智能融合走向真正的工程落地。
descEn: The WAICA "AI Acceleration in Quantum Computing" Workshop focuses on the frontier evolution of next-generation heterogeneous computing architectures. We are dedicated to bridging the physical boundaries between classical and quantum systems, highlighting the fundamental potential of quantum computing in high-dimensional spaces and complex optimization. Our sessions cover a comprehensive range of topics, including quantum computing, quantum information, quantum communication, quantum control, quantum artificial intelligence, as well as QPU and supercomputing clusters. Ultimately, we are committed to translating hardcore architectural innovations and theoretical discussions into a cross-disciplinary narrative, aiming to forge broad industry consensus and accelerate the transition of Quantum-AI integration toward real-world engineering applications.

forumAddrEn: West Bund International Convention and Exhibition Center

name: WAICA研讨会·天基智能计算
nameEn: WAICA Workshop: Frontiers of Space-Based Intelligent Computing
desc: 本论坛聚焦空间智能计算前沿，围绕大模型轻量化、多智能体协同与天地一体化网络，探讨从地面AI向自主空间边缘智能的跨越。卫星星座与星上处理赋予地球观测、灾害应急等新能力，但资源受限、高时延、动态拓扑及安全威胁构成严峻挑战。论坛汇聚AI、航天与通信领域研究者，交流星上高效推理、星地联邦学习、通算感融合等创新架构与在轨实践，旨在突破技术瓶颈，推动构建弹性、智能的空间生态系统。诚邀各位同仁共探未来空天智能之路。
descEn: This workshop focuses on the frontier of spatial intelligent computing, centering around lightweight large models, multi-agent collaboration, and integrated space-earth networks, exploring the leap from terrestrial AI to autonomous spatial edge intelligence. Satellite constellations and on-board processing endow Earth observation, disaster emergency response, and other fields with new capabilities, but resource constraints, high latency, dynamic topology, and security threats pose severe challenges. The forum brings together researchers from the fields of AI, aerospace, and communications to exchange innovative architectures and on-orbit practices such as efficient on-board inference, satellite-earth federated learning, and the fusion of computing and sensing, aiming to break through technological bottlenecks and promote the construction of a resilient and intelligent spatial ecosystem. We sincerely invite all colleagues to explore the future path of space-earth intelligence together.

name: WAIC·Amplified Individual 在AI中看见具体的人（深耕与守望）
nameEn: Amplified Individual: Seeing the Individual in AI (Depth and Endurance)
desc:
下午场，在最动人的故事里，听见最前沿的技术风向。
下一代算力架构、具身智能、科学智能、脑机接口、AI教育、能源——没有参数轰炸，没有术语围墙。
你会听到的，是这些硬核技术背后，一次次的试错和重来；是实验室里真实的欢呼，和更真实的沉默。也会听到，那些闪光时刻背后，具体的犹豫和具体的坚持。
技术也许很远，但做技术的人很近。
descEn:
In the afternoon session, we turn the lens from the spotlight of technology to the specific figures behind it. 

In the frontier of hard tech, some send optical chips to space, others give robots true touch, and some push humanoid robots into factory floors—they are light-chasers, path-breakers, and practitioners. 

In the arena of life, some make rare diseases no longer rare, others rebuild connections between patients and the world via brain-computer interfaces, and some sow the future in the uncharted territory of AI-native education—they are guardians, guides, and explorers. 

At the farther frontiers, some bet on a tomorrow where energy is no longer contested, with AI and physics; returned physicists probe the boundaries of quantum and computation; some pass the torch between academia and investment; and some orchestrate the entire World Artificial Intelligence Conference behind the scenes—they are dreamers, connectors, and operators.

forumOrgStructureReqs.name: 威客引力（WAIC）
forumOrgStructureReqs.nameEn: Shanghai DLG WAIC Gravitation Co., Ltd

guestVisitList.name: 李瑞
guestVisitList.introduce: 李瑞博士毕业于美国麻省理工学院（MIT）计算机科学与人工智能实验室，师从美国两院院士 Edward Adelson 教授，开创并引领了机器人视触觉传感器的研究路线，发明了全球首款分辨率超越人类手指的视触觉传感器—GelSight指尖传感器，相关成果多次荣获国际顶会最佳论文奖，被全球数百所顶尖高校跟随研究，被公认为国际最佳的触觉实现路径。作为硅谷连续创业者，曾创办 Robby Technologies，开发基于视觉、无需依赖高精地图的自动驾驶产品，入选 YC 并获得 OpenAI 董事投资。曾担任MIT中国学生会主席，并发起创办了MIT中国创新与创业论坛（MIT-CHIEF），该平台孵化了多家上市公司，平台企业累计融资金额超过100亿人民币。2024年1月李瑞博士正式创立纬钛机器人，作为视触觉传感的发明者和引领者，将视触觉落地到产业界。公司以国际领先的视触觉传感和手眼协同技术为核心，主营视触觉传感器、末端执行器、数采设备等产品，致力于让机器人拥有像人一样的手感与精巧操作的能力。团队共 40 余人，研发人员占比近 80%，来自于MIT、牛津、清华、北大等海内外顶尖高校。目前产品已量产落地，服务多家世界 500 强及具身智能头部客户，助力机器人从“能看”到“会做”，推动机器人多模态感知与灵巧操控的范式革新

guestVisitList.name: 裘皓明
guestVisitList.introduce: 裘皓明，东浩兰生会展集团85后副总裁，2018 年主动揭榜承办世界人工智能大会，组建 9 人初始团队。自 2019 年起，携团队在集团支持下不断创新，至 2025 年成功承办七届大会。2024 年 12 月，原项目部成立威客引力公司，其任总经理。威客引力未来将持续在AI行业深耕，以“成为AI原生、国际一流的人工智能生态服务商”为愿景，向世界展示“中国智慧”、“上海方案”，不断以中国新发展为世界提供新机遇。

name: WAIC·思想者论坛 朱松纯专场
nameEn: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum Prof.Songchun,Zhu
desc:
核心主题：AI 的第一性原理：回归本源・人才根基・全球共治
活动立意：
作为 WAIC 顶层核心高端思想 IP，全球集结图灵奖得主、中外院士、国际科技掌舵人、顶尖教育家与新生代产业领军者，跳出短期应用热点与流量喧嚣，锚定智能科学底层逻辑与本质内核。贯通数学本源 — 认知理论 — 数据智能 — 工程落地 — 人才培育 — 强化进化 — 全球治理全链路闭环，以跨学派、跨国界、跨代际的深度思辨，树立 WAIC 全球 AI 思想引领、战略定调的顶级标杆，为通用人工智能时代的技术演进、拔尖人才生态、全球协同治理，输出权威共识与长远方向。
descEn:
Column Name: WAIC Thinkers Forum
Core Theme: First Principles of AI: Return to Origin · Talent Foundation · Global Governance
Event Purpose:
As WAIC’s top-tier high-end thought leadership IP, we gather Turing Award laureates, Chinese and foreign academicians, international tech leaders, top educators, and new-generation industrial leaders globally. We move beyond short-term application trends and media hypee to anchor the underlying logic and essence of intelligent science. We connect the full closed-loop chain: mathematical origin – cognitive theory – data intelligence – engineering implementation – talent cultivation – reinforcement learning – global governance. Through cross-school, cross-border, and cross-generational in-depth speculation, we establish WAIC as a world-class benchmark for global AI thought leadership and strategic guidance, and deliver authoritative consensus and long-term direction for technological evolution, top talent ecosystems, and global collaborative governa

guestVisitList.name: 朱松纯
guestVisitList.introduce: 朱松纯，全球著名计算机视觉专家、北京通用人工智能研究院院长。长期致力于构建人工智能科学的统一数理框架，提出“为机器立心”，指出智能的本质在于认知架构与价值体系，先后获得斯隆奖、马尔奖、赫尔姆霍茨奖等奖项。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Song-Chun Zhu is currently director of Beijing Institute for General Artificial Intelligence (BIGAI) – a non-profit research organization, and Chair Professor at Peking University and Tsinghua University jointly. He is also dean of School of Intelligence Science and Technology at Peking University.He received Ph.D. degree in computer science from Harvard University in 1996, and after that he worked at Brown, Stanford and UCLA where he established an inter-disciplinary center of Vision, Cognition, Learning and Autonomy (VCLA@UCLA 2002-2020) before he returned to China in late 2020.He has published 400+ articles in AI areas including CV, Cognition, Robotics, ML, NLP, MAS et al.His scientific contributions have garnered various recognitions, including the Marr Prize (2003), twice Marr prize honorary nominations (1999,2007), Sloan Fellowship (2001), J.K. Aggarwal Prize (2008), Helmholtz Test-of-Time Award (2013) , computational modeling prize at CogSci (2017) etc.He established the Lotus Hill Institute in 2005 to launch large-scale image annotation and pioneered data-driven statistical approaches. He served as general chair for CVPR 2012 and 2019, and led twice the Multi-University Research Initiatives (MURI 2010-2015, 2015-2020) on scene understanding, visual commonsense reasoning and robot autonomy in the US. His research has been pursuing a general unified theory of intelligence.

name: “人机共育 · 重塑大学”人工智能+教育论坛
nameEn: Reimagining the University for an AI-Driven Future
desc:
人机共育 · 重塑大学
在人工智能加速重塑知识生产、人才培养与社会运行方式的时代背景下，AI+教育分论坛将以“人机共育 · 重塑大学”为主题，面向全球高等教育变革的关键议题，搭建兼具战略高度、学术深度与实践导向的对话平台，探讨人工智能驱动下大学使命、育人模式与教育生态的系统性重构。
本场论坛由人工智能开放联盟主办，将围绕“育人之变、人机协同、教育治理”三条主线展开，通过主旨演讲、校长圆桌、专家报告和AI 赋能教育实践展示，呈现人工智能从技术工具走向教育生态重塑的前沿趋势。论坛将追问“AI 时代大学何为”，为全球高等教育未来转型凝聚思想、方案与行动共识。
descEn:
As artificial intelligence reshapes knowledge production, learning, research, and human capability, universities face a fundamental question: what should higher education become when AI is a structural force?
Under the theme “Reimagining the University for an AI-Driven Future,” the AI+Education Forum will convene global leaders, university presidents, scholars, and practitioners for strategic dialogue. It will focus on three core themes: rethinking human development and future capabilities; advancing human-AI collaboration in teaching, learning, research, and institutional innovation; and strengthening governance around ethics, assessment, academic integrity, data privacy, fairness, and social responsibility.
Through keynote speeches, university presidents’ dialogue, expert presentations, and showcases, the forum will explore how AI can help build a human-centered, evidence-based, inclusive, and responsible future for higher education.

His research focuses on neuromodulation engineering, brain pacemakers and related medical devices, with major achievements translated into clinical applications.

guestVisitList.introduce:
哈尔滨工业大学党委常委、校长
韩杰才，男，1966年3月生，教授，博士生导师，中国科学院院士。第十四届全国人大代表。研究领域为材料科学与工程、复合材料和光学材料，主要研究方向是极端环境下复合材料和力学。第八届教育部科技委材料学部常务副主任、中国宇航学会第八届理事会副理事长、中国复合材料学会荣誉理事；国家自然科学基金委创新研究群体负责人、国家杰出青年科学基金获得者。国务院学位委员会委员、教育部教育强国建设战略咨询委员会、“双一流”建设专家委员会委员。

name: “智序生命·AI健未来”浦江医学人工智能论坛
nameEn: 2026 WAIC "AI for Life in Order: A Healthier Future with AI" Pujiang Medical AI Forum
desc: 为践行“AI+”国家战略，打造具有国际影响力的医疗人工智能枢纽，本次论坛以 “智序生命·AI健未来” 为主题，开启一场贯通政、产、学、研、用的国际性思想盛宴。论坛汇聚政府领导、中外院士、权威专家、医疗机构及产业界代表人士，围绕医疗AI的技术突破、临床转化、政策规范及生态构建等议题展开深度交流。论坛亮点包含上海市卫生健康人工智能建设成果发布、医疗AI创新应用案例集首发、院士圆桌对话及重磅主旨报告，共话智能医疗新趋势，共推产业高质量发展。
descEn: To implement the national "AI Plus" strategy and build a medical artificial intelligence hub with global influence, this forum takes "Orderly Intelligent Life, AI Empowers a Healthy Future" as its theme, hosting an international intellectual gala integrating government, industry, academia, research and end-users. The event brings together government officials, Chinese and foreign academicians, authoritative specialists, representatives from medical institutions and industrial circles to conduct in-depth exchanges on technical breakthroughs, clinical translation, policy regulation and ecosystem development of medical AI.Highlights of the forum cover the release of Shanghai’s achievements in healthcare AI development, the premiere of a collection of innovative medical AI application cases, an academician roundtable dialogue and high-profile keynote speeches. Participants will jointly discuss emerging trends in intelligent healthcare and advance high-quality industrial growth.

guestVisitList.name: 林佳宁
guestVisitList.introduce:
Joalin Lim站在医疗科技与医疗健康转型的最前沿，是一位兼具企业家远⻅、临床专业深度与国际战略领导力的杰出领军人物。作为 Agape-Life Medtech & Healthcare Group 的创始人兼首席执行官，她成功打造了一个高影响力的平台，持续推动医疗健康创新在东盟、亚洲 18 个国家及全球更广泛市场的落地与发展。
Joalin 博士曾荣获多项重要殊荣，包括 新加坡陈嘉庚⻘年发明家优异奖、总统领导与服务奖，以及美国明尼苏达大学杰出产业研究员 认可。她亦被收录于 《Who’s Who in the World》 与 《Who’s Who in Medicine & Healthcare》。与此同时，Agape-Life 于 2023 至 2025 年连续荣获新加坡 SME 500 Awards，并于 2023 至 2025 年连续获评 Company of Good，彰显了企业持续卓越的发展实力。她本人亦于 2025/26 年获颁新加坡 Entrepreneur 100 Award。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
<Dr. Joalin Lim> stands at the forefront of MedTech and healthcare transformation, distinguished by a career that unites entrepreneurial vision, clinical depth, and international strategic leadership. As Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Agape-Life Medtech & Healthcare Group, she has built a high-impact platform that advances healthcare innovation across ASEAN, 18 Asian countries, and the wider global market.
A recipient of distinguished honors including the Tan Kah Kee Young Inventor Merit Prize of Singapore, the President’s Leadership & Service Award, and recognition as Outstanding Industry Researcher from the University of Minnesota, Dr. Joalin has also been featured in Who’s Who in the World and Who’s Who in Medicine & Healthcare. In parallel, Agape-Life received the SME 500 Awards Singapore from 2023 to 2025, Company of Good 2023 to 2025, underscoring the company’s sustained excellence. She is also a recipient to Entrepreneur 100 award of Singapore in 2025/26.

name: 毕马威·AI企业的商业化突围与资本进阶论坛
nameEn: KPMG Commercial Breakthrough and Capital Advancement for AI Enterprises Forum
desc:
当前，技术突破正加速转化为产业新动能，AI企业迎来从创新验证迈向规模落地的战略窗口期。与此同时，如何打通从技术价值到商业价值的“最后一公里”，如何前瞻布局资本市场以驱动长远发展，成为领先企业竞逐的核心命题。
在此变局下，毕马威于2026世界人工智能大会承办“AI企业的商业化突围与资本进阶生态论坛”，汇聚产业领军者、知名投资人与监管专家，共商破局之道。
descEn: Currently, technological breakthroughs are accelerating their transformation into new drivers of industrial growth, positioning AI companies at a strategic window of opportunity as they move from innovation validation to large-scale implementation. At the same time, how to bridge the "last mile" from technological value to commercial value, and how to proactively position in capital markets to drive long-term development, have become core strategic questions for leading enterprises. Against this backdrop of transformation, KPMG is hosting the "AI Enterprise Commercial Breakthrough and Capital Advancement Ecosystem Forum" at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, bringing together industry leaders, renowned investors, and regulatory experts to explore pathways to success.

name: 超擎数智·面向 10 亿瓦级 AI 工厂的网络创新论坛
nameEn: Network innovation for Giga-scale AI factories
desc: AI工厂已迈向了数十万卡GPU，甚至百万级GPU时代，优化的网络设计已成为AI业务大规模、可扩展的关键。想要在百万级GPU集群上实现卓越性能，不仅需要通过Scale-Up和Scale-Out网络在单个数据中心中实现最优性能，还需要在多个数据中心之间通过Scale-Across网络和数据中心内网络的协同优化设计，实现跨区域高性能和可扩展。在本论坛中，我们将全面展示NVIDIA网络创新技术如何助力构建10亿瓦级AI基础设施，并深入探讨NVIDIA Quantum-X InfiniBand AI网络平台和NVIDIA Spectrum-X AI以太网平台如何赋能全球AI工厂。
descEn: AI factories have entered the era of hundreds of thousands and millions of GPUs. Optimal networking design is the key to unlimited scalable AI workloads. Achieving superior performance for million-GPU clusters requires more than scale-up and scale-out in single data centers. It needs a co-design combining scale-across networking with inter-data center fabrics to ensure performance and scalability. In this forum, we will demonstrate how NVIDIA’s networking build giga-scale AI infrastructure, and explain how NVIDIA Quantum-X InfiniBand and NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet empower global AI factories.

guestVisitList.introduce: 负责 NVIDIA 网络中国区新市场开发与方案推广工作，设计并推广 AI 大数据，数据库等领域高性能存储方案，推动高性能 RDMA 网络/ DPU /交换机产品落地应用。

guestVisitList.name: Jeff Denworth
guestVisitList.introduce: VAST的联合创始人兼首席营收官（CRO）。他为VAST带来了二十多年的先进计算、大规模可扩展的大数据及云存储技术经验。在加入VAST之前，杰夫曾在DDN、CTERA Networks和Cluster File Systems担任管理职务。拥有特伦顿州立学院工商管理学士学位。

name: 从量产到精品·AI赋能影视内容创作新生态论坛
nameEn: Shanghai AI-Powered Micro-Short Drama Industry Development Forum
desc: 当前，AIGC、多模态大模型、AI Agent等技术快速突破，正深刻重构影视剧生产全流程，推动产业从“专业化生产”迈向“智能化创制”。AI短视频制作凭借生产周期短、传播效率高、商业转化强等优势，成为AI技术规模化落地的重要场景。AI编剧、AI生成、AI配音、AI剪辑等环节深度融合，OPC等创新模式不断涌现，爆款频出、生态协同，推动行业从规模量产走向体系化、精品化发展，成为内容产业赛道的突破口。
descEn: Currently, rapid breakthroughs in technologies such as AIGC, multimodal large models, and AI Agents are profoundly reshaping the entire production process of film and television, driving the industry's transition from "professional production" to "intelligent creation." AI-powered short video production, with its advantages of short production cycles, high dissemination efficiency, and strong commercial conversion, has become a key scenario for large-scale implementation of AI technologies. Deep integration across AI scriptwriting, AI generation, AI dubbing, and AI editing, alongside the continuous emergence of innovative models like OPC, has led to frequent hit productions and synergistic ecosystem development. This is propelling the industry from mass production toward systematic and high-quality development, establishing it as a breakthrough sector within the content industry.

guestVisitList.name: 潘雨莹
guestVisitList.introduce:
潘雨莹，MiniMax多模态内容负责人。
带领团队完成数支爆款官方宣传片，全网播放量过亿。同时参与海螺AI视频模型训练。
多次担任爱奇艺等内容平台讲师，上海国际电影节AI单元评委。
AI代表作入选威尼斯电影节等国际影展。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Pan Yuying，Head of Multimodal Content at MiniMax.
Led the team in creating multiple viral official promotional videos, accumulating over 100 million views across all platforms. Participated in the training of Hailuo AI video models.
Served frequently as a lecturer for leading content platforms like iQIYI and as a jury member for the AI section at the Shanghai International Film Festival. Featured AI works selected for international film festivals, including the Venice Film Festival.

guestVisitList.name: 臧楠
guestVisitList.introduce: 臧楠深耕影视创作多年，兼具长剧与短剧领域的系统经验，在短剧领域参与打造多部现象级作品，代表作《家里家外》《十八岁太奶奶 重整家族荣耀》系列等。曾任2026新加坡新传媒红星大奖、首届全国微短剧剧本创作大赛评委。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Zang Nan boasts years of profound experience in film and television creation, possessing systematic expertise across both full-length TV dramas and short dramas. She has taken part in developing numerous phenomenal hit short dramas, with representative works including the series My Sweet Home and Return at 18: The Great-Grandma Takes Charge. She served as a judge for Mediacorp Singapore’s 2026 Star Awards and the First National Micro Short Drama Script Creation Competition.

上海尚世影业有限公司、上海五岸传播有限公司 总经理
从事传媒行业十余年，深耕版权运营、版权采购和内容制作领域，同时，在内容的国际传播、国际合作及海外活动承办方面拥有丰富经验；
制作出品或监制策划《蛮好的人生》《永不消逝的电波》《赤热》《两个人的世界》《简言的夏冬》《繁华似锦》《转角之恋》《南极之恋》《镇魂》等多部影视剧作品。

ZHOU Yu (Joey Zhou)
General Manager of SMG Pictures and Wings Media

guestVisitList.name: 王霆
guestVisitList.introduce: 王霆，上海戏剧学院导演系艺术硕士，上海一起闹海人工智能科技有限公司总经理、总导演。上海市十大青年高端创意人才，上海市创业指导专家、上海戏剧学院创业导师，长期深耕AI与数字内容生产创新，提出“超级个体（OPC）”理念，推动AI赋能影视创作与内容工业化实践。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Wang Ting holds a Master of Fine Arts in Directing from Shanghai Theatre Academy. He is the General Manager and Chief Director of Shanghai NOWHi AI Tech Co., Ltd. Recognized as one of Shanghai’s Top Ten Young High-end Creative Talents, he also serves as a Shanghai Entrepreneurship Mentor and an Entrepreneurship Mentor at Shanghai Theatre Academy. With long-term dedication to the innovation of AI-powered digital content production, Wang is both a director and a creative producer, as well as a practitioner and promoter of industrialized “AI + Art” creation. He proposed the concept of the One Person Company (OPC), empowering creators with AI and making it possible for individuals to build highly efficient content production capabilities, thereby unlocking new productivity in the digital creative industry.

guestVisitList.name: 王子彬
guestVisitList.introduce: 商汤科技内容与交互事业群副总裁、SekoAI总经理。香港中文大学计算机视觉博士，AI领域资深专家。作为用技术重塑数字艺术边界的引领者，他于2024年初从零到一主导了Seko项目，兼具深厚的学术根基与卓越的前沿技术商业化落地经验。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Dr. Wang serves as VP of the Content & Interaction Business Group at SenseTime and Head of SekoAI. A veteran AI expert with a Ph.D. in Computer Vision from CUHK, he is a visionary leader dedicated to reshaping the boundaries of digital art. In early 2024, he built the Seko project from the ground up, seamlessly integrating elite academic insights with exceptional commercial execution.

guestVisitList.name: 陈宏
guestVisitList.introduce: 拥有15年内容科技与人工智能商业化经验，现任极佳科技内容行业商业化负责人。长期聚焦大模型、世界模型、AI视频与具身智能产业落地，负责市场战略、客户拓展、生态合作及商业化交付，推动AI技术在影视、游戏、文旅等行业的规模化应用。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Hong Chen is the Head of Content Industry Commercialization at GigaAI Technology, with over 15 years of experience spanning the content, entertainment, and AI industries. He specializes in commercializing foundation models, world models, AI-generated content, and embodied AI solutions.
He leads business strategy, enterprise partnerships, and go-to-market execution, driving the adoption of AI technologies across film, gaming, media, cultural tourism, and robotics. His work bridges advanced AI research with real-world industry applications, helping enterprises transform production workflows and unlock new business opportunities.
 With extensive experience in product commercialization, ecosystem development, and strategic partnerships, Hong has successfully led collaborations with leading technology companies, media organizations, and industrial partners. He is committed to accelerating the industrial adoption of next-generation AI technologies and building sustainable AI ecosystems

guestVisitList.name: 陆趣
guestVisitList.introduce: 陆趣，硕士、高级工程师，长期深耕媒体融合、智慧广电和AI创新应用，主导融媒体平台、智能媒资、AIGC工具及企业数字化转型项目，入选上海市东方英才计划青年项目，获中国电影电视技术学会青年科技奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Qu LU holds a master’s degree and is a Senior Engineer. She has extensive experience in media convergence, smart broadcasting, and AI-driven innovation. She has led key initiatives in converged media platforms, intelligent media asset management, AIGC tools, and enterprise digital transformation. She was selected for the Shanghai Oriental Talent Program — Youth Project and received the Young Scientist and Technologist Award from the China Society of Motion Picture and Television Engineers.

name: 大晓机器人·世界模型驱动物理 AI 从理解到执行论坛
nameEn: World Model-Driven Physical AI Forum: From Understanding to Execution
desc:
WAIC 2026世界模型"六小龙"巅峰论坛由世界人工智能大会组委会主办、大晓机器人承办，以驱动物理AI从理解到执行为主题，是大会唯一聚焦世界模型与具身智能深度融合的核心论坛，旨在定义并开启物理AI的开悟时刻。
大晓机器人董事长王晓刚将呈现环境式数采—开悟世界模型—行业级解决方案全栈实践，展示开悟世界模型端侧直驱本体、反思自进化，落地零售、酒店及开放场景等。
国内世界模型“六小龙”企业技术掌舵人首度同台，六条技术路线正面交锋，共探从认知推演通往物理执行的破局之路。
论坛还将联合发布Physical IQ物智——具身物理智能统一评测平台，以真实场景评测界定机器人能力边界，推动行业标准共建。
descEn:
The WAIC 2026 World Model “Six Dragons” Summit Forum, hosted by the WAIC Organizing Committee and organized by ACE Robotics, is themed “Driving Physical AI from Understanding to Execution.” As WAIC’s only core forum on world models and embodied intelligence, it aims to usher in Physical AI’s Enlightenment Moment.
ACE Robotics Chairman Wang Xiaogang will present its full-stack practice—“Ambient Capture Engine—Kairos World Model—Industry-Grade Solutions”—showcasing on-device robot control, reflection-driven self-evolution, and deployment in retail, hospitality, and open scenarios.
Technology leaders from China’s six representative world model companies will share the stage for the first time, exploring the path from cognitive reasoning to physical execution.
The forum will also launch Physical IQ, a unified benchmark platform that evaluates robot capabilities in real-world scenarios and advances shared industry standards.

forumOrgStructureReqs.name: 世界人工智能大会组委会
大晓机器人

guestVisitList.name: 朱政
guestVisitList.introduce: 朱政，极佳视界联合创始人、首席科学家，智源青年学者，主导和深度参与融资超30亿元，公司估值超100亿元。2019年博士毕业于中国科学院自动化研究所；2019年至2021年在清华大学自动化系从事博士后研究。在TPAMI、 CVPR、ICCV、 ECCV、NeurIPS 等顶级期刊和会议上发表论文70余篇，文章总引用20000余次 (Google Citations)，连续4年入选全球前2%顶尖科学家榜单。获得2025年吴文俊人工智能自然科学一等奖、PRCV2025最佳学生论文奖、CCF杰出论文奖、魔搭社区具身智能先锋人物、南方周末年度科创力人物等荣誉。代表作SiamRPN和DaSiamRPN是深度学习时代最具影响力的目标跟踪算法之一，开辟了区域候选孪生网络目标跟踪的研究方向，分别被引用3600余次和1800余次，并被集成进OpenCV；BEVDet是BEV感知领域的代表性算法，被多家车企和自动驾驶公司3D感知方案所采用，累计被引用1200余次；WebFace260M是全球最大的人脸识别数据集，被500余家科研机构申请使用，DriveDreamer世界模型入选ECCV最具影响力论文榜单；GigaBrain和GigaWorld系列工作在RoboChallenge、WorldArena、RoboCasa365榜单上排名第一。曾获NIST-FRVT、COCO、VOT等顶级视觉竞赛冠军，多次在CVPR、ICCV上组织Workshop和比赛，多次担任ICLR、NeurIPS、AAAI的领域主席。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Zheng Zhu is currently the Co-founder and Chief Scientist at GigaAI. During 2019-2021, he was a post-doc fellow at Tsinghua University. Before that, he received Ph.D. degree from Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences in 2019. During 2016-2019, he was research interns at SenseTime, Horizon Robotics, and DeepGlint. He has co-authored more than 70 top journal and conference papers mainly on computer vision and robotics problems, such as world model, AIGC, autonomous driving, face recognition, and visual tracking. He has more than 20,000 Google Scholar citations to his work, including SiamRPN (3,600+ citations), DaSiamRPN (1,800+ citations) and BEVDet (1,200+ citations). His work DaSiamRPN is included in famous OpenCV Library. He was recognised as one of the Top 2% Scientists Worldwide by Stanford University (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025). He won the Best Student Paper Award and CCF Outstanding Paper Award in PRCV 2025 (CCF-C Conference). He ranked the 1st on NIST-FRVT Masked Face Recognition, won the COCO Keypoint Detection Challenge in ECCV 2020 and Visual Object Tracking (VOT) Real-Time Challenge in ECCV 2018. He was the Area Chair of ICLR 2026 and Senior Program Committee of AAAI 2026.

guestVisitList.name: 托马斯·萨金特
guestVisitList.introduce: 托马斯·约翰·“汤姆”·萨金特（Thomas John "Tom" Sargent，1943年7月19日－），美国经济学家，研究领域涵盖宏观经济学、货币经济学及时间序列分析。他是理性预期革命的核心人物之一，与小罗伯特·卢卡斯、尼尔·华勒斯、罗伯特·巴罗等人共同推动了该领域的发展，并撰写了多篇开创性论文。萨金特与华勒斯合作，提出了理性预期均衡的鞍路径稳定性特征及政策无效性命题。2011年，萨金特因“对宏观经济学因果关系的实证研究”与克里斯托弗·西姆斯共同获得诺贝尔经济学奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Thomas John "Tom" Sargent (born July 19, 1943) is an American economist whose work focuses on macroeconomics, monetary economics, and time series analysis. He is a key figure in the rational expectations revolution, alongside Robert Lucas Jr., Neil Wallace, Robert Barro, and others, and is the author of several seminal papers. In collaboration with Neil Wallace, Sargent developed the characterization of saddle-path stability in rational expectations equilibrium and the policy ineffectiveness proposition. In 2011, he was awarded the Nobel Memorial Prize in Economic Sciences jointly with Christopher Sims for their "empirical research on cause and effect in macroeconomics."

name: 骨码智元实验室·人工智能高质量语料生态论坛
nameEn: GOMAX LAB High-Quality AI Corpora Ecosystem Forum
desc: 本次论坛以“全球专家·极致语料”为主题，GOMAX LAB骨码智元实验室汇聚数十位院士、国际头部科技企业数据专家及全球一线投资机构，共同研讨科学智能与产业智能赛道高质量语料的发展路径与产业落地方案。现场将分享全球前沿数据语料行业观点，集中发布多领域高质量数据集落地成果与完整产业发展路线图。
descEn: GOMAX LAB presents a high-level forum under the theme “Global Minds · Premium Corpora.” It will convene a distinguished group of academicians, data experts from the world’s leading technology companies, and representatives of premier global investment institutions to shape the future of high-quality corpora for AI for Science and industrial intelligence. The forum will feature leading global perspectives on the AI corpus ecosystem, the launch of high-quality datasets designed for real-world use across multiple domains, and a comprehensive roadmap for industry development.

name: 光源资本·“AI+N 进化时刻”人工智能产业融合论坛
nameEn: Lighthouse Capital "AI+N Evolution Moment" Artificial Intelligence Industry Integration Forum
desc: 当前，创投对AI的布局已进入更加多元的“后共识阶段”，具身智能、AI4S、行业模型、AI Agent、AI硬件等已实现商业落地的赛道，正成为确定性机会。在这一背景下，光源资本·“AI+N 进化时刻”人工智能产业融合论坛将汇聚AI领域的科学家、创业者、产业领袖与投资人，共同直面一个核心命题：当技术、产业、资本三股力量深度碰撞，谁在定义下一个十年？我们将聚焦这三股力量的协同与博弈，探寻AI驱动产业变革的真实逻辑。期待与年轻一代AI探索者一起，看见进化，参与进化，定义进化。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有18日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn: Currently, venture capital investment in AI has entered a more diversified "post-consensus stage." Sectors that have already achieved commercial implementation—such as Embodied AI, AI for Science (AI4S), industry-specific models, AI Agents, and AI hardware—are emerging as opportunities with high certainty. Against this backdrop, the Lighthouse Capital "AI+N Evolution Moment" Artificial Intelligence Industry Integration Forum will bring together scientists, entrepreneurs, industry leaders, and investors from the AI field to jointly address a core proposition: As technology, industry, and capital collide deeply, who will define the next decade? We will focus on the synergy and interplay among these three forces to explore the authentic logic behind AI-driven industrial transformation. We look forward to joining the younger generation of AI explorers to witness evolution, participate in evolution, and define evolution.

name: 硅星人·AI青年创变者创新论坛
nameEn: AI Youth Innovators Innovation Forum
desc:
AI青年创变者创新论坛 汇聚 Agent、具身智能、AI应用三大最热赛道青年创业者、互联网大厂技术骨干、实验室学术派等实战派创变者——他们不只是技术的布道者，而是已经将产品送进用户手中青年指挥官，
我们将通过论坛呈现青年创变者从0到1的经验以及寻找战友的真诚诉求。4小时高密度输出：4场嘉宾真话分享环节，1场圆桌拆解Agent的产品化方法论，多个最具潜力的创新项目进行闪电路演。
descEn:
The AI Youth Innovation Forum brings together the three hottest fields of "Agent", "Embodied Intelligence", and "AI Applications" - young entrepreneurs, technical experts from major internet companies, and academic researchers from laboratories. These practical innovators are not just advocates of technology, but have already sent their products to users. They are young commanders.
Through this forum, we will present the experiences of young innovators from 0 to 1 and their sincere requests for finding allies. With 4 hours of high-density output: 4 sessions of real talk sharing by guests, 1 roundtable discussion on the productization methodology of Agent, and flash demonstrations of multiple most promising innovative projects.

guestVisitList.name: 李景秋
guestVisitList.introduce: 作为百度搭子DuMate产品总架构师，全面负责产品的整体架构设计与开发规划。主导Agent能力体系构建、用户交互设计、场景化功能落地，推动百度搭子DuMate在智能办公、知识管理、自动化流程等场景的创新应用，打造新一代超级AI助手。

guestVisitList.name: 沈彤欣
guestVisitList.introduceEn: 沈彤欣，Blinkko创始人兼CEO，毕业于加州大学伯克利分校，前苹果公司伦敦体验设计师，具备设计、心理学与商业融合的跨学科背景。大学期间创立校园社交产品，成功击败由前雅虎总裁创办的竞争对手Raftr；后联合创立国内市场占有率领先的AI 3D摄影工作室。曾担任全美最大华人学生科技峰会DECODE主席，长期关注年轻人的社交行为与消费文化。创始人同时运营面向年轻消费者的内容账号，并拥有覆盖时尚、生活方式、留学及校园群体的创作者网络，具备天然的用户触达和社区运营能力。作为连续创业者，她兼具产品设计、用户洞察与商业化能力，拥有丰富的中美市场经验。

guestVisitList.name: 孙林君
guestVisitList.introduce: 孙林君，吉林大学计算数学学士、大连理工大学计算数学人工神经网络计算方向硕士，历任摩托罗拉、阿里巴巴资深算法专家，深耕大数据智能领域近20年。在人工智能神经网络的构建上具有丰富的研究与创新成果，拥有包括《基于深度学习的屏幕图标语义识别方法及系统CN116403199B》等在内19项发明专利。

guestVisitList.name: 姜睦然
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
就读于北京中学创新人才实验班。在校期间积极参与科创项目与跨学科实践，多次代表学校参加国家级赛事与行业交流活动。凭借首届AI Native编程黑客松全场并列第一的成绩，获邀进入猎豹移动学习实践，深入参与AI原生产品开发流程。
在中关村学院与中关村人工智能研究院主办的官方科创赛事中，以全场最小年龄与一众博士后和创业者同台竞技并最终胜出，夺得赛道第一与全场最佳龙虾双料大奖，获「虾王」称号。

name: 近代物理所·AI与先进核能共筑可持续智能未来论坛
nameEn: AI and Advanced Nuclear Energy for a Sustainable Intelligent Future
desc: 作为2026 WAIC首个聚焦“AI与先进核能双向深度融合”的战略级跨界分论坛，紧扣WAIC“智能伙伴共创未来”主题，直面全球AI爆发式增长的能源可持续瓶颈、先进核能智能化升级的底层技术命题，以中国原创的先进核能解决方案为核心实践载体，搭建横跨AI技术、先进核能（核裂变与核聚变）、全球治理、产业落地、民生普惠的全球顶级对话平台。论坛既锚定AI产业可持续发展的核心痛点，也回应全球能源安全、气候治理、技术普惠的宏观命题，更向世界展示中国在“AI+先进核能”交叉领域的突破与大国担当，填补WAIC在“AI+战略能源”领域的内容空白，打造大会兼具学术高度、战略远见、产业价值与民生温度的标杆性跨界分论坛。
descEn: This WAIC 2026 "Advanced Nuclear + AI" forum highlights a dual synergy: nuclear as AI's clean baseload energy, and AI as nuclear's intelligent core. It addresses AI's energy crunch, showcasing China's ADANES for fuel efficiency & waste transmutation, and fusion for limitless compute.The forum debuts China's AI applications across the nuclear chain—enabling nanosecond beam control, smart R&D, and digital twins via HIAF/CIADS. Uniting experts and policymakers, it aims to drive innovation and standards, boosting China's global voice in nuclear governance and the smart energy revolution.

guestVisitList.name: 孙永滨
guestVisitList.introduce: 孙永滨，中广核数字科技有限公司董事长、法定代表人，深耕核电数字化、仪控系统领域多年。长期牵头核电数字化、智能化技术攻关，主导国产化核安全级仪控系统研发落地，推动数字孪生、AI 与核电安全运营深度融合。统筹集团能源数字化整体方案建设，助力核电仪控全产业链自主可控，积极探索 AI 赋能先进核能、零碳算力融合创新，持续推进核能数字技术产业落地与行业标准共建。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Sun Yongbin serves as Chairman and Legal Representative of CGN Digital Technology Co., Ltd.He has long been engaged in R&D of nuclear power digitalization and I&C systems. He leads the development and industrialization of fully domestic nuclear safety-grade I&C platforms, integrating digital twin, artificial intelligence and nuclear safety operation technologies. He oversees the overall digital transformation solutions for CGN’s energy sector, advancing full-chain independent controllability of nuclear I&C equipment. He actively explores the integration of AI, advanced nuclear energy and zero-carbon computing power, and promotes industrial application and standard formulation of nuclear digital technologies worldwide.

guestVisitList.name: 王寿君
guestVisitList.introduce: 王寿君，中国核学会理事长、党委书记，研究员级高级工程师，长期从事核工业全产业链管理与核能行业发展工作。其工作聚焦核能行业学术交流、技术创新、标准体系建设与国际合作，面向核电、核燃料、核工程建设等领域的技术进步与产业升级开展推动工作，注重核工业人才培养与科普宣传，助力我国核能行业高质量可持续发展。曾任中国核工业集团董事长等职，是我国核工业领域资深领军人物。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Shoujun Wang is President and Secretary of the Party Committee of the Chinese Nuclear Society (CNS), a senior engineer (researcher level), long engaged in the full industrial chain management of the nuclear industry and the development of the nuclear energy industry. His work focuses on academic exchanges, technological innovation, standards system construction and international cooperation in the nuclear energy industry, promoting technological progress and industrial upgrading in fields such as nuclear power, nuclear fuel and nuclear engineering construction, emphasizing the training of nuclear industry talents and science popularization, to help the high-quality and sustainable development of China's nuclear energy industry. Having served as Chairman of the China National Nuclear Corporation, he is a senior leader in China's nuclear industry.

guestVisitList.name: 白云生
guestVisitList.introduce: 白云生，中核战略规划研究总院院长、党委副书记，长期从事核能产业战略规划、政策研究与行业分析工作。其工作聚焦中国核能产业高质量发展路径、清洁能源体系中的核能战略定位及核能数字化转型规划，面向国家核能发展规划、重大科技专项实施及产业政策制定开展系统研究，注重战略规划与产业实践的结合，为核能产业发展提供决策支撑。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Yunsheng Bai is a senior official of the China National Nuclear Corporation Strategic Planning and Research Institute, long engaged in strategic planning, policy research and industry analysis of the nuclear energy industry. His work focuses on the high-quality development path of China's nuclear energy industry, the strategic positioning of nuclear energy in the clean energy system and the planning of nuclear energy digital transformation, carrying out systematic research on national nuclear energy development plans, the implementation of major scientific and technological projects and the formulation of industrial policies, emphasizing the combination of strategic planning and industrial practice to provide decision support for the development of the nuclear energy industry.

guestVisitList.name: 瓦茨瓦夫・古多夫斯基
张勤
guestVisitList.introduce:
中国人工智能学会 不确定性人工智能专委会主任
创立人工智能领域动态不确定因果图（DUCG, Dynamic Uncertain Causality Graph）理论，并在大型复杂工业系统在线运行状态监测、故障预报、故障动态诊断、故障发展预测和决策支持、以及眩晕、黄疸疾病诊断等方面获得初步应用。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Former Vice President of the China Association for Science and Technology (CAST); Professor at the Institute of Nuclear and New Energy Technology (INET), Tsinghua University
Chair of the Special Committee on Uncertainty Artificial Intelligence, Chinese Association for Artificial Intelligence (CAAI)
Professor Zhang founded the theory of Dynamic Uncertain Causality Graph (DUCG) in the field of artificial intelligence. This theory has been preliminarily applied to online operation status monitoring, fault early warning, dynamic fault diagnosis, fault progression prediction and decision support for large-scale complex industrial systems, as well as the clinical diagnosis of conditions including vertigo and jaundice.

nameEn: Kehua Data Forum on Computing Infrastructure and Al Chip Collaborative Development
desc: 论坛立足国产芯片高功耗、高密部署趋势，聚焦供电、散热、系统协同等行业挑战，汇聚芯片、服务器、算力基础设施、异构算力平台及终端用户全产业链专家。围绕算电冷一体化、高密度 GPU 集群、软硬协同调度展开深度研讨，发布适配国产芯片的液冷 POD 2.0、风液一体 CDU 等前沿产品，并联合多家国产芯片企业启动协同标准预研，以技术共研与生态共建，为国产芯片极致算力稳定、高效、绿色释放筑牢坚实底座，推动 AI 产业高质量发展。
descEn: This forum focuses on high power consumption and high-density deployment of domestic chips, addressing challenges in power supply, cooling and system collaboration. It gathers industry experts, releases liquid cooling solutions tailored for domestic chips, launches industrial cooperation standards, and promotes stable, efficient computing power release to boost the high-quality development of the AI industry.

descEn: Corpus as Base, Intelligence in Rise", centering on the key aspects of AI basic capability construction and industrial implementation, we will systematically release a batch of landmark achievements and launch a series of key cooperation projects from multiple dimensions, including methodolo system construction, corpus base capability upgrading, key technological capability breakthroughs, and industrial ecosystem cultivation.

name: 浪潮集团·AI 原生驱动工业全域升级应用实践研讨会
nameEn: AI-Native Driven All-Round Industrial Upgrade — 2026 Seminar on Practical Applications of New Industrialization
addr: 上海市浦东新区花木路1388号浦东嘉里大酒店
addrEn: No.1388 Huamu Road, Pudong New Area, Shanghai
desc:
人工智能正在以前所未有的深度和广度重塑全球产业。随着中国“十四五”规划的推进，新的工业化推动高质量经济增长和现代产业体系的发展。 

本次研讨会聚焦于赋能工业场景的原生人工智能技术，针对工业数字化和智能化转型。会议汇聚了院士、央企CIO、行业领军人物和专家，共同分享装备制造、智慧能源和数字运营的实践案例，并发布前沿的人工智能创新成果。 

针对产业痛点和实际需求，活动探索人工智能驱动的工业升级新路径，打造高效的工业智能化转型与合作平台。
descEn:
Artificial intelligence is reshaping global industries at unprecedented depth and breadth. As China’s 15th Five-Year Plan advances, new industrialization drives high-quality economic growth and modern industrial system development.
Focused on AI-native technologies empowering industrial scenarios, this seminar targets industrial digitalization and intelligent transformation. It gathers academicians, central enterprise CIOs, industry leaders and experts to share practical cases in equipment manufacturing, smart energy and digital operation, and release cutting-edge AI innovations.Addressing industrial pain points and practical needs, the event explores new paths for AI-powered industrial upgrading, building an efficient platform for industrial intelligent transformation and cooperation.

name: 蚂蚁密算·产业数据智能 跃迁与普惠论坛
nameEn: Industrial Data Intelligence: Leap and Inclusiveness
desc:
数据智能的价值释放，长期受制于数据孤岛与智力孤岛，其上限往往取决于组织自身的数据规模与人才密度。随着自主智能体崛起，产业数据智能正迎来能力、速度与知识的三重跃迁。其背后依托两大基础支柱：密态计算平台以“可用不可见”的全链路保障，夯实产业协作的信任底座；专业智能体服务平台将行业知识与分析能力封装为可编排、可组合的智能服务，推动数据智能从大企业专属走向产业普惠。
本论坛汇聚产业前沿实践者，围绕三大核心议题展开深度对话：密态计算重构产业数据协作信任范式，专业智能体降低数据智能能力门槛，以及跃迁走向普惠进程中如何构建可持续的治理框架与商业模式。
从跃迁到普惠，产业数据智能的下一章，属于每一个参与者。
descEn:
Data intelligence has long been limited by data and intelligence silos. With the rise of autonomous agents, industrial data intelligence is now transforming in capability, speed, and knowledge. This shift is driven by privacy-preserving computing, which enables trusted collaboration through “usable but invisible” protection, and professional agent service platforms, which turn domain expertise into composable intelligent services.
This forum will explore how these technologies can reshape trust, lower barriers to data intelligence, and support sustainable governance and broader adoption.
The next chapter of industrial data intelligence belongs to every participant.

name: 奇异摩尔·AI网络前沿生态论坛
nameEn: AI Networking, Work as One
desc: 在大模型训练、推理与多模态应用持续演进的背景下，AI产业竞争正由单点算力比拼，全面迈向以AI 工作负载为牵引、以网络互联为核心、以计算与基础设施协同为底座、以光互连等前沿技术为关键支撑的系统级竞争新阶段。面向这一趋势，本次“智联为擎，拓维共进”—AI网络互联生态论坛将围绕AI集群在训练与推理场景下对高带宽、低时延、强扩展、可运维互联能力的核心需求，汇聚Infra厂商、AI芯片、网络设备、云计算、光量子计算、高校等生态伙伴，共同探讨如何构建开放兼容、高效协同、面向未来的AI互联生态体系。
descEn: As AI training, inference, and multimodal applications advance, competition shifts from isolated computing power to system‑level competition driven by AI workloads, centered on networking, built on compute‑infrastructure synergy, and underpinned by optical interconnects. The “Intelligent Connectivity as the Engine, Expanding Horizons Together”—AI Network Interconnection Ecosystem Forum will address AI clusters' need for high‑bandwidth, low‑latency, scalable, and operable interconnects in training and inference. It gathers infra providers, AI chip and network equipment vendors, cloud and photonic quantum computing players, and universities to build an open, compatible, efficient, and future‑ready AI interconnection ecosystem.

name: 启明创投·创业与投资论坛 从算力原点到应用落地的进化征程
nameEn: Qiming Venture Partners · Entrepreneurship and Investment Forum  From Silicon Origins to Real-World Implementation: An Evolutionary Odyssey
desc:
作为中国创业投资行业的深度参与者与技术变革的长期守望者，启明创投连续第四年亮相WAIC。本次论坛以“从算力原点到应用落地的进化征程”为主题，站在技术周期的关键转折点，深度剖析AI如何从底层的算力竞赛转向系统性的价值创造。
论坛将汇聚顶尖科学家、创新领袖与资深投资人，共同解码大模型时代的范式转移：探讨行业如何跨越单纯的参数追求，转向对实际场景、降本增效以及商业模式闭环的极致探索。
我们将继续发挥在“深科技”领域的深耕优势，通过高规格的对话与前瞻洞察，赋能创业者跨越技术与产业之间的鸿沟。在 AI 生产力爆发的新篇章中，与全球创新者共同见证人工智能从“技术理想”向“产业引擎”的终极进化。
descEn: A premier player in China’s VC landscape and a long-term observer of tech shifts, Qiming Venture Partners returns to WAIC for the fourth consecutive year. This year’s forum, “From Silicon Origins to Real-world Implementation: An Evolutionary Odyssey,” arrives at a pivotal moment in the tech cycle, examining AI’s shift from compute arms race to systemic value creation. The forum will bring together top scientists, entrepreneurs, and investors to decode the paradigm shift. Join us in witnessing AI’s transformation—from visionary ideal to industrial engine.

name: 人工智能赋能材料科学论坛
nameEn: AI for Materials Forum
desc: AI4S正在重塑材料发现与创制范式。面对材料空间组合爆炸、结构表征复杂、功能数据稀疏、实验验证成本高等挑战，聚焦“AI4Materials”，汇聚人工智能、材料、化学、机器人与产业界专家，围绕科学基座大模型、材料大模型、原子尺度模型、谱学多模态表征、谱-构-效关联、科研智能体和自主实验室等前沿方向展开交流。论坛将重点展示 AI 如何贯通知识获取、假设生成、材料设计、理论计算、机器实验与迭代优化，突破材料创制中的高维搜索、复杂表征、机理归因、可复现验证和跨尺度设计难题。旨在推动从算法创新迈向平台化、工程化和产业化应用，构建“数据-模型-实验-知识”闭环，加速未来产业升级和智能科研基础设施建设。
descEn: AI4S is reshaping materials discovery. Facing vast design spaces, complex characterization, sparse functional data and costly validation, this forum on “AI4Materials” brings together experts in AI, materials, chemistry, robotics and industry to discuss scientific foundation models, materials models, atomistic models, multimodal spectroscopy, structure–property relationships, research agents and autonomous labs. It will show how AI links knowledge, hypotheses, design, computation, robotic experiments and data feedback to enable platform-level, engineering-ready and industrial materials innovation.
