guestVisitList.name: 陈控
guestVisitList.introduce: 陈控，长期从事智能驱动的单原子催化剂设计与农业可持续发展研究，旨在提升农业原子经济性。2021年博士毕业于中国科学院分子植物科学卓越创新中心，2021年任瑞士日内瓦大学博士后研究员，2022年任北京大学现代农业研究院任副研究员，2023年至今任中国科学技术大学特任副研究员。他积极推动AI for Science在材料科学与农业科学的交叉研究，在国际上率先搭建单原子农业智能创新平台，构建了基于联邦机器学习的高隐私模型（FedLG）、基于双图的晶体性能预测模型（MGT），提出了人机协作的文献高性能挖掘方法。基于平台提出单原子农药、单原子植物调节剂等概念，搭建相关材料千吨级制备生产线，实现相关材料超1000万亩推广，相关产值超1亿元。相关成果被CCTV、光明日报、安徽卫视等媒体报道。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Kong Chen has long been engaged in research on intelligence-driven single-atom catalyst design and agricultural sustainability, with the aim of improving atomic economy in agriculture. He received his Ph.D. from the CAS Center for Excellence in Molecular Plant Sciences in 2021, served as a postdoctoral researcher at the University of Geneva, Switzerland, in 2021, joined the Institute of Advanced Agricultural Sciences at Peking University as an Associate Research Fellow in 2022, and has served as a Associate Research Fellow at the University of Science and Technology of China since 2023.
Kong Chen has actively promoted interdisciplinary research in AI for Science at the interface of materials science and agricultural science. He has pioneered the development of an intelligent innovation platform for single-atom agriculture, established a high-privacy model based on federated machine learning (FedLG), developed a dual-graph-based model for crystal property prediction (MGT), and proposed a human-in-the-loop approach for high-performance literature mining. Based on this platform, he proposed concepts such as single-atom pesticides and single-atom plant regulators, established kiloton-scale production lines for related materials, and achieved the application of these materials over more than 10 million mu of farmland, generating an output value exceeding RMB 100 million. His achievements have been reported by media outlets including CCTV, Guangming Daily, and Anhui TV.

guestVisitList.name: 管鹏飞
guestVisitList.introduce: 主要从事人工智能辅助材料多尺度计算方法、复杂环境下材料服役性能模拟与设计。面向先进材料物性微观机理研究与理论设计的需求，融合多学科交叉知识与方法，发展了人工智能辅助无序合金大尺度模拟与性能设计方法，成功研发了新型高性能材料。相关研究成果在Nature Mater.、Nature Commun.、Phys. Rev. Lett.、PNAS、Acta Mater.等发表SCI论文170余篇，总引用7000 余次；国际会议邀请报告20余次；主持科技创新2030重大项目、国家自然科学基金杰出青年科学基金、国际（地区）合作交流项目、国防基础科研核科学挑战专题等科研项目；现任中国材料研究学会计算材料分会委员、中国金属学会非晶合金及应用分会委员，担任《AI for Science》《National Science Open》《Materials Future》等期刊副主编/编委。

guestVisitList.name: 傅尧
guestVisitList.introduce: 傅尧，中国科学技术大学教授，国家杰青、长江学者特聘教授，长期从事物理有机和绿色化学基础和应用研究。围绕生物基新材料创制开展原始创新和技术攻关，运用理论与实验相结合的研究手段，发展绿色有机化学新反应和催化体系，成功应用于生物质催化转化制取新材料与化学品。曾获国家自然科学二等奖、安徽省自然科学一等奖、安徽省技术进步一等奖、科学探索奖、闵恩泽能源化工奖杰出贡献奖等奖项。

guestVisitList.name: 龚新高
guestVisitList.introduce: 龚新高，中国科学院院士、美国物理学会会士，计算凝聚态物理学家，长期从事理论计算方法、分子动力学、纳米体系物性、新型能源材料计算设计以及表面和界面结构与动力学性质研究。1993 年起在中国科学院固体物理研究所任研究员，2000 年起任复旦大学物理学系教授，2009 年创建计算物质科学教育部重点实验室并担任主任。其研究聚焦复杂物质体系的电子结构计算、低维结构模拟和能源材料理性设计，在光伏半导体、纳米结构和界面物理等方向取得系统性成果。近年来，龚新高院士积极推动人工智能与物质科学深度融合，关注机器学习力场、AI 物理和材料智能设计等新范式，为 AI for Materials 从计算预测走向智能创制提供重要理论基础和方法支撑。曾获国家自然科学二等奖、省部级自然科学一等奖等荣誉。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Xingao Gong is an Academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, a Fellow of the American Physical Society, and a computational condensed-matter physicist. His research focuses on theoretical and computational methods, molecular dynamics, physical properties of nanoscale systems, computational design of new energy materials, and the structural and dynamical properties of surfaces and interfaces. He became a Research Professor at the Institute of Solid State Physics, Chinese Academy of Sciences in 1993, joined the Department of Physics at Fudan University as Professor in 2000, and founded the Key Laboratory of Computational Physical Sciences, Ministry of Education in 2009, where he has served as Director. His work addresses electronic-structure calculations of complex materials systems, simulations of low-dimensional structures, and rational design of energy materials, with systematic contributions to photovoltaic semiconductors, nanostructures, and interface physics. In recent years, Professor Gong has actively promoted the integration of artificial intelligence with materials science, with particular attention to machine-learning force fields, AI physics, and intelligent materials design, providing important theoretical and methodological foundations for advancing AI for Materials from computational prediction to intelligent creation. He has received honors including the State Natural Science Award and provincial-level first prizes in natural science.

guestVisitList.name: 杨金龙
guestVisitList.introduce: 杨金龙，中国科学院院士，物理化学家，长期从事理论与计算化学研究。其研究聚焦第一性原理计算方法与模型的发展和应用，面向小分子、原子团簇、固体表面与界面、纳米体系等复杂体系的结构与性质开展系统研究，并注重理论计算与实验研究的交叉协同。曾任中国科学技术大学副校长，2025年6月任同济大学校长。曾获中国化学会青年化学奖、全国先进工作者、全国创新争先奖、福井奖章等荣誉。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jinlong Yang is an Academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and a physical chemist specializing in theoretical and computational chemistry. His research focuses on the development and application of first-principles methods and models to study the structures and properties of molecules, clusters, surfaces, interfaces, and nanoscale systems, with strong emphasis on integration between computation and experiment. He previously served as Vice President of the University of Science and Technology of China and became President of Tongji University in June 2025. He has received honors including the Chinese Chemical Society Young Chemist Award, the National Advanced Worker Award, the National Innovation Excellence Award, and the Fukui Medal.

guestVisitList.name: 江俊
guestVisitList.introduce: 江俊，中国科学技术大学讲席教授，精准智能化学全国重点实验室副主任，科学智能物质创制中心主任，主要从事理论化学、智能化学和数据驱动科学发现研究。其研究发展融合人工智能、大数据和量子化学的理论方法，聚焦复杂体系电子运动模拟及其在能源催化、功能材料、光化学和谱学等领域的应用。江俊团队提出并推进“机器化学家”研究方向，构建融合计算、实验、机器人自动化和 AI 的自主化学实验平台，并在利用火星陨石智能创制产氧催化剂等工作中展示了 AI 与自动化实验结合的新范式。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jun Jiang is a Chair Professor at the University of Science and Technology of China, Deputy Director of the State Key Laboratory of Precision and Intelligent Chemistry, and Director of the Center for Scientific Intelligence and Intelligent Materials Creation. His research focuses on theoretical chemistry, intelligent chemistry, and data-driven scientific discovery. He develops theoretical methods that integrate artificial intelligence, big data, and quantum chemistry, with a focus on simulating electronic dynamics in complex systems and applying these methods to energy catalysis, functional materials, photochemistry, and spectroscopy. Professor Jiang’s team proposed and has advanced the research direction of the “robotic AI chemist,” building autonomous chemistry laboratories that integrate computation, experimentation, robotic automation, and AI. Their work, including the intelligent creation of oxygen-evolution catalysts from Martian meteorites, has demonstrated a new paradigm that combines AI with automated experimentation.

guestVisitList.name: 曾大军
guestVisitList.introduce: 曾大军，中国科学院自动化研究所副所长，研究员，主要从事决策智能、社会计算及安全信息学等领域的研究。其带领团队研发的“磐石·科学基础大模型”是我国自主研发的国家级科学 AI 基座，打通多学科知识与科研数据，重塑科研范式、大幅提升基础研究效率，实现从传统科研向智能科研的跨越。同时其他项目成果获得北京市科技进步二等奖、复旦管理学杰出贡献奖等十余项省部级科技奖励。

guestVisitList.name: 叶盛
guestVisitList.introduce: 叶盛，中国科学院百篇优秀博士学位论文获得者，现任中国科学技术大学科学智能物质创制中心生物智造部部长、安徽大学人工智能学院教授。长期从事人工智能、量子化学、分子光谱与结构生物学交叉研究，聚焦生命分子结构与功能关系这一核心科学问题，发展融合量子化学与人工智能的蛋白质光谱模拟、动态结构解析、功能机制研究及智能设计理论与计算方法，并开展基于物理“谱–构–效”关系的多功能蛋白逆向设计研究。相关成果发表于PNAS、Journal of the American Chemical Society、National Science Review等国际学术期刊，并获《Science》等期刊专题评述。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Sheng Ye is a recipient of the Chinese Academy of Sciences Outstanding Doctoral Dissertation Award and currently serves as Director of the Biological Intelligence Manufacturing Division at the Center for Scientific Intelligence Innovation, University of Science and Technology of China, and Professor at the School of Artificial Intelligence, Anhui University. His research lies at the intersection of artificial intelligence, quantum chemistry, molecular spectroscopy, and structural biology, focusing on the fundamental relationships between biomolecular structure and function. He develops theoretical and computational approaches that integrate quantum chemistry and artificial intelligence for protein spectroscopy simulation, dynamic structure prediction, functional mechanism analysis, and intelligent biomolecular design. His current research also includes the inverse design of multifunctional proteins based on physical spectrum–structure–function relationships. His work has been published in leading journals including PNAS, Journal of the American Chemical Society, and National Science Review, and has been highlighted by Science.

guestVisitList.name: 刘淼
guestVisitList.introduce: 刘淼，现任中国科学院物理研究所、东莞材料科学与技术研究所研究员、博士生导师，曾为国际知名材料数据库Materials Project核心开发人员。长期深耕材料大数据与人工智能交叉研究领域，专注于高通量第一性原理计算技术研发，搭建行业顶尖材料科学数据库体系，推动海量科研数据与人工智能工具在材料科学领域的落地应用。其主导创建的Atomly.net材料科学数据库，是全球数据体量与数据质量顶尖的材料数据库之一；自主研发的matchat材料科学智能体，深度融合28万篇领域专业论文知识，实现材料领域智能化研究突破。他始终致力于构建人工智能赋能材料科学的全新研究范式，为新材料智能筛选、预测与创制提供核心数据支撑与技术方法。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Miao Liu is currently a  Professor t the Institute of Physics, Chinese Academy of Sciences and Dongguan Institute of Materials Science and Technology. He was one of the core developers of the renowned Materials Project. He has long been dedicated to the interdisciplinary research of big data and artificial intelligence in materials science. He has developed high-throughput first-principles calculations to build top-tier industrial databases for the field, making massive scientific data and artificial intelligence tools accessible to researchers. The Atomly.net materials science database founded by him ranks among the world’s best databases in terms of data quality and quantity. The Matchat materials science intelligent agent developed by his team integrates knowledge from 280,000 professional academic papers. Committed to building a new research paradigm of artificial intelligence-enabled materials science, he provides core data support and technical methods for the intelligent screening, prediction and creation of new materials.

guestVisitList.name: 汪军
guestVisitList.introduce: 汪军，伦敦大学学院计算机科学系讲席教授、信息与数据科学教授，英国艾伦·图灵研究所 Turing Fellow。其主要研究方向包括人工智能与智能系统、多智能体强化学习、深度生成模型、信息检索、推荐系统、个性化、数据挖掘、智慧城市、智能体规划和计算广告等。汪军教授获荷兰代尔夫特理工大学博士学位、新加坡国立大学硕士学位、东南大学学士学位；曾创立 UCL MSc Web Science and Big Data Analytics 项目，并联合创办 UCL 衍生企业 MediaGamma，担任联合创始人兼首席科学家，推动强化学习和数据智能在智能受众决策等产业场景中的应用。其团队曾获全球实时竞价算法竞赛冠军，并曾获 Microsoft Research “Beyond Search: Semantic Computing and Internet Economics” 奖、Yahoo! Faculty Research and Engagement Program 奖等荣誉。其在多智能体学习、强化学习和真实场景决策优化方面的研究，可为 AI for Materials 中的科研智能体、自主实验室调度、实验策略优化和 Research-as-a-Service 模式提供重要方法支撑。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jun Wang is Chair Professor of Computer Science and Professor of Information and Data Science at University College London, and a Turing Fellow of The Alan Turing Institute. His research focuses on artificial intelligence and intelligent systems, including multi-agent reinforcement learning, deep generative models, information retrieval, recommender systems, personalization, data mining, smart cities, agent planning, and computational advertising. He received his Ph.D. from Delft University of Technology, his M.Sc. from the National University of Singapore, and his bachelor’s degree from Southeast University. He was the founding director of UCL’s MSc Web Science and Big Data Analytics programme, and co-founded MediaGamma, a UCL spin-out where he served as Co-founder and Chief Scientist, applying reinforcement learning and data intelligence to intelligent audience decision-making in industry. His team won the first global real-time bidding algorithm competition, and he has received awards including Microsoft Research’s “Beyond Search: Semantic Computing and Internet Economics” award and the Yahoo! Faculty Research and Engagement Program award. His expertise in multi-agent learning, reinforcement learning, and real-world decision optimization provides important methodological support for research agents, autonomous laboratory scheduling, experimental strategy optimization, and Research-as-a-Service in AI for Materials.

guestVisitList.name: 陈立东
guestVisitList.introduce: 陈立东，中国科学院院士，材料物理专家，长期从事热电材料与器件技术研究。围绕高性能热电材料与器件的关键科学问题，他系统研究电热输运机理、材料可控制备和性能调控，提出通过多尺度微结构设计实现电子与声子输运协同调控的学术思想。其团队发展的高性能热电材料与热电转换技术已面向热电制冷与温控、热能高效回收、空间科学等领域开展应用。现任《npj Computational Materials》联合主编。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Lidong Chen is an Academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and an expert in materials physics, with a long-standing focus on thermoelectric materials and device technologies. His research addresses key scientific issues in high-performance thermoelectric materials, including electro-thermal transport mechanisms, controllable synthesis, and property optimization. He proposed multi-scale microstructural design strategies to synergistically regulate electron and phonon transport. Technologies developed by his group have been applied to thermoelectric cooling, thermal management, waste-heat recovery, and space-related applications. He also serves as a Co-Editor-in-Chief of npj Computational Materials.

guestVisitList.name: 刘建军
guestVisitList.introduce: 刘建军，中国科学院上海硅酸盐研究所研究员，中科院杰出人才与上海市东方英才（领军人才）的获得者。主要从事计算电化学与材料人工智能技术开发应用。在Sci Adv, Nature Commun, J Am Chem Soc, Angew Chem Int Ed, Adv Mater等发表论文300余篇。应邀担任2部英文书籍主编。主持国家科技部重点研发课题、国家自然科学基金重点项目、上海市科委重点项目、中科院重点部署项目等。现担任中国材料研究会材料基因组分会委员、中国化学学会的能源化学分会委员、中国材料学会的先进无机材料分会委员，以及npj Computational Materials、AI Agent等杂志的副主编。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Jianjun Liu is a Professor at the Shanghai Institute of Ceramics, Chinese Academy of Sciences (SICCAS). He has been honored as an Outstanding Talent of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and a Shanghai Oriental Talent (Leading Talent). His research primarily focuses on computational electrochemistry and the development and application of artificial intelligence in materials science. He has published over 300 papers in prestigious journals, including Science Advances, Nature Communications, Journal of the American Chemical Society, and Advanced Materials. Additionally, he has served as the editor-in-chief for two English-language books. Professor Liu has presided over numerous key research projects, including those funded by the National Key R&D Program of China, the National Natural Science Foundation of China (Key Program), the Shanghai Municipal Science and Technology Commission (Key Program), and the Key Deployment Program of the Chinese Academy of Sciences. He currently serves as a committee member of the Materials Genome Branch of the Chinese Materials Research Society, the Energy Chemistry Branch of the Chinese Chemical Society, and the Advanced Inorganic Materials Branch of the Chinese Materials Research Society. He also holds the position of Associate Editor for several journals, including npj Computational Materials and AI Agent.

desc: 论坛聚焦AI和无线电技术的融合创新，联合行业大咖和政产学研用各方专家探讨在AI技术大爆发背景下无线行业面临的机遇和挑战，分享行业相关前沿科研成果和实践经验。
descEn: The forum focuses on the convergence and innovation of AI and radio technology. It brings together industry leaders and experts from government, academia, research, and industry to explore the opportunities and challenges facing the wireless sector amid the AI boom. Participants will share cutting-edge scientific achievements and practical insights in the field.

name: 人工智能与能源双向赋能论坛
nameEn: Sub-forum “Mutual Empowerment of AI and Energy”
desc:
由国家能源局主办、国家电网有限公司协办的2026世界人工智能大会“人工智能与能源双向赋能”分论坛，将于2026年7月17日在上海世博中心举行。论坛汇聚政府部门、院士专家、能源与互联网龙头企业、高校及研究机构代表，搭建政产学研用深度对话平台。论坛以“双向赋能促发展，智联能源创未来”为主题，设领导致辞、主旨演讲、专题报告和圆桌对话等环节，聚焦算力设施安全可靠能源供给、全球数据中心绿色低碳转型、算力与电力高效协同、人工智能重构能源科研等方向，分享国内外的成功经验与创新实践。
论坛旨在展现中国人工智能与能源双向赋能融合发展的成效，探讨能源变革趋势与前沿技术迭代路径，共促全球能源与人工智能高质量发展。
descEn:
The 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference Sub-forum “Mutual Empowerment of AI and Energy” will be hosted by China's National Energy Administration and co-organized by State Grid Corporation of China at the Shanghai Expo Centre on July 17, 2026.
Centered on the theme "Mutual Empowerment Drives Development, Smart Energy Powers the Future", the forum provides a high-level platform for cross-sector dialogue featuring opening remarks, keynote speeches, special reports and roundtable dialogues. The sessions will focus on such areas as securing reliable energy supply for large-scale computing infrastructure, driving the green and low-carbon transition of global data centers, advancing the efficient coordination between computing power and electric power, and reshaping energy research through AI. This forum serves as a key platform to showcase landmark practices, explore cutting-edge technological paradigms, and jointly advance the high-quality development of global energy and AI.

name: 荣耀·从数字屏幕到具身智能 物理世界新范式论坛
nameEn: Beyond the Screen: Embodied AI and the New Paradigm for the Physical World
desc:
终端边界持续消融，数字与物理世界的隔阂逐步消解，人工智能迎来从 “数字大脑” 迈向 “具身载体” 的范式变革。秉持“以智慧启迪人类潜能”的 AHI（Augmented Human Intelligence） 理念，论坛汇聚全球顶尖学者、技术领军人物与产业先行者，聚焦两大议题：一是探讨 AI 从“模型”向“系统“的跃迁，演进为“伙伴型智能体操作系统”的技术路径；二是共同谋划 AI如何跨越屏幕桎梏，进入物理世界实现具身觉醒，开启多模态具身交互的新时代。
从刷新人类半马纪录的机器人“闪电”，到重塑移动终端新物种 Robot Phone，荣耀诚邀各界伙伴共建以人为本、人机协同共生的 AHI 新生态。
descEn:
With device lines blurring and the digital-physical divide dissolving, AI is undergoing a paradigm shift from abstract digital brains to tangible embodied forms. Steered by Honor’s AHI (Augmented Human Intelligence) vision — “Unleash human potential through intelligence” — this forum brings together elite global academics, tech stalwarts and industry innovators to center on two core priorities: 1. Mapping the technical evolution of AI from standalone models to holistic systems, ultimately maturing into a partner-driven agentic OS; 2. Forging pathways for AI to break free from screen constraints, enter the physical world via embodied intelligence, and pioneer a new age of multimodal embodied interaction.
From the half-marathon record-setting humanoid robot to Robot Phone, the groundbreaking new mobile device category, Honor welcomes cross-industry partners to co-create a human-centric AHI ecosystem rooted in seamless human-machine synergy.

guestVisitList.name: 李健
guestVisitList.introduce: 李健，男，1973年生，毕业于西安电子科技大学通信工程学院信息工程专业（1992级本科、1998级硕士），现任荣耀终端股份有限公司CEO。 2001年加入华为，历任尼日利亚代表处代表、西非地区部总裁、东北欧地区部总裁、人力资源委员会成员、美洲片区总裁、欧洲片区总裁等职，在尼日利亚工作期间实现销售额连续四年全球第一。2017年起进入华为监事会，担任干部管理团队成员、ICT基础设施业务管理委员会成员。2021年加入新荣耀，任董事、副董事长、人力资源部总裁等职。2025年1月17日接任CEO后，于3月MWC 2025发布“阿尔法战略”，提出五年投入超100亿美元建设AI终端生态。同年5月28日在荣耀400系列新品发布会上宣布启动“全球百万雄鹰计划”，招募技术专家、销售精英及用户体验官，推动荣耀向AI终端生态公司转型。2025年9月30日，荣耀阿尔法全球旗舰店在深圳湾万象城开业，李健在开业致辞中强调阿尔法战略愿景。2026年3月，在MWC 2026上，荣耀机器人手机Robot Phone亮相，李健提出AHI理念，让AI既有IQ又有EQ，并发布具身智能人形机器人，标志着荣耀成为全球首家入局消费市场人形机器人的手机公司。2026年，李健透露荣耀将考虑在国内市场推出子品牌，并计划机器人手机于下半年上市。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Jian Li, male, born in 1973, graduated from the School of Telecommunications Engineering at Xidian University, where he earned his bachelor’s degree in Information Engineering in 1996 and his master’s degree in 1998. He currently serves as CEO of Honor Device Co., Ltd.
He joined Huawei in 2001, holding positions including Representative of the Nigeria Office, President of the West Africa Region, President of the Northeast Europe Region, member of the Human Resources Committee, President of the Americas Region, and President of the Europe Region. During his tenure in Nigeria, he achieved four consecutive years of global sales leadership. In 2017, he became a member of Huawei’s Supervisory Board, serving on the Executive Management Team and the ICT Infrastructure Business Management Committee.
In 2021, he joined the newly independent Honor, serving as Director, Vice Chairman, and President of the Human Resources Department. On January 17, 2025, he assumed the role of CEO. In March 2025, he unveiled the “Alpha Strategy” at MWC 2025, committing over $10 billion in five years to build an AI terminal ecosystem. On May 28, 2025, at the Honor 400 Series launch event, he announced the “Global Million Eagle Program” to recruit technical experts, sales talent, and user experience officers, driving Honor’s transformation into an AI terminal ecosystem company. On September 30, 2025, the Honor Alpha Global Flagship Store opened in Shenzhen Bay Mixc, where Li emphasized the Alpha Strategy vision in his opening remarks.
In March 2026, at MWC 2026, Honor unveiled its Robot Phone. Li introduced the AHI (Artificial Human Intelligence) concept, emphasizing AI with both IQ and EQ, and released an embodied AI humanoid robot, marking Honor as the world’s first smartphone company to enter the consumer humanoid robot market. In 2026, Li disclosed that Honor is considering launching a sub-brand in the domestic market and plans to bring the robot phone to market in the second half of the year.

name: 润建股份·算电协同×Token工厂 东盟绿色智算与AI创新生态论坛
nameEn: Computing-Energy Synergy × Token Factory  ASEAN Green Intelligent Computing and AI Innovation Ecosystem Conference
desc: 绿色算力已从行业可选项转为发展必选项，是国家算电协同与产业可持续发展核心议题，抢先实现绿色算力、Token 商业化双向突破，才能把握新一代 AI 基建竞争优势。此背景下，2026 世界人工智能大会上，润建股份主办“算电协同x Token工厂”东盟绿色智算与AI创新生态大会。大会汇聚全球 AI 专家与行业领袖，通过趋势分享、政策解读、圆桌对话，全面展示广西“绿电 + 算力 + 东盟通道”核心优势，聚合产业生态；联动政产学研及东盟合作伙伴，破解绿色算力标准、Token 商业化落地、跨境项目落地等行业难题，探索中国 — 东盟数字合作全新范式。
descEn: Green computing has evolved from an optional industrial choice to an indispensable development priority, a core agenda for China’s coordinated computing-power development and sustainable industrial growth. Against this backdrop, Runjian Co., Ltd. hosts the ASEAN Green Intelligent Computing & AI Innovation Ecosystem Conference themed Computing-Power Coordination × Token Factory at the 2026 WAIC. The summit convenes global AI experts and industry leaders for trend sharing, policy interpretation and roundtable dialogues. It fully showcases Guangxi’s unique strengths of green power, computing capacity and ASEAN digital corridors to integrate the whole industrial ecosystem. By uniting governments, universities, research institutes and ASEAN partners, the conference addresses major industry pain points including green computing standards, Token commercial implementation and cross-border project landing, and explores an innovative new model for China-ASEAN digital cooperation.

name: 上海市节能中心·人工智能与产业绿色低碳转型创新发展论坛
nameEn: “AI + Green and Low-Carbon Transformation” Innovation and Development Forum
desc: 2026年是“十五五”开局之年，也是能耗双控向碳排放双控全面转型的关键期。能碳数据的可信、安全与互认已成为国际竞争的战略刚需。人工智能技术的爆发式发展，为能碳数智化管理、产业绿色化升级提供了全新范式。国家“十五五”绿色制造新规明确动态退出、细分标准扩容等改革方向，上海正加速构建绿色低碳智能体集群。本论坛聚焦AI赋能产业绿色化与绿色产业化双向跃迁，推动数智向绿、绿智协同。
descEn: The 2026 WAIC "AI+Green Low-Carbon Transformation" Forum, themed "Smart Energy & Carbon, Green New Journey," will bring together global experts, industry leaders, and policymakers to explore AI-driven pathways for smart energy-carbon management and industrial green upgrading. The Forum will unveil Shanghai’s "AI+Intelligent Energy and Carbon Spatial Core Platform," focusing on green manufacturing agents, showcasing their latest achievements in energy saving, carbon reduction, and investment attraction, and host a signing ceremony for the AI+Green Manufacturing Innovation Ecosystem. Committed to turning "digital intelligence computing power" into "green potential," the Forum aims to foster bidirectional empowerment between AI and green transformation, contributing solutions to address international green trade barriers and achieve carbon peak and neutrality.

name: 思朗科技·超智融合驱动AI4S发展论坛
nameEn: Supercomputing-AI Integration for AI4S Development Forum
desc: 本次论坛是国内首个聚焦“超智融合算力驱动科学智能落地”的高端行业峰会，致力于搭建从技术突破到产业成果的全链条对接平台，率先推动超智融合成果在科学智能核心领域实现规模化应用，引领我国科学智能产业迈向自主可控、融合协同的新阶段。本次大会具有鲜明的开创性与标杆意义。大会将构建一个政、产、学、研、用、资六位一体的高端对话平台，通过前沿技术研讨、标杆案例发布、产业资源对接，打造国内AI4S领域国产算力产业链协同交流的核心发声舞台，立足行业发展痛点与产业化实际需求，加速自主可控算力技术深度赋能科学智能产业应用。
descEn: This forum is China's first high-end summit dedicated to "AI for Science (AI4S) implementation driven by supercomputing-AI integrated computing power." It aims to bridge technological breakthroughs and industrial applications, drive large-scale deployment of integrated computing power in core AI4S fields, and lead China's AI4S industry toward an independent, collaborative future. The forum serves as a pioneering platform for government, industry, academia, research, application, and capital. Through technology discussions, benchmark case releases, and resource matchmaking, it accelerates the empowerment of AI4S industrial applications with indigenous computing power.

guestVisitList.name: 张涛
guestVisitList.introduce:
张涛，男，汉族，1963年生于陕西省。中共党员，理学博士，研究员，博士生导师。2007年2月至2017年3月任中国科学院大连化学物理研究所所长。2016年12月至2023年9月任中国科学院副院长。2013年当选为中国科学院院士。,2018年当选发展中国家院士，2020年当选为加拿大工程院国际院士。第十四届全国人大常委会委员、第十四届全国人大环境与资源保护委员会委员。

张涛院士长期从事工业催化的研究，负责研制的新型催化剂应用于我国航天、航空、石油化工领域，三次获国家技术发明奖二等奖。近期主要从事航天无毒推进剂催化分解技术、环保催化及催化新材料等方面的研究。已培养毕业研究生一百余人，发表论文450余篇（SCI收录），申请发明专利一百余件（国际专利20余件）。张涛院士曾经和正在担任的主要学术兼职有：973项目首席科学家，国家863计划专题专家组副组长，中国空间科学学会副理事长，中国石油学会副理事长，英国皇家化学学会会士，中国化学会催化委员会委员。担任《催化学报》共同主编以及Green Chemistry, Industrial & Engineering Chemistry Research, ACS Sustainable Chemistry & Engineering, ChemPhysChem, Applied Catalysis B: Environmental等多个国际期刊的编委或顾问编委。

张涛院士曾被国家人事部和国防科工委授予“全国国防科技先进工作者”称号，获中国科学院“参加载人航天工程突出贡献者”称号，是“首批新世纪百千万人才工程国家级人选”。2003年获国家自然科学杰出青年基金，2008年获中国催化青年奖，2009年获“全国五一劳动奖章”和周光召基金会“应用科学奖”，2010年所带领团队曾获中国科学院杰出科技成就奖，2016年获何梁何利科学技术奖。2018年获首届“中国科学材料 创新奖，2023年获中国化学会-中国石油化工股份有限公司化学贡献奖，2023获亚太催化成就奖。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Zhang Tao, male, of Han ethnicity, was born in Shaanxi Province in 1963. He is a member of the Communist Party of China, holds a Doctor of Science degree, and serves as a research fellow and doctoral supervisor. He served as Director of the Dalian Institute of Chemical Physics, Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS) from February 2007 to March 2017, and as Vice President of CAS from December 2016 to September 2023. He was elected an Academician of the Chinese Academy of Sciences in 2013, a Fellow of The World Academy of Sciences (TWAS) for the developing world in 2018, and an International Fellow of the Canadian Academy of Engineering in 2020. He currently serves as a member of the Standing Committee of the 14th National People's Congress and a member of the Environment Protection and Resources Conservation Committee of the 14th National People's Congress.

Academician Zhang Tao has long been engaged in research on industrial catalysis. The novel catalysts he led in developing have been applied in China's aerospace, aviation, and petrochemical sectors, earning him three Second-Class Prizes of the National Technological Invention Award. In recent years, his research has focused primarily on catalytic decomposition technologies for non-toxic aerospace propellants, environmental catalysis, and novel catalytic materials. He has supervised over one hundred graduate students to graduation, published more than 450 papers (indexed by SCI), and filed over one hundred invention patents (including more than 20 international patents). His current and past major academic appointments include: Chief Scientist of the National Basic Research Program (973 Program), Deputy Leader of the Expert Panel for the National High-Tech R&D Program (863 Program), Vice President of the Chinese Society of Space Science, Vice President of the Chinese Petroleum Society, Fellow of the Royal Society of Chemistry (UK), and member of the Catalysis Committee of the Chinese Chemical Society. He serves as Co-Editor-in-Chief of the Chinese Journal of Catalysis and as an editorial board member or advisory board member for multiple international journals, including Green Chemistry, Industrial & Engineering Chemistry Research, ACS Sustainable Chemistry & Engineering, ChemPhysChem, and Applied Catalysis B: Environmental.

Academician Zhang Tao has been conferred the title of "National Advanced Worker in Defense Science and Technology" by the Ministry of Personnel and the Commission of Science, Technology and Industry for National Defense, and the title of "Outstanding Contributor to the Manned Spaceflight Program" by CAS. He was selected among the first cohort of the National Hundred, Thousand, and Ten Thousand Talents Project. He received the National Natural Science Foundation's Distinguished Young Scholar Fund in 2003, the Chinese Catalysis Young Scholar Award in 2008, the National May 1st Labor Medal and the Zhou Guangzhao Foundation Award for Applied Science in 2009. The team he led received the CAS Outstanding Scientific and Technological Achievement Award in 2010. He was awarded the Ho Leung Ho Lee Foundation Prize for Scientific and Technological Progress in 2016, the inaugural Science China Materials Innovation Award in 2018, the Chinese Chemical Society–Sinopec Chemistry Contribution Award in 2023, and the Asia-Pacific Catalysis Achievement Award in 2023.

name: 燧原科技·构建协同创新的Token经济芯生态论坛
nameEn: Enflame Technology: A Collaborative Chip Ecosystem for the Token Economy
desc: 本次论坛由上海市工商联人工智能专委会主办，上海燧原科技股份有限公司承办，将邀请业内知名院士专家、行业主管部门、产业链龙头企业、一线创新者，以及头部产业资本等共计500位嘉宾，以token经济下的协同创新为主线，凝聚发展共识，切实推进合作。论坛将包含大咖分享、合作签约、创新展示、圆桌交流等环节，串联起半导体、数据中心系统、AI应用生态三大产业链飞轮，呈现以客户需求为导向，以芯片设计为牵引，携手软件、硬件、制造、装备等上下游合作伙伴所共同实现的创新成果。聚焦token经济蓬勃发展态势，共同探讨中国AI发展对算力的需求痛点、技术创新与趋势畅想。
descEn: Hosted by the AI Committee of the Shanghai Federation of Industry and Commerce and organized by Shanghai Enflame Technology, this forum convenes 500 industry leaders, academicians, and innovators. Centered on the "Token Economy," the event aims to foster collaboration across the semiconductor, data center, and AI application flywheels. Through keynotes and roundtables, it will showcase customer-driven innovations and address critical computing power demands shaping the future of China's AI landscape.

name: 物理智能创新生态论坛
nameEn: Physical Intelligence Innovation Ecosystem Forum
desc: 当前，人工智能正经历从数字世界走向物理世界的决定性跨越。物理AI作为连接虚拟仿真、基础模型、终端硬件与真实场景的关键技术，正成为赋能实体经济、培育未来产业的重要基础能力。由飞捷科思智能科技（上海）有限公司发起的“2026 WAIC中国物理智能产业发展论坛”，将汇聚物理 AI 领域的顶尖高校、科研机构、领军企业与行业伙伴等，通过打造高水平学术交流、标准评测与产学研协同创新平台，推动物理AI关键技术从单点突破走向系统协同，从企业创新走向行业共建，加速科研成果与产业需求精准对接，推动校企合作与人才流动，助力构建自主可控、规范发展的中国物理智能创新生态，推动物理AI前沿技术加速落地应用。
descEn: Artificial intelligence is making a decisive leap from the digital to the physical world. As the key technology bridging virtual simulation, foundation models, terminal hardware, and real-world applications, Physical AI is becoming a foundational driver of the real economy and future industries. Hosted by Fysics Intelligent Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., the "2026 WAIC China Physical AI Industry Development Forum" will convene leading universities, research institutions, pioneering enterprises, and industry partners. Through high-level academic exchange, standardized evaluation, and industry-university-research collaboration, the forum aims to advance Physical AI from isolated breakthroughs to systemic collaboration, and from corporate innovation to industry-wide co-creation — accelerating research-to-market alignment, fostering talent mobility, and helping build a self-reliant, well-regulated Physical AI innovation ecosystem in China.

name: 西部数据·面向AI时代的数据存储架构创新论坛
nameEn: Data Storage Architecture Innovation for the AI Era Forum
desc: 在算力成为焦点的同时，作为底座的存储如何实现协同演进？我们将汇聚从存储、算力、安全到行业应用的全产业链代表，通过务实的产业对话，为AI基础设施的协同建设提供可参考的实践路径。
descEn: While compute power has taken center stage, how can storage — the foundation — evolve in synergy with it? We bring together representatives from the entire AI industry chain — storage, compute, security, and industry applications — to engage in pragmatic industry dialogue, delivering actionable and referenceable pathways for the collaborative development of AI infrastructure.

name: 先进计算网络与算电协同论坛
nameEn: Advanced Computing Network & Compute-Electricity Synergy
desc:
论坛由院士领衔，围绕新一代人工智能基础设施这一战略命题，汇聚鹏城国家实验室、怀柔国家实验室、北京智源人工智能研究院、中国移动等政产学研顶尖力量，从Z级算力、P级光网络、GW级电力三大维度展开深度研讨。
议题涵盖算网融合、众智计算、算电协同、Token经济、世界模型等前沿热点。论坛将发布百T千公里新型光纤直连验证平台、驭算WSF平台、中科类脑算电OS三大年度重磅成果，并签署先进网络内蒙古科技合作、国产生态联盟、"一带一路"Token出海联盟等战略合作协议，直面AI基础设施的核心挑战与破解路径，完整呈现从技术攻关到商业落地的全链路实践。
descEn:
Hosted by Pengcheng National Laboratory, co-organized by Yusuan Intelligence and Hefei Zhongke Leibao. Led by prominent academicians, the forum convenes Pengcheng Lab, Huairou National Lab, BAAI, China Mobile, and other top institutions. Discussions span Z-scale computing, P-band optical networks, and GW-level grids, covering computing-network convergence, crowd-sourced computing, computing-electricity synergy, the Token economy, and world models.
The forum will unveil three landmark achievements: a 100T/1000km fiber-optic verification platform, the Yusuan WSF (World State Foundry), and the Zhongke Leibao Computing-Electricity OS. Strategic agreements will be signed for the Inner Mongolia Research Institute, a domestic ecosystem alliance, and the Belt & Road Token Go-Global Alliance—presenting a full chain from R&D breakthroughs to commercial deployment.

name: 芯鑫租赁·芯智相融 AI启未来产融生态合作论坛
nameEn: Chip & Intelligence Integrated, AI Powers the Future Forum
desc: 本届论坛以“芯智相融 AI启未来”为主题，由国内唯一专注服务集成电路等战略性新兴产业的综合金融服务平台芯鑫租赁主办。论坛定位为“产融生态合作”，已知邀请到会的部分企业包括：沄柏资本、上国投先导基金、孚腾资本、天数智芯、阶跃星辰、千里科技、苏度科技、财跃星辰等。此外、招银金租、上海越秀租赁、张江租赁、基石国际租赁等多家租赁同业嘉宾也将到场参会。本次论坛上，芯鑫租赁还将安排一系列跨界合作签约仪式，并与财跃星辰联合发布一款刚刚上线的金融垂类智能体新品“小财芯”V1.0。
descEn:
Hosted by SEMI-TECH LEASING, China’s sole comprehensive financial service platform focusing exclusively on integrated circuits and other strategic emerging industries, this forum carries the theme “Integration of Chips and Intelligence, AI Lights Up the Future”. Positioned as an industrial-financial ecological cooperation event, it will welcome participating enterprises including Yunbai Capital, Futeng Capital, Tianshu Zhixin, Aixin Yuanzhi, Stepfun, Qianli Technology and Caiyue Star. In addition, peer leasing firms such as China Merchants Bank Financial Leasing and Zhangjiang Leasing will join panel discussions.
Multiple cross-industry cooperation signing ceremonies will be arranged on-site. SEMI-TECH LEASING will also jointly release the newly launched vertical financial AI Agent “Xiao Caixin” V1.0 together with Caiyue Star.

guestVisitList.name: 章锟
guestVisitList.introduce:
章锟先生负责孚腾资本整体投资管理工作，在管基金规模超440 亿元，管理包括的直投基金包括:临转院一期、科技成长一期、孚腾沪明基金、上海集成电路装备并购基金、交大基金、元创基金、大模型基金、具身基金等。母基金及S基金包括:上海国资母基金、S基金一期。
章锟先生领导投资的项目包括：曦智科技、盛合晶微、沐曦、稀宇科技（MiniMax）、阶跃星辰、智元机器人等人工智能产业链上下游企业，以及奕斯伟材料、爱士惟、积塔半导体等先进制造企业。并拓展与长鑫、中际旭创、中微、芯联集成、商汤科技、哔哩哔哩（B站）等产业方建立多维度生态合作。
加入孚腾前，章锟先生曾任国开金融旗下国创中鼎基金董事总经理/投委会委员、美国普凯投资董事总经理/投委会委员等相关工作。
章锟先生拥有上海外国语大学学士学位，美国西北大学凯洛格商学院MBA学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Mr. Zhang Kun oversees the overall investment management of Futeng Capital, with assets under management (AUM) exceeding RMB 44 billion. His portfolio of direct investment funds comprises: Linzhuan Phase I Fund, Tech Growth Phase I Fund, Futeng Huming Fund, Shanghai Integrated Circuit Equipment M&A Fund, Jiaotong University Fund, Yuanchuang Fund, Large Model Fund, Embodied Intelligence Fund, etc.
His fund-of-funds (FoF) and secondary market (S) funds include: Shanghai State-owned Capital FoF, Secondary Fund Phase I.
Mr. Zhang Kun has led investments in enterprises covering the upstream and downstream industrial chains of artificial intelligence, including Xizhi Technology, Shenghe Jingwei, Muxi, MiniMax, StepVerse, AgiBot, as well as advanced manufacturing enterprises such as ESWIN Materials, Astronergy, Jita Semiconductor. He has also established multi-dimensional ecological partnerships with industrial players including ChangXin Memory Technologies, Zhongji Innolight, Advanced Micro-Fabrication Equipment Inc., Chipjoin Integration, SenseTime, and Bilibili (B 站).
Prior to joining Futeng Capital, Mr. Zhang Kun held senior roles including Managing Director and Investment Committee Member at Guochuang Zhongding Fund under China Development Bank Capital, as well as Managing Director and Investment Committee Member at Prax Capital, a U.S.-based investment firm.
Mr. Zhang Kun holds a Bachelor’s degree from Shanghai International Studies University and an MBA from Kellogg School of Management, Northwestern University, United States.

guestVisitList.name: 贾宝龙
guestVisitList.introduce: 主导发布财跃 F1——国内首个千亿参数多模态金融大模型，基于万亿级金融语料预训练。覆盖智能投研、投顾、风控、营销等全金融场景，已完成生成式AI及深度合成算法备案。联合国泰君安等头部券商落地证券垂类大模型，首创大模型融入客户数字化服务体系，引入前微软全球副总裁姜大昕担任首席科学家，组建金融+AI顶尖团队。

guestVisitList.name: 茹彬鑫
guestVisitList.introduce:
个人介绍：茹彬鑫博士，识渊科技联合创始人兼首席技术官，深圳清华大学研究院智能工业视觉研发中心主任，2026上海青年科技创业人物。本硕博均毕业于英国牛津大学，本硕以全系第一毕业于工程专业，博士攻读人工智能专业，在全球人工智能顶级学术会议累计发表 30 余篇论文（h-index 17）。曾在在华为诺亚方舟实验室和 Google X 有丰富 AI 研发经验, 并曾入选华为天才少年计划。
公司介绍：识渊科技致力于用前沿AI技术定义智能化时代的先进制造新范式，实现对海外自动化设备巨头的超越与颠覆。公司目前聚焦泛半导体领域，基于自研的行业视觉大模型和智能体系统,成功打造多款全球首创的具身智能质检专机,完美攻克行业长期痛点：大幅提升检测性能的同时，将换线效率提升百倍并摆脱对专业操作员的依赖。 该类产品已批量落地近200家客户，涵盖航空航天到汽车电子，并入选2025年上海市“AI+制造”智能产品推广目录。公司曾荣获2023年全国人工智能应用场景挑战赛一等奖，2023年WAIC蓝鼎奖和2025年“创·在上海”国际创新创业大赛初创组第一名。

guestVisitList.name: 徐磊
guestVisitList.introduce: 徐磊现任上海越秀融资租赁董事、副总经理，兼任江苏越秀融资租赁董事、总经理，南京市鼓楼区政协委员。深耕绿色融资租赁行业十余年，聚焦光伏、风电、储能、数字能源等赛道。牵头设立江苏越秀租赁并完成增资，落地百亿级光伏产业合作，区域累计投放规模可观。统筹集团全国绿色租赁产品研发、风控体系搭建，多次出席陆家嘴金融论坛等行业峰会分享绿色金融创新实践，是国内绿色租赁领域资深从业者。

guestVisitList.name: 朱旻琦
guestVisitList.introduce: 现任张江租赁总经理、张江科贷董事长，上海市金融青年联合会第四届委员会委员。近二十年深耕浦东科创金融领域，长期服务生命科学、集成电路、数字信息等核心科创赛道，累计服务科创企业超百家，助力超20家企业登陆科创板及各类资本市场，对科创金融发展与产业赋能有着深刻理解与丰富实践。

name: 星环科技·认知涌现·数据新生人工智能论坛
nameEn: Transwarp Technology "Cognitive Emergence, Data Reborn" AI Forum
desc:
本次论坛以「认知涌现，数据新生」为主题，聚焦 AI 时代数据基础设施革新，汇聚行业专家、生态伙伴与企业代表，共探数据价值释放新路径。
星环科技将发布年度战略级认知数据技术成果，并携手以英伟达为代表的生态伙伴，探讨前沿人工智能与数据库技术的融合方向，共筑智能数据底座。围绕 “数据新生” 理念，论坛将推出新一代 AI 就绪数据能力、全栈国产协同方案及高性能融合数据引擎，展示数据从静态存储到智能活化的突破性进展；在行业实践分享中，结合实际运用案例，为企业数字化转型提供可落地参考，助力产业智能升级。
descEn: This forum, themed "Cognitive Emergence, Data Reborn", explores next-gen data infrastructure innovation in the AI era, gathering industry peers to unlock new data value paths. Transwarp will unveil its key cognitive data innovations and discuss AI-database integration with partners including NVIDIA. It will launch new AI-ready data capabilities, full-stack domestic solutions and high-performance converged engines, showcasing breakthroughs from static to intelligent data. Customer sharing offers practical digital transformation insights to drive industrial upgrading.

name: 壹沓·Agentic AI进场 重塑全球供应链创新论坛
nameEn: OENAIX·AGENTIC AI ENTERS THE GAME - RESHAPING GLOBAL SUPPLY CHAINS
desc:
本次论坛以 “Agentic AI进场 · 重塑全球供应链” 为主题，直面地缘冲突常态化、关键航道中断等挑战，聚焦 AI 智能体进化、自主决策系统、数字员工与供应链超自动化，以及区块链与航贸产业的融合发展方向，旨在赋能航贸产业的数字化、可信化升级，提升全球供应链韧性。
论坛将邀请国内外政府领导、专家、国际组织与全球企业代表，共同探讨 AI 如何赋能全球供应链韧性与效率提升，推动跨境技术交流、生态合作与标准共建，助力构建安全、协同、智能、开放的全球供应链体系。
descEn: With the theme of "AGENTIC AI ENTERS THE GAME - RESHAPING GLOBAL SUPPLY CHAINS", this forum focuses on the large-scale application of AI agents, autonomous decision-making and digital workers in the supply chain. It brings together government, industry, enterprises and ecological partners to share practical cases, best practices and value results. The forum will launch a new-generation supply chain autonomous decision-making agent platform and whitepaper, demonstrate the application effects in documentation, performance, scheduling and settlement, and help enterprises achieve cost reduction.

name: 猿编程·让孩子未来驾驭AI 青少年人工智能教育论坛
nameEn: Youth Artificial Intelligence Education Development Forum
desc:
当AI重构认知边界、重塑成长逻辑，我们诚邀您共赴一场洞见时代、确立育人航向的思想盛会。
猿编程将登陆 2026 世界人工智能大会，重磅启幕「WAIC 2026 青少年AI教育论坛」。大会特邀世界著名未来学家、科技预言家凯文・凯利前瞻时代走向，《最强大脑》科学评审、北京大学心理与认知科学学院教授魏坤琳深挖青少年成长本源，猿编程创始人、清华大学心理与认知科学系AI教育研究中心学术委员会副主任李翊分享AI教育前沿实践，立足全球顶层视野，剖解AI时代教育的根本命题。
本次大会，猿编程将官宣品牌全面焕新，重磅发布以5A素养体系为内核的下一代育人范式，搭建贯通校园普惠课堂、家庭长效培育的全域AI教育体系，
descEn:
When AI reconstructs cognitive boundaries and reshapes the logic of growth, we sincerely invite you to an ideological event to understand the times and establish the direction of education.

Ape programming will be launched at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, with a grand opening of the "WAIC 2026 Youth AI Education Forum". The conference specially invited Kevin Kelly, a world-famous futurist and science and technology prophet, to look forward to the trend of the times. Wei Kunlin, a scientific reviewer of "The Strongest Brain", a professor of the School of Psychological and Cognitive Sciences of Peking University, to dig deep into the origin of the growth of adolescents, the founder of ape programming, and an academic committee member of the AI Education Research Centre of the Department of Psychology and Cognitive Science of Tsinghua University. name: 智算超节点与算电协同论坛
nameEn: Forum on Intelligent Computing Super-nodes and Computing-Power Synergy
desc: 随着AI大模型和大规模算力集群快速发展，智算建设正迈向高密度、兆瓦级、绿色化新阶段。传统机房在散热、供电、互联和电力适配等方面瓶颈显现，行业亟需转向全栈一体化超节点架构，并推进算电协同。Open AI Infra社区联合超聚变等伙伴举办“智算超节点与算电协同论坛”，聚焦超节点技术演进与工程落地，围绕架构迭代、核心硬件突破和协同调度创新展开研讨，助力建设高效节能、自主可控、可调度的GW级AIDC。
descEn:
Driven by the rapid evolution of large-scale AI models and massive computing clusters, the development of intelligent computing infrastructure has entered a new phase characterized by high density, megawatt-scale capacity, and green sustainability. Traditional data center architectures face significant bottlenecks regarding chip performance upgrades, high-density thermal management, high-voltage power delivery, ultra-high-speed interconnect throughput, and flexible power adaptability. The industry urgently needs to shift from simple hardware stacking to a full-stack, integrated "super-node" architecture and implement deep synergy between computing power and the power grid—linking computing resources with the "source-grid-load-storage" dynamics of modern power systems.
The Open AI Infra community, in collaboration with industry partners such as FusionServer, is hosting the Forum on Intelligent Computing Super-nodes and Computing-Power Synergy. The event focuses on the technological evol

name: 中船集团· 智领深蓝 AI+船海产业实景应用论坛
nameEn: CSSC.Green Innovation & Blue Intelligence: Al Real-World Applications in Maritime & Shipbuilding Industry
desc:
“AI 赋能海洋” 是世界人工智能大会（WAIC）专属船海特色分论坛，已连续开办五届，线上线下累计参会超 6000 人次。历经深耕，它已是国内船海智能领域覆盖面广、专业度高、影响力强的高端学术平台，在全球智能船舶行业颇具口碑。
2026 年论坛主题为智领深蓝 AI+船海产业实景应用，规划线下 300 人、线上 5000 余人观会。活动邀约中国工程院院士、国际机构代表、国内外智能船领域专家学者，以及AI行业龙头代表一同分享，整合全球海事智库，搭建海事高水平国际交流平台。
descEn:
The "AI Empowers Ocean" Forum, WAIC’s exclusive ship and marine sub-forum, has run for five years and attracted more than 6,000 online and offline participants. Years of development have made it a prestigious high-end academic platform in China’s intelligent maritime field with widespread global recognition.
Centered on the 2026 theme Leading the Deep Blue:Green Innovation & Blue Intelligence: Al Real-World Applications in Maritime & Shipbuilding Industry, the forum expects 300 on-site attendees and over 5,000 online viewers. It will invite CAE academicians, international institutional representatives, global intelligent shipping experts and leading AI enterprises to share insights, integrate worldwide maritime think tank resources and build a high-level international exchange platform for the maritime industry.

name: 中国联通·模数同频 智造共振AI赋能新型工业化发展论坛
nameEn: Synchronizing Models & Data, Resonating Smart Manufacturing: AI Empowering New Industrialization Forum
desc: 人工智能与实体经济深度融合已进入规模化落地关键期，模型与数据协同互促成为驱动工业变革的核心引擎。为深入贯彻国家工信部等八部门“人工智能+制造”专项行动，推动“模数共振”行动走深走实，在上海市经济信息化委的支持下，中国联通将举办"模数同频 智造共振"AI赋能新型工业化发展论坛，围绕“模数共振”行动部署、工业智能前沿趋势、智能制造场景落地等核心议题深度对话，并重磅发布上海市及中国联通在“AI+制造”领域的最新成果，共探人工智能与制造业融合发展新路径，共启工业智能新未来。
descEn:
The deep integration of AI with the real economy has reached a critical phase of large-scale implementation, with model-data synergy emerging as the core engine for industrial transformation.
To implement the national "AI + Manufacturing" initiative and advance the "Model-Data Resonance" campaign, China Unicom, supported by the Shanghai Municipal Commission of Economy and Informatization, will host the Forum on AI Empowering the New Industrialization.
The forum will feature in-depth dialogues on the campaign's deployment, cutting-edge trends in industrial intelligence, and practical smart manufacturing scenarios. It will also showcase the latest achievements of Shanghai and China Unicom in "AI + Manufacturing." Join us to explore new pathways for integrating AI with manufacturing and to usher in a new era of industrial intelligence.

name: 中国年度AI人物·巅峰对话
nameEn: China Annual AI Figures · Summit Dialogue
addr: 上海市徐汇区龙腾大道2350号西岸穹顶艺术中心
addrEn: WEST BUND DOME,No. 2350 Longteng Avenue, Xuhui District, Shanghai
desc: “中国年度AI人物·巅峰对话”是中央广播电视总台《2026中国·AI盛典》的核心品牌活动，于2026世界人工智能大会期间在上海西岸穹顶艺术中心举办。作为中国AI领域最具公信力与影响力的年度思想盛会之一，活动依托“2026年度AI人物”推选体系，汇聚多位AI领域院士专家及“年度AI人物”，围绕开源生态构建、产业深度融合、科学前沿探索等维度展开深度对话。活动旨在搭建一个政产学研跨界交流的高端平台，以思想碰撞激发行业共识，以年度人物树立行业标杆，为推动“人工智能+”行动走深走实贡献智慧力量。
descEn: “China Annual AI Figures · Summit Dialogue” is the flagship event of CMG“2026 China AI Gala”. It will take place at the West Bund Dome Art Center in Shanghai during the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). As one of the most credible and influential annual thought-leadership gatherings in China’s AI sector, the event is built upon the “2026 Annual AI Figures” selection system. It brings together distinguished academicians, experts, and the selected “Annual AI Figures” for in-depth dialogues across three key dimensions: open-source ecosystem development, deep industry integration, and frontier scientific exploration. The Summit aims to forge a high-end cross-sector platform bridging government, industry, academia, and research — sparking industry-wide consensus through intellectual exchange, setting benchmarks through its annual honorees, and contributing strategic insights to drive the solid and substantive advancement of the “AI+” initiative.

name: 中国政法大学&联合国教科文组织·人工智能规则全球对话与协同发展论坛
nameEn: Global Al Policy Dialogue and Collaboration Development Forum
desc: “人工智能规则全球对话与协同发展”论坛是2026世界人工智能大会官方核心分论坛，在中华人民共和国司法部的指导下，由中国政法大学与联合国教科文组织联合主办，将于2026年7月17日下午举行。论坛期间拟发布“全球人工智能治理规则地图2.0”“AI Governance Compass平台”、《全球人工智能产品隐私合规报告》《中国人工智能法治实践报告（2026）》等成果。依托世界人工智能大会这一国际交流平台，论坛致力于汇聚全球人工智能治理领域多方智慧，深化人工智能规则国际对话与交流合作，推动全球人工智能治理规则协同发展。
descEn: The Global Al Policy Dialogue and Collaboration Development Forum is the official core sub-forum of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference（WAIC）. Under the guidance and support of the Ministry of Justice of the People's Republic of China, it is jointly organized by China University of Political Science and Law and UNESCO and will be held on the afternoon of July 17,2026. During the forum, outcomes such as the Global AI Governance Rule Map 2.0, AI Governance Compass Platform, Global White Paper on Privacy Compliance of AI Products and China AI Law and Governance Practice Report (2026) are scheduled to be released. Leveraging 2026 WAIC as an international exchange platform, the forum aims to gather expertise from various stakeholders in global AI governance, deepen international dialogue and collaboration on AI rules, and promote coordinated development of global AI governance frameworks.

name: 中金公司· 共建全球科技金融伙伴新生态投融资论坛
nameEn: Co-creating a New Global Ecosystem for Technology–Finance Partnerships- CICC Investment and Financing  Forum
desc: 当前人工智能（AI）作为新一轮通用技术革命的重要引擎，正加速从技术突破走向产业应用。推动AI开放合作，关键在于携手全球AI产业伙伴，促进技术、产业、资本和市场高效连接，让智能技术转化为更广泛的产业生产力。随着AI技术扩散，研发投入、应用落地、跨境合作、并购整合、风险管理等金融需求不断涌现，科技金融将成为支撑AI企业成长和产业生态发展的重要力量。本次论坛将邀请产业、金融、科技企业及国际合作伙伴代表，共同探讨金融机构如何发挥产业伙伴连接者、长期资本配置者、企业成长陪伴者、风险管理专家和国际合作桥梁作用，为科技型企业提供全链条、全生命周期金融服务，共同推动智能技术扩散和产业高质量发展。
descEn: As a core engine of the new general technological revolution, AI is rapidly shifting from technological breakthrough to industrial application.To advance open AI cooperation, we must work with global industry partners to connect technology,industry,capital and markets efficiently,turning smart technologies into broader industrial productivity.With the proliferation of AI, growing financial demands have emerged in R&D,commercialization, cross-border cooperation,M&A and risk management.Tech finance has therefore become a key force supporting AI enterprises and industrial ecosystem development.This forum brings together representatives from industry,finance,tech sectors and global partners to explore how financial institutions can act as industrial connector,long-term capital allocator,growth companion,risk management expert and international cooperation bridge and jointly promote AI diffusion and high-quality industrial development.

guestVisitList.name: 朱政
guestVisitList.introduce: 朱政，极佳视界联合创始人、首席科学家，智源青年学者，主导和深度参与融资超30亿元，公司估值超100亿元。2019年博士毕业于中国科学院自动化研究所；2019年至2021年在清华大学自动化系从事博士后研究。在TPAMI、 CVPR、ICCV、 ECCV、NeurIPS 等顶级期刊和会议上发表论文70余篇，文章总引用20000余次 (Google Citations)，连续4年入选全球前2%顶尖科学家榜单。获得2025年吴文俊人工智能自然科学一等奖、PRCV2025最佳学生论文奖、CCF杰出论文奖、魔搭社区具身智能先锋人物、南方周末年度科创力人物等荣誉。代表作SiamRPN和DaSiamRPN是深度学习时代最具影响力的目标跟踪算法之一，开辟了区域候选孪生网络目标跟踪的研究方向，分别被引用3600余次和1800余次，并被集成进OpenCV；BEVDet是BEV感知领域的代表性算法，被多家车企和自动驾驶公司3D感知方案所采用，累计被引用1200余次；WebFace260M是全球最大的人脸识别数据集，被500余家科研机构申请使用，DriveDreamer世界模型入选ECCV最具影响力论文榜单；GigaBrain和GigaWorld系列工作在RoboChallenge、WorldArena、RoboCasa365榜单上排名第一。曾获NIST-FRVT、COCO、VOT等顶级视觉竞赛冠军，多次在CVPR、ICCV上组织Workshop和比赛，多次担任ICLR、NeurIPS、AAAI的领域主席。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Zheng Zhu is currently the Co-founder and Chief Scientist at GigaAI. During 2019-2021, he was a post-doc fellow at Tsinghua University. Before that, he received Ph.D. degree from Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences in 2019. During 2016-2019, he was research interns at SenseTime, Horizon Robotics, and DeepGlint. He has co-authored more than 70 top journal and conference papers mainly on computer vision and robotics problems, such as world model, AIGC, autonomous driving, face recognition, and visual tracking. He has more than 20,000 Google Scholar citations to his work, including SiamRPN (3,600+ citations), DaSiamRPN (1,800+ citations) and BEVDet (1,200+ citations). His work DaSiamRPN is included in famous OpenCV Library. He was recognised as one of the Top 2% Scientists Worldwide by Stanford University (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025). He won the Best Student Paper Award and CCF Outstanding Paper Award in PRCV 2025 (CCF-C Conference). He ranked the 1st on NIST-FRVT Masked Face Recognition, won the COCO Keypoint Detection Challenge in ECCV 2020 and Visual Object Tracking (VOT) Real-Time Challenge in ECCV 2018. He was the Area Chair of ICLR 2026 and Senior Program Committee of AAAI 2026.

guestVisitList.name: 乔·韦曼
guestVisitList.introduce: 乔・韦曼，知名 AI 与云计算战略专家、云经济学奠基人、美国未来产业研究院创始人，拥有康奈尔大学与威斯康星大学硕士学位。深耕 ICT 行业三十余年，先后任职贝尔实验室、AT&T、惠普等头部科技企业高管。首创云经济学、雾经济学理论，著有《云经济学》等多部 Wiley 全球重磅专著，担任 IEEE 权威期刊专栏主编，在 SCI 源刊发表多篇学术论文，手握 27 项国际技术专利。常年受聘全球头部科技企业战略顾问，受邀在六大洲四百余场行业峰会担任主讲嘉宾。
guestVisitList.introduceEn: Joe Weinman is a distinguished expert in AI and cloud strategy, the father of Cloudonomics and founder of the International Institute of Future Industries. He holds degrees from Cornell University and the University of Wisconsin‑Madison. With over 30 years’ senior management experience at Bell Labs, AT&T and HP, he pioneered core theories of Cloudonomics and Fogonomics. As a bestselling Wiley author, he has published influential monographs including Cloudonomics. He served as column editor for IEEE’s SCI-indexed journal and has published numerous academic papers, alongside 27 global patents. He works as strategic advisor for worldwide leading tech firms and has delivered keynote speeches at more than 450 conferences across six continents.

name: 中科闻歌·迈向决策智能的技术与应用探索
nameEn: Wenge Tech·Technology and Application Explorations on the Path to Decision Intelligence
desc:
当前，人工智能正从“生成内容”走向“驱动决策”的关键阶段。以大模型为代表的生成式AI，在企业与政府核心业务场景中，仍面临“不可控、不可解释、难落地”的关键瓶颈。真正决定AI价值上限的，不再是模型能力本身，而是其能否进入复杂业务流程，参与并优化关键决策。
在此背景下，“决策智能”成为AI产业的新范式。它强调将数据、知识、模型与行动进行系统性整合，通过推理、规划与多智能体协同，使AI从“辅助分析工具”升级为“决策基础设施”。
论坛将通过主题演讲、圆桌对话与真实案例发布，呈现决策智能在实际业务中的应用路径与商业价值，推动AI从“技术能力”走向“生产力系统”
descEn: Currently, artificial intelligence (AI) is at a critical stage of transitioning from "generating content" to "driving decision-making." Generative AI, represented by large-scale models, still faces key bottlenecks in core business scenarios for enterprises and governments, namely "uncontrollability, unexplainability, and difficulty in implementation." What truly determines the upper limit of AI's value is no longer the model's capabilities themselves, but rather its ability to integrate into complex business processes and participate in and optimize key decisions.

guestVisitList.name: 王磊
guestVisitList.introduce:
磊博士个人介绍

王磊，博士，发改委博士后，北京市政协委员、中国科学院自动化研究所研究员、中国科学院孵化企业北京中科闻歌科技股份有限公司董事长、创始人。王磊多年从事安全信息学、决策智能和社会计算的研究，作为技术负责人承担国家级和省部项目总经费超过2亿元，发表国际学术期刊和会议论文20余篇，申请发明专利53项，相关成果获北京市科技进步奖、吴文俊人工智能科技奖创新奖、中国电子学会科技奖、公安部科技进步奖、中国自动化学会科技进步奖等，获评团中央全国青年岗位能手、海英人才。2017年创立中科闻歌并担任董事长，致力于成为全球领先的人工智能认知与决策技术企业，公司获“科技冬奥”、科技创新2030“新一代人工智能”、中科院弘光专项等重大专项支持，入选工信部赛迪智库中国AI企业TOP20，福布斯中国AI企业TOP50，获北京市人工智能行业大模型创新应用大赛金融、文化赛道第一、中科院科创企业先锋榜单人工智能赛道第一、北京市智慧广电重点实验室、博士后科研工作站、王选新闻科学技术一等奖、世界人工智能大会创新大赛AIWIN第一名等多个奖项。
带领科研团队牵头研发了面向多模态大数据技术与产品体系，推出了“天湖”“闻海”“红旗”“雅意大模型”等具有标杆示范意义的数据智能产品，其中：“闻海”数据操作系统，服务新华社、央视总台、人民日报、中宣部、冬奥组委会等多家重要部门，可处理42个语种数据，是数据量最大和覆盖面最广的开源数据平台之一；“天湖”大数据智算平台解决了跨源和跨模态的数据融合问题，形成了大数据感知、认知、决策的产品矩阵，包含数据智能组件130余项，算法3000余个，自主知识产权的专利技术32项，技术测评9项居于国内领先，应用于海关总署、税务总局和新华社等数十家单位大数据平台建设；“红旗”融媒体平台面向国家媒体融合的战略需求，推出了覆盖媒体全链条的智媒体操作系统，成功推广到21个省，覆盖近500个区县，被评价为中国技术和市场领先的融媒体服务商。“雅意大模型”是团队自研和从头预训练的大模型，具有自主知识产权，集成了团队17年数据积累300TB，4万亿token数据，在自然语言理解增强、多模态数据处理、Agent决策方面具有技术特色，在两个评测榜单中斩获全球第一，为企业打造安全可靠的专属大模型，公司产品服务媒宣、安全、金融和城市等领域，长期服务部委级头部客户数十家，政府和中小企业客户超过千余家。
相关成果转化到企业经济效益显著，公司是中国科学院自动化所孵化的人工智能企业排头兵，在媒体、舆情、金融、安全等领域实现了大规模商业化落地，2023年销售收入近3亿元。获国家高新技术企业和国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业称号，得到“科技冬奥”、科技创新2030、中科院“弘光专项”支持，累计获得超过10亿元融资。

王磊，博士，北京市政协委员、发改委国家信息中心博士后，中国科学院自动化研究所研究员、中科院孵化人工智能领军企业中科闻歌董事长、创始人。近二十年从事人工智能和决策智能技术研究，承担国家重点研发项目课题10余项，发表学术论文30余篇，授权发明专利70余项，获北京市科技进步奖、吴文俊人工智能科技奖创新奖、中国自动化学会科技进步奖、中国电子学会科技奖、公安部科技进步奖等奖项，获评全国青年岗位能手、北京市劳动模范，海英人才。
社会任职：北京市人工智能安全与治理研究院副院长，人工智能超级对齐与安全治理北京市重点实验室副主任、北京市政协委员、中关村商会副会长。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Dr. Wang Lei is a postdoctoral fellow at the National Development and Reform Commission, a member of the Beijing Municipal Committee of the Chinese People’s Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC), a researcher at the Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS), and the founder & chairman of Beijing Zhongke Wenge Technology Co., Ltd.—a high-tech enterprise incubated by the Chinese Academy of Sciences.
Dr. Wang has long been engaged in research on security informatics, decision-making intelligence, and social computing. As a technical principal, he has led national and provincial-level projects with a total funding of over 200 million RMB. He has published more than 20 international academic journal and conference papers, and applied for 53 invention patents. His research achievements have been honored with numerous awards, including the Beijing Science and Technology Progress Award, the Wu Wenjun Artificial Intelligence Science and Technology Innovation Award, the Science and Technology Award of the Chinese Institute of Electronics, the Science and Technology Progress Award of the Ministry of Public Security, and the Science and Technology Progress Award of the Chinese Association of Automation. He has also been recognized as a National Outstanding Young Professional by the Central Committee of the Communist Youth League and a Haiying Talent of Beijing.
In 2017, Dr. Wang founded Zhongke Wenge and has served as its chairman ever since, committing the company to becoming a world-leading enterprise in artificial intelligence cognition and decision-making technologies. The company has been supported by major national programs including the Tech Winter Olympics, the National Key R&D Program of China—Next Generation Artificial Intelligence (2030), and the CAS Hongguang Special Project. It has been ranked among the Top 20 Chinese AI Enterprises by CCID Consulting, Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, and the Top 50 Chinese AI Enterprises by Forbes China. It has won first prizes in the finance and culture tracks of the Beijing Artificial Intelligence Industry Large Model Innovation and Application Competition, first place in the artificial intelligence track of the CAS Science and Technology Innovation Enterprise Pioneer List, and many other honors including the First Prize of Wang Xuan News Science and Technology Award, the AIWIN Championship at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference Innovation Competition. It also houses a Beijing Key Laboratory of Smart Radio & Television and a Postdoctoral Research Station.
Dr. Wang leads the R&D team to develop a full product system for multimodal big data technologies, launching benchmark data intelligence products including Tianhu, Wenhai, Hongqi, and the Yayi Large Model:
Wenhai Data Operating System serves Xinhua News Agency, CCTV, People’s Daily, the Publicity Department of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, the Beijing Winter Olympics Organizing Committee and other key institutions. It supports 42 languages and is among the open-source data platforms with the largest data volume and broadest coverage.
Tianhu Big Data Intelligent Computing Platform resolves cross-source and cross-modal data fusion, forming a product matrix covering big data perception, cognition and decision-making, with more than 130 data intelligence components, over 3,000 algorithms and 32 patented technologies with independent intellectual property rights. Nine of its technical evaluations rank leading domestically, and it has been applied to big data platform construction for dozens of authorities including the General Administration of Customs, the State Taxation Administration and Xinhua News Agency.
Hongqi Media Convergence Platform addresses the national strategic demand for media integration, providing an intelligent media operating system covering the entire media chain. It has been deployed in 21 provinces and nearly 500 districts and counties, establishing the company as a leading provider of media convergence solutions in China in both technology and market share.
Yayi Large Model is an independently developed and fully pre-trained large model with proprietary intellectual property rights. It integrates 17 years of data accumulation (300TB, 4 trillion tokens) and features strengths in enhanced natural language understanding, multimodal data processing and agent-based decision-making. It has achieved first place globally in two authoritative benchmarks, providing secure and reliable dedicated large models for enterprises.
The company’s products serve sectors including media and publicity, public security, finance and smart cities, with long-term partnerships with dozens of ministerial-level clients and over 1,000 government and SME customers.
The commercialization of these achievements has delivered strong economic returns. As a flagship AI enterprise incubated by the Institute of Automation, CAS, Zhongke Wenge has realized large-scale commercial deployment in media, public opinion, finance and security fields, with sales revenue approaching 300 million RMB in 2023. The company is certified as a National High-Tech Enterprise and a National Specialized, Sophisticated, Unique, and New "Little Giant" Enterprise. Backed by the Tech Winter Olympics, National Key R&D Program 2030 and CAS Hongguang Special Project, it has accumulated over 1 billion RMB in financing.
Brief Profile
Dr. Wang Lei is a postdoctoral fellow at the National Information Center, National Development and Reform Commission, a researcher at the Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences, and the founder & chairman of Zhongke Wenge—a leading AI enterprise incubated by CAS. With nearly 20 years of research in artificial intelligence and decision-making intelligence, he has presided over more than 10 national key R&D projects, published over 30 academic papers and been granted more than 70 invention patents.
He has received awards including the Beijing Science and Technology Progress Award, Wu Wenjun Artificial Intelligence Science and Technology Innovation Award, Science and Technology Progress Award of the Chinese Association of Automation, Science and Technology Award of the Chinese Institute of Electronics, and Science and Technology Progress Award of the Ministry of Public Security. He has been honored as a National Outstanding Young Professional, Beijing Model Worker and Haiying Talent.
Social Positions
Vice President, Beijing Artificial Intelligence Safety and Governance Research Institute
Deputy Director, Beijing Key Laboratory of Artificial Intelligence Super-Alignments and Safety Governance
Member, Beijing Municipal Committee of the Chinese People’s Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC)
Vice President, Zhongguancun Chamber of Commerce

name: 欧莱雅集团 · AI向美论坛
nameEn: L’Oréal Groupe · AI for Beauty Forum
desc: 2026年7月19日下午14:15—16:00，欧莱雅将在世界人工智能大会（WAIC）Future Tech舞台呈现一场 “AI向美”主题活动。活动融合大咖主旨演讲、战略合作签约、黑客松赛事发布,并呈现首个特别论坛秀，汇聚各领域嘉宾，从消费者、组织与社会三个维度，共同探讨AI如何真正服务于人、成就于美，展现欧莱雅在“AI向美”理念下人与AI的双向奔赴，以及欧莱雅全球创新成果与中国独特科技生态相融合的美之历程，生动诠释“‘美’一程，有你有AI”欧莱雅参展主题。
descEn: On July 19, 2026, from 2:15 PM to 4:00 PM, L'Oréal will host a event titled “AI For Beauty” on the Future Tech stage at WAIC. Featuring keynote speeches, partnership signing, the launch of the 2nd Beauty Techathon and the first-ever special panel, bringing together distinguished speakers from across industries, decoding “AI for Beauty” across consumers, métier + employees and society: How technology serves humanity and elevates beauty. The event highlighs a journey that fusing L'Oréal’s global breakthroughs with China’s unique tech landscape, bringing a deeper emphasis on human warmth and empathy, bringing to life the theme “AI Powered Beauty Odyssey”.

name: AI驱动经济前沿与全球协同论坛
nameEn: Seminar on Fostering Economic Innovation and Global Collaboration through AI
desc: 旨在探讨香港及粤港澳大湾区在加速人工智能产业化与全球化规模应用中的核心角色 。立足于香港连接内地技术创新与全球市场的“超级联系人”定位，研讨会将深度展示如何利用区域协同效应与国际化平台，将前沿AI技术转化为可落地、可复制的实际商业价值，赋能两地企业共同创新，合力布局全球人工智能产业市场。
descEn: This seminar aims to explore the important role of Hong Kong and the Greater Bay Area (GBA) in accelerating the industrialization and global scaling of artificial intelligence. Positioned as a "superconnector" bridging mainland technological prowess with global markets, the seminar will highlight how regional synergy and internationalized platforms can transform cutting-edge AI innovations into scalable, real-world business value.  Through these high-level dialogues, the seminar seeks to demonstrate how the integration of tech innovation, robust professional frameworks, and capital markets can foster a sustainable, globally competitive AI ecosystem.

name: 记忆张量·从一次性 Agent 到记忆原生智能时代论坛
nameEn: Build with Memory, From One-off Agents to Memory-Native Intelligence
desc:
本论坛聚焦 AI Agent、AI 终端、AI PC、企业智能体、工业 AI 与通用基座模型在长期运行过程中面临的记忆、状态管理与持续学习问题。随着人工智能从单轮问答和内容生成逐步走向长期任务执行、跨场景协作和自主决策，如何让 AI 具备持续理解用户、积累经验、保持状态一致性以及可治理演化的能力，正在成为产业发展的关键议题。

论坛将从 MemOS 记忆操作系统层出发，探讨长期记忆如何支撑 AI 从一次性生成走向长期智能，并连接终端、算力、企业场景、学术研究与开源生态，共同讨论记忆生产、状态管理、经验沉淀、偏好建模和治理能力如何成为下一代 AI 基础设施的重要组成部分。
descEn:
Under the theme “Build with Memory: From One-off Agents to Memory-Native Intelligence,” this forum explores how long-term memory and state management are becoming key capabilities for next-generation AI systems.

As AI evolves from single-turn generation to Agents, AI devices and enterprise intelligence, the industry faces a new challenge: enabling AI to retain context, accumulate experience and operate continuously over time.

Centered on MemOS as a system-level memory infrastructure, the forum will bring together experts from industry, academia and the open-source community to discuss long-term memory, Agentic AI, AI terminals and memory-native foundation model paradigms, and explore how memory can support the transition from one-off intelligence to long-term intelligence.

guestVisitList.name: 严骏驰
guestVisitList.introduce: 严骏驰，上海交通大学人工智能学院教授、博士生导师，现任上海交通大学人工智能教育部重点实验室主任助理。他曾任职于IBM研究院（首席研究员）和亚马逊（高级顾问）累计10年，是CCF全国优秀博士学位论文奖获得者。严骏驰的主要研究领域包括机器学习、图神经网络、组合优化及科学智能（AI for Science）。他担任ICML理事会成员（中国大陆首位）、ACM Multimedia 2026程序共同主席等多个国际顶级会议和期刊的重要职务。其学术成果丰硕，论文被引用超过4万次，入选爱思唯尔中国高被引学者榜单，并荣获IEEE计算智能学会杰出青年奖（2026）、IEEE CS AI's 10 to Watch等国际荣誉。

guestVisitList.name: 熊飞宇
guestVisitList.introduce:
熊飞宇，美国 Drexel University 博士，现任记忆张量（上海）科技有限公司创始人兼CEO、上海算法创新研究院大模型中心负责人。曾任阿里巴巴集团业务中台数据智能负责人及淘宝天猫数据平台负责人，主导构建了国内首个千亿级数字商业知识图谱和零售行业知识交互大模型，相关成果荣获浙江省科技进步奖等多项荣誉，并在多个顶级AI会议与期刊发表多篇论文。
 
2024年11月，创立记忆张量（上海）科技有限公司，长期致力于人工智能基础理论与系统性创新。带领公司率先提出并落地具有中国特色的大模型发展路径（PlanB），成功构建“低成本、低幻觉、高性能”的大模型核心技术体系。

guestVisitList.name: 李辉
guestVisitList.introduce: 联想集团 CTO 组织 CTO 办公室 技术战略与平台主任研究员、副高级工程师。 长期深耕多模态理解、个性化 AI 与人机交互等方向，主导多项核心技术在集团产品线规模化落地。曾任摩托罗拉、诺基亚系统架构师，拥有丰富的全球化研发与技术管理经验。先后两次荣获“吴文俊人工智能科学技术奖”科技进步奖二等奖（2021、2026），并在 ICDAR、ICPR、PRCV 等国际权威赛事中斩获十余项冠军。累计获得授权发明专利 60 余项，连续三年荣获联想“最有价值专利（MVP）奖”。其主导研发的多项 AI 技术已在联想超过 2,000 万台设备上实现规模化应用，对智能终端创新与 AI 技术普及产生了重要影响。

guestVisitList.name: 高仲
guestVisitList.introduce: 高仲，华为计算首席专家，负责华为计算产品、解决方案与生态规划。曾长期任职于英特尔、谷歌、摩托罗拉等世界顶级科技企业，从事半导体芯片、云计算、人工智能解决方案研发与架构设计相关工作；企业工作之余，学术领域目前是中国计算机学会会员，担任分布式计算与体系结构专委委员，多次参与国内外前沿科技相关学术研究交流与碰撞。

name: 科学智能开放论坛
nameEn: AI for Science Discovery Forum
desc: 过去十年，科学界把 AI 当作工具——跑数据、做拟合、加速计算。今天，AI 正在走出“工具”角色，成为科研的“基础设施”与“合伙人”。由复旦大学与上海科学智能研究院联合主办的 WAIC 2026科学智能开放论坛，以“AI 原生·闭环发现”为主题,将汇聚诺贝尔化学奖得主、图灵奖得主、中外院士、大学校长与产业领袖,以四场主旨演讲、一场巅峰对话、重磅技术发布和学术期刊发布，共同探讨和回答一个核心命题：当 AI 从一开始就内嵌于科学问题的提出、设计、实验、验证与迭代，科学发现将不再是线性、单点的，而是闭环的、自驱的、可累积的。
descEn: Over the past decade, the scientific community has treated AI as a tool — to crunch data, fit curves, accelerate computation. Today, AI is moving beyond its role as a tool, becoming the infrastructure and research partner of science itself. Jointly hosted by Fudan University and the Shanghai Academy of AI for Science, the 2026 WAIC Forum on Scientific Intelligence convenes under the theme "AI-Native · Closed-Loop Discovery." Bringing together Nobel Laureate in Chemistry, a Turing Award laureate, and academicians and industry leaders from China and abroad, the Forum will address — through four keynote addresses, one live podcast dialogue, and a series of major technology launches — one central question: When AI is embedded from the very outset into how scientific questions are posed, designed, experimented, validated, and iterated, scientific discovery ceases to be linear and isolated. It becomes closed-loop, self-driven, and cumulative.

name: 共赢金砖论坛
nameEn: Win-Win BRICS
desc: 中国—金砖国家人工智能发展与合作中心紧扣国家总体外交战略和全球发展态势，依托世界人工智能大会，持续打造“共赢金砖”品牌，着力构建开放、包容、稳固的全球人工智能治理高端对话平台。论坛以“从共识到实践：让人工智能成为造福全人类的国际公共产品”为主题，围绕公共产品、创新应用与全球生态三大关键维度，广泛凝聚国际共识，推动我国同金砖国家及全球南方国家人工智能领域合作不断走深走实，将人工智能合作嵌入人类命运共同体实践，为构建包容普惠的人工智能生态贡献“金砖智慧”和“中国方案”。
descEn: In line with China’s diplomatic strategy and global trends, the China–BRICS AI Development and Cooperation Center, through the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), has cultivated the "Win-Win BRICS" brand and built an open, inclusive, and robust high-level platform for global AI governance. The forum, themed "From Consensus to Practice: Making Artificial Intelligence an International Public Good for the Benefit of All Humanity," will focus on three key dimensions: public goods, innovative applications, and the global ecosystem. It aims to build broad international consensus, deepen practical cooperation between China, BRICS countries, and Global South countries in the field of artificial intelligence, embed AI cooperation into the practice of building a community with a shared future for humanity, and contribute BRICS wisdom and Chinese solutions to the development of an inclusive and universally beneficial AI ecosystem.

guestVisitList.introduce: 联合国工业发展组织（UNIDO）数字化转型与人工智能司司长、首席人工智能创新与数字官。统筹联合国工发组织人工智能、数字化转型、创新领域全部项目规划实施，聚焦全球数字经济普惠可持续发展，牵头推进《全球数字契约》目标二相关落地工作，致力于推动包容、普惠、可持续的全球数字化转型。入职工发组织后，历任信息技术、战略财务、业务转型、传播部门负责人，主导组织整体数字化升级方案落地；入职前深耕英国公共部门财务咨询，曾任大型跨国企业财务负责人，为特许管理会计师，持有工商管理硕士学位。
guestVisitList.introduceEn:
Chief, Division for Digital Transformation and Artificial Intelligence / Chief of AI, Innovation and Digital Officer, United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO)
He oversees all UNIDO projects and programmes on artificial intelligence, digital transformation and innovation with a strong focus on the global digital economy. He co-leads delivery work under Objective 2 of the Global Digital Compact, advancing inclusive and sustainable digital transition worldwide.
Previously as Digital and Innovation Officer of UNIDO, he steered the organization-wide digital transformation initiative and innovative solution development. He has headed UNIDO’s departments covering IT, strategic financial management, business transformation and communications. Prior to joining UNIDO, he led financial management consulting for the UK public sector and worked as finance lead at a large multinational corporation. He is a Chartered Management Accountant and holds an MBA.

descEn:
On the afternoon of July 17, the WAIC 2026 Scientific Frontier Forum will be held at the Shanghai AI Laboratory New Campus in Shanghai.
Under the theme "Advancing Intelligence, Exploring the Frontiers", the Forum will bring together leading AI researchers, distinguished scientists, and industry pioneers from around the world for high-level dialogue on the latest advances and future directions of artificial intelligence.

name: 青少年人工智能创新发展论坛
nameEn: Youth AI Innovation and Development Forum
desc: 2026年世界人工智能大会青少年人工智能创新发展论坛延续“人工智能从娃娃抓起”宗旨，呼应大会“智能伙伴 共创未来”主题，以“AI向善·少年有为——从学习AI到共创美好生活”为主线，面向青少年搭建感知前沿科技、对话专家学者、展示创新实践的平台。论坛将发布科普读本新成果，呈现“科普读本—兴趣课程—赛事活动—展示平台”四位一体教育生态，组织青少年TED秀、专家对话、AI学习伙伴分享、AI使用倡议和AI共创任务榜，引导青少年理解AI、用好AI、善用AI。
descEn: The 2026 Youth AI Innovation and Development Forum of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference continues the mission of “Nurturing AI literacy from Childhood” and echoes the WAIC theme “Intelligent Partners, Co-creating the Future.” Under the theme “AI for Good, Youth in Action: From Learning AI to Co-creating a Better Life,” the forum provides a youth-centered platform for exploring frontier technologies, engaging with experts, and showcasing innovative practices. It will feature the release of new AI popular science publications, a four-in-one youth AI education ecosystem, youth TED-style talks, expert dialogues, a sharing session on AI as a learning partner, an initiative on AI use, and a Youth AI Co-creation Task Board, guiding young people to understand, use, and apply AI responsibly.

name: 紫琅智谷·智能时代，智谷作答：AI产业生态发布会
nameEn: Zilang AI Valley: An Ecosystem That Answers the Call of the Intelligent Era
desc: 当智能时代提出新的命题，谁来作答？南通创新区紫琅智谷以45分钟品牌专场，交出一份AI产业生态的实践答卷。从1月生态大会到5月创新营，从6月复赛路演到7月WAIC主场签约，紫琅智谷正为AI超级个体铺设一条“从紫琅湖到世界舞台”的加速通道。本场活动将全景呈现紫琅智谷生态成果，邀请OPC创业者站上讲台讲述真实创业故事，发布“人工智能+”场景清单2.0及专项政策工具，举行落地项目签约与生态伙伴授牌仪式。我们邀请全球AI创业者、投资机构与产业伙伴共同见证——在长三角AI创业版图上，紫琅智谷正在成为那个最懂AI创业的答案。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有17日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn: As the intelligent era raises new questions, who will step forward to answer them? Zilang AI Valley, Nantong Innovation Distract, presents its response in this 45-minute dedicated session — a showcase of an AI industry ecosystem built for the next generation of founders. From the OPC  Ecosystem Conference in January to the Innovation Camp in May, from the regional semi-finals in June to the signing ceremony on the WAIC main stage in July, Zilang AI Valley has been paving an accelerated pathway for AI "super individuals" — connecting the shores of Zilang Lake to the global stage. This session will unveil the Valley's annual ecosystem milestones, invite OPC entrepreneurs to share their real startup stories on stage, release the upgraded "AI+" Open Scenario List 2.0 along with key policy tools, and witness the signing of new landing projects and the accreditation of ecosystem partners. We invite AI founders, investors, and industry partners to join us.

name: WAIC After Hours——AI企业全球成长对话
nameEn: WAIC After Hours: From AI Innovation to Global Growth
desc:
AI正在重塑世界，也重新定义企业的全球成长路径。从迈出海外市场第一步，到连接全球客户与产业生态，再到企业与创始人的共同成长，全球化已不仅是业务拓展，更是企业长期发展的重要命题。

WAIC After Hours 是渣打银行打造的一场轻松开放的 Talk Show。三位渣打全球业务专家将围绕AI企业全球成长的关键议题，分享跨境发展、全球生态连接，以及企业家财富规划等实践与思考，共同探讨AI企业如何实现全球成长，陪伴企业与企业家迈向下一阶段的发展。

当技术的讨论告一段落，关于全球成长的对话，才刚刚开始。
【活动在世博展览馆H4展区舞台，有当日展览票即可参与】
descEn:
AI is reshaping industries and redefining the path to global growth. From expanding into new markets and building global ecosystems to supporting founders through the next stage of success, growth today goes far beyond technology.

WAIC After Hours is a talk show presented by Standard Chartered, bringing together three business leaders to explore the journey of AI companies—from international expansion and ecosystem building to founders’ wealth planning and long-term growth. Together, they will share insights on how innovation can be transformed into sustainable global success.
【Venue Note: Pioneer Stage, Hall H4, World Expo Exhibition & Convention Center. Admission is free with a valid exhibition ticket for the day.】

name: WAIC·思想者论坛 俞勇专场
nameEn: WAIC Thought Leaders Forum Prof.YuYong
desc: 人工智能时代，真正决定未来的不是技术，而是能够创造技术的人。上海交通大学ACM班创始人、著名计算机教育家俞勇教授，将结合四十余年教育实践，分享人才培养的第一性原理。俞勇教授始终坚持”培养计算机科学家，而非仅培养程序员”的理念，构建科研驱动、实践导向的人才培养体系。ACM班培养了众多活跃于全球AI前沿的青年科学家与产业领军人才，其中谢赛宁与图灵奖得主Yann LeCun共同创立AMI Labs，探索下一代人工智能。众多毕业生活跃于OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Meta、微软、字节跳动等机构，持续推动全球人工智能创新。
descEn:
Artificial intelligence will ultimately be shaped not by technology itself, but by the people who create it. In this keynote, Professor Yu Yong, Founder of the ACM Honors Program at Shanghai Jiao Tong University, shares insights from more than four decades of experience in computer science education, exploring the first principles of talent development in the AI era.
Guided by the philosophy of “cultivating computer scientists rather than merely training programmers,” Professor Yu has built one of China’s most influential talent programs. Its alumni include Saining Xie, who co-founded AMI Labs with Turing Award laureate Yann LeCun, as well as many researchers and engineering leaders at OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Meta, Microsoft, and ByteDance.
This session explores how curiosity, independent thinking, and long-term vision can cultivate the innovators who will shape the future of artificial intelligence.

name: 量坤科技·量超智融合论坛
nameEn: Field Quantum · Quantum-HPC-AI Integration Forum
desc: WAIC 2026 | 量坤科技「量超智融合论坛」——「量」量子算法能力对齐IBM，发布国内首个量子纠错白皮书；「超」自研BP纠错解码器4–12×英伟达，量子计算经典模拟器性能2-4×英伟达；「智」AI4S生成算法国际基准第一，科研智能体全流程自动化。三线融合，重磅发布量启AI Agent——国内首个量子智能体平台，旗下元材智库、fieldqkit（五大云统一SDK）同步亮相。产品将落地生物医药、新材料、锂电、高温超导等应用领域，研发周期缩短70%+。量子计算产业化，量坤正以融合之力，定义新范式。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有19日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn: WAIC 2026 | FieldQuantum's "Quantum-HPC-AI Fusion Forum" — "Quantum": algorithm capabilities on par with IBM, with the release of China's first quantum error correction white paper; "HPC": proprietary BP error correction decoder delivering 4–12× over NVIDIA, classical quantum simulator achieving 2–4× NVIDIA performance; "AI": AI4S generative algorithm ranked #1 on international benchmarks, with fully automated scientific research agents. Three pillars converge in the launch of Qira AI Agent — China's first quantum intelligent agent platform — alongside sub-products Material Hub and fieldqkit (a unified SDK compatible with five major quantum clouds). Deployed across biopharma, advanced materials, lithium batteries, high-temperature superconductors, and more, accelerating R&D cycles by over 70%. Quantum computing is entering the industrial era — and FieldQuantum is defining the new paradigm through the power of convergence.

forumOrgStructureReqs.name: 北京量坤科技有限公司

name: 芯展速·AI90 -FaaS for AI 释放消费级显卡的AI潜能发布会
nameEn: AI90 - FaaS for AI, Unleash the AI Potential of Consumer-Grade GPUs
desc: AI90是芯展速推出的软硬件一体化AI推理加速解决方案，直击行业"内存墙"核心痛点：近二十年GPU算力增长六万倍，而显存容量仅增十六倍，导致GPU有效利用率普遍徘徊在30%至60%之间，即使顶级数据中心级GPU也难以幸免。通过FaaS智能缓存技术，AI90以高性能SSD扩展GPU显存，实现三大突破：首Token延迟提升50倍、吞吐量提升5.1倍、显存节省39%。配合智能P2P多卡互联技术，8卡5090集群加速达5.8倍。支持128K+超长上下文，让消费级硬件即可获得接近企业级数据中心的推理性能，广泛适用于模型开发等场景。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有18日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn:
AI90 is an integrated hardware-software AI inference acceleration solution launched by GENSTORAIGE, directly addressing the industry's core "memory wall" pain point. Over the past two decades, GPU computing power has grown 60,000 times, while VRAM capacity has increased only 16 times, leaving effective GPU utilization generally hovering between 30% and 60% — even top-tier data center GPUs are not spared.
Through its FaaS (Flash for AI Cache) intelligent caching technology, AI90 extends GPU memory with high-performance SSDs, delivering three breakthroughs: 50x faster first-token latency, 5.1x higher throughput, and 39% VRAM savings. Combined with smart P2P multi-GPU interconnect technology, an 8x 5090 cluster achieves 5.8x acceleration.
Supporting 128K+ ultra-long context, AI90 enables consumer-grade hardware to deliver inference performance close to that of enterprise data centers, making it widely suitable for AI model development and other scenarios.

name: 奇富科技·AI Native 重构普惠信贷的安全增长范式论坛
nameEn: AI Native: Reconstructing the Secure Growth Paradigm of Inclusive Credit
desc: 以普惠信贷为场景，提出“金融本质不变，生产系统重构”的核心判断：大模型和智能体并不重新定义金融，而是重构金融理解风险、匹配需求、执行流程与治理责任的方式。本次论坛将从智能风控出发，阐释金融智能体如何由大模型、专业小模型、风控策略、金融知识、业务工具、流程编排和可信治理共同构成，并结合奇富科技的实践，分享金融智能体落地的业务闭环、风险闭环、知识闭环和治理闭环，探讨 AI Native 如何推动普惠信贷实现可控、可审、可持续的安全增长。【⚠️论坛在世博展览馆H4展区内开放舞台，有17日展览入场权限即可参与】
descEn:
Against the backdrop of inclusive credit scenarios, we put forward the core judgment that "the essence of finance remains unchanged, while its production systems are being reconstructed": large models and intelligent agents do not redefine finance, but reshape the way finance understands risks, matches demands, executes processes and fulfills governance responsibilities.
This forum will start from intelligent risk control, elaborate on how financial intelligent agents are jointly constituted by large models, specialized small models, risk control strategies, financial knowledge, business tools, process orchestration and trustworthy governance. Drawing on the practices of Qfin, it will share the business closed loop, risk closed loop, knowledge closed loop and governance closed loop for the implementation of financial intelligent agents, and explore how AI Native can drive inclusive credit to achieve controllable, auditable and sustainable secure growth.

name: 百型智能·新品发布：企业本体与系统协同，开启2B AI应用新范式
nameEn: BaiXyn Forum: Evolve enterprise core with agentic workforce
desc:
企业级AI应用正在经历一场从工具堆砌到系统协同的范式转移。如何让AI应用真正创造价值？百型探讨如何通过构建企业本体（Enterprise Core），打造统一的上下文层与执行原语图谱，打破组织部门墙；并解析如何让AI具备理解因果本体，具备企业战略能力，从“把事做对”到“做对的事”。
结合中国企业出海与跨境B2B增长实践，我们将首次公开百型在160多个国家、百万级海外采购商KP建联中，活跃的1000+智能体如何通过成交场景的强结果信号完成自迭代进化。看站在全球贸易买卖双方中的AI新物种，如何重塑跨境业务链路，带来可复制的规模化增长。【论坛在世博展览馆H4，有18日展览入场权限可参与】
descEn: In 2026, enterprise AI applications are undergoing a paradigm shift from "tool-stacking" to "systemic synergy." How can AI applications truly create value? Baixyn explores how constructing an "Enterprise Ontology"—by building a unified context layer and execution primitive map—shatters organizational silos. We will analyze how to empower AI with the capability to comprehend corporate strategy, moving from "doing things right" to "doing the right things." Grounded in Chinese enterprises' global expansion and cross-border B2B growth practices, we will debut how Baixyn’s 1,000+ active agents across 160+ countries and millions of international buyer engagements achieve self-iterating evolution via strong result signals in transaction scenarios. Witness how this new AI species, positioned between global buyers and sellers, reshapes cross-border workflows to deliver scalable and replicable growth.

name: WAIC UP! 2026青年观察家夜场活动
nameEn: WAIC UP! 2026 Youth Observer Night Event
desc: 作为“WAIC UP! 2026青年观察家·思享会”的夜间延伸单元，我们将白天的理性思辨延续至夜幕之下，打造一个更开放、多元、沉浸式的青年交流场域。白天的议程交给思想碰撞，夜晚则留给体验与连接——在这里，你可以参与“Agent创意风暴”，与虚拟身份组队激发跨界灵感；加入“开发者派对 · AI桌游实战”，在策略博弈中解锁技术社交的新玩法；也能投身“AI公益行动”，聆听3000公里外的火种故事，用科技温暖照进现实。多重视角，一夜交融，让思想在夜色中升温，让连接在共创中发生。
descEn: As the nighttime extension of the "WAIC UP! 2026 Youth Observers · Ideas Share," we carry the day's rational discourse into the night, creating a more open, diverse, and immersive space for youth exchange. The daytime agenda is devoted to intellectual collision, while the night is reserved for experience and connection. Here, you can dive into the "Agent Creative Storm," teaming up with virtual identities to spark cross-boundary inspiration; join the "Developer Party · AI Board Game Battle," where strategic gameplay unlocks new dimensions of tech-social interaction; and take part in the "AI Public Welfare Action," hearing stories of the "spark" carried across 3,000 kilometers, as technology brings warmth to reality. Through multiple perspectives woven into one night, let ideas rise with the evening glow, and let connections flourish through co-creation.

name: 2026中国·AI盛典
nameEn: 2026 China·AI Gala
addr: 上海市徐汇区龙腾大道2350号西岸穹顶艺术中心
addrEn: WEST BUND DOME,No. 2350 Longteng Avenue, Xuhui District, Shanghai
desc: 《2026中国·AI盛典》是由中央广播电视总台、中央网信办、上海市人民政府联合主办，总台央视频、总台上海总站、上海市经信委、上海市徐汇区人民政府共同承办的人工智能产业发展大型主题活动。该活动积极响应国家“人工智能+”行动部署，以“达特茅斯会议70周年”为重要历史契机，立足上海、辐射全国、面向世界，致力于打造集权威发布、国际对话、前沿竞技与创新展示于一体的高规格AI盛会。盛典将汇聚顶尖科学家、产业领袖与技术先锋，重磅揭晓10位“年度AI人物”，树立行业标杆，并通过人机互动、数字人演绎、AIGC创意短片等多个精彩节目，全景式呈现人工智能走进千行百业的无限可能。
descEn: 《2026 China·AI Gala,》jointly organized by CMG, the Cyberspace Administration of China, and the Shanghai Municipal People's Government, and co-hosted by CMG Mobile, CMG Shanghai Headquarters, the Shanghai Commission of Economy and Informatization, and the Xuhui District People's Government of Shanghai, is a premier AI industry event. Responding to the national "AI+" strategy and commemorating the 70th anniversary of the Dartmouth Conference, the Gala, based in Shanghai, aims to be a high-level platform that integrates policy releases, international dialogue, cutting-edge competitions, and innovation showcases. It brings together leading scientists, industry figures, and tech pioneers, announces ten "China Annual AI Figures", and features human‑machine interactions, digital human performances, and AIGC short films, illustrating AI's vast potential across all industries.
